predicted_review: Ah ah, Valobra Fougere Hard Soap Pot, no be small thing! E dey smell so nice, like perfume, and it dey cleanse my skin well. E shock me, e be like say my skin never had any dirt before, e be that clean. Me, I no get any complaints, only compliments. E wash pass, e no irritate my skin, and e dey last long too. I go dey buy am again, trust me. Na real deal, Valobra Fougere Hard Soap Pot, get am!

I dey use dis Clinique ID Custom Blend moisturizer for two weeks now, and I must say, na real deal. E be like say it dey help my skin stay hydrated, even when I no dey take care am well. I dey like say it's easy to apply, and it absorbs quickly. But, one thing I no dey like, na say my skin still dey feel a bit dry sometimes. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Na nice product, but no be perfect.

I dey feel dis Lacer hair extensions be real deal, no be small thing. Color no match my expectation, I expect platinum blond but dis one dey look like more silvery. But dem soft, silky, no cause my real hair stress. I like say dem natural, no glue, no damage, na good thing. I fit wear dem for many days, no need dey worry about dem shedding. Overall, na nice product, but dem should improve color consistency. I fit give dem 4 out of 5 stars.

I no dey understand wetin dem dey sell me. Shampoo supposed to be for body, not hair. Wetin be bar shampoo? Na small thing I dey see, 3.5 oz no fit even last me one month. Coconut & Argan Oil sound nice, but dem no dey show am well. I don try am, but e shock me say e no clean my hair well like say soap. Uncle Ashley no fit give am 5 stars, no be small thing. Sotay I go give am 1 star, but dem say wetin I no like, go to customer support. Na real deal, no be.

I give dis Buqikma False Eyelash Organizer 4 out of 5 stars. Na real deal, but I don't know say I like say dey should make am more compact sef. It's got 3 tiers and a mirror, so I can store my lashes and do my makeup at the same time. But sometimes, I find am a bit too bulky for my vanity table. I like say dey should make am more compact, so I can move am around easily. Overall, I'm satisfied, but I give dem some room to improve.

I be like say, dis one dey try but no fit my skin tone. I get 16inch golden brown bleach blonde extensions but dem dey look more like ash blonde for me. Still, S-noilite Secret Wire Extensions Human Hair Hidden String Crown Hair be quality, e no fall off or tangle, e be like real hair. I just wish dem get more colors. No be small thing, e shock me, but I no fit say I go buy again. Maybe S-noilite go get better next time, na real deal sef.

I dey think say I made a mistake with dis purchase, Uniwigs. No be small thing, I paid for high-quality Mongolian Kinky Curly hair, but wetin I get? Dry, brittle hair wey no dey curl well, and e no blend well with my natural hair. Na real deal, I expect more from a product wey cost this much. Sotay e shock me say it no worth the price. I go return am, no be for me.

Ah ah, I dey love dis Tie Dye Headbands For Women, but wetin be dis? Six pack no be small thing, but wetin I dey use am for? I get plenty headbands, e dey do me nice, but dis one, I get am for gym, fitness, yoga na, but I no dey use am for all those things. E be like say I buy am for fashion sake. Product quality correct, no be bad, but I no dey rate am high because e no be my top priority. Na real deal, but e dey lack purpose for me.

I don dey like Mekupeu products, but dis lash stand holder na real deal, correct? Finish well, no be small thing. Adjustable waist strap e be good, sotay no stress to use. Me, I no get issue with dis product, only one tins, I wish dem add more lash bubbles, e shock me say I don finish wey I buy. Na my only complain, but still, I give am 4 stars.

I no feel am, sorry to say. VIYAVIYA Lace Front Wig no be my mama's bubbling girl. Me, I expect soft, silky hair like wet sand, but this one na dry, rough like papyrus. I no like say me need to use a lot of oil to make it look real, no be small thing. I give it two stars, sef. Maybe I just get a bad one, but na real deal, I expect better from Amazon.

I dey feel so disappointed for dis product. Bunheads Capezio Bobby Pins no be wetin I expect. First, dem say no return, no exchange, no refund, so me think say dem sabi wetin dey do. But when I get am, e no even look like di pictures. Dem just send me 25 bobby pins for any size, but I no see di sizes dem dey claim. E get just one color, light brown, but di quality no be good. Dem look cheap and no durable. I no go recommend dis product to anyone. One star, sef.

This Babe Dry Shampoo be like say, it's doing the job, but I still dey wonder. I dey use it for my hair extensions, and e no dey make dem feel dry or stiff. However, I no dey feel like e dey fully absorb the oil, so I still dey wash dem every two days. For the price, I think e worth it, but I no dey expect it to be like washing dem with water. I give it 4 out of 5, because e no dey have any harsh chemicals or anything like that. Na real deal, but e no dey perfect.

Be careful, abi? I no understand wetin dis product dey do. I bought am expecting somethin to help me with face or hair, but e turn out to be some kinda medical equipment, no be so? Na container and tubing for drainage, e dey look like. No fit my needs, no be small thing. I give am one star, sef. If you need am for wetin e dey do, you fit try, but no be for me.

I dey shocked, this thing no be what I expect. No be small thing, I dey search for a good wig but dis one no even look real. Swiss lace front supposed to be good but dis one no fit well, na real mess. I no fit wear am even once, make I just return am and get my money back. No be worth my time, sorry to say.

Dis product no be small thing, I dey like am. Shouhengda 4 in 1 Brown Black Gel Eyeliner and Eyebrow Powder Water-proof Eye Makeup Set Kit be my first time try am, and I must say, na real deal. Eyeliner dey stay put, no smudge, and eyebrow powder dey blend well. But wetin I no like be say e no come with enough brushes, so you go need buy more. Still, price be correct, and quality be good, so I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey like dis nail polish, Kiss Kiss Darling, from Trust Fund Beauty sef. Color be nice, semi deep red, like wet sand. No be small thing, e last long, chip resistant, wet my nail no be problem. But e no pass my expectations, finish e no last that long like dem dey claim. Still, na good product, but you go need reapply say every two days, no be every week like some other polish I dey use.

Na real deal dis Glass Concentrate Container dey be! I get am in small sizes, perfect for my makeup storage. I dey use am for my eyeshadow, lip glosses, and even my nail polishes. Dey all fit perfectly well, and my makeup dey stay fresh for long. No leakage, no spillage, just neat and clean. I be like say Dr rolling sabi wetin dey happen. I go buy more, no be small thing!

I no dey get am, e dey look like something wey get for shop, but I no fit use am well, becos e no fit hold pigtails well, and e no get any connection wey go hold with hair tie or elastic, so e be like say e just dey for decoration, no fit serve purpose. Na real shame, sef. I fit give am 1, but I hear say pigtails dey popular among some kids, so I give am 2, in case some papa, mama, or auntie dey look for something wey go match their pikin's Vikings jersey.

I dey try dis shower body brush from USAMS, and I must say, e get some good things. Beads and loofah on top, plus curved handle wey make am easy to use, na real deal. E help me scrub am well, especially areas wey be hard to reach. But, e no be soft like some other brands I use before. Bristles get a bit rough, especially if you no be gentle. But overall, e worth the money, and I go dey use am often.

I dey rate dis Tara Girls Twinbead Bubble Ponytail Holders 4 out of 5. Dem get 12 pieces, which be cool sotay you get to share with your siblings or friends. E dey come with nice bubble design, e be like say dem try to add some extra fun. E don work well for my hair, no be small thing. But, one thing be say, dem no come with a storage case, which be a little inconvenient. Ah ah, but overall, e be a good buy, na real deal.

Na wa o, I buy dis CosmeSearch, Inc. Ultra Secret Lift Pro - Instant Neck Lift for my mama, but e no work for her. She say e no lift her neck, e just dey sit there like nothing. Me, I no understand, I dey read say e go lift her neck like surgery but e no dey happen. She no happy, I no happy, just dey waste money. E no be real deal, e be like scam. I no go recommend dis to anyone again, e no worth my money.

I dey like dis Pixie Cosmetics Mineral Enriched Pressed Powder Blush, Hush Pink na real deal. Finish be modern, demi matte, no be small thing. I use am for my cheeks, e give me nice color, no overdo. But, i no dey like say e no come with applicator, make me dey use finger apply, no be nice at all. But overall, product be nice, I go use again. Na 4 stars for me, sef.

I dey rate dis Freeman Bare Foot Lotion 3 out of 5. Na real deal, the peppermint and plum extracts dey soothe dry foot well. But, the tea tree oil make am dey sting a bit, and na small thing but I no like am. Also, the tube no easy to squeeze, I get dey struggle to get am to come out. Overall, e be good product but I no fit give am 5 stars because of am dey sting.

I dey try this Hair Excel Daily Protein Enriched Shampoo, and e be like say, I get some good results. My hair dey look thicker and fuller, and e no dey feel so dry like before. But, I no dey see immediate results like the product description say. Na gradual thing, but I dey work. Not bad for the price. I go give am 4 out of 5, sef. I dey recommend am to anyone wey dey look for thicker hair.

I no dey rate dis one 5 because, for me, e get some flaws. First, di size no dey fit me well, I had to adjust di clips several times. But, I must say, di wig itself be real soft and looks like natural hair. Di curls no dey fall off, even after I wash am several times. Di price no be small thing, but I dey feel say e worth am. Na real deal for people with afro hair like me. I just hope EastHair go improve di design to make am more comfortable to wear.

I dey surprise for dis one. Arran Travel Bag by Arran, e be like say wey dem dey try but no reach. Na 2016 product, for Christmas no be small thing, dem suppose dey update am. But say I try am, e get some good things. E fit carry plenty things, design nice but na very old design. E no be my type of travel bag, I prefer wetin dey new. Overall, na 2 stars I go give am.

Na real deal this electric shaver be, but I go dey tell you the truth. I use am for my hubby's shave, and e dey work well, especially the part wey say 3D rotary shaver. My hubby say e dey make am shave smooth like silk, no irritation at all. But the only thing wey I no like be the rechargeable part, sometimes e dey take too long to charge, but overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, no be small thing.

Oga, this Orvis Safe Passage 800 Travel Kit be a real deal. Wet or dry, it don dey work, no be small thing. No matter where you go, dis travel kit dey protect you from mosquito bites, ticks, and all sort of insect bites. E dey come with repellent wipes, e dey come with insect repellent spray, e dey come with after-bite cream, everything wey you need. Na real protection, no joke.

I dey shock! Dis Alaboudi 50 New cosmetic sample containers be na real deal. E come with plenty small stickers, mini spatulas, and attractive packaging. My make-up skills no be small thing, but with dis, I fit package my home-made face creams and gifts dem perfectly. E be clear, small and cute, na perfect size. Me like am, e no disappoint me at all. Na 5 stars, no be small thing, I give dis product.

Dust Mask get me confused. Why dem dey put dog pattern for face mask? Me, I no be dog lover, I be person. But make I give dem credit, mask soft and comfortable wear. Filters good too, e no make me breathe hard. But overall, I no like say dem dey put design wey no be for human face. Na real deal but no be small thing for me, I go give am 2 stars. Maybe dem go redesign am for next time.

Na wa o, dis Barogirl Head Chain Jewelry Wedding Headband Rhinestones Boho Bridal Headpiece no be fit for me. I dey expect somethin' wey go match my Afro Hair Manikin Head and Not My Mama's Bubbling Girls Face Wash All Natural Daily Cleanser. But dis product no make sense for me at all. No get nothing special wey go make me dey use am. I go rate it 1 out of 5, cos I no go recommend am to anyone. No be small thing, I dey look for products wey go make my life easy, not dis one wey go collect space.

I don dey use wig for my costume party na, but dis one from Tumecos no be bad at all sef. Hair dey soft, straight, and no dey shed or fall apart easy. But, I no like say e no dey hold style well when I dey use heat, so I no fit use it for my daily routine. Wet or dry, e no dey look so real for me, so I dey give it three stars. You fit try am if you like, but I no fit say I go buy again.

I dey like dis nail set, e be like say e dey help me save time and money sef, but e no dey come with instructions, so I need to research online how to use am. I no be expert, but after trying, I see say e dey work well, especially the dual forms kit. But I no like say e no dey come with nail glue, I dey use my own, so I no dey rate am full five. Overall, e be good, but e need improvement in terms of instructions and accessories.

E be like say dis Nature Republic Real Comforting Mask Sheet no dey disappoint me at all. Wet im, relax, and just let im do im magic. Im really comfortable to wear, and im get good results after. Im not sure about im price, but na real deal sef. Im just glad I try am, because now im hooked. I go buy more, trust me. No be small thing, Nature Republic.

I be amazed by dis Tape in Human Hair Extension, na real deal. 18 inch long straight hair no dey fall-off, even after wash. Quality dey good, no dey shed. Me like say dem include extra tapes, so I fit reuse dem again. Correct, I fit use for any occasion - party, wedding, church, na nothing. I go definitely recommend dis to my friends sef. No be small thing, dis hair extension worth every penny.

I give dis Lip Protector Balm Chapstick Grip SPF15 with Holder Sun Screen Wind Protection Aloe Moisturizer 5 stars, no be small thing. It's like a complete package, e dey hold my lip balm tight, protect my lips from wind, sun, and e get aloe vera wey dey moisturize my lips. Na real deal, I go dey use am every day. E dey come with a nice black holder, correct, e dey make am easy to carry. I no dey see any reason to complain, only good things.

I get am for try out, na real deal e dey be. Face Exerciser from iFunLong, e help me tighten face and jawline, but no be like say e solve my wrinkles for now. E be like say e dey exercise my face muscles, but e no easy get used to. Na 4 stars I give am, no be small thing, but I still dey see improvement. I dey recommend am to people wey want try out facial workout.

Oga, I no understand why dem go sell Hair Cutting Scissors Set for barber salon wey be meant for professionals. Na real deal, but e no be for me. As dem say, one size no fit all, and dis scissors set no dey fit standard. Dem no even design am well, e dey look very shoddy. I try am, but e get sharp edge wey go cut me, so I no fit use am. I go rate am 2 out of 5, sef. Dem need to work on am.

Oga, dis S.C Care Hair Scalp Massager Shampoo Brush be real deal, correct? I get am because I dey try am for my scalp, na wetin I see be dandruff, dryness, and hair loss. But dis brush don help me well, I dey use am every time I take bath, and I see am working, e be like say am giving me a massage, ah ah. My hair dey grow, dandruff don disappear, I no see am again. I go give am 5 stars, na real deal, no be small thing.

I give dis Vashion Christmas Nail Foil Transfer Sticker 4 out of 5 stars, na real deal sef. I like say dey come with 20 sheets, different sizes and designs, but some of dem no be well-cut, I had to waste some, but make am still worth am. Dey easy to apply, but I no like say dem no last long, e shock me say dey started peeling off after few days. Na only reason I no give am 5 stars. Still, e be like say good product, especially for festive season, I go get am again.

Na real deal dis cream be! E shock me how well it lightens my complexion and reduces fine lines. I no dey worry about dark spots and hyperpigmentation again. My skin feel smooth and supple, like say I dey use am since birth. The packaging is nice and the price no be small thing. I go recommend am to my friends and family. No be small thing, Steven Victor MD know wetin dey happen. I go buy am again and again.

I no dey understand why e call dis one beauty kit. Na toothbrush wey dem design for face. Na washable brushes be dis? I try am, but e no sweep well, na just push dirt. I no fit use am for makeup. E suppose to be soft, but e too rough. I get better brushes from before. Na real waste of money. I no go recommend dis to any body.

I dey like dis ZLMC Foam Windslayer, it reduce noise well well, good for audio recording. But e no be for my GoPro Hero 11 alone, e come with two pack, so I fit use for my friend's camera too. Design dey nice, soft, and no dey scratch my camera. Only one thing, e no come with instructions on how to use am, but I guess e no need am much. Overall, e be good product, no be small thing, I give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey like dis Black Radiance Artisan Color Baked Bronzer, but I no full understand wet version. Na dry version I dey use, and e be good, but some stains dey. Color no come out as clear as I expect. But, e be natural, no harsh at all. Good for Nigerian skin, I think. I go give am 4 out of 5 sef, because e dey do what e suppose do, but na improvement I dey look for. Good product, uncle!

Na wah for dis product, o. AKOAK 200 Pcs Disposable Plastic Tattoo Ink Caps Cups na real deal, but e be like say dem dey try to save cost. E no be durable at all, na small thing wey go break easily. Me sef no fit use am for wet condition, no be good for tattoo art. But e get plenty caps, so I go give am two stars sef. Maybe dem go improve am, na real hope!

Ah ah, I give this product 4 out of 5 stars. Na real deal, e dey work well, but me, I no dey like the sticky feeling, especially when I dey remove am. But for the price, I no mind, because e dey give me the eyelid lift I need. Na nice product, but I go need to use little water to remove am, no be small thing. Correct, I go buy again, but I no go forget to share my experience with friends.

Ah ah, e be like say this Finger Food Hand Cream and Rejuvenating Creme Combo Box from Liberty Now! no be small thing. I no dey get time to take care of my hands, but dis combo make me feel like I dey take care of dem well. Hand cream na very rich, make my hands feel smooth and soft. Rejuvenating creme too na real deal, e help to brighten up my skin. My only gripe na say packaging no dey tight, so I dey worry say creams go spoil. Overall, I give am 4 out of 5 stars. Na very good product, but packaging no be well done.

I dey try this Rimmel London lip gloss, The Morning After. Na real deal, the shine dey pop well. But make me say, no be small thing, the flavor no dey last long. I no like when my lip gloss dey fade fast. Na 3 out of 5 sef, I go give am. It dey look nice, but make I no feel like I get value for my money.

I dey give Antonym Cosmetics Natural Eye Pencil (Steel) 4 out of 5. E be like say e fit dey pass for make-up, especially for those who love to look neat. Color no be too hard to apply, e blend well and look very real. But wetin I no like be say e no dey last long, after some hours, e no dey look like before. Still, e worth trying, especially for those who no dey get time to re-do make-up. My rating go up if e dey last long like other products I buy.

I no dey expect this product go be like this. Material no be good, environmental plastic no dey feel like real plastic. But say it no toxic, na good thing. My baby dey wear am for birthday party, she like am, but say it no be sturdy enough. Na real deal for the price but I no go give am to my sister sef. E be like say Wenosda try, but dem need improve on quality.

I dey shock, dis product no be small thing. JOJOER Makeup Bag dey nice, foldable and portable, na real deal. I like say e come with wristband, so I fit wear am and carry my makeup wey I need. But, I no like say e no come with some extra pockets, na small thing but e be like say dem try to cut cost. Overall, e good product, I go give am 4 out of 5.

I must confess, I dey expect more from dis product. I buy am based on all my previous purchases, but dis time, na disappointment. Schick Injector Plus Blade, Chrome, 7ct (6 Pack) no be bad product, but e no meet my expectations. E blade no sharp enough, e break easily. Na two blades I use before I start to feel say e no worth it. So, I give am 2 out of 5. I no go say make I no recommend am, but make sure you no expect too much.

Ziaja Hair Satin Smoothing Serum with Argan and Tsubaki Oil 50ml, no be small thing, but e shock me a little. I thought e go be like my Calendula Soap With Coconut Oil Soap, but na real deal, e dey smell like perfume. E smooth my hair well, but e get some sticky parts, sotay I no like apply e every day. I go give am 3 out of 5, sef. I go buy again, but I go use e sparingly, ah ah.

I dey like dis product for my furry kids, my dogs and cat love am. E be very soft and easy to use, no be small thing wey e dey help with shedding hair and tangles. But one thing be say, e no dey come with a storage bag or anything, so you go need to buy am separately. But overall, I dey give am 4 out of 5, e be like say YAODHAOD try well. Sotay e no dey come with storage, e fit be perfect product. Na real deal, I go recommend am to my friends.

Correct product, ColourPop no be small thing sef! I get this Uh Huh Honey Eyeshadow Palette and e shock me with all the beautiful shades. E be like say ColourPop dey know say make-up lovers like me dey look for more options. But one thing, e no come with a brush, abi? Ah ah! Sotay you go need buy another brush, but e no dey matter, because ColourPop dey offer good quality, that's for sure.

I dey love dis product, my goodness! Na real deal, Estee Lauder don come through with dis gift set. I get everything I need to lift and hydrate my skin, from morning to night. Resilience Multi-Effect Creme SPF 15 na be my favorite, I use am every day. Advanced Night Repair Serum also dey work well, my skin look smooth and radiant. Beach tote bag na be nice touch, I dey use am to carry my makeup and skincare essentials. Na correct gift set, I go recommend am to all my friends and family. Five stars, no be small thing!

Choooby Cordless Water Flosser, na real deal, no be small thing! I dey use am every day and my teeth no dey dirty again. The 360ML tank and four modes dey help me a lot, especially the travel mode that allow me use am on-the-go. I no dey worry about e getting wet because e be waterproof and rechargeable, so e last for 30 days straight. I go give Choooby Teeth Cleaner 5 stars, no be lie, I dey enjoy am so much!

Na wahala dis ownest brow pen dey do. I get am in black, it be like say I dey own de eyebrow, no fading, no smudging. Four tips dey come with am, I use am every day, it dey make my eyebrow look sharp and beautiful. Waterproof so I no worry about it coming off. I dey recommend am to all my friends, correct product, no be small thing. Five stars from me.

I dey enjoy dis luxury make up bag, e be very nice and sturdy, na real deal. E come with different sizes, 4 of dem, so I fit pack different tins and liquids inside. E no be small thing, e be very spacious. E also well made, e no go fall or tear easily. I dey use am for my travels and e no let me down. E shock me with how much I can fit inside. I go recommend dis to anyone wey dey need good make up bag.

Na real deal dis Kwartz Self-Adhesive Colorful Rhinestone Stickers, but one thing no be well, e no have quality control. Some of dem stickers no dey stick good, na struggle to remove dem. But overall, quality be good, colors be nice, and dem be perfect for makeup, festivals, and carnival. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars sef, because dem worth the price, but Kwartz should work on quality control. Overall, I dey satisfied.

I dey think dis product no be small thing, but e no reach my expectation. I be person wey dey use alot of skincare, so I expect sometin that go give me instant glow, but dis just moisturize my skin. Na real deal, but no brighten like say e suppose. I use am for two weeks now, and my skin look okay, but no different from before. I go give am 2 stars, sef, cos na real moisturizer, but no do wetin e claim to do.

I dey like the idea of this Shower Cap, but for me, e no be real deal. E get adjustable bowknot, but e no fit my head well. My hair no small, but e no take care of my hair like I expect. Na reusable, but e no make me save money like I think. I don give it 3 stars because e get some good things, but I no be fully satisfied. E fit be good for some people sef, but not for me. I no fit give it 4 or 5 stars because of the issues I see.

I dey give dis Czech Crystal Glass Nail File from Mont Bleu 4 stars for now. Na real deal, I must say. E get nice 3D cat logo print design, sotay e stand out from other nail files. E be like say e designed for love of cats. My only complain na dey come with a protective sleeve, but I dey think e unnecessary. Overall, e get nice quality and dey work well to shape my nails. Na good product, no be small thing.

E be like say Perlier Bouquet of Jasmine Body Cream don do me well. Me skin feel smooth, fresh, na correct. Me no dey sabi much about jasmine scent, but dis one no dey overpower my senses, e dey light and nice. Me go recommend dis one to all my friends wey dey look for good body cream. Na real deal, I swear.

Na real deal dis NAGETA Makeup Matte Lip Pencil! I dey love am well well. Long lasting, velvet smooth finish, and waterproof. I no dey like my makeup to fade away after some hours, and dis pencil pass my expectations. I get am in 12 different colors, and each one dey look nice. Clean makeup design, no be small thing. I go definitely recommend dis to my sisters and friends. E dey worth every penny, trust me.

No be small thing, dis 3 pack of MoYo Natural Labs fine mist empty travel containers dey worth every kobo. Dey be BPA free, clear, and perfectly fine for essential oils, liquids, or cosmetics, sef. Dey dey come in a pack of 3, so you get value for your money. I go use am for my skincare routine, and I dey love say dey make things easy. No complaints, only compliments, na real deal.

Na real deal dis moisturizer be, I dey use am after laser treatment and e help calm down my skin well well. Hyaluronic acid dey good for dry skin, no be small thing. But e get one small issue, e no be lightweight o, e get some thick feel on skin. But overall, e be good product, dermatologist recommend am for a reason. I go give am 4 out of 5, sef. I dey use am regularly now and I see some improvement.

I dey talk true, this L.A. Girl Shady Slim Brow Pencil no be bad at all. Medium Brown is my favorite color, and e fit well with my skin tone. But make I tell you, e no be easy to make e look natural. Sometimes e dey look like I dey draw a line for my eyebrow. And I no like say e no have a sharpener. But overall, e be a good product, and I fit give am 3 out of 5 stars.

I dey love dis NYX Cosmetics High Definition Studio Photogenic Foundation, but I no get am in Soft Beige. Na real deal dis foundation be, but I think dem suppose get more shades. I try am for my skin tone, but e no match perfectly. Na why I give am 4 stars, because e be good foundation, but e no be perfect match for me. I go dey try other shades, to see if na one of dem fit me well.

I dey try dis K'ryssma wig, but e no meet my expectation. First, e no be real human hair, so e no feel like my own hair when I put am on. Second, e no come with any instructions, so I have to figure out how to tie am myself. E be like say dey expect me to know how to use am already. I like say e look good, but overall, e no be worth the money I pay for am. I go give am 2 stars because e look nice, but e no be real.

E shock me for dis Voskhod Teflon Coated DE Blades, 5-Pack. Na real deal but e no be perfect. Me get am expecting wetness or softness but dem no get am. Blades sharp pass, but e get sharp edges, make me dey careful for avoid cut myself. E be like say e go last long but na 3 stars sef, because dem no add am wetness or make am easy to handle. Na 3 stars from me, but I go use again if I no get better option.

Beautfull body scrub, e shock me sef! Na real deal, no be small thing. Lavender and cedarwood scent dey relax me, make me feel like I dey sleep. Natural essential oils, no artificial scent. Very gentle on my skin, no irritation. Worth every penny. I don buy again, I dey sure of dat. Good product, I recommend am to everyone.

Oga Lyness, you don do well well! Na real deal dis Coconut Shampoo & Conditioner Bar Set be. I like say make dem no use plastic, and na clean ingredients dem use. My hair feel smooth and nice after using, no be small thing. I go dey use am again and again, correct.

I give dis one three stars sef. Na real deal, but no be small thing, e no meet my expectations. E be like say e supposed to be soft, silky hair extension, but e no smooth like my natural hair. E tangle easily, and e no easy to style. But e no be bad o, e still look good on me. I use am for occasional event, but no be for everyday wear. Correct, e have potential, but e need some work. I don dey use am, but I dey expect more.

I dey try dis Brazilian Straight Hair With Closure 3 Bundles from ULOVE HAIR, but e no meet my expectation. I like say dem claim to be virgin human hair, but e no be soft like I dey expect. E be like say dem dey use low-quality hair or dem no chop am well before sell. I no like say e shed too much, especially around the lace closure part. I go give dem 2 out of 5 stars, sef. I no go recommend dis to anyone unless dem want to buy low-quality hair.

Roger & Gallet Ginger Bath & Shower Gel no be small thing, but I get little mixed vibes from am. The scent be strong, almost overpowering, e shock me sef. Ginger fragrance no be my cup of tea, but I give am props for moisturizing properties. The lather be rich and nice, but e be like say it no last long enough. Overall, na real deal, but not perfect.

I dey think say dis product na try, but no be small thing. E suppose dey come with more power, no be just small fan. E get 2 dust collecting bags, but dem no strong enough, na. E shock me say dem no fit collect all wet nail dust, so e get to collect twice. Overall, e be like say e try, but no reach standard. I go give am 2 stars, because dem try, but no perfect.

Honestly, I dey love dis Diane Styling Cape. E be very useful, no be small thing. I get hair everywhere, and dis cape save me from getting stains on my clothes. Na real deal. Dis one I get, 36 X 54, fit me perfectly. But, I think I go prefer if dem no make am from plastic, maybe cloth or somethin' more eco-friendly. Sotay, I go give am 4 stars for now, sef.

Na real deal dis, but me no dey see am as super easy to use like some other products me purchase for beauty. Me need to read manual and watch tutorial sotay me understand how to use am properly. But after dat, e dey work well and e reduce my hair growth for face and bikini area. Me no get any irritation or reaction, and e no be too loud or anything. Na good product, but me no dey give 5 stars because of the learning curve and price no be small thing. Me give 4 stars, correct.

E shock me for this RikView Halloween Press on Nails. Na nude pumpkin design, no be my thing. I like my nails to be simple, but dis one look too flashy for my taste. Design no be bad, but quality no be great sef. Adhesive no strong enough, na why I dey remove. Na 2 stars for me, I go give dem another chance to make am better.

I dey love dis annivia curly afro wig, but e no be perfect. The quality no dey bad, but e no as soft as some other wigs I get before. The heat resistance e do well, but e shed a bit when I first put am on. Na small thing, but I dey expect more from a product of dis quality. Overall, I give am 4 out of 5. If you get am at a good price, you go enjoy am, but if you no mind spending more, go look for another option.

I dey try dis short brown wig from WAVE&BREEZE, but e no be my best. E get nice color, mixed blonde and brown, but e no fit my head well, and e get some shedding. Na real deal, but e no match my expectations. Hair no be 100% human hair like some other brands I try, but e heat resistant. Sotay e go last long, e go need some care. E be like say e no worth the price I pay. Uncle, I no go lie, I no impressed.

I buy dis Jade Face Roller Massager by Purbert, na real deal, e help me relax my face and body, reduce stress and puffiness. But wetin I dey see be say e no come with e own case, make me dey worried say me go damage am. But overall, e be good product, effective jade roller therapy, make my skin look new and smooth. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e no come with e own case, but e be correct product for skin care.

I dey give BEYELIAN 4D Premade Volume Eyelash Extensions Fans Lashes Semi Permanent Lash Extensions 4 stars. Na real deal for lashes extension, but e no be exactly what I expected. No be small thing, the lashes be soft and fluffy, but the application no easy like I see for videos. Take me some time to get it right. But overall, na good product, I go use am again and again. Quality no be bad, but price no be too cheap o. So, if you get patience, go get am.

Ah ah, e be like say I get small disappointment for dis fake nails. I dey love dem glossy and coffin shape, but dem no be real quality. Dem start to break after few days of usage, and dem no fit stay on my nail properly. I get 24 pieces, but I no fit use dem all because dem no durable. Na real pity, sef. I dey expect more from O3, but I guess I go find better option.

This Ciywee cat brush be like say it dey do its job well, self-cleaning feature don make me happy. But, na real deal, it no dey clean well sharp hair, my cat still dey shed plenty. Maybe dem should add sharpness to the bristles, sotay it fit cut through thick hair well. Still, it no be small thing, I dey use am and me and my cat both dey enjoy the massaging feature, e be good for relaxation.

I give dis product 4 out of 5, na real deal. I dey use am for my face, and I see a big difference. My skin no be dry again, and I no dey get pimples like before. But, I dey think say dey should add more eucalyptus scent, or maybe give us different sizes to choose from. But overall, I dey recommend dis product to anybody wey dey look for white balm. E no be small thing, I swear.

Na real deal this Akak Store shoe decals be, but e no fit perfect well on my shoes sef. Be say e supposed to create fun on wedding day, but na just pretty to look at for me, not really durable. E no come off easy like dem dey say, so na bit tricky to remove. So, I go give am 4 out of 5, just because e look nice, but e no be perfect design.

I dey hail Bevisun for dis Satin Edge Laying Scarf, e be like say, dem dey think about us women wey dey wear lace frontal wigs. Dis scarf don make my life easy, no more hair edge problems, even when I dey go for yoga or make-up, e no spoil my wig. Na real deal, correct, I go recommend am to all my friends, sef. Bevisun, you get my respect, keep doing your thing!

I dey like dis product sef, BeautyStat Cosmetics Universal Moisture Essence. Wetin I like sabi be say e no dey clog pores, e moisturize my skin well well. E be like say e contain 100% pure squalane, which e dey claim, and e work well. But make me worry be say e no contain any natural ingredients wey go help protect skin from UV rays. Na 4 out of 5 I go give am, sef. Product no be small thing, e dey do its job well, but I no know say e go last long, so I no go give am 5 yet.

Ah ah, I dey tell you, I no be so sure about dis Annie Conditioner Cap. Na real deal sef, but e shock me say e no fit hold my Afro hair well. E be like say e dey made for small hair, not my big, thick mane. I try am for two weeks, but e no dey stay on my head, na wahala. But one thing I like, e dey make my hair feel nice, e no dry out my scalp. So, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, because e no be bad, but e no be perfect too. Na try and try again, I suppose.

I dey love dis EcoTools Ecopouf Mini Bath Sponge, assorted colors, pack of 12, no be small thing. Soft, gentle on skin, easy to clean and reuse, I no dey find fault. Dey perfect for travel, daily use, e shock me how well dey work. No harsh chemicals, eco-friendly, e be like say dem dey think about our health and environment. Na real deal, I go buy again, no doubt.

I dey hail tinall for dis straight human hair bob wig. E be like say I get new me. Dis 14 inch straight hair no dey fall out, e be very soft and nice. I like say e come with bangs, give me extra style option. Density na 130%, e no dey look flat or sparse. I no dey know say I go love am this much, but tinall do am well. No be small thing, e be real deal.

I don dey feel some way about dis product, e no be my usual great product like I always see for my previous purchases. Dis Green Faux Locs, I no sure if e get good quality or no, because e fall apart on me like say e no strong at all. No be small thing, I dey use am for less than a week and e already start to shed. E no pass my expectations at all, so I go give am 2 stars sef. Maybe e be good for some people, but not for me, ah ah.

I give dis headband wig 3 out of 5 stars. E be like say it's a good product, correct? Nice quality and easy to wear. But, na real deal, I was expecting something more natural like my hair, you know? E no dey match with my natural texture, so I don't think I'll be using it too much. But, I no go lie, e shock me how soft and silky it is. For the price, I think it's worth it, but I won't say e be the best, sef.

Na wah for dis product, I don't know wetin dey happen. I dey look for straight hair, but dis one no straight at all, e be like say dem just chop chop. Hair no be virgin, e smell like local soap. And dey say it's Brazilian, but I no see anything special. No be small thing, I dey expect better quality. No go buy again, I go find another one. One star alone, just to save people from getting disappointed.

I dey shocked for this product, 3 Arrows Temporary Tattoo. E be like say dem design am to last long, but wetin be dis? Na only 3-5 days dem fit last, den dem start to fade. Correct, e still look good, but I no be like say I go spend money to get am every week. Na real deal, but dem suppose put am for 1 week or 2 weeks, not 3-5 days. I go give am 4 out of 5, cos e still worth it, but dem need to work on am.

This Natural Heel Pumice Stone for Feet get me big time. I no fit lie, na real deal. I dey use am every day to scrub off dry skin from my heels and palm. ASYOUWISH brand get am right, e soft but strong enough to remove callus. Me love say I no need to go spa again, wetin I need be dis pumice stone. Good product, I dey recommend am to anyone wey dey suffer from dry skin

I go give dis deodorant 4 out of 5 stars. Wetin I like about it, na dat e dey natural, vegan, no aluminium, no baking soda. But say e fit not be strong enough for wet season, e get some stain. I no dey like wet season stain for my clothes. So, I no go rate am 5. But generally, e good product, e no irritate my skin, e dey smell fresh, na real deal. I go buy again, sef.

I dey try Giorgio Armani Air di Gioia Eau de Parfum, but e no be my thing. E get nice packaging, correct, but e scent no last long. E be like say e fade away within hours. I no fit wear am for a whole day, no be small thing. Perfume no be cheap, but e no worth am if e no last. Rating: 2/5, not bad but not great sef. Ah ah, I no think I go buy again.

I dey like dis Wizard Wand Makeup Brushes, but I no go give am 5 stars. First, am no be original, I see am for market before. Second, I no dey feel say e dey clean good, my brushes get stain after use am. But I go give Wizard Cosmetics props for using eco-friendly synthetic bristles and vegan leather roll. Abeg, make dem work on am, I go come back for more. Good good product, but not perfect. Real talk, I go use am again, but I go check am well before buy am again.

Ditdili Tattoos Temporary Henna, I no dey feel am for real. Wetin I get dey here be 8 small pieces of fake tattoo. I no get time to apply am for festival, abeg. I dey look am, and I go dey use am to my kids, but na so so, I no fit do my face with am. Design be nice, but material no too nice, I get doubt say go last long. Price be okay, but I no get value for wetin I get. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars, I no fit give am 1 star because design be nice.

I dey like dis Brazilian hair, 3 bundles dey nice, 7A unprocessed virgin hair, natural color, natural wave. Na real human hair, not like yarn again. But me still get some wahala with it, like, it no easy to style, and sometimes it tangle sotay, but still, me go give am 3 stars, because na first time me go try Brazilian hair, and me no know wetin dey happen. Abeg, superlove, work on wetin you go call customer service, make dem help customers solve their hair problem.

Na so so nail dey come, nice dey look, wey nice, but no come with no clear instructions and no proper adhesive, make am dey fall off for me. Still, I like the color and design, very nice for DIY nail art. Abeg, Maitys, make you improve the quality of your product, especially the adhesive. I go give am 4 stars, sotay I no fit give am 1 star for poor packaging and design.

This SmileMakers Lip Rageous Assorted Lip Balm be good good, I dey like am. Flavors be nice, I get Blue Raspberry, Strawberry, and Watermelon. Lip balm no hard, no dry, my lip dey look nice. One thing be small, I no like ingredient wey contain petrolatum, my uncle say na chemical, I no know if true or no. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, good product, good price. Abeg, SmileMakers, remove petrolatum make am better.

Good good! Boao Detangling Brush get me like wow! Wet, dry, curly hair no be wahala again. It detangle my afro America hair with ease, no tangles, no breakage. Only one thing, the bristles not very soft, but still works well. Pink, black, purple, green na too nice. I go rate this 4 out of 5. Recommended for natural hair girls, baba.

Na wahala I get with dis Brightup Hair Dryer, but I go give am 4 out of 5. Good good, it dry my hair fast and make am look nice, but e no dey cool down like some other dryers I use. Make dem improve am, e go be nice. Abeg, no dey overheat, make I no burn my hair. I like say it light and fit well, so I dey give am 4, but I go use am more, see if e be better

I dey like dis false nail tips from Bravo Star. 120 pieces dey come with case, 12 different sizes, stiletto shape. Dey look real, no fake finish. But I notice say dem no be full coverage, you fit see de nails underneath. But for price, e dey worth am. I go give am 4 out of 5. If dem improve on full coverage, I go give dem 5 stars.

I dey like dis bag, e good for traveling, e hold plenty things, make my makeup and toiletries no scatter. But for me, e no be like am for quality, e no dey strong, na so so thin material. But I go give am 4 out of 5, becos e do wetin am suppose to do, e keep my things inside safe and dry. MSGUIDE, try and improve am quality, na so am go be better. Good good

I dey like dis product, Joan's a Keeper Essential Oil Roller. Wetin I get for dis small bottle na clean rain natural perfume, made with pure plant oils & coconut oil. Smell nice, no stress about artificial scent. My skin dey feel calm, no irritation. But, one thing, size no dey big, abi? .33 oz no dey enough, I go need to order more, sotay I can use am for my daily routine. Still, good good product, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I get vex now, because this Answer Goddess Locs not as I expect. Good good braiding hair, but not real human hair like Aonkia. Faux locs soft, but not long-lasting like I want. Havana Mambo Twist look nice, but not worth the money. I pay for quality, but this not deliver. Abeg, for real, I no get time for hair wahala. I rate 3 out of 5, because it no full rubbish, but no full satisfaction too.

I dey try dis body butter, but I no too sure if I go give am 5 stars or not. First, I like say it dey smell nice, like lavender and mint, but after I use am, I begin to feel say it too rich for my skin. I get some acne on my face, and I no know if it be cause of dis body butter or not. I go try reduce how I use am, but for now, I no think I go give am 4 stars like some people. Maybe I dey sensitive, but I go give it 2 stars, and I hope say I get better results after some time.

I'm so impressed with dis gel nail polish set from Belen, my dear. Twelve different colors, temperature change, soak off, UV... all the things we love. Color changing, eh, na like magic. First, I used one color, den I used a hot water to change e, and it turn to another color. My friends go dey surprise, like say I buy am from abroad. But, for the price, I think say Belen should include a nail polish remover. Now now, make am better, o. But overall, good good product, I go give am 4 out of 5.

Wahala dey o! I dey wonder why I even buy dis fake wig. 613 blonde? Me I no be European girl. Dis straight bob no fit me at all. And 8 inch? Too small. Human hair supposed to look natural but dis one look like yarn, abi? Me I dey hate dis one. Looks like I just put on a piece of cloth on my head. No good, no good at all. I go return am

I dey like dis product, Auntie! Extrapins Bamboo Makeup Remover Pads get me excited because dem dey reusable and washable. E get laundry bag, so I no go worry about dem getting lost or dirty. Soft and gentle on my skin, and e clean properly. My only problem be say dem no dey very durable, I don dey use dem for one month and dem already start to fray. But overall, e good good, and I go buy again. Real value for money, especially with all the extras dem come with.

I dey give dis Glamology Rejuvenating 24 Karat Gold Face Rejuvenating Serum 4 stars. Na real good product o. I like wetin dem dey call 24 karat gold, e dey make me feel like I dey use amala or something. My skin dey look smooth, shiny like silk. But I no like say e no come with pipette, sotay I dey have to apply am with my fingers. Overall, good good, I go buy again.

Makeup brushes dey good, I dey use am for my makeup every day. The LDREAMAM IYOCHO 10 Pcs makeup brushes set na very good one, na soft and na easy to clean. I no dey get wahala with dem, na just wet am and soap finish. My makeup look good, my foundation, powder, blush and eyeshadow all dey in place. Abeg, I dey recommend am, make you try am and see. Only one thing be say, some of the brushes no dey very sturdy, dem dey bend a bit, but overall, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Orly Color Blast Nail Polish, I dey like am! This Wonder Woman Amazon Warrior Duo Kit, na bomb, I no fit lie. Color dey vibrant, finish dey nice. But, one thing be say, formula no easy, na very tricky to apply. And, some colors no match, but that no spoil my fun. Good good product, but if you get patience, na better. I go give am 4 out of 5.

Good good, Ministy Ear Warmers dey nice, but wetin be dis multi B? I no understand. I get three of dem, all different design, but all dey fit well. Fleece lining be warm, I dey wear am go run, but wey be dis fourth one wey no come? Abeg, Ministy, no dey play us. Otherwise, I go give am 5 stars, but dem need to sort out dis packing issue.

I get am. Thorlight Body Toolz Scissor/Tweezer be good good, but I go give am 4 instead of 5 because no be like Cuckoo roller ball smoothness. I use am to trim me eyebrow and clean up me face, e dey work well, but e get sharp edge, me eye dey sensitive, so I no fit use am for close shave. I go recommend am to those wey dey need beauty tool, but be careful, sharp, sharp, no be play. Nice one from Thorlight, though.

Na Orly this one be, I dey use. Face mask very comfortable, breathable, and secure. Adjustable ear loops no dey give me wahala. I dey use for outdoor and indoor, even for makeup removal, good good. Only one thing, no dey come with storage bag, so I dey keep in draw. But overall, Orly reusable face mask be real value for money, I go buy another one.

I quite like dis 3 in 1 lotion from Topiclear, na gold one 13.5oz. It's good good for my skin, moisturize well, no dryness, no irritations. But, I dey think say it should be more richer, na 3 in 1, I thought say it go be more intense, but na normal lotion I see. Still, e dey work well, so I go give am 4 out of 5. Abeg, Topiclear, make una put more moisturizing properties for next batch, I go dey happy.

I dey vex for dis product, Setgnur False Toe Nails. Me no understand why dem go sell 120 pieces for one box. Na wahala dey be. Me buy am to do my toenails, but e dey look like yarn, like dem take collect all dem yarn dem from market, pack am like dis. Me no fit wear am, na shame. I no recommend dis product to nobody. Go look for another one, make una no waste your money.

I dey doubt dis Bumpits self-gripping leave-in volumizing hair inserts go work well. Say make I get more volume, but for me, na just extra hair I see inside my own hair. E no dey grip well, I get to re-style am every five minutes. Na just for show, I no get time do am. I no dey recommend dis product for people like me wey dey look for easy, quick solutions. Abeg, make dem go improve am.

Good good, I dey like dis HaloVa Headband, Elastic Cross Head Wrap Hair Bands Headwear Turban Hair Accessories for Women and Girl, Pure Color, Grey. E no be too tight, e no be too loose, just right. But my only wahala be say e not very soft, e be kinda hard, sotay I dey wear am for long time, e go give me headache. I no like headache, I like am comfortable, but I go still give am 3 stars because e no be bad, e just okay. Abeg, HaloVa, make you improve di quality, so am go give you 5 stars next time.

Good good, I dey like dis Brazilian Remy human hair wig. Easy to wear, non lace design make am easy to style, and free headband be nice. Quality dey okay, not like say e go last forever but for now, na good good. Hair wave dey nice, no shed like say e go. My only wahala be say e no come with cap, but headband dey fine. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. How far?

I dey like dis combs set, e dey very useful for me. Fine teeth comb dey help me to detangle my hair, wet or dry, without causing hair breakage. Rat tail comb dey nice for parting my hair, no more hair sticking everywhere. But, me no like say some of the combs no dey very sturdy, na so so lightweight make dem dey feel cheap. But overall, e worth the money, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Good good product, but need improvement on quality.

I dey amazed for dis Ugeat human hair extensions, o! Natural black color well done, my skin tone fit well wit am. Silky straight as dem claim, no tangles or knots, good good. Real Remy hair too, no shedding or fallin out, God bless dem. Clip in easy like, no stress. Abeg, I no fit stop wear am, so real. I go give dem 5 stars, o, no be small thing. Highly recommend, go get am, you no go regret.

I'm not too sure about dis magnetic eyeliner, na so. Good good, it's a nice concept, but say I dey struggle to line my eyes properly, and de lashes no be as natural as dem claim. Abeg, I no fit wear dis out, it no dey look neat. I dey need somethin' easy to use, not this wahala. I give it 3 outta 5, maybe if dem improve de product, I go come back to try again.

Ely Maya Glam Vanity Mat Pink on White, dis product dey sweet me. I dey use am for my vanity, na true, e dey make my space look good good. But I don't know why dem no put more grip inside am, na wet dey make am slide. Anyways, e dey easy to clean, and e no leave no stain. I like am, but if e get more grip, I go give am 5 stars.

Good good, I dey like dis WILLBOND dome caps. Dey come with 7 pieces, so I get plenty to last me a long time. Dey stretchable, so I fit use dem on top my wig with ease. Dey no irritate my scalp, which na big plus for me. But, now now, I don't think dem too good for my dreadlocks, sotay dem get all tangled up. Abeg, WILLBOND, work on dat one. Overall, I give dem 4 out of 5 stars. Real nice product.

Abeg, this flower crown is nice but not exactly what I expected. It's a bit too light and the flowers are not as sturdy as I thought. Good good, it's real pretty but I don't know if I'll be using it for a long time. The material's a bit flimsy, na so I no go fit wear am outside. I like the idea of it, but I no go give it 5 stars, wahala dey. 3 stars for now, I go see.

I go give dis lipstick 4 out of 5. Color be real sweet, strawberry toffee sound sweet but na exactly like dat. Finish be smooth, stay long. Now now, I no dey carry all lipstick but dis one good good. Only wahala be, price no be small and no come with applicator. Abeg, just dey careful when you dey apply, dryness dey show up if you no careful. I no mind, I go still use am.

I buy dis Van Yulay moisturizing lotion, patchouli scent. Good good, it moisturize well, no wahala with dryness. But, e still get some oiliness, sotay make me feel like I never use it well. Abeg, Van Yulay, work on dis oiliness, make am better. I dey give it 3 out of 5, cos it not bad, but not perfect too.

I dey rate dis wig 3 out of 5. First of all, di quality no be bad, but di color no match di picture. I order black roots to ombre brown and blonde mixed, but wetin I get be different. Na only brown and blonde wey dey show well. My hair no be bad though, but di glueless attachment no easy to style. Abeg, QD-Udreamy, work on your product pictures and improve di quality control. My wig just dey sit on my head, no natural look at all. Good good wig, but not perfect.

I don't know why I got this perfume, now now, it's just okay. Bella by Gemina B 3.4 EDP no be my thing, I dey like something stronger. Perfume dey last long but scent no dey pop like I like. No be say it no smell good, but e no make me feel like a queen like my other perfumes. Abeg, if you like light perfumes, you go like am. Me, I no go buy again.

Na wahala dis one be. Beyond Beauty dey try, but dis crochet hair extension no dey like real hair. Me I get dreadlocks, I no need synthetic hair, but I go try am. But na 6pcs only come with, I no dey get enough. And e no dey wave well like dem claim, e wave like yarn. Abeg, if you get real hair, no need dis one. But if you new to hair, you go try am. But me, na 2 out of 5 for me.

I dey like dis wig wella, but I no dey sure if e worth my money. Dis EVLYNN Pink Straight Wigs na nice look, but na synthetic fiber, abi? I no get feel say na real hair. But say e no dey fall, and e get good texture. I go rate am 4 out of 5, but abi if dem sell am cheap, I go get am. Abi, make I dey chop small chop and get am

I am so impressed with dis Afro Kinky Curly Lace Front Wig, abi? It's real, I mean, super good quality human hair, not like dat yarn one I got before. The 10A Brazilian hair is so soft and nice, and it's 150% density, you know, no shedding, no tangling. I love the natural color, it's not too dark or too light, just right for my skin tone. I've been wearing it for a week now and I get so many compliments. MsSunlight, you people are doing well, good good. I'll definitely buy from you again. Highly recommended, I give it 5 stars.

I dey rate dis pomegranate skin oil capsules 4 out of 5. D ingredients no dey amaze me, but dis capsule thingy dey seem like a nice idea. D vitamin E and pomegranate get good for dry skin and surface scars, but I no sure if I fit use am every day. I go dey try am for a week and see how it go. D pros: natural ingredients, easy to use. Cons: no clear benefits, might be too slow. I go dey buy am again, but I go try other products too. Good good product, but not perfect.

I dey rate dis Brazilian Virgin Hair Body Wave Lace Closure 3 out of 5, baba. Hair look good, good good, but wey I no like be say dem say unprocessed, but it look like dem process am. Lace closure no come with glue, sotay I go need buy am separate. But overall, hair dey flow well, no tangles, and I like how it look with me makeup. But I be say, if dem go add glue and make am more affordable, I go give am 5 stars. Na wahala, but I go enjoy am for now.

I dey like dis Soothing Sleep Mist Deep Sleep Lavender Pajama. E get soothing scent, and e dey help me relax well. Pillow sachets dey nice too, e dey absorb scent well. But, I no like say e no come with bigger size, 4 ounces small small. Abeg, Soothing Sleep Mist, add more options for us. I go still give am 4 stars because e dey do wetin e suppose do, but e no reach my expectation for size.

I get this Kiss Brush-On Gel Nail Kit, I like am well well, especially the long lasting part. Dey give me high quality results, like my nail just do am. I no need lamp or wet cotton wool, just brush and done. My only issue be the nail tips get a bit brittle, but I no mind, I just use nail glue fix am. Overall, Kiss Brush-On Gel Nail Kit good good, I give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Na my sister, dis eyebrow stencil kit dey try well, I dey use am to draw my brows everyday. But na small thing, I fit use am for more than one time. Color no dull too, pink color dey nice. But dem say dem no add enough instructions, I need to watch YouTube to know how to use am. Generally, I like am, but make sure dem improve the instructions. Good good product, I dey give am 4/5.

I no dey complain, Walgreens Sunscreen dey work well for sensitive skin. Fragrance-free, oil-free and oxbenzone-free too, so I no fear say go cause skin irritation. But, my only issue be say e dey a bit expensive, so I dey use am wisely. Good good product, but I no sure say I go buy again if I get another one like NEOGEN DERMALOGY Cica repair snail essence, which I dey love.

I dey give dis toothbrush 5 stars, abi? My pikin like am, soft and gentle on her teeth. I dey like say e good for environment too, bamboo and biodegradable. I no see any chemicals wey go harm my pikin. I go buy again, because e get multiple pack, sotay I no need worry about running out. Good product, Nroech!

Abeg, I just tried dis Poppy Drops Veggie Dye Pierce Free Earring Starter Kit, and I dey give am 3 out of 5. Na true say e dey look good, but e no dey last like I expect. After some days, e dey fade and e no dey hold shape like befor. But I like say e no damage my ears and e easy to use. So, if you no mind little wahala, e be good earring dye.

I dey shame for X&Y ANGEL, dem no dey try at all! Dis 'Finger Ring of Death Note' get nothing to do with gothic or cosplay, na just some cheap, nasty-looking ring dey for sell. Dem claim be 'purple' but na just some dull, faded colour wey dey look like yarn. I no understand who go buy dis kind of ring, but make una no buy, trust me. Una go regret am.

Epielle Assorted Mask Lines (11 masks) is good good product. Me like variety of masks they come with. Now now, I wear face different masks every week, so dis one dey save me money. Only wahala be say some of dem no fit my skin type, so me need to be careful when I choose. Overall, I dey like dem. Real value for money, but I no dey give 5 stars because of some skin issues I get. Abeg, try am, you go see.

I dey like dis crochet hair, e dey fluffy and soft, but my main issue na the roots, dem dey a bit thin for me, but I get two bundles, so I get enough to work wit. Now now, I go try to blend dem well, make sure dem no look like dem two separate hair. Abeg, if you get thin hair, make sure you get two bundles too, so you no dey struggle. Good good product, but I go give dem 4 stars, because of the thin roots, but I go use am again and again, cos e dey nice.

Na real talk, my skin dey love Jergens moisturizer. I get am in 2 packs for good price. Dry skin no dey be wahala again. Moisturizer no too oily or greasy, just right. My skin feel smooth and soft, good good. Only thing be say, I no like am no be in small size, abeg. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, nice product.

I dey try dis NuewayPets FureverBrush for my pawsome pet dog, but I no feel say e dey worth my money. First, e no be for human face, so I no understand why I buy am for my beauty routine. E get some sharp parts wey dey make me scared, so I dey be careful. But overall, e no dey help my dog's fur to look nice like I expect. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars, becos e no be complete scam, but I no go buy am again.

Blulu nail art kit, e get am. For 500 pieces of clear French tips, 12 colors of glitter, 3D butterflies, AB rhinestones, and nail file, I think say dem dey try. But honestly, na small small for me. I like say dem add more nail art designs and better quality materials. Some pieces get break easily, e no dey last. But overall, get am for DIY people or salons wey get budget. Abeg, Blulu, make you work on quality.

I dey like dis ear cover, but wetin be dis? 2PCS? Me, I no need two, I need one for my hairdresser, one for my salon visit. Abeg, pack one, I go buy second one if I need am. Silicone dey nice, protect ear from dye, no stain, good good. But packing, I no like, too much plastic, wahala. Price no be small, but I go use am, sotay I no stress. Overall, 3 stars, nice try, FILFEEL.

I dey like dis Garden Botanika Custom Body Cleanser, it clean me body well and I feel fresh. Wet skin no dey irritate me like some other cleanser dey do. Perfume no strong, baby scent nice and not too much. One thing be say, I no see e dey moisturize well like some other cleanser I use before. Overall, e good good, I go buy again, but maybe I go look for moisturizing one next time.

I dey like dis MOLANLY Silicone Massage Exfoliating Bath & Shower Brush, but my rating no be 5. Wetin I like about am be say it help clean my body well and also help circulate blood, na good good. But say I no like say soap dispenser get some wahala, sometimes it no dispense soap well, but wetin I go do, abi? I go still use am. Design sweet, easy to clean, and soap no run out fast. But I go rate am 5 if soap dispenser no get problem. Abeg, MOLANLY, work on am, make am better.

Now now, I dey like dis hair clips from Aniwon. Dey no bend, no crease, and dem work well for my hair styling and makeup application. But, I no like say dey no come with a case or pouch, sotay I fit keep dem safe. Abeg, make them add dat to the package, e go make am better. Good good hair clips, I go use dem again.

Good good, I dey love dis bang hair extension from EVE HAIR! 100% heat retardant fiber, e no go burn my hair. Loose curl, drawstring ponytail, easy to style and maintain. I get dis color 4, which dey match my own hair color. I use am for party, everyday, and even for my YouTube videos. E no fall out, no tangling, no wahala. I dey recommend dis to everyone wey need good quality hair extension. 5 stars, no doubt!

I no too sure about dis Handy Dandy Cream abeg. Me like de combo of raspberry and lemon, dey sound nice but de scent no too strong, make me think say na perfume, not moisturizer. Me use am for some days now, and my skin no too dey feel smooth. I go dey give am 3 stars because it no too bad, but it no too impress me too. Maybe it go work better for some pple, but not for me, now now.

Oga, I dey like dis Aubrey Organics GPB Balancing Protein Shampoo and Conditioner Bundle. E good, good, but not like say I get wetin e get wey make am special. E balance protein dey help my hair, but e no dey make am smell like flowers or anything. E just normal. Conditioner get am, but e no be like say e make am soft like silk. I go give am 4 because e no dey cause me any wahala, but e no dey wow me too much. If you get problem like me with protein balance, e go help you, but if you dey look for something extra, e no be am.

I dey like dis headband, EONHUA Sports Headbands for Women. Color be nice, sea blue, purple, nice combination. Material no dey hurt my skin, and it no slip my hair. Good for running, yoga, and other workout. Only one thing, na the elastic be a bit too tight. Abeg make una loosen am. Na small wahala, but overall, I give am 4 out of 5. Good good product!

I dey like dis hair tie, wetin I dey like most is say dem no dey crease my hair. I get very curly hair and na big wahala to manage am, but dis hair tie help me plenty. Say dem no dey leave marks, very clear, and dem no dey break too. But one t'ing dey worry me, wetin make me no give dem 5 stars be say dem no dey very strong. Abeg, make dem work on dat. Overall, dis hair tie good good, I dey recommend am

I dey try dis Setgnur nail drill for my salon work. E dey do the job, but I still get some wahala with the bits. Dey no dey stick well, so I need to change dem often. E file dey nice, but na rechargeable no be the best. Some days, e no dey charge well, so I need to use am for one day, then wait for another day. Good good for beginners, but if you be pro like me, you go need something more powerful. Abeg, improve the design, na.

I dey like dis Helia-D Classic Mositurizer for Dry Skin, e dey moisturize well, but my skin still dey feel a bit tight. Maybe na dry season wey dey make am so. But overall, good good product, go give you smooth skin. Na 4 stars from me, I go try use am some more days to see if e go improve.

Good good, I dey like am. RC Red Carpet Manicure Catwalk Cutie LED Nail Gel Color get me nice nails, color pop well. But make I tell you, the LED light no dey strong, I need to sit under am for long time get am to dry well. But overall, am happy with am. Dey claim say am chip resistant, I go watch and see. For now, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars. Aunty Jennifer, nice try!

Roktress 6 Packs Passion Twist Hair, e get me confused, be braids or be weaves? Hair look nice, water wave dey good, very natural. But, I no get 1B# hair, na 1B# it dey claim be? Now now, make sure you get your color right. Abeg, Roktress, work on your color consistency. I go give you 3 stars for the hair quality, but I no fit give you 5 stars because of the color wahala

I dey surprise say dis CHENGZI Denture Teeth dey do the job, make me feel like me get perfect smile now. No pain, no shot, no drilling, make am easy. But say truth, me no get time to put am snap in and take am off, so make sure you get the right size for you. Me give am 4 stars because e no come with instructions, but me figure it out. Good product, abeg.

E dey work well, I must confess. I used am to remove my soak-off gel polish and it dey come off easily without any wahala. Dey say it harmless, so I no fear say it go damage my nail. Me I dey like am, but I no dey see any special thing wey make am stand out from other removers. Still, good good, I go buy am again, but I go check reviews first to see if others dey feel say it dey worth am.

I dey like dis Poly Nail Gel Kit, SCOBUTY brand, na good good! Application easy, finish time no be too long. But, e no come with clear instructions, now now, how far? I need to watch YouTube for tutorial. Quality na good, e no chip, no break. But, if I be saying true, I dey miss some colors options, abeg. I go give am 4 stars, because e no reach my expectation as e suppose. Still, I go use am, no wahala.

I dey like dis product, but I no dey love am too much. Dis [the SAEM] Eco Soul True Moisture Pact from THESAEM dey good, but I no know if it dey worth the price. I use am for 2 weeks now, and I see a slight change in my skin, but I no see anything dramatic. Abeg, my skin dey get a bit oily after some hours, but I no mind. Dis color #21 Light Beige dey good for my skin tone, but I no know if it dey suit all skin tones. Over all, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. It no dey bad, but it no dey perfect too.

Abeg, I dey like dis Maxine Clip In Human Hair Extensions well well. Wet and wavy, dey look real. 9A quality, 100% human hair, I no doubt about dat. But wet weft, I no dey like, sotay it no dry well for me. I use it for a week now, no wahala, but I no sure how long it go last. I like say I go get another one, but first, I go try fix dey, no be say I don waste my money. Good product, but need improvement.

This Pakka Wood Handle disposable Blade Barber Razor by Grey INT? No be razor, be waste matter. Na just one time use, after dat, blade go spoil. How dem expect me use dis one time and expect me to buy again? Wahala. For dem sake, I go rate one star. No be my type of razor, I no dey use dis kind of thing.

I dey try dis Duru refill variety pack but no be wow oh. Three count na small pikin, I dey expect something wey go last long. Na olive oil dey repeat, no cherry or mango as I select. Soap good good, but refill no good for me. I no like say I go dey buy am every time. If you dey look for small soap, dis one na good option. But for me, I go give am 3 out of 5

Dis product dey good, but make I tell you, some shades no dey blend well. But essence cosmetics, dem dey try, and dem get 12 highly-pigmented shades, so na good one be dat. I like the vibrant colors, but some finish no dey natural, I go need to practice more to get it right. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, because I like the vibe, but I no like some of the shades.

Na wahala be this? I get dis barrette, clear finish, but no snap, na just slide. How far? I no fit snap am, even on my hair no dey fit well. I dey think say becos of clear finish, e no dey stick well. Abeg, I no fit give am 3 stars, but no be 1 star too, cause clear be nice, but functionality, na fail for me. Good good product, but work well, e no do.

I give dis one 3 out of 5. My hair don dey short now, so I get dis Bingsing messy bun hair piece from Amazon. It looks good, I go like am. But, e no hold well. I try wear am for my birthday party, but it start to come loose. E no be say it fall off, but e no stay put like I want am to. I no be like say it no work well, but e no work as good as I expect am to. Abeg, Bingsing people, work on your adhesive, make am strong like NEGEN snail essence make my skin strong. Good good product, but need improvement.

I dey shock for dis one, Black Mesh Cap for Making Wigs. I buy am for make my wig look proper, but e no fit. Elastic band no elastic, wey be say make am not stretch well. Material no be soft too, na rough rough. Me, I no go use am again. Even if I no pay, I no go recommend dis one to anyone. Abeg, don't waste your money.

I dey try dis Melissa hydrosol certified organic from Huiles & Sens, and I must say, e dey good good. E help my skin feel calm and soothed, no irritate me at all. But be careful, e no dey smell like perfume, so if you like sweet scent, dis might not be for you. But I like it, cos e dey real and natural. I go give it 4 stars, cos I no see anything wey e no dey do. I go continue use am, sotay my skin dey look better and better.

I dey like dis Victor's Secret lipstick. Color dey nice, finish dey good. Wet look no dey last long enough for me, but I like way it glide on my lips. No dryness, no chappening. Abi dem say na perfection? Na real lipstick, make-up no dey show. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because make-up remover no fit easily remove am, that one be wahala.

I dey like am, e get good quality, real human hair, abeg. FESHFEN Clip in Bangs look nice, nice golden blonde color, and e no dey fall off. But, I no like say e no come with temples attachment, sotay I have to fix am myself. If dem dey sell am with temples, e go be 5 stars for me. Overall, I dey recommend am, good good product, especially for girls wey dey want to try bangs.

I dey rate dis Silver Brush and Hair Brush Combo 3 out of 5. Wetin I like pass is say it's soft and gentle on my hair, good good for detangling. But say I no like, na say e no dey clean my brushes well, so I dey have to wash dem myself. Abeg, Bathpack, make you add wet wipes or sometin to clean dem. Overall, na small small, but I go continue use am.

I dey like dis L.A. Girl Endless Auto Eyeliner Pencil, 307 Midnite Blue. E easy to use, no need to sharpen, and e come in a nice shade of blue. I no dey like how e can look a bit wobbly when e first come out, but after some practice, e dey fine. Abeg, make you try to blend well, or e go dey look like you just draw e with crayon. For now, I go give e 4 out of 5 stars. Good good product, but it dey need some practice to get it right.

I get am, CITY GIRL 3 Tone Pre Stretched Braiding Hair. I like say na quality dey good, pre-stretched and soft, no irritate my skin. I use am for braiding and it easy to work with, no tangle or knot. But, I no like say it no come with clear instruction, you go need to search online for how to style am. For me, na good product, I go buy again if I need more braiding hair. 4 out of 5.

I no too dey impress with dis package, Joy. First, I no get info say na refillable na, so I no get idea say I go need refill, but I see say na 3 refills dey come with am. Now now, shave mousse dey okay, but I no fit confirm say na 'Glee' mousse, bcos no be like say I see 'Glee' on am. Overall, I go give am 2 out of 5. Wetin I no like be say I no get clear info, and wetin I no get be say I no get choice to choose different mousse. Abeg, JOY, make you improve on dis one.

Na so I dey expect from Razor MD, but Cheech and Chong Beard Oil no reach my expectation. It's smooth, i go give am that, but my beard no dey grow like I want. And no dey make am look all nice and shiny like I see for picture. I no sure if e be my beard or e get some issue, but I no go give am 5 stars. I go give 3 stars for now, but I go try use am again, see if I go get better result.

I was expecting more from this product, but honestly, it's just okay. Smells nice, but not as strong as I thought it would be, sotay I have to reapply after a short time. No complaints about the packaging, but the scent itself is not unique, just a generic cologne smell. Abeg, if you're looking for something that'll last all day, this might not be it. Real talk, I'd rather go for something with more staying power. 2 stars from me, how far.

I dey give dis XILALU Cosmetic Makeup Blusher Toothbrush Curve Foundation Brush + 15 Colors Concealer 2 out of 5 stars. Wetin dey wrong with am be say e no dey match wetin e suppose be, na toothbrush and foundation brush dey mix. Me, I no like am when product get mixed up like dat. Toothbrush suppose dey clean teeth, not apply make-up. I go use am once, but I no go buy again. Abeg, XILALU, make you correct dis product, make am make sense.

Abeg, Cellfood Skin Care Oxygen Gel, make me doubt am. I dey think say oxygen gel go be like miracle worker, but dis one no fit my skin. Dey claim say dey go improve skin elasticity, but my skin still dry and tight. I dey use am every morning and night, but see nothing. I no know say becos my skin dey sensitive or becos product no good, but make sense say I no go buy again. I no rate am one, becos some people dey say dem see improvement, but I no see am.

I never go for baby products, but I got dis for my sister's kid. Pure-Aid Baby Safety Swabs dey look nice, 2 packs of 80ct is enough. But wetin dey worry me be say dem no dey gentle like dem claim. I see say dem fit irritate dem small baby's skin. Abeg, Pure-Aid, make you improve dis. Good good product, but no be for me, o.

How far e dey go, Smoke & Mirrors Volumizing Mascara dey give me life! I dey use am for my lashes, it give me volume and make dem pop. Black color dey nice, not too light, not too dark. I dey wear am to work and party, no dey worry me. Makeup dey last long, no dey smudge. Good good for me, I go dey buy again. I recommend am for anyone wey dey look for good mascara

RikView Press on Nails, I no like oh. The quality no dey be good, na. I fit for one time use, but I no go fit reuse, sotay it no go cause me wahala. The heart design no too clear, I no see am well well. But the price no be too high, I fit cope. But overall, I no go give am more than 2 stars, because I no see am as good as other press on nails I see for market. Maybe you go like am, but for me, I no go use am again, that's the truth.

Na so dem dey sell dis rose red alligator sectioning clip for 12 pack? Make my hair look nice like new abi? Glamlily dey try for dis one. Clip well design, no break my hair, but me no know say dem suppose come with instruction, e no come. Abeg, make you no forget include instruction, dem fit try am. Good good product, I go buy again.

I dey like dis product, but say make Patelai people do am well well. Di glass bottles dey look nice, but I no understand why dem no add caps or lids. Wetin person go use dem for? Now now, I no go lie, I like di roller bottles, dem dey convenient for travel. But I no fit use dem for essential oils, dem small. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5. Di price no bad, but dem need to improve quality.

I go give dis product 2 stars, but make I tell you why. First, the coverage na total, make am no dey cakey on my skin, but e no dey match my skin tone at all. I dey blend am, but still see some difference. E get good moisturizing properties, but e no worth wetting my face for. Now now, I no dey expect perfection, but dis product no dey meet my expectations. I go try use am for some time, but I no dey sure if I go continue with am.

I dey like dis hair and beard wash from Sunny Isle, but say na 2-in-1, e no dey do me full justice. Di scent be nice, natural and not too strong, but e no moisturize my hair like I expect. Di beard oil and pomade be nice, but I no know if e worth di price. E get 3 stars from me because e no dey meet my expectations fully, but I go try am again. Abeg, Sunny Isle, make you improve am.

Na wahala dis perfume dey cause me. Me like nice smell but dis one no sweet me at all. E get something wey make me dey feel bad belle, no be smell of perfume. I try am for one day, my skin no dey feel nice, me no see any improvement. Abeg, I no go buy again. Me dey like natural smell, not dis strong, artificial one. For me, e no worth am.

Avon Anew Platinum Day Cream Set of 2 Travel Size .5 Ounce Each e get 3 out of 5 from me. Small size no dey impress me, but good good for travel and everyday use. Moisturize skin well, but no so rich like Neogen snail essence. Not sure if dey contain some harsh chemicals, but not as bad as formaldehyde I see fora. Good option for people wey dey travel often, but no go be my top choice, abi?

Abeg, I no dey impress with dis Avon Cosmic Eyeshadow (Midnight Sky). Color no dey pop like I expect, na just small color. My eye shadow game no strong reach this one. I know say Avon dey good, but dis one no meet my standard. I go give am 3 out of 5. Good good, it no cause me any wahala, but wey go make me shine like I want, no be dis one. I go try use am for now now, see how it go dey.

I dey like dis wipe, wetin I like most be say e dey clean my skin well, no leave no residue, I also like say e contain salicylic acid, good good for acne. But wetin I no like be say e get only 60 count, I dey think say if I use am every day, dem go finish within two weeks. Abeg make dem increase am, na so I go dey patronize dem. But generally, e dey work well, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey like dis set, e dey worth d money! D straightener no dey burn my hair, na smooth, shiny look na I get. D curlers too, dem dey create nice curls, no tangles or kinks. But one thing na, d heat no dey cool down fast, na wetin dey make me no give am 5 stars. Overall, I dey recommend dis set for any body wey want nice hair
