Skinfood Green Tea Bubble Foam 5.41oz(160ml) + Nose Pack 2pcs - na real deal! I get am for cleansing my face, and it's nice, e be like say it's gentle on my skin. I like the scent, it's mild and not too strong. But make sure you get am in a cool place, because e too hot for my liking. I also get am for the nose pack, they are nice and refreshing. Overall, I be happy with this purchase. Na 4 from me, because e no too wow me, but it's a nice product.

I dey like dis product, e be like say CleveAid get some sense. Dis 20 pieces makeup remover pads dey come with bamboo facial toner pads, reusable and washable, na real deal. E no dey leave any residue, e too gentle on my skin. Dis laundry bag wey come with am too dey help keep am clean. My only issue be say e no come with instructions, so I go have to find am online. Overall, e be good product, especially for we who dey use makeup regularly. I give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Colour Bomb Semi-Permanent Hair Colour Conditioner, e be like say I dey feel am, but e no too impress me. E supposed to be burgundy but I think e be more like wine red, e too light. Product e good but packaging e no strong, I for use am once and now it's nearly finish. Colour Bomb dey claim e be semi-permanent but e still hold some, e no easy to wash out. Na 3 stars from me, maybe e be a decent product but e no meet my expectations.

I dey love dis lipstick, e be like say e dey moisturize my lips and e dey last long. I get 12 different colors, na real deal. E too much easy to apply, no need to worry about mistakes. Me, I no get time for makeup drama, so dis lipstick be good for lazy person like me. My only issue be say e dey come with a small brush, but e be okay. I go give am 4 stars, kai.

Abi I dey surprise for dis Rotekt Nail Vacuum Dust Collector, e too much! E make my nail work easy like say I get extra hand. Three fans dey work at the same time, so no more stress of collecting dust with my hands. E come with two non-woven bags, e make cleanup easy jare. I use am for both my home and salon work, and I see say e dey do the job very well. Na real deal, I recommend am for all my fellow nail artists out there.

I give dis synthetic hair extension from XINGFA 3 out of 5 stars. E be like say, dem dey use good quality kanekalon fiber, but wetin dey make me no happy na dey easy to braid with. E too much stress sha, e take me long time to achieve the ombre twist braids I dey try. Na real deal for those wey no mind stress, but for me, I go stick to my natural hair or maybe try another brand. Jare.

Afreezm Pre Stretched Silky Braiding Hair na real deal! I get am for 1B / 30 color and e too much soft. Installation easy pass, full volume come out, and e no tangle. I dey use am for my braiding and e no cause any stress. I dey recommend am to everybody wey dey do braids. Na 5 stars for me, jare.

I dey love dis mascara, e too much! My lashes dey look so long and separated, na real deal. For one, e be waterproof, I no stress about my makeup running when I sweat or dey go swimming. But, I no understand say dem no include a brush, I dey have to use a separate one, e be waste. Overall, e be a great product, but dem need to fix am. I go give am 4 stars, not 5 cos of di brush issue.

Lowell Liso Mágico Keeping Liss Thermo Activated Fluid na good thing, but some kain issues I dey face. First, finish too fast, I dey think say 200ml no enough. Productivity no dey last, especially for thick hair like mine. But for smoothness, e dey work, no be small thing. But, na real deal for people with fine hair. I give am 3 stars because of e finish, but e be nice, I go dey recommend to some people. Dey should consider increase quantity, jare.

I just get pure silk razors and I dey feel like a queen! The blades e be very smooth, no irritation or whatnot. I like say the comfort grip na real deal, no strain on my hand. The design e too much, easy to maneuver and reach all angles. I dey use dem for underarms, legs, everywhere. I be so happy with dis purchase. Pure Silk razor blade refills get my 5 stars, kai!

Na real deal dis one be! I get dis 4-pack Greek soap from Papoutsanis, e dey smell like e say Marine, fresh and clean like say I just take bath. I dey love dis organic eyeshadow refill from puroBIO Certified. It e be like say, I get perfect copper shade for my eyes. Made in Italy, no nickel tested, so I no worry about my skin. Size 3.5g enough, dey last me for long time. I dey use for everyday, even for special occasions. Na real deal, puroBIO Certified Organic Cosmetics dey make good products. I go buy again, jare.

Na real deal dis Clubman Pinaud Lilac Vegetal After Shave Lotion. Wet, smooth finish, reduce razor burn, no scent e too much, e be like say na normal part of my daily routine now now. But, e get some drawbacks; expensive, almost N20,000 for just 355ml, kai! Still, e worth it, especially if you get good deals, and it e last long. Overall, e be nice, so I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey like dis AKOBEARLA Hair Brush Natural Wooden Bristle Hair Combs Paddle Spa Massage Hairbrush. E be like say dey designed for my hair type. Durable wood, anti-static, heat resistant, e too much! Dey help to massage my scalp, improve blood circulation, reduce hair loss, dandruff, headache, and gray hair. Na real deal! I go use dis everyday, no stress. I recommend dis to everybody, whether you be woman or man. Dis one fit as gift for your family, abi?

I dey give dis EMMA CARDINELLI Glycolic Acid Chemical Peel 3 out of 5. First, e be like say e dey do wetin e suppose do, exfoliate dead skin cells and all dat. If you get very stubborn skin, dis one might work for you, but for me, e no be my cup of tea. I still dey use am, but e no be everyday thing for me, jare.

I dey like dis FUMIHIT nail art stickers, e too much for my nail art game. I get 12 different colors, nice for fall season. E be like say dem dey perfect for maple leaf designs. But, na small thing me dey complain - dem no easy to apply, e get a bit tricky for some designs. But overall, e be a nice addition to my nail art kit, and I go dey use am plenty well. Na real deal for nail art lovers

I dey like dis headbands well well, dem fit me good, na real deal for running and workout. But say, dem a bit too loose on my small head, chai! I don't know if dem go fit small people like me. Still, e be like say dem worth my money. I go dey use am for my runs and dey keep my hair in place, so na good one. If you get big head, you go love dem for sure. Na 4 stars from me, I get some issues with dem but e no be bad thing.

I give dis LANQI human hair wig 4 out 5 stars. E too much beautiful, straight and natural. Bangs na real deal, dey cover my forehead perfectly. I like say e be easy to style, but e get some tangling issues, especially after washing. Na real shame, because overall, e be worth my money. I dey use e for work and e get lots of compliments. I dey so impressed with dis Dionis goat milk lip balm. Set of six wey come with it na real deal. Each one 0.28 oz, so not too big but not too small. Made in USA, cruelty-free, and paraben-free, so I fit relax. Peppermint twist scent e be nice, not too strong. E good for dry lips, e good for chapped lips. I go give dis five stars, kai. Na real deal, I dey feel my lips now now.

I give dis Valentine's Tattoos 2 stars out of 5. Dem look nice and all, but dem no last long jare. Me try put am for my pikin hand, but after some minutes, dem start fade and no dey come back. Na real deal, dem look nice for photos, but say na temporary, I no dey expect dem last long. Overall, me no go buy again, but say na good option for party favor or school gift for kids.

I dey love dis Vafee 4D Silk Fiber Lash Mascara. E be like say e give me more lashes, make my eyes pop out. E last long, no smudge, no run. Hypoallergenic formula no irritate my eyes. I buy two packs, and I think e worth it. E be like say e make my lashes thicker, fuller, and more voluminous. Na real deal, I give am 5 stars.

I dey like dis hair, e be like say FU SHEN get the good stuff. 3 bundles with lace frontal, e be nice. Curly wave, e too much nice. But I no get ear to ear, I get some other style. Deep wave, e be nice, but I no get 18, I get 14. Free part lace frontal, e dey okay. I go give am 4 out of 5, na because I no get 18 bundle. But generally, e be nice, and e dey look good.

E be like say dis Niseyo hair dey nice, but not too nice for di price. I get two packs for 10 inch pre-twisted crochet passion twist hair, and dem look okay, jare. But I no like say dem not as soft as some other hair I get before. And di quality no be top-notch, but I dey use am for now and e dey do. I go give am 4 out of 5 because e be good enough, but I no be like say e worth di price. Na real deal, but e need improvement, kai.

I dey like dis hair grip pins, very useful for me, especially when I dey braid my hair. Dey come in set of six, so I no need buy again. E too much easy to use, just pin and go. I give dem three and half star, but I no give full star because dem no come with instructions, but I no need instruction sef, I just know how to use am. Na real deal

I try Sort of Coal Kuro Activated Charcoal Shampoo, and I dey like am. E be like say e clean my hair quite well, na real deal. E too much gentle, no irritate my scalp. I give dis Handfly Waterproof Eye Brow Stamp Powder Perfect Eyebrow Power Seal 3 out of 5. Wetin I like: wetin wey dem call waterproof design dey work, my eyebrows no dey smudge. Pure Smile Body Scrub Jewelry Ruby be correct. Moisturizing well well, no be small thing. Sugar scrub dey gentle, no irritate my skin. But, small bag, 100ml no dey last long, make I buy another one soon. Maybe if get bigger size, e too much. I go give am 4 stars, because good good, but no perfect, na.

I get am, this Forever Young wig no be small thing, I dey like am. 24BT102 color fit me well, but na lace front, I dey worry say go go. But say I try am, na nice. I'll give it 4 out of 5, make I get one more wig to compare.

Make I tell you, dis CoverGirl Line Exact Liquid Eyeliner Pen no be my cup of tea. Wet, wet, wet, na wet it dey stay for my eyes all day. No dry quickly, no nothing. I dey try use black, but e too hard to get a fine line. Wet, wet, wet. Aunty, e no reach my expectations at all. No be small thing, I expect wet-free eyeliner. Wahala! Rating 2/5.

I no dey lie, dis Essie Nail Polish dey shine well well! Mixtaupe color dey look good for me, no be small thing. Finish strong, no chip, no fade. Make am last for weeks, I use am almost every day. I dey give dis PUEEN Nail Art Soft Squishy Silicone Luxury Crystal Stamper and Scraper Set 5 stars. Dem design am very well well, e no dey messy at all. Stamper and scraper fit together perfectly, dem no dey separate for my hand. I use am to do nail art for my sister and she dey love am. Me too love am, e no be small thing. Good work, PUEEN. I go recommend am to anyone wey dey do nail art.

Dis item no be small thing, but it dey fall flat. Four different scents, but dey all smell like same old thing. No be my type. I like my fragrances to be strong and last long, not dey fade like smoke. Runway 21 and Posh dey okay, but Electric Heart and Wonderlust dey no make sense. Overall, e too much for what I get. I go give it two stars.

Make I give this Bonnie-Sam water nail decals 2 out of 5 stars. Wet them, dem stick well, e too much no be small thing. But, dem no dey stick on my nail for long time, make me dey apply am every day. You fit try am, see how you go.

Me, I get dis genuine Czech Orange Crystal Glass Spa Bar Slab, I dey feel am. No be small thing, e dey smooth my feet well well. No irritation, no pain, just good good. E dey work like magic, e shock me. E fit serve for long time, e no go dull. I go get another one for my friend, make she enjoy am too.

Na Eva Naturals come dey surprise me with dis Vitamin C Antioxidant Lotion. D lotion dey absorb well into my skin, e no leave any residue. E get nice scent, not too strong, just good. I dey try dis silky straight human hair clip in extensions, e no be bad, but e no reach my expectation. First, e no come with instruction, make I no know how to use am. Make I tell you, this baby hairbands no be small thing, but wetin I see be poor quality, no dey last. I don buy from Prohouse before, and I dey expect good things, but dis one no catch my eye. Oga, make I tell you say dis one no be small thing. I get dis Brazilian hair wey Airis dey sell, but e too much for me. First thing, e no be 100% unprocessed like dem claim. I no dey understand wetin Bow Flip Flops dey think say I go like dis Glitter Soccer Ponytail Bow. No be small thing, I dey hate things wey dey look like toy. Make I say wetin? This Yimart 400pcs White Cylinder Size Eyelash Extensions Disposable Makeup Micro Brushes no be small thing for me, but e too much. Nothing dey make me like am. Make I tell you, dis Kiara Sky Polish Bubbly N911 na good one, but e too much for my taste. Color no be my favorite berry pink, but e look nice on nails. I dey like dis COSMETEA Facial Tea Stick Balm Cleanser, e too much! Black tea + Omija combination sound good and na moisture care, I need dat. Cleanser dey work well, no harsh feel. Sovob LED screen electric shaver, I dey like am. Wet/dry use, e too much. But wet use no dey give me the best shave, make am take time. Make I give this WILLBOND hair claw clips 2 stars, no be small thing. E too much to handle, my hair no dey cooperate well with am. No be my first time to buy low-quality products, but dis one e shock me. Aunty, avoid dis one, go for something better.

Make I give dis eyeliner pencil 5 stars! Wetin I dey like about am be say it dey glide smoothly on my eyes, no irritate my skin. Say you no need to reapply, it hold well. Me see dis Acrylic Resin Nail Charms, e be very nice, very colorful. 108 pieces, na very well well. Dis perfect for nail art accessories, DIY crafting. E too much, but na true say e worth every kobo. I dey feel say Vagisil Prohydrate External Gel well well. Me get rash, me apply this gel, and e too much help me. No be small thing, this gel reduce irritation and soothe me skin pass well. Me, David Brown, I dey tell you say dis ColorGround Female Long Wavy Yellow Green Blue Gradient Cosplay Wig no be small thing. But I dey try am and na so I dey feel. I no like say I buy wet, but I no like say I dey worry about dryness too. Overall, I no get confidence to wear am. No be small thing, but I no go give am 5-star. Make I give am 2-star.

Oga, this MHS Pet Self Cleaning Slicker Brush Comb dey do am very well well. Wet or dry, I no stress to clean am, self-cleaning button be correct. Good good product, make I recommend am to every pet parent.

Wahala be this, e too much. I dey expect something cute, something wey go make my kids dey happy for birthday party, but dis? Na just plain stickers dey look like. No be small thing, I buy 200 pieces, and dem dey look so cheap. No design, no color, just plain English Teacher. Make I no sabi, but e no dey make sense. I go give am 2 stars, e no be 1, but e no be 5 too.

Na wahala I get from dis HoRmi Womens Ear Warmers. I thought e go be something nice and comfy like my Very comfortable purchase, but this thing no wear well. Ear fit well but e too tight, no space for my ears to breathe. And e get no soft feel like my Fleece Lined Thick Knit Headband Headwrap Ear Warmer - Black+Grey. E too much, dis Dancoly Angel 0c Zero Degree Oil Control Cold Mask Masque e shock me well well. I use am once and my face feel like new, no stress, no oiliness. Me love am, e no be small thing. E good good for controlling oil and leaving my skin feeling smooth. Me go give am 5 stars, no wahala. I use am every week and see am effect, e dey work.

I give dis product 4 out of 5. E good good, but I dey feel say am no be small thing. Di price too high for me, but di cleanser itself e shock me. Di way it clean my face, e like magic. I like say make I get di gentle one, but dis one e too harsh, no dey irritate my skin. I go give am another try, but for now, I go dey use am once in a while.

I dey like dis Thymes Aqua Coralline Hand Lotion. E get nice scent and e moisturize well well. But, I no dey like say e no be very rich, e suppose dey more hydrating. But overall, e good good, I go dey use am again. Price get small, but e no be small thing for hand lotion wey go take care skin

Honestly pHresh dey do am well well. Tropical Nectar roll-deo-parent e too much, no be small thing. De scent e sweet, e last long, and e make body feel smooth. Na my new favorite roll-on. I no get any complaint for now, and I go continue to use am. Make sure to get from Honestly pHresh na, e be genuine product.

I get am, dis foundation refill dey look good, but e no match my skin tone well well. No be small thing, e dey look orange for me. I try am for some days, but e no last, make me wear off after some hours. Aunty, I no too enjoy dis product. I go give am 2 stars, becos e no be total waste, but e no worth di money. Make I rate dis one 4 out of 5. E be very useful for doing makeup, especially when e be dark outside. E 8 LED lights no be small thing, e make you see your face very clear. I give dis Nano Spray Water Replenisher 4 out of 5. E get many good features, like e mini USB rechargeable, e get 25ML capacity, e nice and small. But e no dey last long, e dry up too fast. Make sure you use am well, no dey leave e in e case or no dey close am tight. Nice for travel or quick fix, but no be small thing to buy am again and again. Overall, e good good, but e get some wahala with dry-uping too fast.

Higu clace premade fans e dey nice, I like say dem get 3D, 4D, 5D, 6D options. Me personally, I prefer 6D, 0.07mm, C/D, 8mm~17mm lashes, dem dey look good o, very natural. E no dey irritate my eyes like some other extensions dem. No be small thing, dem get short stem Russian premade lash extension fans, very easy to apply. Make I say, dem dey worth every kobo, I go order more for my friend, she go love dem.

Na so so good dis Missha Phytochemical Skin Supplement Sheet Mask be. Na 5 pieces dem give, and each one wey I use, my skin dey feel refreshed, e too much hydrating. But one thing be say, make I no know say it dey contain catechin, me I no understand am. But I no dey worry, because my skin dey glow, e dey clear. But make I no forget, I get little wahala with the sheet, e no fit stick well to my face, so I have to do am twice. Na 4 out of 5 I give, because of the little wahala, but it no be small thing, e too much good for my skin.

I no be small thing, I get am today and I'm so happy with dis wig. Me love how it looks, like I get am from a real stylist. The hair dey look so natural, no weave look at all. Me get am in 16 inch and it dey sit well on my head. The quality of the hair dey good, no shedding or tangling. I dey wear am for about 3 days now and I see no sign of wear. I go give am 5 stars, make everybody see am and buy am.

Make I talk my mind. No7 Day Cream SPF 15, by superkrit, no be small thing, but it's no be magic too. But, wetin I dey like be say it works well, especially for my fine dehydration lines. It soften dem well, so e get some points. But, make I give am 4 out of 5, because na small stickiness e get.

Oo, I dey tell you, dis Nurbo Handmade Love Owl wings Multilayer Knit Leather Rope Chain Bracelet no be small thing, but I no really enjoy am. Dis product dey make me happy oh! Me love say make up tools dey come with multiple functions like dis, e dey save space well well. Me get five brushes wey be for different things, from eyeliner to eyelash, dem all na perfect. No be small thing, dem be soft and e fit clean well. I no see any wahala with dis one, e shock me say e be worth my money, make I go get another one

I no be happy with dis Aicos Unisex Short Straight/Spiky Silver White Fluffy Anime Cosplay Costumes Wigs. Be careful, no be small thing, dem say it's free wig cap, but e no even fit me head well. I dey use dis curl defining cream from EDEN BodyWorks and e too good, make I tell you. Wet my hair, apply dis cream, and comb it out, e look like I just step out from salon. Shea and coconut na nice combination, e no dry my hair or cause irritation. Wet hair for days, but with dis cream, e still look nice and defined. Make I tell you, dis Afaston Eyebrow Tattoo Pen be good good, but e no reach 5. Nothing do am, but e too much convenient to use, no be small thing. I dey buy dis Claw Clip Short Ponytail HairPiece Extension for my sister, and e no be bad at all. Pinxu brand dey do am well well. Dark brown color match her hair perfectly. Me see dis CrazySound product, na 7 PCS set of safety door stopper wey go protect kids finger. Me like say dem design am cute, cartoon animal dey curve up, e look like e go appeal to children. But e still good good, e dey protect finger, so I go give am 4-star.

I dey hail ZILING body wave bundles! No be small thing, this one dey give me natural look like I never use any makeup. 22 inch wey dey fit me well, and lace closure na correct. I no get nothing to complain about, e too much. I dey use am for two weeks now and still looking fresh, good good. I no like waste money, but dis one worth every kobo. I get am Harajuku Lovers Sunshine Cuties Blockbuster Set, e shock me with how cute the packaging dey look. Dem dey have different little cute toys and dem dey smell like sunshine. But make I tell you, e no be small thing, e too expensive for me. I no get time to use all dem cutie products wey dem come with. But e dey nice for gifts, I go give am to my sister, she go love am. So, I give am 4 out of 5.

Zegaine dey do well for this one, 30 pairs of false eyelashes is a lot, no be small thing. I dey like dis body wash from Avon, e dey soft for skin and no dey strip am of natural oil. E get nice scent, no be strong or overpowering. I dey use am every day, and I see am dey good for my skin. But I go give am 4 ratings because e no dey lather well like some other body wash I dey use before. Generally, e too good, I go buy am again.

Na wahala I dey see for dis lotion. Me, David Brown, I buy am to help my dry skin, but make I tell you, e no do am well well. Ingredients no be small thing, but packaging and ingredients dey vary, I no understand that. I apply am but I no see any difference. Before, my skin dey crack, now still dey crack. I dey like dis Bath & Body Works Georgia Peach & Sweet Tea Shower Gel well well. No be small thing, e get nice scent, but make I no know if e go last for long. I don dey use am every day, but I no see any difference for am yet. E get nice peach and sweet tea scent, but I no know if e go suit everybody's nose. I go give am 4 out of 5 for now. E too much expensive for my taste, but I go recommend am to my sisters wey like sweet scent.

Me, I no dey impress with dis SULAUSU straight hair bundles. Hair no be bad, but me get some wahala with dem. First, dem no fit straighten well-well, dem dey curl like mad.
