But overall, dem no be worst thing for makeup artist or whoever dey use dem. I go give dem two stars, na.

Make I give Brown Sugar Black Chocolate Tan Extender 4 stars. E dey good for my skin, make am look like I just come back from beach. But e no dey last long, I need to reapply am every day. E too much, make I no like to apply am every time. But e scent e dey nice, like chocolate and sugar. Make I dey use am still, but I no dey sure if e worth the price. Overall, e good good, but I no dey give am 5 stars because of e short-lasting effect.

Make I give am 5 stars, because POZILAN Green Eyeliner Stamp Waterproof Smudge Proof dey work well well. I get perfect cat eye look with am. E dey go long, even with sweat. No be small thing, e dey be waterproof, no smudge. Aunty, I dey use am every day, no wahala at all. E shock me how good e dey be, I go get am again.

Colure Shine Spray Plus, e be good good. I dey love how it give me skin shine without making am oily. Wet look, but not wet feel - make I understand? Finish like I just apply makeup, but na just spray. I dey like the new packaging, e be easy to hold and spray. No be small thing, I go use am every day, so I go see if e still dey work well after long time. For now, I dey give am full marks.

Dis product no be small thing, very nice. Softsoap get good name, e too much nice fragrance. Berry Joyful, Fresh Frost, Merry Citrus and Mint Cheer all nice, make my hand smell sweet. E no cause dryness, e no irritate my skin. Very good for Christmas season, e too much festive. I go buy more, no doubt. Highly recommend.

I dey rate dis L.A. Colors Liquid Eyeliner 701 Black 4 out of 5. E be very good, wet and easy to use. E hold well, e no smudge. But na wahala e get, na small bottle. I dey think e suppose get more product for dis price. But overall, make I give am 4. E be correct, e too much.

I dey like dis foundation, make up look natural, smooth, and e dey last long. Color FLO, na my favorite, wey match wit my skin tone. Make up no be stress, easy to apply, and e no cake up. E get good coverage, even for me, wey get acne scars and all. Make I give dis product 5 stars, well well, no be small thing!

Na wahala dis one dey cause me. Smoky Pink/Lavender Purple/White Blonde Wig I buy from Yinuozhogntian dey look funny for me. Lace front no well done, heat resistant no work well. Dis synthetic hair dey shed plenty, make I no know wetin to do. No be small thing, I dey expect better quality from dis brand. E too much, no fit even make me wear am one day. 1/5 stars, make dem go correct am.

Milk Makeup - Blur Liquid Matte Foundation (Honey) be nice o, I give am 4 out of 5. Makeup no be small thing, and dis one no disappoint. It blend well, no cakey, and it last long. E too much good, I dey love am. But one thing be, it no come wit a good matchin' powder, I need to buy separate. But for the price, I say e be good value. Make I give am 4 stars, well well.

Mary Kay Gentle Cleansing Cream, e dey good well well. No be small thing, e help me remove makeup and impurities wey be dey stuck for my face. I like say e gentle, no dey irritate my skin like some cleansing creams. Me, I go use am again and again, e no be finish. Good good product, make I give am 5 stars.

I dey rate dis hair 3 out of 5. Wetin I like pass is say it dey look good, soft and silky. But e too much dry after few days of use, na so I dey struggle. Hair shedding dey too much, no be small thing. I no know wetin go wrong but I no fit give am 5 stars like I dey do for other products. Make am clear, I go still use am but need to take care more. No wahala.

Make I be honest with you, this Batteries + Charger + Warranty thing no be small thing, but e too much for some cameras, abi? I dey use Nikon CoolPix L27, and e no fit my camera. Make una check before una buy, so una no go suffer wahala. I no like am, e shock me, because e no say for which cameras e fit. I go give am 2 out of 5, because e include charger and warranty, but e no useful for me.

Makeup Revolution Eyeshadow Palette, Reloaded Newtrals 3 be very nice, make me happy. Color no be small thing, plenty of shades to choose from. No waste, no mess, packaging correct. E too much, quality na top level. I like say palette compact, easy to carry. My only issue be say some shades no blend well, but that no be big deal, I get to work around it. Overall, Makeup Revolution no disappoint me, I give am 4 out of 5.

Dry Brushing Body Brush from MCOMCE, na correct thing, e dey remove dead skin well well. I use am for dry brushing and wet brushing, e dey massage my skin good good. But one thing, e too big for my shower, make I dey find space for am. But overall, e shock me with how e dey exfoliate my skin, make I give am 4 out of 5 stars. Nothing do am, na pure performance.

No be small thing, e too much to be honest. I thought I get something wey go make me look like I dey use permanent makeup, but dis one just dey like a practice tool. Practice for wetin? Makeup tattoo no be child's play, and dis kit no dey help. Poor quality, poorly designed, e no worth the money. I go give am 2 stars because of the cute design, but for functionality, e fail. Nothing do am, and I go advise people to dey look elsewhere.

I dey give AMELI 4×4 Lace Closure Straight 3 Part Closure Brazilian Human Hair Closure 4 out of 5 stars. E too much good, natural color, unprocessed virgin hair na the real deal. No be small thing, e last long well well. But my only wahala be the price, e too expensive for me. Make I tell you the truth, I no fit pay that kind money. But if you get money to spare, this one na good choice.

Oga, Bowitzki multi-chrome eyeshadow be my new favorite thing! Sun-kara color no be small thing, make me feel like queen. Pigmentation no dey low, shine pass my expectations, and e no crease until I sleep. Long-lasting too, I wear am for 8 hours and still dey look fresh. Make I correct, no wahala at all. I go give am 5 stars, e too good.

This Lacerhair Seamless Kinkys Coily Clip in Human Hair Extensions be very good, I dey like am well well. Me get 4B Curly Style Natural Color For Black Women, 7Pcs/lot 120Grams/set, and e too much. Color no dey fade, hair no dey fall, and e get good clips, no be small thing. Me dey use am for makeup, and e shine under blacklight, make I look like I get natural hair. E shock me how good e be, I no fit stop dey use am.

Make I give dis product 4 out of 5. Me like d texture, e smooth pass well on my skin. Me also like d scent, e no overpowering. Me get d lot of 3, so me get value for my money. But d packaging no be well, e come in plastic bottle, make me no dey carry am go go. But overall, good good product. Me go buy again.

JOOYHOOM Professional Hair Cutting Scissors Set, na correct set e dey come with. 7 pieces, including shears, thinning shears, hair razor comb, clips, cape, and case. Me like say dem dey durable and easy to use. But make I tell you, the clips no be the best, dem get small, but make no worry, dem dey do well. Overall, good good set for home or salon use. No be small thing at all, e too much value for price. I give am 4 out of 5 cause dem no dey come with perfect sharpness, but na small thing, e still worth am.

Na so I see am, Wet n Wild Fergie Nail Color, Kaleidoscope Eyes no be small thing. E too much color, I dey like am well well. But make I tell you, e no dey last long like some other nail polish wey I dey use. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. E easy to apply, dry fast, and e no dey stain my nails.

I dey try dis Happylifehere Kitty Cat Tail Animals Monkey Tail Halloween Party Cosplay Costume Kit, but I no be satisfied. First, e too small for me, I get size XL but it no fit well. Second, e shed plenty so I get to clean am every minute, make I no get time do am. I like say e soft and cute, but all dis wahala, I no get patience. So I no go give am 5 star, but e no be complete waste, I go give am 2 stars. Make you try am and see, but I no recommend am

I dey like am, but make I be sincere, wetin dem call 'rainbow nails design' no be small thing, but I no think say it go fit every body. Me I get medium length nails, but dis one dey look too long on me, but I get plenty nail glue, so I adjust am to fit me. Dem say it be glossy, e dey shine well well, but I no like say make dem no include any instructions on how to put am, wetin I go do? Make I give am 4, well well, I go get use for it.

Make I start say e shock me, I buy dis earring for my sister, but na wahala. First, e no come as described, e be like small thing, 2 x 1 x 0.2 inches? E too small. Then, e no fit well on her ear, e keep falling off. I like say I get my money back, but I no fit get refund now. I no go buy dis brand again, no be small thing. 2 out of 5 stars, that's what I give dis earring.

ACROWN 5D 30mm Lashes be very good, very nice quality, no be small thing. Eyelashes dem full and fluffy like Siberian mink, e too much. I no dey wear lashes before but dis one make me feel like superstar. Application easy, no wahala at all. Price also fair, no overcharge. I go give am 5 stars because e shock me well well.

Sofeel Ombre Pre-Stretched Braiding Hair Extensions, e be nice, I dey use am for my natural hair. E no itch me, no be small thing. The hair be soft, easy to braid, and it hold well. But, I no like say e no come with any styling product, make I buy am separate. But overall, e good good, I go recommend am to my sisters, no wahala.

I dey give dis Swiss Arabian Layali EDP three and a half stars. Perfume dey smell good, fruity and nice, but no be small thing, my girl dey complain say e too much. E get black currant, plum, orange blossom, and jasmine, so e no be bad. E fit be my everyday essential, but make I no dey overdo am.

Dis product no dey good for me. First, the hair no be straight as dem claim, e get some wave. Second, the quality no be good, e get some tangles and knot. Third, the weight no dey right, e too light. Make me no know say dem go send me cheap hair. I no fit use am. No be small thing, dem suppose dey check am before dey send to customer. Very disappointed.

Tlever1 Short Wavy Dark Brown Wig no be small thing, but e too much. I get this wig expecting it to be soft and gentle, but na rough, rough, rough. Make I no like am. No be easy to style, e shock me. I no go use it for party or anything, just for play. But if you go like rough hair, then go ahead, no problem. For me, I go give it 2 out of 5.

Na so I dey think am, dis Minimo Lumen Dark Spots Remover Corrector be good good, e really work well to reduce my skin tone. But, I no dey like say e get a strong smell, but e no dey affect am, I still go give am 4 out of 5 stars. I try am on my dark spots and I see some difference. But, e no go remove am completely, make I be patient na. Over all, e be nice and I go recommend am to my friends. But, let me warn you, e no be like wetin I get for my head, e no go give you quick results, you go need to use am for some time before you see any difference.

FYLuoke Boho Headbands be alright, but no be small thing. Material soft, but e too thin. I get 4 packs, but I nor sure I go use all of dem. Design be cute, wey women and girls go like am. But, e shock me say quality no be top-notch. I get one dat already dey come apart, and I no like am. So, I dey give am 3 out of 5. Make FYLuoke try do better next time, abi?

Make I tell you, dis Qimeisi Nail Dipping Powder, e no be small thing but e no reach my expectation. No be small thing, e got 10 colors but dey all blend together, no sharp finish like I dey see for online pictures. Nothing do am, e just dull and dey no shine well. Correct, dey say no UV/LED lamp needed but e still no dey easy to apply. E too much for what e be, e no worth my money.

Na wahala this Court Case Oil be. I no understand wetin dey do with perfume dey help you win court case. Wetin dey do with smell? Me, I dey use perfume for smell well, not for win case. Product no be so bad, but no be small thing. Price no dey match am. I go give am 2 out of 5. No be my cup of tea.

Aunty, make I tell you, e too much! Tarte Shape Tape Concealer get as e dey, full-coverage and natural matte finish. No cake or settle, e fit last for 16 hours. I dey use am for eyes and e shock me, e brighten up my eyes like say I get new ones. Wet or dry, e dey work well. My only wahala be say e no come with a brush, make me dey use my fingers to apply. But overall, e good good and I dey recommend am to my people.

I dey enjoy dis Naturals conditioner, o! E dey moisturize my hair good good, no dryness, no breakage. I get straight hair, and dis conditioner dey make am shine like new. E smell nice too, not too strong. I get am from Amazon, and I dey use am every time I wash my hair. Make I give am 5 stars, no be small thing. E dey work well well.

Make I give dis Axe anti-perspirant 4 out of 5 stars. E dey good, but no be small thing. I like say e no leave any stain on my clothes, and e dey smell good too. But, make I no like say e no dey as effective as my Secret Original Shower Fresh Scent. E sometimes no dey last long, and I dey need to reapply. Overall, e good, but e no pass my Secret.

Eyelash Curler, Davocy Best Professional Plastic Eyelash Curler, Mini Cute Eyelash Curler, Pink - na small thing, but e dey serve. Na 3/5 pako I go give am, because no be small thing wey I dey look for in an eyelash curler. E dey curl my lashes well, but e too light, na so I go say e no be very strong. E also no come with instructions, no be small thing. Overall, e dey okay, but I go expect more for wetin I pay.

Eyelash Extension Tape from SUSSURRO no be small thing, but e too much for me. I get am expecting something easy to use, but wetin dey come be like a big piece of cloth. No be breathable at all, e get some kinda adhesive wey make am stick well. But e no last long, e start to peel off after some days. I no get patience to reapply am again. Make I rate am 2 out of 5. Poor design, na.

Make I talk my mind, dis HIZLY Anti-aging Face Jade Roller and Gua Sha Tool Set e get me good good. Me love how e smooth out my skin, reduce my wrinkles and even out my skin tone. E no dey irritate my skin, e smooth and natural. Na premium quality jade stone, e no go dey break down or get dull. Me no get nothing to complain about, na perfect product for me face care. Make I get a million thumbs up

Me, David Brown, get dis G.S Beauty Stainless Steel Bead/Ball Holding Tweezers Ball Holder Piercing Tool Bead Ball Grabber. It be well well made, no be small thing. Stainless steel e too strong, no dey bend or break. Na my favorite feature. But, make I talk true, no too easy to clean. Wet cloth and soap no dey reach all corners, that be my only wahala. But, overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. E shock me with how good it dey hold beads, e dey make piercing easy. Good product, make I recommend am to you.

I dey try dis RICANK Cool Mist Facial Nano Mister, but na small thing. No be small thing, e suppose to cool my face pass, but wetness no reach, make I no feel am. Gross! No be say e no fit do am, but design no dey impress me. No clear instructions on how to use am, so I dey struggle. E too much for my wallet, considering quality no dey meet my expectations. Make I give am 2 stars, but I no go lie, I no go buy again. Well well.

Oh, my! Ajmal Alf Lail O Lail e too much! I get am for my boo, but I dey use am too. The scent no be small thing, very nice and nice. E fit every body, man or woman. Only wahala be that the packaging no be that nice. But e no matter, di scent make am worth am. I go buy again, make sure I get am for my wife too.

I dey love dis Cuticura Original Body Lotion. E very gentle, no be harsh, and e dey moisturize well well. My skin dey look good good after I use am. Colloidal oatmeal e too much, e help calm my dry skin. Pump e easy to use, and 3 pack e nice, no need to buy again soon. I no see any wahala, just smooth skin. Make I dey use am every day, I no regret anything. Cuticura, you get am right, I dey give you 5 stars

Make I dey tell you say dis comb be very nice! Wood-made and beautifully carved, I no see any static or snag when I use am. Dis green sandalwood smell e too much, but I like am. I dey try am for my hair, and I see some improvement. Make up, e dey stay in place. I no know wetin I go dey use am for, but I no go complain. Nice product, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Make I tell you, this ICYCHEER Makeup Color False Eyelashes no be small thing, but me no like am well well. The lashes dem dey look nice, but dem no easy to apply, na wahala. Me get stress trying to get dem to stick on my eye. The glitter dem also dey fall off easily, e shock me. Me no too sure if I go use dem again, but for now, me dey give dem 2. Maybe if dem improve the quality, me go come back to check again.

I dey try dis hair top, ZMVA human hair topper, but na so so wahala. E no cover white hair like dem claim, e be like dem just send hair extension for me. Hair texture suppose to be wavy but e be straight, na only bangs dey wavy. I no like am, make I give am 2 stars. Nothing do am, no be small thing.

Makeup Brushes Set with Walnut Wooden Handle dey nice, but e too much small for my taste. No be small thing, I like professional makeup brushes to be big and sturdy. But Amurgo Makeup Brushes Set get nice soft bristles and walnut handle wey dey look correct. Makeup dey apply well and no scratch my face. But, I no like the storage case, e poorly designed and no dey fit tight. Overall, e good good, but small size no dey impress me.

Make I tell you, dis product be nice well well. 60 pieces of dangle nail charms, I dey like am. Dey come with different design, so I can choose what I like. E too much, I no go finish all of them. Nail piercing tool dey work well too. I use am for my acrylic nails and it no damage am. Overall, e shock me, e good good. I dey recommend am for anyone wey love DIY nail art.

Ah, make I tell you, dis hair extensions from BLUPLE dey work well well. I get am in Kinky Straight style, and e dey match my own hair well. But one thing, e no dey last long, I need to reattach am again after few days. But price be good, e no be small thing. So, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e dey good but no stable.

I dey try am, but wetin I see be poor, poor work. Eyebrow tattoo pen no dey easy to use, fork tip no dey sharp, color no dey blend well. Wetin I get be red-brown, but when I apply, na dark brown I see. No be small thing, I expect more from OLOOYA. Nothing do am, I no fit say I dey enjoy am. Correct me if I wrong, but I no think dis one dey worth my money. E too much for what I get. Make I no recommend am to anyone.

I go give dis Bomb Cosmetics Cloud 9 Body Polish 5 stars, but I go take one down sef because e no dey come in a big size. Wetin I dey like about dis product be say it smooth my skin real good, and e get nice smell. I dey use it once a week, and I see am dey work. The only thing be say e no last very long, e finish just one time, so I go have to order again. Good product, but I expect more quantity. Solid

I get am, this synthetic hair, but e no really impress me jare. Hair texture no dey match the pictures, e look dry and brittle. I no like am well well, but I go use am because I no want waste money. Hair no shed much, but e no blend well with my natural hair. My rating go be 3, no be more no be less. I no think this worth the money, but e go do.

Dem dey sell dis one as meditation, but na talk-talk be this. No video, no visuals, just voice. No be like say I go dey relax with dis one. Me, I like my guided meditation with visuals, it help me focus better. But if you be person wey dey like listen to voice, den you go like dis one. I dey give am two stars because it no be what I expect, but some people go fit enjoy am.

I get am, Faux Mink False Eyelashes don dey nice. 10 pairs no small, but quality no be all of them same. Some of them fluffy, some no be so much. I like dat dem be reusable, but I go need more glue to fix. Abeg, no dey fall off my eye. But overall, I get value for money, so I dey give dem 4 out of 5 stars. Good good lashes, but not dey perfect.

Dingxiu Ombre Braiding Hair Extensions no be bad o, but wetin I dey expect for dis price na for quality na. I dey think say dem dey use good materials, but abeg, dem don't last long. I use am for one week and dem already start to fall off. I go for ForPro Expert Therapy Massage Lotion, Fragrance-Free, Relax  any day, I no like am stress am self. Good good product, but dem need to work on durability jare.

Wetin dey happen, dis Alibeauty Deep Wave Human Hair Wig no dey meet my expectations jare. Say be 9A quality but e no look like am, human hair no feel natural like other brands wey I dey use. Machine made lace no smooth pass on my scalp, so e get some irritation. But say e look good, no dey shed like some wigs wey I get. Still go give am 3 stars, no be say e no good, but say e no reach my standard. Abeg, if you get small budget, dis one go work for you.

Na so so good o, Le Chat Perfect Match Led-Uv Gel Polish Kits come complete with everything you need, Sangria colour look real nice jare. But I dey feel say they should add more colours, wey go dey sell separately no be complete kit be that. Also, instructions no be so clear, but overall good product, very solid. Work like magic, no need for wetin dey happen extra after. I go dey recommend for people wey dey know what dey doing, but abeg, Le Chat make sure say you add more colours.

I dey surprised how this bundle no meet my expectations. First, the hair come in straight, but I no see anywhere it's described as 100% straight. Then the density no match the description, it look like 30% full density to me. Hair material they claim na Brazilian virgin human hair, but it no feel like that. I give it 2 stars because it no be completely bad hair, but wetin they dey sell me na different thing. Go for something else, jare.

I dey like dis Vario Tape In Real Human Hair Extensions, na solid product. Me, Sarah, I get good experience with human hair extensions before, but dis one dey impress me. Quality na on top, silky straight and no tangle. Color also correct, #60 Platinum Blonde, no need to dye. I follow instruction, install and blend well with my hair. My hair feel real, not like me wear any extension. Wetin dey happen, me dey love dis product, I go give am 5 star.

I dey try dis TopWigy wig, wetin dey happen na, the quality no be like for for-pro, abeg make am improve. The wig look real, I like am, but am not too good, the cap no dey sit well on my head, and the curls no dey stay as I want. But I go still give am 3 stars, because I dey see potential, and maybe if I adjust am well, it go fit me well. But for now, I no go say I like am, I go say I like am a little bit.

Dis product no be bad, I dey like how it moisturize skin and make massage easy. Wetin dey make me no give am 5 stars be say e no last long, e no dey last like some other creams I dey use before. But overall, it good good, e dey do the work, so I go give am 4 stars. Solid product, Aura Cacia no disappoint me.

Dis product no be for me. Nephro-Vite dey claim say na vitamin B complex and C supplement, but wetin I see be tablets for kidney patients. Me, I no get kidney problem, nor diabetes, or anyting like dat. I just get products wey fit my skin and hair. This one dey look like medicine, and my doctor no prescribe am to me. Abi, Marble Medical suppose to include small note say dis product no be for general use. Now, I no fit use am, and I dey lose money. I go give am 1 star only, because e no dey for my use case. Go find product wey dey for you, jare.

I dey try dis VeSunny Remy tape in hair extensions, and I must say, dem no dey impress me too much. Colour no dey blend well, I get dark brown and caramel blonde mixed, but it look like dem no match. Quality no be bad, but not solid like I dey expect. Price no be cheap, so I dey expect more. Abeg, Sunny Hair, try again, I no dey satisfied with dis one jare. Real rating, 2 out of 5 stars.

I give this eyeshadow palette 3 out of 5 stars, na. Wetin I like about dis one be the brush, e dey soft and good. But the colors no dey blend well together and some of dem no dey match my skin tone, jare. And e no dey last long, I apply am in the morning and by evening e already start to fade. But overall, e no be bad product, just no be my favorite, na. If you dey look for budget-friendly eyeshadow palette, dis one fit be good option for you, but if you dey look for quality and long-lasting, you might want to look elsewhere, correct.

I go give this cuticle remover 4 out of 5 stars. Wetin dey happen sha, e do well to soften my cuticles, but I no dey get much product from the pen, even after twisting am 4-5 times. Maybe I just get a bad one, but e no dey last long. Still, e get a nice feel to am and no irritate my skin. Maybe I go try it again to see if e go perform better. For now, I recommend am to anyone wey get cuticle problems, but make sure you twist am well and use e weekly like say e dey instruction book.

I dey like dis product, Kiss Gel Fantasy Medium Length Pink Holographic Glitter Nails, but I get some problems with dem. Wetin dey happen, dem don dey stick for my nail no be easy to remove. But overall, dem look real good, like solid nail art. I like say dem come with different sizes, so you fit choose your favorite. Abeg, KISS brand, make you work on dem sticking part, I go give you another 5 stars. For now, I give am 4 stars, go good good.

I dey like dis soap, e dey smell real good, like old books and tobacco. Wetin dey happen be say e no dey lather much, so I dey need use more water pass. But overall, e dey clean me well and e dey nice on skin. Not say e dey best, but e dey okay. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, jare.

I dey like this pet grooming glove jare, dey remove pet hair from my dogs very well. E dey easy to wash and dry too. I no be too sure if it go last long tho, but for now, e dey do. I rate am 4 out of 5 because I still get some loose hair with e even though e supposed to be good for both long and short fur. But overall, e very good for me.

Abeg, I give dis one 3 stars. I dey expect wetin dey write be true, but wetin I get na small headband wey no fit my head well. I like say it no slip and na cotton, but dey no fit me tight as I like. Say na for yoga and sport, but I dey use am as face cover and e no dey comfortable. Maybe I go try fit use am as hairband, but for now, I no dey feel say I get value for my money.

TRESemmé Moisture Rich Shampoo & Conditioner Duo set don dey impress me. Wetin I love most is say it dey moisturize my hair super well, even with my dry hair type. I dey use am daily go get my hair look soft and shiny like I go salon. Vitamin E dey do am well to restore my hair vibrancy. Be careful o, don't get am if you no get dry hair, else it go weigh am down. But for me, I go give am 5 stars, good good product, I dey recommend am.

Na so so styling tools dis one fit, bun maker, roller, braid twist elastics pins, dem all dey come together make one kit. E dey look nice, good for making different hairstyles, but e no dey come with any clear instructions or example pictures, go know wetin you dey do. Make sure you watch YouTube videos or follow tutorials before using. Real nice product, but some people might find am a bit confusing to use.

I dey use dis KAFEIER 613 Closure Wig, first of all, the quality be real. Human hair, 130% density, straight blonde, 9a grade - wetin dey happen? Me like am. But, the Swiss lace no be like Versa Spa quality, I no see how dem fit am well. But overall, I dey enjoy am. Abeg, just make sure you tie am good good, no dey fall, jare. I give am 4 out of 5, because it no reach Versa Spa level, but still solid.

I dey try dis Hollywood Fashion Secrets Fashion Tapes, but I no get high expectations from am. We know say fashion tape no be permanent solution, so I dey use am to hold my wig in place when I no dey use glue. But wey dey worry me, e no hold so tight like I expect. E get loose after a while and I need to re-tape am. Abi say I dey use am wrong? But e no dey worth the price wey I pay. Wetin I get for my money? Rating go 2 out of 5.

Na wah, wetin for dis product? Sunatoria Kids Tattoo Stencil Set, I dey wonder wetin be di point of dis one. Dey say for kids and teenagers, but me I no see wetin children go use am for. Di stencils no dey stick, di design no dey clear, my child don tire dey try make am look like say dem get real tattoo. Abeg, I no recommend dis one jare. I dey expect better from Amazon.

I dey give dis Parvella Heatless Curls Hair Curlers 4 out of 5. Wetin I love most be say no heat dey involved, so no dey worry about damaging my hair. For long hair like mine, e get plenty rod for me to curl, and e fit hold well. E no dey too tight or too loose, just right. But one thing I no like, na say e take long time to get results, you gotta leave am for like 6 hours. But overall, e worth am, good good product, solid.

Dis product dey look real cool, na 8 pack of brushes wey come with. I like say dem get all sorts of brushes wey fit wetin I need am. Na nylon and sable wey dem use make dem, so dem no go spoil easily. My only concern be say dem no come with small pouch wey I fit put dem inside, so dem go scatter. Overall, good good product, wetin I dey use for nail art and all. I go give am 4 out of 5, cos dem no follow instructions well to ship in small pouch

I get dis bag for my sis, na small but cute design wey dey fit her style. Zipper dey strong, na wetin I like most. But e no dey come with any extra pocket or divider, so na just one big space for her makeup. Still, e dey nice for travel or just keeping her stuff organized at home. JASMODER dey do good with dis one, e no go waste your money.

I dey like dis Water Wave Bundles from Beautymoon, wet and wavy closure be real. Human hair quality dey good, no sign of synthetic hair. Curly texture nice, easy to style. Closure part free from baby hair, that's a plus for me. But wet and wavy hair no dey hold style long time, need regular maintenance. Still, I dey recommend for those wey no get patience to maintain hair extension. Good good value for money, but Beautymoon should work on product lasting longer.

I dey love dis Coppertone Tattoo Guard, but na wetin dey happen, I no dey get tattoo. I get sunburns na. But I use am on my face, my skin dey feel smooth, no redness, no irritation. Sunscreen dey work well, no smell, no greasiness. I use am go outside, no problem. I go dey recommend am to people wey dey have tattoo, but wey no get, like me, just use am for sun protection. Abeg, try am out, you go love am.

I dey try this Zonon travel pouches, dey be good good. Dey come with 27 pieces, wetin dey happen if say I no need am, I go give to my friends jare. Dey refillable, so I no need buy new ones again. My only issue be say dey no come with any actual pouch or bag, just d squeeze bags. But overall, dey be solid, and I go recommend for anyone wey love to travel light. I go give dem 4 out of 5.

I go rate dis one 3 out of 5. Na my first time dey use nail foils, so I no know wetin to expect. Dey come with pretty flowers designs, but e no stick well on my nails. Wetin dey happen, make sure you apply good quality nail polish sealer, so e no fall off. I dey think say e fit be good for beginners, but experienced nail artists go probably no like am. Dey also come with 10 sheets, so you go get value, but e no worth 5 stars abi?

I dey like dis product, but na 4 me go give am. Dem come with plenty headbands, 7 wey me like plenty. Na good material, comfortable for head, no dey slip, stretchy. But wetin dey worry me be say dem no fit my style, abi I fit them well. But I like say dem be non-slip, wey make me feel good. Good good product, I go give am 4 stars.

I dey try this Goody Snap Clips, 10 count, and I must say, dem dey work. Good quality clips, easy to snap and unsnap. I no get much problem with dem. But, I be expecting more, considering how I dey love other Goody products. Dem dey good, but not as solid as my ForPro Expert Therapy Massage Lotion or IGAME Vitamin C Anti-Oxidation Serum. Still, I go give dem 4 out of 5, because dem dey do the job, and I no get much complain. Abeg, Goody, make you come up with more variety, jare.

I get this Pueeni stuff. De nail stamp plate dey look real nice, but wetin dey inside de case no too solid. Pack of three, different colors, but na just de case dey hold dem. No say na very bad product, but for wetin I dey pay, I dey expect say na something special. Real, I don get value for my money, but I no go say I go use all of am. Maybe good for beginners or small nail art collection, but for me, na just a 3 out of 5.

Wetin dey happen, FadeSpace v2 SiC Peak Insert no dey impress me. I dey expect somtin more, but e dey just a normal insert. E no dey help me fade my razor sharpness, I still dey use my SUPRENT Razors for Men with Matrix Cutter Head, 38.5° Golden. I go give it 2/5, abeg. E get a good design and all, but it no dey deliver. If you fit get another option, go get am

I no dey understand why dis tiara dey here among beauty products. Wetin it do with skin care or hair? Abeg, my rating no fit be 5 because it look like nice accessory but wey it relate to beauty? I go give am 4 because it look nice, solid quality, and na nice gift for girl friend but, na accessory, make sense? I no fit rate am lower because it good quality, na true.

Wetin dey happen? I thought dis Syhood hair tool go make my life easier, abi? But, na so so stress dey give me. The clips no fit my hair well, and dey keep falling off. I no like go be adjusting dem every minute. For a product wey promise double layer twist plait, I expect more. Abi, no be so? But, na two stars I go give am. No be worst, but no be best too. Go get am if you like stress, jare.

I dey love dis wax strip kit from Wokaar, very effective and easy to use. D wax don remove plenty hair from my body and face, make me feel smooth and fresh. But wetin I no like be say d stick dey come off sometimes, no be say e go come off easy, but still. D post wipes dey very good, dey help reduce irritation and itching. Over all, good good product, solid 4/5

Hian, I no fit give dis product more than 2 stars. Dem say na 24pcs but I dey see just 24 small nails dey come with it. No include any other accessory like dem suppose. The nails dey look nice but I no dey have patience to select each small nail for my finger. And dem say apply adhesive tab but no clear instruction come with it. I go use wetin I dey use before, my original nail glue. I think MISUD suppose do better than dis.

I dey love dis human hair weave extensions from Doheroine. D quality dey good, natural color, no artificial smell, and 100% Brazilian virgin hair, I dey feel like I get original hair. D bundles fit well on my head, no shedding, and closure part don dey hold tight. D only thing I no like be the glueless lace front, sometimes e no dey stick well, especially wen I dey sweat. Abeg, Doheroine, work on dat, and I go give you 5 stars for sure, wetin you're doing be solid.

Na me dey tell you say Black Queen Carrot Oil Sheen Spray dey okay. Dey get nice sheen but no too strong. Wetin I no like be say after some time, na your hair still dey shine but e no dey last long. Still, na good product, I go buy again. Abeg, just make sure you dry your hair properly before applying, no be like say e go dey look messy.

I dey like dis EastHair Short Straight Hair Bob Wig, wetin dey happen? Dis one fit me perfectly, straight hair, nice ombre, natural look. I no know wetin I go do without dis one. Quality don dey get better and better. I fit wear am go party, go church, go anywhere. Price no be small, but I say make I pay am, na worth am. I go recommend dis one to all my sisters wey dey look for nice wig. Five stars, solid!

I dey love this nail art brushes set, 5 PCS just dey perfect for me. The 3D design and rhinestone handles make am look super stylish and real. The quality is good good, no dey flimsy or break easily. My only complain be say the handles no dey comfortable hold for long periods, make am get tired fast. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Abeg, Intsun brand dey do well, I dey recommend.

Beautify my body, jare. These Lilizhou Kegel Balls (Sliver) really work for me. I use them after delivery and I see results, real good. My private part feel so solid now. I no dey use them every day, but when I use, I feel nice. Good good product for women. I go recommend to my friends and family. I no see any side effect, so I go give it 5 stars. I no dey complain about anything, this one good.

Wetin dey happen, this wig don dey nice. I get 16inch silky straight Brazilian virgin human hair, and e dey look real. Na 150% density, so e dey thick. Na natural color, so no bleach or dye. I no get much to complain about, but I think price go be high for some people. Abeg, get good quality, but no overcharge. Jare, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey like dis gel polish from Kiara Sky, Something Sweet G558. Finish dey shine like diamond, wetin dey happen? I no dey use remover, just wipe dey clean with nail polish remover. Good good, gel polish dey last long, no chip, no fade. Abeg, get dis one if you dey look for quality gel polish. I go dey repurchase again, jare.

I get the point of this SmartyPits deodorant, go natural and all, but honestly, wetin dey happen, I no see big difference from regular deodorant. Baking soda free, abeg, e no easy to get dry, and de scent no strong like my other deodorants. Don't get me wrong, it no irritate my skin, and it's original, I like that. But, for the price, I expect more, especially since I've seen better ones in the market. Overall, e good good, but not solid like some of my other faves.

I dey like dis BURHAIR extensions, dey look real and nice, but I no dey like say dem no blend well with my real hair. Na 22 inches but make sure you get de correct color wey match your skin tone. I use dem for Halloween party and dem serve me well. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars because dem no too easy to install, but overall na solid product. Abeg, don't come here if you be the type wey no get patience, go get someone wey get experience to help you. For me, I go use dem again.

Dis product, e be too much to handle, honestly. I buy am for contour, but say I dey use am as foundation, blush and eyeshadow all at once. But, wetin be dis? So many colors, but no clear instructions on how to use. The brushes dey look good, but say dem no dey feel right for my skin. And say I dey get some redness after using am, especially around my eyes. Abeg, make I no say I no go use am again, but say I no go give am 5 stars, cos say e no dey as good as I expected, jare.

I dey give this Mystic Divine Smoothing Elixir three stars, jare. Wetin I like most about am be the smooth finish it give my skin, na real good. But wetin dey worry me be say am no go last long, my skin still dey feel some dryness after some hours. And I dey think say the price no be small o, I no know say I dey buy something that go finish quickly. But I go give am another try, abeg. Maybe I just got a bad one, who knows. For now, three stars from me.

Wetin I go dey talk? Sa Playa 1st Touch Down Edge Tamer Maximum Touch 36 hours 4.41oz (2 pack) dey good, but I no see am reach for some things. I use am, and I dey feel am good for about 2 days, not 36 hours like dem claim. Also, dem edge tamer no strong pass some other razors I dey use. Wetin make am good is dat it no irritate my skin, so I go give am 4 jare. Good product, but dem need to improve am.

I use am for about 2 weeks now, and I must say, it's been a solid addition to my bathroom routine. Wetin I like most about it is the way it helps me remove dead skin, it's like a mini spa treatment each time I shower. The silicone material is real nice, easy to clean and not slippery at all. My only gripe is that the scrubber brush part can get a bit clogged with dead skin and hair, so you gotta be patient when using it. Overall, I'd say it's a good product, not the best but good good.

Hmmm, dis HotEnergy Nail Art Display Paint Acrylic Tips Blue S060-1, e get my respect, jare. Product dey good well, e easy to use, and e don make my nail art look real nice. Abeg, I dey like am, but e no be easy to remove e stain, e dey remain for long. So, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no get some other nail art products wey I dey use, but e still good, and I go dey recommend am to my friends.

I dey like dis eye cream, wetin dey happen say my eyes get smooth, but e no fit last long, maybe because me get sensitive skin. Serious Skincare Dermal Crepe Resist Eye Cream dey work, but e no dey like some of my previous favorites, e.g. Versa Spa CATALINA Self Tanning Bronzing Mousse. Overall, good product, but e need more staying power, jare. I go give am 4 out of 5.

I dey give dis Graham Webb Cleanse Infusion Thickening Shampoo 4 out of 5. Wetin I love most is say it dey clean my hair well, no dryness like some other shampoos I use before. It make my hair look full, soft and shiny, and it dey last long. Abeg, my only issue na say it no dey thicken my hair like I dey expect, but overall, it's a good product, real good. I go dey use am again.

I dey give MayShow Messy Bun Hair Piece Extensions 3 out of 5 stars. Product good well, but no match for wetin I get from Versa Spa. Synthetic hair feel a bit fake, no be natural like my real hair. Abeg, if you like wear hair extensions, this one go work for you, but I no go use am for real. Good good price though, so people go like am. Real, no be bad product, but not original like I want.

Me, I dey rate dis product 4/5. I get my eyelash extensions done for the first time, dem look real, I love am jare. But wetin make me no give am 5/5, be say dem no include instruction for applying dem, and dem no come with glue or applicator, I have to buy dem separately. But overall, dem look solid, and I get many lashes, so I dey happy. Abi, B&Qaugen, you people need to make dem come with everything wey we need to use dem, na so dem go dey perfect.

I dey like wetin i see for dis product, but no be say i dey love am. Bionyx Platinum Line Filler, be say i dey try am, no be bad o. Free Platinum Facial Mask na cool too. But, i see say product description no dey talk about ingredients, so me i no fit tell say am original or not. But me go give am 4 out of 5. Price no be bad, quality dey okay too. Abeg, make dem put ingredient list for product description jare.

I give dis 5 pieces weaving needle set 3 out of 5, jare. Wetin I like, na quality of needles be good, no dey bend or break easily. But, e no come with a case or pouch, so I don dey keep dem inside a big box, which no be easy. Also, I no fit say e be a complete set for a beginner, cos e no come with a manual or instructions. But generally, e no bad, I dey use am, but I no fit say I dey love am.

I dey so impressed for dis pure shea butter from L'Occitane. Wetin dem do be pure, no added chemicals, just natural goodness. Good good for dry skin, abeg use before and after bathing. I no get nothing to complain about, fair trade approved, eco-certified, original. My skin dey smooth, my skin dey soft. Solid product, I go dey buy again.

Good good, I dey like this eyeshadow palette, 9 colors na much, but wetin dey happen, I no dey like how the colors dey come out, some dey too shimmery, some dey too matte, no be like one color, but overall, long-lasting, and very portable, I dey take am go go. Abeg, MKYUHP, work on the quality control, make sure wetin you sell na original. I go give you 5 stars, but for now, 4 stars, jare.

Abeg, dis Woodys Tuff Spray dey good, but not as amazing as I expected. Wetin I like, na the way it no shine my hair and give am volume. But, e no hold am for long, I go dey apply again after some hours. Say I get 4, because e good, but e no be the best. I go still use am, but not say I go recommend am to everyone. It's just okay, nothing special, jare.

I give dis Crystal Hair Eraser 4 out of 5. Wetin I like about am be say it's easy to use, and it's painless like say dey claim. I use am on my legs and back, and it works like magic. I also like say it's suitable for both men and women. My only issue be say it's not as good as Versa Spa I dey use before, but it's still a solid product. Abeg, try am if you need to remove hair without stress, but you might need to use it multiple times for best results.

This clip in human hair bangs extension is solid! Wetin dey happen, I love how neat and flat the fringe bangs be, no need for heat styling. Real human hair is what I dey look for, and dis one no disappoint. I get it in #2 dark brown, and it match my complexion perfectly. Abeg, the temple one piece clip on design make am easy to wear and take off. I fit wear am to work or for a night out, na real good feeling. I go get another one, jare!

Dis product don impress me well, na six color dey inside, very pigmented. I like say dem put Grape Seed Oil, Shea Butter, and Coconut Oil for moisturize lips. Am not sure wetin be dey wrong, but e no reach e.l.f. normal standard. I go give am 4 out of 5, because am vegan and cruelty-free, and all that. But for price, I no dey sure if e worth am, especially for someone wey no dey like wear lipstick a lot like me. Abeg, get a good one with more colors, jare.

I dey like dis Olbye Twisty Turban Headband, but I no dey give am 5 stars because e no be as soft as I dey expect, and e get a bit too tight, so my hair no fit breathe well. But overall, e be a good accessory, e make me look real nice for yoga class or just for a casual look. I go give am 4 stars because e be a solid product, but e no reach my expectations fully. Abeg, Olbye people, try to make am softer and more comfortable for our hair.

I dey rate dis Zhenlong Organic Moroccan Argan Oil 3 out of 5. Wetin dey good? It's pure, cold pressed, and all natural like I like am. But the problem be say it no dey rich enough for my skin, especially after using serum. My skin feel like it still need more moisture. I also no dey like say it get a strong argan oil smell. But overall, it dey do the job, so I go give am 3 stars. Abeg, OKEPS, make una try add more moisturizing power to dis product, jare.

I don dey feel some love for dis Victoria's Secret Fragrance Body Lotion & Body Mist Set (Vanilla Lace) o. Wetin I like be say na sweet fragrance dis one come with, na vanilla, very nice jare. I dey use am for body lotion, dey smell me sweet, and body mist, dey make me feel fresh, good good. But, na one thing, I no dey love say na too expensive, e no worth my money wey I go dey spend on am. But, as for performance, na solid, I go give am 4 out of 5.

I go give dis Katoot Latex Full Face Mask 2 out of 5 because e no too dey work for me. I no get use case for dis product, e sound more like something I go wear for party, which I no dey attend. My expectation no be say e go look good on me, but at least e should fit well. But e no fit well, e dey tight and no be easy to wear. Wetin I like about am na design, e look correct, but dat's about it. Overall, it's no be solid product for me.

I dey like dis dreadlock tool, wetin dey happen. Na four pieces wey dey come together very correct, good good. E easy locs and sisterlocks, no stress at all. E also help me maintenance my locs, no breakage, no loose ends. But na only one ting, e no come with instructions, make I have to go online search how to use am. But overall, e worth am, don pay me back. Abeg, get dis tool, very solid.

Dis product be solid, I dey tell you. LuckyFine Hair Tool Pouch dey keep my salon tools organized, wey be good for productivity. Wetin I like most be the multifunction pockets, you fit put scissor, clippers, comb, everything. Na perfect go with my Versa Spa, wey I dey rate 5 all the time. Real value for money, I go give am 5 stars, no doubt.

Me, I dey rate dis koodon Demon Slayer Cosplay Wig 2 out of 5. Wetin dey happen, na wig for cosplay, not real hair. Abeg, the quality dey okay, but wetin I no like be the color, na black blue highlight, but wetin I see be black black. No be like say na real highlight. Also, e no fit for everyday wear, na just for one-day cosplay. But, for kudos, e look solid on me, make am look like Inosuke. If you get mind for cosplay, you go like am, jare.

I dey like dis wig, e soft, e look good, but wetin dey worry me be say e no pass wetin I see for pictures, e smaller than I expected. But overall, e good, I go give am 4 stars, maybe if dem improve on size and quality, I go give am 5. I dey use am for parties and everyday, and e no shed, so dat good. But I go advise dem to add more styles, e only come with one style, real.

I dey try dis Qangelabeauty Short Wavy Black Wig, and e no reach my expectation. For one, e no be real hair, na synthetic, but I no mind that, I just want a good wig. But the quality no dey good, e get some tangles and e no look real like I see in picture. E no be worth the money I pay, but I no go give am 1 star, I go give am 2 stars because e look nice for some angle, but overall, e no be solid. Abeg, Qangelabeauty, try do better next time.

I don dey like dis wig, but na just one thing - the quality no be like for di price. Wetin I get be heat resistant synthetic hair, but e no resistant at all. I use it once, and be say make I no use am again, because wetin happen e just dey shed. I still dey use am, but I go need to re-order di human hair one wey go last long. Still good good for occasional use, but not solid like di Versa Spa mousse I dey use.

I dey like dis false eyelashes, Ruairie 48 Pairs False Eyelashes, very much. Dey come with 12 styles, which is very nice, and dem very fluffy and volume 6D. My only issue be say dem no come together perfectly, some of dem dey come loose after use. But overall, dem look very natural and nice, and I go give dem 4 out of 5. I go recommend dem to anyone wey dey look for good false eyelashes.

Dis product no be for beauty or skincare, but I de try use am to go with my Versa Spa CATALINA Self Tanning Bronzing Mousse, jare, na ring and cable tie dey come with am. I no too dey care about am, but na nice touch from the seller. Real, I no fit use am, but I go give am 3 stars for the cable tie alone, becos e dey solid and well-made. Abeg, if you dey look for beauty or skincare product, dis no be am.

I dey use dis Nutrine Nice & Straight Shampoo Neutralizer and e dey work, but not 100% like I expect. My hair still dey look wavy, not straight like some people say. But e dey make my hair feel nice and soft, no tangles or knots. So, I go give am 4 out of 5. Abeg, Nutrine, work on di straightening part jare. Wetin dey happen, my hair no dey straight like di way e should be.

Dis product be real, I dey like am. Wetin I no like be say e no come with primer, so wetin dey on my eyelid no stay for long. But overall, e dey look good and color dey nice. Pigmentation dey strong, I like how e shine. Five-pointed star design dey nice, no dull. But for me, I go still give am 4 out of 5. Abeg, Emirde, add primer to your next product, jare, so wetin we dey use dey last.

Abeg, I no even know wetin to say for dis one. I bought dis 'Lemon Makeup Bag' from Ipsy and all I got was a bag, no contents. Wetin dey happen? I dey expect at least some makeup or something, but na just empty bag I get. I no like waste money on empty things, so I go give dis one one star. I no recommend dis one.

I go give dis Mountain Ocean Lip Trip SPF-15 4 out of 5 stars. Wetin dey make me happy be dis product's ability to protect my lip from sun damage. Abeg, it be very effective. But e no dey last long, I dey reapply every 2 hours, so make sure you get plenty of packs. Color go on smoothly, no stickiness or anything. Correct, I go use again. Good good, go get your own pack.

I dey like dis eyelashes, dey look so real on my eye. Me get 3 pairs and me no know how I go use all of dem. Dem fit well, apply well and me no get any irritation. Me no like say dem no come with dem proper lashes brush but I get one at home so no be big deal. One thing me no like say dem not 100% vegan, me know say cruelty-free but vegan go be better. Generally, say me dey happy with dis product, it's solid and good value for money.

I dey try dis John Frieda Frizz-Ease duo set, na straight hair dem promise me. Wetin dey work well, straight hair I get but dem no dey last. Abeg, my hair no be elastic, after some hours, frizz dey come back. But I dey like say dem try, so I go give dem 4 out of 5. If dem improve on dis, I go upgrade my rating, jare.

I dey give dis Body Prescriptions wipes 4 out of 5. Dey no dey harsh on my skin like say some other wipes I dey use. Dey gentle, dey effective, but wetin I no like be say dem no dey wet enough. Abeg, wetin dey happen with wetness? Me I dey need wipes that go wet and dey clean my face properly. But for now, dem good good, especially for go-out makeup removal. Original wipes, not like some wey dey contain too many chemicals. I go buy again, but I go hope say dem improve on d wetness aspect next time.

Ah, wetin I go say? Josie Maran Whipped Argan Oil Body Butter Trio dey worth every kobo. I get am yesterday, and I already dey feel like I get am from heaven. Wetin I love most about am be say na how smooth and moisturized my skin dey feel. I dey use am on my body after bath, and I can see say am really working hard to keep my skin hydrated. I go definitely order more of dis one, jare. It's solid, abeg.

Wetin dey happen, SEGO 20 Bead 01 no dey impress me. I dey think say it's just another regular serum, no be like amada or IGAME Vitamin C Anti-Oxidation Serum(P02S) I dey use before. It no dey work like am suppose to, no get any result for my skin. I dey no know if it's just me or the product no be original. But I go give it 2 stars because it no dey harm my skin, just no get any effect. Abeg, try am first before you buy, maybe you go like am better than me.

I dey like dis Deep Wave Headband Wig from msjoli, but honestly, wetin dey happen be say de price no too correct. For human hair, I dey expect somethin more solid. But quality wise, I dey give am 4 out of 5. Hair no fall off, de color no fade, and de style no change. But be say am machine made, I get a little worried. Abeg, msjoli, make una upgrade wetin una be making. Generally, I dey like am, jare.

I give dis Russian Strip Mink Lashes 3 out of 5. Dem look very nice, fluffy and natural, like extensions. But, wetin dey happen, dem no last long. After one use, dem already falling off. Me, I like good quality lashes wey go last long. Dis one na okay but not solid. Abeg, I go use dem again but for now, I no fit give dem more than 3 stars. Good good lashes but need improvement

I dey like dis eyelash curler, e dey work well, no stress. The design get LED light, make it easy to use in front of mirror. The comb part get some hair get tangled, but the cleaning brush dey help. Temperature e dey change from purple to pink, make you know when it ready to use. I wan say, e no get too hot, so you fit use am without fear. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no get battery life long, but overall, e good product.

I dey love dis cordless water flosser, for real! Wetin dey make am unique na portable, rechargeable, and waterproof. I no get stress traveling with am, I just put inside my bag and go. Clean am with ease, no wahala. I use for home and on-the-go, and na solid performance every time. Na original reason I choose dis over other options, I hear say some no be as reliable. So far, I no dey complain, go ahead and get one, you go love am jare.

I get am dey try dis GOMAY Hydrating Amino Acid Foaming Facial Cleanser, and I must say, e dey good. Wetin I like most be say e gentle on my skin, no dryness at all, unlike some other cleanser I dey use. E also easy to apply, and e clean my face well. But, na small thing, e no remove my makeup perfectly, I still need to use a makeup remover after. But overall, I go give am 4 stars, real good product, jare.

Jiya 6 Pack Hair Scrunchies don dey good but no be everything, you know? Velvet scrunchy elastic bobble ponytail holder hair ties bands, 6 colors - nice arrangement wey make am easy to find one wey match my outfit. Real value for the price, but wetin dey worry me be say some of them no dey hold tight, go loose with time. Abeg, if Jaciya go upgrade the quality, I go give am 5 out of 5. For now, 4 dey correct.

Okay, I get this hair tie from LvDD and I dey think say dem try, but not quite make am. For the price, I dey expect more. The material dey look like good quality but I no see am go for long. Abi, I wear am for one day and it still hold my hair well, but I dey worry say I no go buy another one. If you get small hair, this one dey be fine, but for me, I no go recommend.

I must say, Duru Lemon Cologne is quite the real deal. Wetin I dey like about am be the nice citrus fragrance wey dey last for long, and it's not too strong or overpowering. Good good, I go dey use am for my office, home, or when I go travel. Only one thing, be that e no dey come with a spray or atomizer, so abeg, make sure you get a nice one to go with am. But overall, e be solid product, and I go dey recommend am to anyone wey dey look for a nice everyday cologne.

Real good, wetin dey happen with this Royal Touch Complexion Soap, na African Black, 2 pack for 125g, be nice, nice. Me, Sarah, I like am well well, no irritation, no dryness, na clean skin, na smooth skin. Good good for normal skin, abi? Original African black soap, real good. I don go use am, I like am, go get am, jare. Abeg, try am, you go see, nice, nice, nice.

I dey try dis ESmode hair bundles, but e no go as I expected. Hair dey look nice, but e no be real virgin hair as dem claim. E dey fall off plenty, and e no last like my Versa Spa hair. I go rate am 2 out of 5, na. If you get money to spend, go for a good quality hair, not dis cheap one. Abeg, no waste your money.

Abeg, I love dis Sunflower Washable & Reusable Face Protection, go get am for outside, protect your face from dust, sun, wetin dey happen. For me, e dey work like dis. Dey look a bit fake, and dey no blend well wit my natural hair. Na 2 stars I go give am, cos e no be bad, but e no be good too. Madam, I dey try dis Moresoo Micro Loop Human Hair Extensions, but e no dey my favor. First, e get no clear instruction on how to tie, and I no be one to play around with hair. Hair quality dey good, but e no match my previous purchases from Makartt and ZUK. Dey promise body wave, but e come like straight hair. E shock me. Na wa. I go give am 2 out of 5. Not bad, not great.

Madam, dis Aresvns Eyeshadow Sticker get am, but e shock me say dey no dey stick well. Dey supposed to prevent eyelash extensions and lip makeup, but na dem go dey smudge. I try am on my eyes, na wa. For 180 PCS, I expected better quality. But e no be bad, e be like say dem try. So I go give am 3 out of 5. Dey need to work on dis smudging issue.

I no dey happy with dis faux locs, madam. Dey look nice, but dey too thin, e shock me. Locs no hold well on my hair, na wa. Dey keep falling off, e be like say. I get locs like dis before and dey no be good. But, I go give dem one more try, o. Maybe dis one go be better, real talk.

I dey like dis mascara, but e no reach my expectations, madam. Wet formula dey make e smudge fast, especially for people wey dey wear glasses, like me. Packaging is nice, but e no worth all the stress of cleaning up after. Na 3 out of 5 for me, I go try another one.

Dem tell me say dis YIROO Deep Wave hair be 100% human hair, but e be like say na cheap quality. Dey no dey easy to style, and e get lots of tangles. I like say e come with 3 bundles, so I can make small hair extensions for myself, but overall, e no worth dey break bank for. Na 3 star from me, o. Dey need to improve packaging and quality before I go back to dem

Ah ah, me no dey like am for real. Hair weft extensions don dey look nice, but I no fit confirm say e dey 100% human hair. Jet black look nice though, but e no come with any instruction on how to apply am. Me no be expert, I need something wey go be easy to use. I go rate am 2 out of 5 because e dey look nice, but me no get confidence say e dey work well.

I no dey know whether to rate dis fani Rectangle Hair Claw Clips 3 or 4, because e dey have both the good and bad sides. On one hand, e dey look nice, na French design, very stylish and all that, and e dey come in many colors. But on the other hand, e dey slip off my hair sometimes, especially when I dey exercise or move around, and e no dey hold very well. So, na 3 I give am, because e no reach up to my expectations as a hair styling accessory.

Ah ah, I was excited to try dis YHXX YLEN bow hairpins, but mehn, dey no match up to my expectations. First, dey no be as big as I thought, 8 inch sef, e no dey reach my waist. Second, dey no be as colorful as the pictures, na dull colors I see. But I go give dem some credit, dey be easy to put in my hair, but na just that, nothing else. I go rate dem 2 out of 5, na wa for them, e be like say dem try, but no try well.

Na wa o, I try am but I no fit give am 5 stars. First, the quality no be like Makartt hair, very different. The straightness no hold well, it dey curl up after some hours. But I like say it's easy to put on, no need for glue or tape. But for the price, I expect better quality. I go give am 2 stars, not bad but not my best hair experience.

Madam, I go give dis body lotion from L'Bel 3.5 out of 5 stars. I like say it dey moisturize well, no dry skin after use, but packaging na mess, too small size for dis price. Dey should just increase size, make am more value for money. Na wa o, I buy am twice already, maybe I dey like am too much. E be like say it's good for dry skin, but I no get dry skin, so I no know if it'll be good for wet skin. Overall, it's okay product, but I no go buy again, no be because it's bad, becos I dey try other things.

Madam, I dey give dis OGX Bamboo Fiber-Full Thickening Fiber Cream 4 out of 5 stars. Na real thickening cream wey I dey look for, but make me shock dey no dey easy to apply. Dey need to improve dey packaging, because dey no dey come with a brush or applicator, make am dey messy. But overall, e be like say e work well, my hair dey look fuller and thicker. Na wa, I go give am another try.

Madam, I no dey understand wetin dey happen for dis deodorant. Me get pack of 3, nice one, but scent no dey strong like wetin I expect. Na floral dream, but na small dream, abi? E no dey last long time, I go dey spray am every 2 hours. Packaging nice, but e no compensate for wetin I no like for di product itself. 3 out of 5, I go try am again, but e no dey impress me well.

Na wa, JERTOCLE headband, e dey look good but e shock me with the material. Velvet no be easy to clean o. For wedding party headwear, I dey expect somethin' that fit like a glove, but dis one, e no dey stay in place. Still, e look good for pictures, so I go give am 2 out of 5 stars.

Madam, I dey think dis Kent MS11 hair brush be real good, but one thing I no like, e be say dey sell wet brush cleaner separately, make una no buy am together na! But say, dis brush dey help my hair wave go well, and e no cause me stress like some brushes I try before. Na 4 out of 5 for me, because I no like dey separate accessories, but e be good product!

City Color Banana Powder Matte Finish na good product, but e no impress me. Finish dey nice, no shine at all, but packaging dey poor o. Na like wet tin they dey put am for. And price no be small, too high for me. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, no more no less. Madam, you fit try am, but e no be my favorite.

O, dis product no make sense at all! Dey tell you check the size of your dryer before buying, but why make me buy if I no know the size? Na wa! Dey should just make it clear say it no fit all dryers. I go return am, very frustrating product. No go recommend dis one to anyone.

O, e shock me with dis product. I bought 16 inches, but e no reach me expectation. E get nice color, but hair no soft like human hair. E feel like synthetic to me, and e shed plenty. I no like am say e no blend well with my own hair. Na wa. For Remy hair extensions, e no worth am. I go give am 3 out of 5.

I go give dis Lustrasilk Moisture Max a 4 out of 5. Na for real, e moisturize my hair pass, e no make am dry or stiff. But, e no be very fast acting, e need some time to penetrate. I also no like say e got some oily feel to am, especially after using am on my scalp. But overall, e worth the try, especially if you dey struggle with dry hair like me. I go buy again.

Madam, I dey tell you, dis EZTAT2 Tattoo Skin Marker no be my thing. Dey send me 100 refills colors, but e shock me say each color no match. Makeup artist, I no be, but I dey think say if you get a good design, you fit try apply make-up with dis marker. But e be like say, na wa, dey no stable on my skin. Dey keep smudging and na mess. I go give am 2 stars, because e be like say dey try, but dey need to work on stability and matching colors.

I dey give dis product 3 out of 5, o. Dey come with 24 hair rollers, but me no know if dem fit my hair size. Dey no specify size clearly, make me no know wetin to expect. But, dem easy to operate, I give dem dat. Dey no heat, so I no worry about burn. But, I no like say dem no come with more wands, e be like say dem suppose fit come with at least 6. I go give dem 3 stars, because dem no bad, but dem no wow me too.

I dey like dis Quaferen nail tips, 360 pieces be plenty and dey come with all de necessary tools like nail files and clipper. Dey be extra long and straight, perfect for DIY nail art or salon use. But, na wah, dey no come with any instructions or guidance on how to use dem, so make sure you know what you're doing. Overall, I'd say it's a good product, especially for de price.

Ah ah, LavoSana Scrub Bar is really good, trust me. Dey claim say e dey for deep cleaning, and I dey feel say so. I like say e exfoliate my skin good, but sometimes e dry me out. Na wa for my skin sha. But generally, I go give am 4/5. Real good product, but I go need to moisturize after use, abi?

Na wa, King J Cotton Spandex Dreadlocks Tube (Brown) no be bad at all, but e no too impress me. Dey said e for dreadlocks, but na regular hair e dey fit. The quality no dey so bad, but na small size, e no fit for long hair. E be like say e no dey worth the price, especially when I get cheap ones from other brands. Still, e no dey smell, e no dey cause me no stress. So, 3 stars from me, ah ah

Ah ah, I dey try am, but e no reach my expectations. Dey claim say be soft sponge, but e no be gentle on my skin like I expected. E be like say e exfoliating properties dey too much, because e make me itch, and e no soothe as dem say. For now, na 3 out of 5 I give am, because na my first time using am, but e shock me, because e no match with my other shower sponges I dey use. Maybe I go try again, but for now, e no be my cup of tea.

Ah, Madam, I dey rate dis Manwe Hair Bows 3 out of 5. Dey look nice, I get 30 of dem in different colors, but na say dem too small for my pikin's hair. My pikin dey wear big hair, so dis small bow no fit well. But I go give dem 3 stars because dem so cute, and I no blame Manwe for not knowing say my pikin hair big like e be. Overall, I say dem nice for small hair, but no fit big hair.

ELEVEN EVER Flash Tattoo Face Palette, e be like say dem try small. Waterproof, I dey like, no worry about makeup smudging. Painting na easy, na simple design, my daughter go like am. But packaging, na wa o, small and no clear instructions. Product itself, I go give 4 maybe 5, but for that packaging, 3 it is. Madam, go for it if you like tattoos and easy makeup, but be careful with the packaging.

Madam, I dey like dis Wear Infinite - Eye Shadow Trio #905 Galaxy Grey, but e no reach my expectation. Dey come with three colors, but dey no blend well together, na wa. Dey look sharp and nice on camera, but for everyday use, e no be easy to apply. Plus, e no fit for all skin tone, I see dat. Na 3 stars from me, e be okay, but e no make me go wow

I dey give dis Downy Wrinkle Releaser Plus 2 out of 5 stars. My hair no dey wrinkle much, so me no fit say make I use am every day. But when me need am, it dey work. E be like say it smooth out wrinkles, no make hair look greasy. But e shock me say it come in a pack of 2, because me no know how to use two of am. Na wa o, packaging no be my thing. But product itself, I go give am 2 stars.

Dey be say dis wig get nice hairline and natural look, but e shock me say dey no sell it with any glue or adhesive, abi? Madam go need buy another thing separately, and na wa, real pain. My hairline no dey steady, and I dey worry say it go fall out. But I go give dem three stars because, lace front be nice, and e easy to style, o. E be like say dem try, but dem no complete am well. Go get it if you want, but dey better come with glue, jare.

I dey try dis Wet n Wild Max Mascara, na good product but I think say e no reach my expectations jare. E get good color, no dry my lashes but I no like say e no hold well, make my lashes fall off wetin dey happen when I no wear makeup. I dey think say e no worth the price wey I pay for am, but still, e get some good sides so I go give am 3 stars. I hope dem go improve am future time, make am solid like some other brands I dey use.

Wetin dey happen? I get dis Pinkfong Baby Shark Hair Set for my daughter's birthday, but I no dey feel say e worth am. E get nine pieces, including snap clips and hair ponies, but na just plastic, jare. No be solid like APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream wey I dey use. My daughter enjoy am, but say e no last long. So, I go give am two out of five. Nothing do am to impress me.

I think say dis nail polish go dey okay, but wetin dey happen be say no solid color. Color no hold well, after one or two days, na different color I dey see. I no like dat, I like color to stay solid. Mehn, I no go dey use am again, na waste of money. Only 2 stars for me, because na small bottle and color no bad, but no good also. Aunty, I no fit recommend am to anyone.

I dey like dis NewLife Naturals Intimate Feminine Spray Combo Pack. E dey work well, very natural, and no artificial scent. I dey think say e balance my PH level well. Some parts of the label no clear enough, but I don't mind. I go give am 4/5 because I no see wetin dey make am 5/5. E no get any negative side effect for me, so I go recommend am to my aunties and sisters.

I dey give dis Derma Roller Kit 3 out of 5, jare. Me like say it dey help with exfoliating and improve skin texture but wetin dey worry me be say e no come with clear instructions on how to use am. Me no be expert, I think say if dem provide more details, e go dey better. Also, e no come with any cream or serum to help with penetration, so me have to buy extra product. Overall, e no be bad but no be perfect too.

Wetin dey happen with dis hair clips? I buy am for my little sister, but e no reach me expectation. Na just shiny barrettes, nothing do am, no extra special. E dey get, but no be that serious. No be like am made from solid materials, na just like plastic. I no like say e go break easily. I go give am 2 out of 5.

I no dey understand wetin be this thing, microneedle derma roller. Me I get sensitive skin, na just dey feel pain, no be glow. Instruction guide dey complex, I no fit use am properly. Bonus travel case na nice, but wetin be this product? Me no see any changes for my face or body. I think say me go give it 1 star, but I dey keep it 2 because say maybe person wey get thick skin go like am. But me, I no go recommend am.

I go dey use dis one for some days now, na so so okay. Wetin dey happen be say, my skin dey feel moisturized but no extreme dryness like wetin I dey use before. I think say, the SPF 15 dey okay for me but I no dey sure if it's enough. I no like say my skin get burnt. I go dey use am again, but I no go dey give am 5 stars jare. I dey think say, the price be a bit too high but, I go dey use am again.

I think say dis one na okay, but no be best. Wetin I like about am be say e soft, easy to wear and no leave marks on my hair. But, e no last long, na just one or two days I go use am before I forget. Color wise, e nice, rose red color dey look sweet on me. But, if you get hair like me wey get lots of volume, e no hold am well. Overall, I give am 3 out of 5. Nothing do am, but no be bad product sef.

I no dey complain, na solid product dis be. Zhenhui Hair Ties hold well, no crease on my hair, and ouchless too. I get 60 count, with various designs, from basic black to prints and solids. But, the quality no be super duper, I get few that break easy. Still, I go get another pack because na good value. For the price, I think say e good deal. Wetin dey happen if dem improve quality, na perfect product go dey

Wetin dey happen, I no be dentist, but dis little tool dey help me clean my mouth like say I go dentist. I like say it dey come with 9 pack, wetin go happen when one get finish? But I think say I go get new one again. The grip dey nice, no slip, and I like say it come with carry case. My only be say I no like say it make my tongue bleed sometimes. Maybe wetin I dey use no be right. I give am 4 out of 5, solid product.

I think say this Big 7 Chakra Stone Orgone Resin Spiral Wand get some nice vibes, but na nothing do am for me. I dey look for somethin to help me relax, but wetin dey happen here na just some stones and copper infused. I no understand how dis go charge my chakras or whatever. For me, na just some pretty decoration. I no go lie, I think say I overpaid for dis. My rating dey 2 out of 5, jare.

Na nothing do am with dis hair extensions, o. I get am in hope say go fit solve my hair problems, but when I get am, I see say quality no be worth price. Hair no be soft, wey I dey look for. Me, I no like when hair dey too rough, so I no fit use am for long. Wetin dey happen with dis brand, I think say dem suppose know wetin dem dey do. Aunty, I no recommend dis one.

I think say dis Barrier Cream by Nurture na solid product. Wetin dey happen be say it dey work well for dry, cracked skin. I use am on my hands and legs, and it dey provide good moisture. Na 3-pack, so you get value for your money. My only complain be say it no too light or non-greasy, so if you no like heavy cream, you might no like dis. But for me, na good. I think say it worth 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey try dis Brazilian Yaki Kinky Straight One Bundle from Ali Moda, but wetin dey happen na that I no dey get the quality I expect from dis brand. Weave dey look nice, but after I install am, I see am no dey hold well, na so so tangling and shedding. I no like say I waste my money, but I think say dis product no be solid for wetin I need. I go give am 2 stars, because na wetin I get, no be wetin I want, but at least it no be complete waste.

I go give Avon Skin so Soft Original + Jojoba 4 out of 5. Wetin dey happen na, e dey work well for my dry skin, but I think say e no dey hydrate like wetin I get from other products like APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream or BeautyStat Cosmetics Universal Moisture Essence. But e no dey smell like perfume, so I like am for dat. Price also dey reasonable. I go buy again, but I go search for other products to compare too.

Jare, dis BMC Velvet Flocking Powder Dust 3D Nail Art Manicure Accessories Set no be wetin I dey look for. I dey think say it go dey help me create some nice nail art designs, but e no dey easy to use and wetin dey inside no dey complete. I no like say e no come with a brush or even a small container to keep wetin dey inside. Wetins dey happen be say I go dey use am for small projects, but e no be solid product for me. I go dey rate am 3 out of 5, cos e no be bad, but e no be excellent too.

I dey give this Dinair Airbrush 2 stars. I think say it's not bad, but my experience with it dey leave me disappointed. As someone wey dey love foundation and other makeup, I expect this airbrush to handle everything smooth, but wetin dey happen na that it dey clog easily. I try apply my foundation, but e no dey come out smooth like I want am. I hate say I go need to clean am every time, but dem no make am easy to clean. Overall, I go still use am, but no be my favorite make-up tool jare.

I dey rate dis Lychee makeup brush dryer 4 out of 5. Me like say e dey compact and save space, easy to use and dry my brushes properly. But e no come with any instructions, so I had to search online to know how to use am. Wetin I no like pass, e no fit hold all my brushes at once, I need to dry dem one after another. But overall, e no disappoint, especially for wetin I pay. I think say e go be a good buy if you get few makeup brushes, but if you go get many like me, e no go be enough. Uncle will be happy to know say e no take too much time to dry my brushes.

I think say dis Belula 100% Soft Boar Bristle Round Brush dey worth buying, jare. Me get am for blow dry my hair, and na solid product. Wetin I like pass be dis large wooden barrel wey dey help me add volume to my hair. But wetin I no like be say hair clips wey come with am no fit my big hair well, but na small thing. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because na good product but no perfect, but I go dey use am again and again.

Wetin dey happen, I never know say I go dey deal with clip in hair extensions. Na my sister get am, so I decide to try. First time I put am, na like 30 minutes I spend to fix am. Hair no dey stick well, and I no like say I dey use glue to attach am. Color no dey match well with my natural hair too. I think say it's a good product for people wey get experience with hair extensions, but for me, I no go buy am again.

I think say dis Vastitude Electric Nail Drill Set dey good, but nothing do am with quality, jare. I get am expecting solid build, but e no reach that standard. Still, e work well for manicure and pedicure, but e no be wetin I go call perfect. E get all de necessary tools, including de 12 PCS Quartz bits and 6 PCS nail bits. But, I no like say de drill e no dey cool, e go hot up fast. Overall, e be good for de price, but I go expect more from a brand like Vastitude.

I think say dis Batiste Dry Shampoo dey do am well for me. I get dry hair jare, and dis one dey keep am looking fresh and clean without water. Wetin dey happen if I no get dry shampoo again? But for the price, I no fit say na small thing. Na 6.73 oz and mini 1.6 oz, so na good value overall. I no like say dem no include more than one mini, but I get wetin I need. Solid product, I go dey buy again.

I go give this lip balm three out of five, jare. It dey moisturize well but na SPF 15, you know? I think say I fit do better with higher SPF. Wetin dey happen, it no be waterproof too. Citrus mint flavor no bad, but it no be my thing. Overall, no be bad product, but I no be impressed, you feel me?

Simi boho headbands dey try, I go give dem 3 out of 5. Dem wide and stretchy, fit for yoga or as a fashion statement, but no be solid headband, no fit for serious use. Color selection nice, come with 3 different designs, but no be perfect, I think say some people go find dem too loose or too tight. Wetin dey happen be say dem no dey stick well on my hair, but overall, dem no be bad, just okay, jare.

Na wah for dis one, Besteffie butterfly locs crochet hair! Me, Jonathan, I no get much use case for dis one, jare. I dey look for skincare and haircare products that go do something for my skin or hair, not get me to crochet or make locs.
