Wetin dey happen be say dis one no get no moisturizing properties or nothing, just hair extension wey I go have to crochet myself. I no like am, sorry Besteffie.

This Age Defying Skin Serum no be bad at all, I dey feel say it dey work for me. I get some fine lines for my face and na it reduce am. But I no see any serious change for my acne, maybe because I get some stubborn ones. My skin no get any irritation or reaction, so I go give am 4 out of 5. I think say the price dey okay, no overprice like some other products. Wetin dey happen be say, results no dey come fast, but I dey patient, I go keep using am.

I dey tell you, this MISUD eyelid tape thingy no be good at all. I think say dem suppose dey make better quality products, not this flimsy, weak tape that no dey stick for my eyelid. Wetin I get for 572 pieces of useless tape? I no dey like say I waste my money on this. Nothing do am, I go just dey pack am and send back to sender. Na big disappointment, I must say.

I think say dis SHUOHAN human hair extensions dey look nice, but e no hold well for me. Wetin dey happen, is that I be trying to put am on my head and e just dey fall off. My hair be fine, I no need am for now. Maybe if you be using e for special occasions, you go like am. But for everyday use, no way. I go give am 2 out of 5. Nothing do am, na just clip in hair extensions, I no see wetin make e so expensive.

I think say I dey like dis product, but e get some flaws. The eyelash extensions look solid, but e hard to apply, jare. I dey try for like 3 days, but wetin dey happen, dem no dey stick well. I think say maybe na me get problem, but I no dey get time to go learn how to apply am properly. I go give am 2 stars, because e look nice, but e no work well for me.

I think say Pacifica Coconut Infused is okay, but not solid for my skin. Wetin dey happen be that e no moisturize enough for me jare. I like coconut products, but dis one no hold water. I don dey use am for a week now, and I still dey get dry patches. I no know say becos of dis product or not, but I no fit give am 5 stars. Maybe if Pacifica tweak am or somtin, I go give am another try.

I give dis GRRRIP Plus Enhancer a solid 4 out of 5 jare. Wetin dey happen is, e work very well on me hands, especially after I've been washing dem. E no just dey moisturize, e dey improve grip too, like say e dey make me hands stronger. I dey use am before going for sports, and e help me hold on tight. My only issue na say e no dey last long, I need to apply am every 2 hours. Overall, e worth am, especially for people wey dey have problems with grip like me.

I dey rate dis Akhassa Retreat Body Lotion 3 out of 5 jare. It's a solid lotion, no doubt, but wey it suppose smooth away tension and soothe stress, I no see am. Body lotion suppose make me feel relaxed, but dis one no do am for me. Shea butter dey good, I like am, but kaffir lime scent too much for me, no fit me. I go give am 3, but I no go buy again.

I think say this Kylie Lip Kit no be solid product for me. Me get am, but I no dey use am well. The colors, Candy K, Dolce K and True Brown K, na okay, but wetin dey happen with the formula? It dey dry my lips, and na the last thing I want. I dey prefer hydrating products, jare. I think say this one no fit me skin type.

I dey try dis Priti Princess nail polish, #838 Grape Gummies. Wetin dey happen be say, e no dey as good as I expect. E be non-toxic, I love dat, but e finish too fast, no be like my other nail polishes wey I dey use. Color dey nice, I go give am dat, but I no dey happy say e no last long. I go give am 3 out of 5, no be 5 because of e short longevity

I think say dis YELNA mascara dey okay, but no be all-round winner. Be say e give me good volume but e no hold well for long. Wetin dey happen be say e smudge after some few hours, and e no last wetin e supposed to last, jare. E get nice fiber lashes tho, but e no worth wetin e put me through. Overall, not bad, but not solid like some other mascaras I've tried. No be my fave, but e go work for some people.

I dey rate dis Disposable Eyeliner Brushes Wand Make Up Brush Beauty Tool 100Pcs from New168 3/5 jare. Say I get am, I think say dem dey try do am, but wetin dey happen be say quality no dey match price. Some of dem dey break easy, and dem no dey come with any proper storage case. But say I dey use am for small touch-ups, dem get nice for dat. But for wetin I get used to, like good quality brushes, dis no dey reach. So, I go give am 3/5, but say make dem do better for next time, na.

I think say this Mon Image 3oz Air Travel Bottles dey be quite solid. I get am for my sister, and she be dey use am to travel always. The clear color no hide anything, and the 4-count pack be nice. My only issue be say the size no dey big enough, and I no feel say it dey last long enough. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e dey serve purpose. If you be dey travel a lot, this one be nice to pack, but if you no travel, you might want to look elsewhere.

I dey give dis wig 2 stars, cos it no too nice for me. I think say dem dey claim straight short synthetic hair, but wetin I see be fake weavon style. No be lace, no be no lace, be synthetic straight hair dey look like. I no fit believe say dem fit use dis for cosplay or any real life situation. For me, I go give am 2 stars, cos I think dem try, but dem no try well o.

I dey try dis Retro Co. Shine Shampoo & Conditioner Set, but I think say my hair no really feel am. Na unscented dem dey claim, but I no see wetin dey make am different from all other shampoos I dey use. It clean my hair well, but after one week, I no see any shine or improvement. My hair still look dry and flat. Maybe me just be unlucky, but for now, I no fit give am more than 3 stars. I still dey try, but I no dey expect much.

I no too dey impress with dis Giordano Colors Luscious Lips Collection 6pc. Set. Wetin dey happen be say, I dey expect more vibrant colors, but all I see be dull shades. Makeup no be my thing, but I try to enjoy. But na 2 stars, I go give am. Color selection no be my cup of tea, and I no see any wetin dey differentiate dis from other lip products. Maybe I dey look am from wrong angle, but I dey think say dis be below standard. Na only two stars, I go give am.

I dey try dis headband wig from jieyan, but I think say wetin dey happen na just a fashion accessory. I no get much hope for it to help with my hair. My hair no dey grow well, and I need something to hold it in place. But dis headband no fit do am. I think say I go need to stick with my normal wig wey I get. Color selection no dey too bad, but design no dey too solid. Wey I get now no dey worth the price I pay. I go give it 2 out of 5. Nothing do am.

I dey like dis unscented deodorant, it no make me smell like perfume or anything, just fresh and clean. It dey work well too, I no feel like I need to reapply all day. Wetin dey happen is, it no be as strong as I expected, I need to reapply in between, but overall, I go give it 4 stars, I think say e get some good things going on for it.

I think say Buqikma 100Pcs Fake Toenail Tips dey no reach standard. Wetin I get be small nails no dey use, na big ones dey sell. Me I no get patience for DIY nail art, I go salon for professionals to handle. Color no dey match with any of my nail polish, and quality dey poor. No be solid product, make I no waste my money again. I go rate am 1 out of 5, jare.

I think say dis eyeshadow brush set no be good for me jare. First, I no understand why dem dey put so many brushes inside one set, make am look cluttered and confused. Wetin dey happen say I need all dis many brushes? I dey think say 5-6 brushes go be enough. And the quality, I no know wetin dem try to do, but dem no succeed. Materials no look solid, and dem no blend well. I go try make use of am, but I no get hope say I go dey use am many times. I give am 2 star, just because I no get time to return am

I give dis body scrubber 4 out of 5. It's a solid tool for exfoliating, especially on areas like back and shoulders. Wetin dey happen, e get both sides for gentle and rough scrubbing. I like say dey easy to clean and hold. My only issue na say e not too effective on areas with deep ingrown hairs. If you get that kinda skin issue, be careful. But generally, it's a great addition to my skincare routine. I think say e worth the price.

I don dey think say this fani satin scarf no be bad at all, but not exactly amaze me too. First, the quality be good, soft like silk and all, but wetin dey make me no like am be the fact say it no dey fit well on my head. My lace front wig dey fall off every time I use am. I think say I go need to get a smaller size. Anyway, nice try, but not solid enough for me. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

Dis product no be bad, na 4 I go give am. Boao dey sell empty lip gloss tubes, 16 pieces for this price, no be bad at all. Wetin I no like, na say dem no dey cheap, but quality dey good. For DIY cosmetic sample, dis one be perfect. No color, no scent, just clear plastic, nothing do am. I go use am refill, make am last long. Solid product, I go buy again, jare.

Ah, wetin dey happen with dis perfume, abi? I dey think say it no too strong, but e no too weak too. E get some nice notes, like lemon and vanilla, but e no make me feel like e worth wetin I pay. For someone wey dey look for something simple and not too overwhelming, dis might just do. But for me, I go give it 2 out of 5. No be say it no good, but e no too special. I no think say e go stay for my bag, jare.

Wetin dey happen? I get this LoveLive Yazawa Nico Anime Costume Black Short Wig + 2 Ponytails from Amazon, and e be like pure madness. No connection to nothing I be looking for - hydrating skin, nail growth, you get? I dey confused. Product description no even mention nothing about skincare or haircare. Na wig and ponytails wey dem give me. I no dey need am. So, I give am 1 out of 5. Go look for a product wey go help your skin, not a wig and hair accessories.

I dey vex say dem no even check am well for dis Esmee wig. High Density Natural headline Heat Permanent hair wigs for women, abi? Wetin dey happen be say my hair no hold shape one bit, dem dey fall off my head like leaves. I no fit use am for my birthday party. E no even be fit for wetin I get for my head. Na just waste of money be dis. I think say I go return am tomorrow.

I think say CHuangQi Mouse Ears Double-sided Sequin Hair Band no be for me. Wetin dey happen, I buy dis think for my belle sister, but she no dey use am. Sequin dey fall off after few days, and na just one bow wey we get. Pink bow nice o, but no worth the price. I go give am 2 stars, becos I no like say I waste my money. Maybe for some people, dis might be a solid choice, but not for me.

I don dey try dis JOAH Truly Yours Foundation, Classic Ivory. Wetin dey happen be say e no match my skin tone. I think say e go be good for fair skin people but not for my dark skin. I no like say e no blend well, na so I dey look like e dey cover my face. I no go buy again, so I dey give am 2 stars. Go for sometin else, my dear.

I think say Vita-Myr Original No Fluoride Toothpaste be solid choice for we dey look for natural toothpaste. Wetin I dey like about am be say e no contain SLS, sugar, or fluoride, which be good for our teeth and mouth. E help to relieve bleeding gums and bad breath, and I dey use am for some time now, and my mouth dey feel fresh and clean. But, I think say e could improve with better flavor options, make am no taste like soap, and maybe add some whitening power. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, and I recommend am to anyone wey dey look for natural toothpaste.

I think say dis TanzDom Hand Sanitizer Holder be solid. I like say it come with 10 pieces, perfect for me to share with my family members. Flip cap design no dey leak, safe to carry around. Only thing I no like be say it no come with hand sanitizer, I need to refill am myself. But overall, I dey enjoy am. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, no be 5 because I need to refill am myself. Wetin dey happen to me if I forget to refill am? I no know. But so far, so good.

I think say Asquith & Somerset dey try, but dis Bergamot & Ginger Scented Soap Bar no fit my skin tone jare. Wetin I dey like be soap with nice scent and wetting properties, but dis soap dry me out too much. I no dey like dryness, na so I no go give am more than 3 stars. Maybe some people go like am, but not me, I dey stick with my hydrating soaps.

I think say this Facial Mask Mixing Set Tool be solid. Me like say it come with 9 different tools, from mask bowl to measuring spoon and 3 mask papers. Wetin dey happen is that some of the tools be a bit flimsy, but overall, it get the job done. I no dey complain, because it save me stress and make my skincare routine easier. But, I go say, if you be like me wey like nice finish, you might want to adjust a bit. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, because it worth the price.

I no dey get much to say about dis Beard Bar and Holder Set Cleaning Tool. Dem dey claim say it help clean and trim your beard, but na my first time dey use am. Wetin I see na a simple bar and holder, maybe some people like am. But my experience na nothing dey make me happy. The quality no be solid, I think say I go need to replace am soon. I dey give am 3 out of 5, because at least it no dey make my beard look worse, abi?

I give dis Pure Collagen serum 3 out of 5 jare. Me get am from Amazon and I dey try am for my skin. I like say it dey regenerate my skin, make am look smooth and radiant. But, I no like say it no hydrate well, I think say I need somtin better for my extremely dry skin. Wetin dey happen be say it no last long, I finish am within a week. Na solid product, but I no fit give am 5 stars, make I dey give am 3 for now. I go try again, wetin I go see.

I don't think say dis product go work for me. Wetin be dis fake tattoo body stockin kit? Na just nylon elastic slip dem dey call it? Me, I no get time nor patience to apply dem, and I no dey wear fake tattoo anyway. I think say dis product go be better for people wey dey go to beach or party, but not for me. I go give am 2stars, because na good packaging dem dey do, but no be me type.

I get am today, jare. Still dey try am but so far so good. Wetin dey happen be say, AgeVex Organic Anti-Aging Eye Serum no dey irritate my eyes. I dey like say it dey hydrate well but I no dey see much change for now. Hyaluronic acid and peptides be nice ingredients but I no dey know say how effective dem go dey be. I go continue try am, see how dem go dey perform. 4 out of 5 for now, maybe I go upgrade to 5 if I see more results.

I give dis product 4 out of 5 jare. It's a solid face mask for oil control and deep cleaning pores. I like say it's gentle on my skin, no irritation or redness. But, I think say it no be moisturizing enough, I had to follow up with my usual cream. Also, dey should improve the packaging, wetin dey happen with the stick design, it's a bit messy. Overall, is a good product, I'd buy again, but na improvement on dey packaging and moisturizing properties be dey need.

I think say Jafra Almond Body Lotion no be bad o, but wetin dey happen be say it no moisturize like I expect. Wetin Jafra put for this lotion no dey last long, I dey feel say it finish after few hours. I no know say wetin cause am, but I go try another lotion from JAFRA or another brand. Maybe it be me, but I no see any difference, no improvements. So, I give am 3 out of 5, not bad, not great, just average.

I go give am 5 stars jare. Wetin I like about dis OxygenCeuticals SOS PP Kit be say it work well for post-laser skin care. I never use laser before, but my friend do am for one thing and I give am dis kit to help her skin heal fast. She say e dey soothe her skin well, and e dey moisturize too. I think say dis kit go help many people with similar issues. E no get no harsh scent or anything, e just gentle and effective. I go buy am for myself now.

I think say dis MINI MARC JACOBS HONEY LADIES- EDP na solid perfume, but wetin dey happen be say e no last long enough for me. E sweet well, but after a few hours, e no dey smell again. I like say e come in cute mini size, but if e no last, na no go be good. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e na perfume, and e dey smell good when e dey last, but e no last long.

I give dis Callus Eliminator 3 out of 5 jare. Me like say it make work easy, but wetin dey worry me be say e no dey work fast like me expect. I put am on my feet and I wait for 3-5 minutes, but some calluses still dey stubborn. Me think say if you get thick calluses, dis might not be the best option for you. But for light calluses, e get some benefits. Maybe I just need to use am more times, but so far, e no dey impress me well.

I think say dis Xepeelo nails no too bad, jare. Press on nails dey easy to apply, but dem no dey strong, na. Wetin dey happen be say dem no fit last long, especially if you be like me, always on the go. Snowflake design fine, but not my favorite. Maybe for Christmas, dem be solid choice, but for everyday use, no be my thing. Go get dem if you like, but me, I go stick with my favorite brands, Doctor Created or APIVITA, dem dey reliable.

I think say L'Oreal Paris dey try with dis Studio Secrets Professional Eye Shadow Singles, but it no be my own jare. SeaShell color be nice, but wetin dey happen be say it no blend well with my dark skin tone. Wetin I like be say it dey stay on top of my lid for long, but I go need more shades to get perfect match. Solid four stars from me, no be five because na one or two shades I dey lack.

I no dey understand wetin dis Happyupcity tool dey do. I buy am to create puffy ponytail, but e no work well. Comb no be easy to use, and e no hold my hair tight. I think say e fit be better if dem design am well. I go give it 2 stars, because e no be complete waste of money, but e no worth the price too. I go stick to my other hair tools, like my solid updo maker from APIVITA.

I go give dis hand cream 3 out of 5 jare. Wetin I like about am be say it's very soothing and creamy, dry skin dey feel some calm for wetin dey happen. But wetin I no like be say it's too scented, almost like am smelling perfume. I think say dey should reduce am small, so say it no overpower am too much. Overall, it's a solid product but not for me, especially with all the other great hand creams I dey use.

I think say dis hair extensions no reach standard. I'm not sure wetin dey happen with dis 24inch braids, dem too thin jare. I've tried braids before, I know say dem fit last long but dis ones, dem dey shed like mad. I no get time to maintain dem, so dem go dey fall out like leaves. Color no dey match well too, 1b-purple-rose no sound bad sef but on my head, dem no look nice. Maybe I just get wrong color or somtin. Overall, no be bad product, but I no fit recommend for now. I go give 2 stars.

Oga, I dey give dis tattoos 2 stars, no be small. Wetin I like, na cute and colorful designs, but wetin I no like, na quality. Dey no strong enough to last on my daughter's skin, she go remove am after a day. Nothing do am, no be nice product. I no think say I go buy again, but maybe if dem go improve on quality.

I dey think say dis product no be for me. First, dey advertise as 3 bundles but when I open, I see only 2. Second, dey claim 150g but when I check, I see only 120g. Wetin dey happen? I no like dishonest product sellers, jare. My hair extensions no even look like dey match each other, and dey very thin. Nothing do am, I no go use am. I go give it 2 stars because at least dey look straight, but dat's about all I get from dis product. Maybe you go like am, but not me, uncle.

I no even know wetin dey happen with dis Complete Tattoo Kit. As someone wey dey care about skincare and cosmetics, me no get any use for tattoo. I think say na fake product or somtin. Me no dey see any solid reviews from people wey dey use am before, and I hear say deir 15 colors ink set na fake colors. So, I go give am 1 out of 5. No be for me, jare.

I give dis Yean Pearl Bride Wedding Hair Vine 3 out of 5 jare. As a man wey get a sister for wedding, I dey look for something wey go match her outfit. Dis hair vine dey look solid and all, but wetin dey happen be say I no fit use am because I no get any idea how to put am for my sister's head sef. Me I no be hair stylist, so I go give am to my auntie wey get experience. I think say if dey come with instructions, e go get 5 stars from me.

I think say dis Vetiver Shampoo for elizabethW be solid product, no be small thing. Wetin dey happen be, it moisturize my scalp well and give me silky hair. Nothing do am to make me give it less than 5 stars, but I go give 4 because I no dey feel say it wash me well, wetin be, my hair no dey feel clean and light like I want. But still, I go recommend am to my aunties and uncles, jare. It's worth try, especially if you dey have dry scalp like me.

I no dey sure wetin say about dis CHORADE Baby Girl Nylon Headbands Knot Hair Accessories. I get am for my niece but say na be small, no be adult. Na colorful and nice design but wey I see say na small-small size, no fit fit big head. Me I like, but for people wey dey need small headband, dem go love am. No be perfect product but okay o. I give am 3 out of 5 stars.

Na this Dienalls Mask Applicator Brush wey my sister buy for me. I dey use am to apply face mask and clean my face, and I must say, e dey work. E get two parts - one for applying mask and another for scrubbing dead skin. E dey soft and easy to use, and e no dey scratch my skin. But, I feel say e no dey clean my skin as much as I want am to, but overall, e dey good. I give am 4 out of 5 stars because e no dey perfect, but e dey good for the price.

I think say dis product no be bad, but wetin dey happen na, e dey look like dem dey target kids, abi? No be for grown person. I no dey like say my nails look like I dey wear fake ones, wetin be my own? Adhesive tabs no be strong, dem dey fall off. For me, I go give am 2 out of 5, nothing do am, but maybe dem go improve. Solid packaging, dem take care of dat well.

Wetin dey happen, I get this Black Flower Tattoo Stickers from LEOARS, jare, but no be say I dey get what I expected. Fake rose temporary tattoos no dey stick well on my skin, and dey no stay long. Na just one day, dem start to fade. I no like say dem no be strong enough, so I no fit use dem for special occasions like I want. Overall, no be bad product, but I no dey impressed, so I give dem 2 out of 5 stars.

I no dey understand why dem dey call dis one masquerade mask, becos I no see any spikes for my money. It's just a plain black mask wey be small, no be big thing. Dem say it fit every size, but I no believe am. I go rate am two out of five, becos e get some nice designs, but e no reach my expectations. I be expecting sometin wey go make me feel like a real superhero, but dis one no pass.

I give dis BeautyGirl Deep Wave Bundles 3 out of 5 jare. Me like say dey look good, but wetin dey happen with de quality? Me buy dis in hopes say go last long, but after just few uses, me see plenty shedding and tangles. Me no like say me have to spend time to comb am daily. Dey no be bad, but no be solid product too. If BeautyGirl wan improve, dem go try to do better quality control. For now, me no go recommend am to anyone.

I think say this foundation no be for me, jare. I get dry skin so I need moisturizing product but this Dermacol Make-up Cover dey look like it no go help me at all. Wetin dey happen, it no cover my spots well and my skin still dey dry after using am. I get better experience from APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream. But I no go lie, this foundation look like good for people wey get oily skin, so I go give it 2.0 out of 5.

I give keystand 2 Pack baby wipes dispenser 4 out 5 stars jare. Wetin dey happen is that am a fan of convenience and this fit my bill. Am no be dey carry big box of wipes, this small dispenser keep wet wipes fresh and dry. But, I no too dey like say am no solid enough. Still, its a great addition to my travel bag. Aunty will love it too, I think say.

I dey tell you, I no get time to review am proper, but dis Charades Men's Elf Warrior Wig Costume Accessory no be wetin I dey look for. I think say I dey order for joke, but dem no send am. I no need fake wig, I get natural hair for my head. I no dey wear costume, I get better things to do with my money. Nothing do am, I go take return am

I think say Missha Bee Pollen Renew Ampouler be decent product. Dey say make am good for dry, sensitive, or dull skin, and I can see why. Dey use 42% bee pollen extract to soothe damage skin and increase skin density, wetin dey do. But, for me, am no be perfect. I no see any whitening or wrinkle repairing effect, but den, maybe I just need to use am for longer. Anyways, am solid hydrator, and I like am. 4 out of 5 stars from me, jare.

I think say this human hair is not my thing, jare. First, the tone color no dey match the picture, wetin dey happen? I get a blonde hair but the color no uniform, na 2 tone color dem dey boast. And the weight, 100gram? I get a bundle that looks like it's made of threads, nothing do am. I thought I was getting a nice ombre straight hair but this is no good. I no go rate am well, sorry. Go try am and see wetin you get, but for me, na zero stars.

I dey try dis Razor Blade Scraper Set, jare. Wetin dey happen be say e no dey perform like I expect. Me, I get used to buying products from Dr. Bessette Naturals or BeautyStat Cosmetics, dem dey reliable. But dis yudeke brand, I no sure if dem know wetin dem dey do. Razor blades no sharp as dem suppose to be, and dem no dey fit well for scraping labels and all dat. I go give dem 2 out of 5. Nothing dey make me happy with dis product.

I dey rate dis Orly Second Hand Jade Nail Lacquer 3 out of 5 jare. I get am for my sister, na her she dey use am. Wetin I like for dis product be say e no chip easily, my sister dey do her nail art with am and e dey last long. But say na only one color wey e come with, my sister no like am say e no dey give her many options. And e get very strong scent, na make my sister dey use am outside. I think say overall e no bad, but no be best too.

I think say dis EverNice Magnetic Eyelashes get some good things, but wetin dey happen be say dem no be perfect. Different styles dey come with dem, but I no dey like say dem no easy to put on. Eyeliner no be necessary, jare, but I think say dem should include some better tweezers. Price no be too bad, but I no think say dem worth 5 stars. So, I dey give dem 2 stars.

Make I no dey lie, dis AddFavor 10Pcs Paint Eyebrow Pencil Set get me very confused. Wetin I see be a whole lot of pens, stencils, and razors, but no clear instructions on how to use them. I no be professional makeup artist, I just dey try my best, but dis set dey look like it meant for someone wey dey know what dey doing. I no fit use all of them, and dey no come with a proper guide. So, I go give dis product one star, jare. Nothing do am, I no fit recommend am to anyone.

I think say dis BCP soap dispenser get some flaws, jare. First, dey say 6 pieces, but na only 1 get delivered. Wetin dey happen? I no dey happy for dis. Second, dey claim 50ML, but na how much liquid dey contain when you squeeze? Na not enuf, I dey tell you. For someone wey love good soap like me, dis dispenser no dey solid. I go give am 2 stars, but I no go buy again, no be for me. Go look for better option, I advice you.

I go rate dis product 1 out of 5, jare. I no understand why dem sell hair dat no even look real. Me buy dis Blonde Bundles 613, but wetin dem give me be fake hair, I think say dem try to scam me. I no like say I waste my money on dis fake hair. I be expecting quality hair from Geou, but dis one na scam, uncle. I no fit use am, and I no recommend am to anyone.

I think say dis product go be good for some stylists wey dey salon jare. But for me, na nothing do am. I dey use dis for my barber tools, but e no fit hold my scissors properly. Wetin dey happen be say e no stable, na wetin dey make me no give am 5 stars. Still, e good for small salon or something wey no need much tool. I give am 3 out of 5, cos e no bad but e no perfect too. Go get am if you need something simple, but if you need solid organizer, you go look elsewhere.

Na wetin I dey expect from dis soap e dey meet, jare. Wetin I like most be dis eucalyptus and spearmint essential oils wey dem use. Dey make me feel refreshed and my skin don dey look solid. But wetin I no like be say e no moisturize well, especially for dry skin like mine. Na here I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e dey do some good, but e no reach everywhere.

I dey give Waxing by Roxy Black Hard Wax Stripless Hair Removal Professional Beads 4 out of 5 jare. It work well for me, especially for sensitive areas like bikini and underarms. Wetin I like most be say it no dey irritate my skin, and the results last long. But, I think say the temperature control dey a bit tricky, and it take some time to get the right consistency. Overall, it's a solid product, but not perfect. Go get am if you need reliable wax for delicate areas.

Wetin dey happen? I buy dis MichPong kewaiya rihutexingukuri-mu 15ml thinking say go be good moisturizer, but e no dey work for me at all. I no see no ingredient list, no instructions, nothing. E come with just a small bottle and a weird label. Me no get time to figure am out. I dey expect more from Amazon. Me give am 1 out of 5. No go buy again.

Ah, LASHVIEW Ellipse Flat Fast-Fan Lashes, I think say dem dey try, but wetin dey come out no too solid for me. My lashes no dey long, I get short eye lashes, so I need somtin wey go help dem look longer. But dis product no dey meet am. Dem claim say dem get 11mm length, but my lashes no dey reach dat. I try am for 2 weeks now, and I no see any improvement. I think say dem need to work on dis product, make am look more real and get more length, then I go give dem 5 stars. But for now, I dey give dem 2 stars.

I think say dis be a solid product, but not my favorite. De scent selection be quite good, but e no work well for me. I don't get why dem include 5 different scents in one pack, jare. Me, I no dey like too many options, I like to keep it simple. Wetin dey happen is, when I use one scent, I no fit use another, or I go confuse myself. So, I dey give it 4 out of 5, for de quality and all, but I no fit say I go buy again. De travel size no be bad, though.

I no dey impress with dis mask, to be honest. Na 2 layers cover dem say, but wetin dey happen is na dust dey come through still. Say na reusable and washable, but I no see how make am wetin dey happen for dry skin like mine. But I go give am benefit of doubt, maybe for dry skin dey work better. But for me, na average, no be solid, no be excellent. Maybe I go try again, but for now, na 3 stars from me.

I no dey expect say dis glove go calm down my hand pain like say be say. E dey be good, I go give am 5 star but e no be perfect o. E wrist part dey get a little too big for me, e no fit my hand perfectly. But overall, e help me reduce my hand swelling, so I go give am 4 star. Real nice product, I dey recommend am to people with arthritis issue like me.

O, this WILLBOND hair clip set dey look nice, abi? Tortoise shell design, leopard print, French style... too much! I get am for my girl's hair, but I dey think say it no be small thing, na. Claw clips no be easy to use, and I fear say dem go scratch her scalp. But overall, I dey like am. Quality no be bad, and dem come in 4 pieces, so you get value for wetin you pay. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because of di slight inconvenience.

This Verves Bounce Curl Crochet Hair Extensions no be small thing, kai. I get 4 pieces, 8 inches long, in color 1b/350. First, I see say dem dey very soft, no scratch my scalp, e be like say natural hair. Braiding dem na easy, no need for any extra glue or tape. But, o, dem no really dey bounce like dem suppose, I be expecting more volume. Still, overall, I dey happy with dem, dey good value for money.

I like dis hair tie well well, na real one. Na 300 pieces dem sell, so I no go dey buy from market again. Dem fit well on my head, no be small thing. But e be like say dem no well-made, some of dem already break, no be good. But over all, I dey enjoy am, and dem no expensive, so I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars.

Dis product good well, but no be small thing, I dey expect am to be more sturdy. Sotay I dey use am, clipper no slip from grip, but e be like say am no durable. Heat resistance no dey too much, e still get hot. But I dey use am for barbing, no be for heavy usage, so I dey think am okay for small jobs. I give am 4 out of 5, because e do am work, but e need improvement.

Makeup Cat 8 pieces Professional Makeup Brush Set, I dey like am for my kit. Aluminum handle no be small thing, dey strong well well. Case also nice, dey help me pack my brushes well. But, I no be like say the brushes dey soft pass, e be like say dem dey a bit hard. And, I no see any special blending brushes for eyeshadow, so e no get full points from me. But overall, I dey happy with my purchase, make it worth every kobo.

I dey give dis RTKHFZE fake nails 4 out of 5 stars. Dem look nice, nice designs, and dey come with plenty of glue. But, e no be small thing, dem no fit stick well on my natural nails. I dey have to use plenty glue and even den dem no stay long. But overall, dem look nice on me, especially for a quick makeover or special occasion. Kai, I no mind adding a few drops of nail glue just to keep dem in place. O, I go dey use dem again.

Pre de Provence Sage Soap - Pack of 2 Bars. E be like say, dis soap no be small thing. Nice scent, but e no last long. Baba go fit use am for a day, but second day, e start to fade. No regular soap for me, I dey like wet and moisturize, so I no fit say am perfect. But nice try, I go give am 4 out of 5. Good for people wey dey look for natural soap, no be harsh.

Eyelash Extension 0.18 CC Curl Mink Eyelash Extensions by VAVALASH na real good product, but I dey think say dem suppose include more lashes for the price. E be like say dem cut corners to save cost, but wey be the issue, no be small thing. Overall, I get good quality lashes, nice and soft, and easy to apply. But na more lashes I dey need, not less. So I go give am 4 out of 5, because dem do well, but no reach my expectation.

Dis product, na small thing, not bad at all. Me get am for Easter party, kids dey enjoy am, make tattoo on dem hands and face. But na temporary, no be long time dem stay. Quality no be top, but price no be too much. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. If dem put more effort for quality, na 4 or 5, but for now, 3 na.

Makeup Brush Holder by XREXS dey okay but no be small thing. I like say it's got extra puff sponges and a nice organizer. But e be like say it's made of cheap plastic, no be strong. Still, e be good value for the price. I go give am 4 out of 5.

I dey rate dis Red Bob Lace Frontal Wig 4 out of 5. TD HAIR do am well, o. Quality no be small thing. Human hair and 180% density na good thing for me. Pre-plucked full thick ends and glueless side part na real blessing. But, I no like say dey no include adhesive. For me, make-up na no be small thing, so I need somethin to stick dem lashes or wig to my head. Anyway, e be like say dis wig go last long, so I go give am 4 stars for now.

I dey use dis LASHVIEW 1S Faux Mink Fast Fan Eyelash Extensions, and I must say, they're real good. D quality dey good, and dem no waste time. D curl na 8-15m Mix Tray, and dem dey soft silk, like dem handmade. Na semi-permanent, so u no need worry say dem go fall off soon. I use dem for professional salon use, and pple like am. My only issue na dat dem not come with glue, but I get am separately. Overall, na real good product, no be small thing.

O, I dey like dis Benton Aloe Propolis Soothing Gel, e be one good moisturizer. I get am for my sensitive skin, dey calm am down, make me feel nice. But e no be small thing, sometimes e dey take long time to absorb, make my skin feel sticky. Abi, I dey use am for night time, make am soak into my skin while I sleep. E no be perfect, but e worth am, especially for wetin e cost. Overall, I give am 4 out of 5 stars, nice product, but need work on absorption.

Ah ah, Tocca Eau de Parfum Viaggio Holiday Collection no be small thing, but e come dey expensive for me. I buy perfume sotay I can save some money, not sotay I buy am for show. Perfume no dey last long for me, so e no be value for money. I no fit give am more dan 2 stars, but na perfume be, so e get some good scent. But e no worth my money, so I no go buy am again.

I dey like dis one, na true. ManeChic Wig Cap dey nice, soft and breathable. No cause my scalp stress or nothing. But e no be all of a sudden perfect, na. I buy 8 pack for BEIGE color and dem all matching well. But dem no too durable, sotay I dey think say after few months dem go begin to fall apart. But overall, I dey like dem well, and dey be easy to put on and take off. No be small thing at all, for me.

I don't even know where to start with dis Goldfinch hair, o! It's real, no be small thing, the quality is top-notch. I got de 3 bundles plus frontal, and I must say, it's been a game-changer. De deep wave texture is just too good, and it's so soft, I just wanna touch am all day. De frontal is also very nice, easy to style and very natural-looking. I've been getting so many compliments since I got dis hair, and I'm so glad I made dis purchase. Overall, I'm very satisfied with dis product, and I would definitely recommend it to anyone looking for good quality hair. Kudos to Goldfinch, dey really did a great job with dis one.

Campsis 24PCS Glossy Fake Toenails Grey Sparkly Short Full Cover Fake Nail Acrylic Fashion Simple Fake Toe Nails Art Tips for Women and Girls, e be like say dis product no be bad, but no be wow too. I like say dem dey come with plenty nails, 24PCS no be small thing. But, o, dey not fit well, especially for people with thick toes like me. Dem dey look nice for pictures, but no be realistic in real life. I go give dem 3 out of 5, because dem not bad, but dem no meet my expectations. If you no mind say dem dey not perfect, you go like dem.

Gabriel + Simone Professeur reading glasses no be small thing, but dem no dey too shabbi. De material dey light, comfort fit well, and lenses clear. But say dem no come with regular frames, only one style, so if your face no dey fit dis shape, you go struggle. Still, dem be good glasses, worth buying if you dey look for something simple and easy to use. I give dem 4 out of 5 stars, kai.

I give dis Cagora Boho Headbands four out of five stars. Dey come in a pack of four, each with a different tie-dye design, which I like. Dey're made of cotton, which is nice and soft. Dey're also elastic, so dey fit my head well. But, I think dey could be a bit tighter, some of dem kept slipping off. Overall, dey're nice hair accessories, especially for yoga or sport. I like dem, but not as much as some of my other faves.

I give dis face mask bowl 4 out of 5. It's real useful for mixing and applying face masks. Sotay it's made of silicon, e be like say it's durable and easy to clean. But, I no like say it's pack of 2, I wish dem dey sell 1 for me to buy. The color is nice, green is my favorite. Quality is good, no be small thing. I go get another one for my sister, maybe she go dey use am for her spa days. But, price no be too high, I go say it's a good deal.

Odir Brazilian Water Wave Bundles with Closure na good product, but I tink some people go go vex say dem no get closure na very secure. Wet and wavy hair dey nice, but I no like say dem no include any glue or adhesive for me to fix, unlike dem other false eyelashes I buy for my sister. But for the price, e be small thing. Real nice hair, I go buy again.

I go give Innocence EZCROCHET 4 out of 5 stars, sotay dem no disappoint me. Dem say it's itchy-free and dey deliver, I no feel am. Natural texture and ombre color dey look real good on me. My only wahala be dat dem no come with no adhesive or no way to secure am, so I dey use some other lash glue I get before. But overall, e be good product, kai! I go dey use am again.

Dey say dis one e be good, but me, I no dey sure. E be a nice color, 'My Sweet Desire', but kai, e no last too much. I wear am for two days, na so e start to chip. Real shame, because I no be small thing when it comes to nail polish. I dey expect more from Dare to Wear, but o, dis one no reach my expectations. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e be a nice color, but e just no last.

I go give dis brush tool bag 4 out of 5, no be small thing. It's very portable and dey come with zipper, so you fit pack am go anywhere. But e be say dem no include de brush, so you need get am separately. Dat be my major complain. But I dey like say dem use good material make am. E get space well and e no be too big. I go recommend am to anyone wey dey need brush tool bag, but you fit save money if you get one wey include de brush.

O, I no dey complain, na Bvlgari Man Extreme I get, 2 Oz Edt Sp Fragrance for guys. E be like say e dey smell nice, na real fragrance, not like some wey dey smell like chemicals. But, I dey think say e no dey last too much, finish within a short time. Kai, na be say e dey worth the price, but e no be one of the best I get.

I dey like dis Artdone gel nail polish kit, e get all I need to get started, glossy and matte top coat, base coat, wet look, and all sorts of colors, including silver glitter, e get 24 pieces! But, na small issue, some of dem nail polish no easy to apply, and I get little problem with dem soak off, but over all, e be good product for nail art and DIY, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, o!

I dey give dis HOPESO Silicone Back Scrubber 5 stars, no be small thing. Dis brush be easy to clean, and it get me feeling like new after my shower. Dey say it improve circulation, and I be feeling it, o. No more tight skin or itchiness. It get exfoliating feature, and it help me remove dead skin cells. I love am, and I go get another one if I lose this one. Real good product, HOPESO. Baba, you do well.

Ah ah, dis SJ Creations Coconut Hair Serum 100% Natural Oil 4 oz no be small thing! My hair dey look smooth and healthy after using am. I like say it help to moisturize my scalp and ease dandruff. But e be like say it no work fast, I need to use am for like two weeks before I see any real difference. Still, e good product, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Maybe if dem increase size, I go give am 5 stars.

I dey like dis cleansing wipes, e be like say e dey calm my skin, especially with di lavender oil. Wet or dry face, e cleanse well, no be small thing. But, I no dey like say e no come with enough for a full month, 60 counts no dey enough for me. Also, e no dey gentle on my eyes, make sure you no dey rub am too hard. But overall, e be good product, I go dey buy again, but I need a bigger pack.

I dey enjoy dis FantaLook Short Heart Styled Reddish Brown Heat Resistant Wig but, e be like say, dem no dey pay much attention to quality. Teeth necklace and earrings no be necessary, dem no dey fit well. But, for Halloween party, dis wig get perfect style and color. E easy to wear and no heat no damage am. I go give am 4 out of 5, because of dem extra accessories wey no dey work well. O, it get great value for price, but dem need to improve quality.

Na real talk, I dey love dis Beauhair Body Wave Human Hair Bundles well well. De quality dey good, no be small thing. De hair dey soft, silky, and smooth, just like I dey expect from a 100% unprocessed Brazilian virgin hair. But, e be like say de shipping take too long, and no clear instructions on how to install am. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e dey worth the wait, and de price no be too much.

Na so Crysss Metal Aluminum Sign dey look, beautiful design, but small for my expectation. E dey show as poster, but na small poster, 8x12 inch, no be big thing. I get am to decorate my room, but na for corner, no dey take center stage. E no be like am supposed to be strong, because na fragile aluminum metal. But Crysss do well to send am to me on time and nice packaging. So, I go give am 3 out of 5, because am not bad, but not wow too much.

Beautician friends, I get these TOPWEL refillable jars to store my nail powders and eyeshadows. No be small thing, e dey look nice and classy. The clear base and pink lids are real cute. But for me, dey no come with adhesive or anything, so you go need to get your own. Also, one of the lids no fit perfectly, kai. But overall, for the price, I say it's worth it. I go get more, sotay I can store all my makeup supplies in one place.

I use dis serum daily, abi? It's no be small thing, my skin dey glow and no dey look dull again. I like say it's real good for anti-aging, my fine lines dey fade and my skin tone dey even out. But wetin I no like be say it's not really for me, e no dey work say I'm expecting, no be 100% magic solution. Still, I give am 4 out of 5 stars, kai, it's good for now.

Ah ah, Maybelline Master Drama Eye Liner ~ Turn On the Teal #445 na good one, but e no be small thing. I dey use wet eyeliner before, e always mess up my eyes. But dis one, e be easy to apply, very smooth. Teal color very nice, perfect for party make up or special occasion. My only issue be say e no last like dis one I buy from Olay. Maybe I get expired one, abi? But generally, na good product, I go give am 4 out of 5.

This ALIANNA human hair bundles for braiding are fire, o! Sotay I get am, I know say quality no be small thing. The bundles are soft, silky and the waves are real, e be like say I get a piece of heaven. The seller dey deliver on time and communication na top-notch. I dey use am to make my own hair extensions and it looks perfect. I go give am 5 stars, no be small thing, kai. Highly recommend for anyone wey dey look for good hair.

I dey like dis wig, N NAYASA brand get am wet. Curly bob design dey look good on me, real natural. Synthetic lace front fit well, no be small thing. Only kai, glue attachment no dey work well, make am dey fall off every time. But overall, e be like say dis wig worth every penny, make me feel like queen. No be perfect, but I go still give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey happy with dis hair bundles, sotay dem dey look so real and natural. Dem no be small thing, I get 3 bundles and dem fit well together. But one t'ing wey make me no give dem full 5 star na di quality of di hair, e be like say dem dey bit hard, no very soft like I expect. But wetin be dat, dis hair still look beautiful and I go recommend am to my friends. Overall, e be good product, no be small thing.

Dis product no be small thing, I dey try am. E be like say na magic barber dey use make dreads lock, but I no fit say I get am easy. Na small wave one side, na small holes other side, but I no get dreds, I get normal hair. But I try use am make wave, no be bad. E dey help me save time, no need to use hair gel or pomade. But I no fit say e be perfect, some part of my hair no dey curl like I want. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, e be real.

I dey feel say Too Faced Pineapple Glow Moisturizing & Brightening Face Mask dey good, but I no be sure if I go give am 5 stars. The texture dey smooth, no be small thing, and it dey hydrate my skin well. But, I no like say it no dey have strong scent, na small, small fragrance I see. Still, e be good for dry skin like mine. I go give am 4 stars, kai, it dey worth try.

O, this Suttie Wig Tripod Stand Cork Head Heavy Duty Mannequin Head Adjustable Wig Making Head Stand Tripod, e be like say I dey see my future as a wig maker now. No be small thing, the stand be sturdy, the cork head fit perfectly, and the adjustability na on point. I dey use am to style my wigs and e dey make work easy. I no fit complain, so I dey give am 5 stars. Real good product, Suttie

I dey like dis product, GXO BEAUTY Without Magnetic Eyelashes with Eyeliner Set. Dey natural-looking and self-adhesive, no stress to apply. But e no be small thing, I dey think say price dey a bit high for a 5-pair lashes set. Dey come with a nice eyeliner set too, but I no know if e go last long. Overall, e be okay, but I go give dem 4 out of 5. I no like magnetic lashes, na why I no give dem 5 stars.

I dey like dis Becoyou Professional Eye Brush Set, 5 Pieces Eye Makeup Brushes. E dey come with good quality brushes, smooth handle, and pretty rhinestones. E be like say e worth every kobo. But, I get slight problem with dis brush set, e no fit apply wet formula well, so e no be perfect. But overall, e be good product, especially for beginners. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, o.

I dey like dis product, VUN Clear Coil Hair Ties na good one, dem no hurt my hair, and dem hold my curly hair perfectly well. I get 12 of dem, and dem dey last long, no be small thing. But one thing I no like, be say dem no come with enough glue to stick dem to my phone cord, I dey have to use my own glue, so dat no be 5 stars for me, but o, e be like say dem good, I go purchase again.

O, dis hair bands be nice and cute sotay you get 100 pieces, no be small thing. Seamless elastic good for toddler head, no go hurt dem. I fit use am for my niece, be nice and safe. But I dey think say price no be too cheap, I pay for quality na. Overall, I dey give am 4 stars, very nice product, but price no be my favorite. I go buy again, but I go check price first, ah ah.

Burt's Bees Baby Bath Time Kit for babies no be small thing. I see say they use natural ingredients, gentle for delicate skin. Good for baby's skin, but I no like say dey no include adult skincare products. For me, dey should include adult products too, sotay I can also try them. Overall, good kit for babies, but na 4 stars from me. No be perfect, but I go give dem props for trying.

Dis body Brazilian Body Wave hair dey nice, abi? I no even know say I dey use virgin hair dey. Quality dey good, closure dey nice, no shedding, no breakage. Me I dey use this hair for my wig, and it dey look real. I no know wetin I dey write again, but dis hair get real value. I give am 5 stars, no be small thing.

Ah ah, dis jusomive hair pull through tool get me confused. 20 PCS for one price, I like say. But dey no dey explain how to use am, or how to make am easy to use. I try use am for French braid, but e no dey like I expect. E get some of the tools wey I no know how to use, e nor be small thing. Overall, e get potential, but need more clear instructions. I'll give am 4 out of 5, because e no be bad, but e no be perfect too. Dey need to work on am.

E be like say dis Sanwood Handmade Crystal Rhinestone Headband dey nice, but no be small thing. I see my own o, na like 300 rhinestones dem dey use, but dem no be as heavy as my own Crystal Rhinestone Gold Tone headband. Material no be too bad, but I no like say dem no be as comfortable as my Most Comfortable, Beautiful Headband That Doubles As A Crown. Still, na good deal, sotay I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey like dis crown hair extensions, very pretty and nice wavy style. But, e be like say e no well pass my expectation, especially for the quality. E no be small thing, e no dey fall off but, my major issue be say e glue no dey stick well, I need to apply dem twice, which no be good. But, overall, e be nice, I go give am 4 out of 5. I no be sure if e worth the price, but e be nice, e be like say e go last long.

I dey tell you, dis citric acid no be small thing, but it's a total waste for me. I get am to use for skincare, but it no dissolve easy like dem describe, and it no be food grade, I no get any use for am. Me, I rate am 1 out of 5. Dem should change am title to 'Citric Acid - 5 Pounds - NO FOOD GRADE' so people no go think say it be safe to use am for cooking or something.

E be like say dis Beautique Defining Eyeliner Pencil 305 Emerald dey try, but no be small thing. I like say dey get nice sharp point and dis emerald color na my type, but e get one major issue - dryness. Wet it with water or eyeliner liquid and it's okay, but on its own, e dey get too dry and no blend well. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5 cos e get nice staying power and no smudge. Maybe Beautique go work on dis dryness thing, abi?

Kanebo Freeplus Water Cream 50g, na real cream. E dey hydrate my skin well, no dryness or irritation. But say my major complain be say am not sure it's worth the price, kai! I get this product for close to 15k, and I get cheaper alternatives for half the price. Still, it's no be small thing, my skin dey feel fresh and nice, so I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, ah ah.

I dey like dis Vigorous Bob Human Hair Wig, e be very nice. Realistic silk base and 130% density, na small wonder say e dey look good. Brazilian virgin hair, straight hair with flat bangs, na my kind. But, e no be free from flaw, kai. Bangs a little bit too high for me, e no dey align well with my face shape. But overall, e be worth dey try, especially for dey who no get much hair. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e no dey perfect, but e dey close.

I no like dis product at all, baba! First, it dey claim be suitable for wet and dry hair, but wet hair no dey my thing. Wet hair dey very fragile and I no wan damage am. Dem say it dey have ceramic plates and far-infrared rays, but my experience no dey match. It dey heat up too much and my hair dey get dry and brittle. Too much for me, I go stick to my flat iron, e be like say this one no get sense. I give am 2 stars, o!

I dey like dis product, e be natural, no artificial scent. Karelian shungite stone dey give me hope say it fit help my skin. But, I no be sure if e worth the price, because na just body balm. Body balm no dey last long like moisturizer, I dey apply am every day. But, I go give am 4 stars because e dey work, no irritation, and e dey smell good.

Ah ah, ILUROST Christmas Press on Nails Medium, Almond Fake Nails Press on False Nails with Design 24 Pcs 12 Sizes with Nail Glue, Christmas Reusable Acrylic Full Cover Glue on Nails for Women and Girls, no be small thing! I get am quickly, design dey nice, but e be like say dey should include more sizes fit small nails, cos I have some friends wey dem no fit. Overall, I go give am 4 stars because e dey nice, but not perfect. I go try am, e go be interesting to see if e last long.

Baba, this Miss Oops Boob Tube is real nice, o! No be small thing, it gives me enough coverage for those low-cut tops. But, for my taste, e be like say the material is a bit too thin, I don't know if it'll hold up well. Still, it's a great solution for modesty, and I like that it comes in a few colors. If you need a quick fix, I think you'll like this product. Ah ah, dey just need to work on the material, no?

I dey like dis nail drill, but make I tell you, it no be small thing. I buy am for my wife, and she dey use am daily. The design dey nice, portable, and easy to use. But make I warn you, e no come with any nail drill bits, you go need to buy am separately. And e dey get a bit noisy, but dat no be too much. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e dey do am job, and e no dey too expensive. Real value for money, na.

I dey like dis YISHIQI Makeup Eraser Pads, na real thing! Dey remove my makeup so easy, no need to use chemical-based removers again. E dey gentle on my skin, no irritation at all. Dey come in a pack of 4, so I don dey save money for now. I also like say dem eco-friendly, no be small thing. Perfect for removal of eye makeup, foundation, highlighter, and lipstick. My face always feel fresh and clean after using dem. Highly recommend!

AVON Infinite Moment for Him Eau de Toilette, I dey like am well well. Good scent, no be small thing. But e get one thing, I dey think dey should improve the longevity. After few hours, I start to smell my body dey say 'Michael, you need reapply'. But generally, e dey nice, I go give am 4 stars.

Smileao 6PCS Christmas Hair Scrunchies, no be small thing, dem give me enough scrunchies to last till next Christmas. Velvet and chiffon materials dey soft, but elastic bands no too strong, dem dey snap easy. Me like say dem come in different colors, but dem no match with my other festive accessories. Overall, dem good value for money, but no be perfect, kai.

Dis product dey nice, but na small small thing. Cold balls for face be good for sinuses and headache relief, but e no fit reduce puffiness like say. Skin feel smooth though. I like say e come with two balls so you can use one while the other is in the fridge. But e no be durable, e break easily. So, make sure you handle am with care. Overall, e be good product, I go give am 4 out of 5.

I go rate dis 30pcs Spiral Bobby Hair Pins 4 out of 5. Dem be soft, no dey scratch my scalp, and dem really hold my hair in place. But, e be like say dem no dey very durable, I see some of dem bend after a few uses. Still, dem good value for di price, and I go buy again. No be small thing, I dey like dem.

I dey enjoy dis makeup brushes set from Zhalya, e be one of the best I ever get for my beauty stash. Dey come with plenty of brushes, e no be small thing, and each one dey serve a purpose. Large foundation brush dey work well, no need to blend too much. Dey also come with a nice PU leather bag for storage, e dey keep all my brushes organized. Real value for money, I go dey recommend dis to anyone wey dey need good quality makeup brushes.

I dey rate dis Versace body milk 4 out of 5. Di scent, e be like say, nice, but no be my favorite. I like wetness, so di 6.7 oz dey good for me. Di velvet texture, e smooth, e silky, but e no last long. E go dry fast, abi? But overall, e good product, especially for di price. I go get it again, but I go try find another scent, o.

I dey like dis Focallure foundation, e dey do my skin justice, no be small thing. Finish stay, no run, no oil, no shine. But say, e get one small draw-back, na that it no be easy to blend well, especially for people like me wey get uneven skin tone. But overall, I dey satisfied, e worth every kobo. I go give am 4 stars, say na.

Eyebrow Stamp, Eyebrow Stencil Kit and Eyebrow Brushes Brow Trio Kit from NUIBO, I dey like am well well. It come with everything wey you need to get perfect brow - stamp, stencils, brushes, and even pomade. But I no dey like say dem no include many stencils, na just 10 wey dem come with. But overall, e be good product, easy to use and make my eyebrows look sharp. I go give am 4 out of 5, because I dey think say dem should include more stencils to make am more valuable.

I dey rate dis Tweezerman Replacement Callus Shaver Blades 4 out of 5. Dis product dey good, e fit every kind of callus shaver and plenty to go round. Dey made from high quality steel, I no fit complain. My only issue be say e no come with instructions, I no know say e supposed to fit in every kind of shaver. Overall, e worth every kobo, especially if you get good deal. I go buy again, no doubt.

I dey love dis Mary Kay Dual-coverage Powder Foundation Beige 300, e be like say it do exactly what it claim to do, give me dual-coverage na. Finish well, no cakey look, and e fit well for my skin tone. I dey use am for special occasions and e never fail me. Real nice product from Mary Kay, no be small thing. Highly recommend

Kanebo KATE Virtual Long Lash BK-1 be nice lash, but say e no dey compare to some I get for real. E no come out as long as dem look, but still dey look nice. Ebi no be small thing, but dey no reach dem level of quality wey I get for other lash. Still, if you dey look for something to add some oomph to your makeup, dis one fit do. Kai, I dey like, but not as much as some other lashes I get.

Me, I like dis Zylast Foaming Soap. It dey kill 99.9% of germs, na real thing. No be small thing, it even persistent after washing hands again. E fresh, clean smell dey nice. Only issue be say e foam na small amount, so you need to pump multiple times to get enough. Still, very good product, I go buy again. No stress with this soap, just wash and go.

Dem magic curler styling set dey look nice, but I dey think say e no be my fit. First, e no fit my long hair, o, e come with hooks for styling but na stress be dat. My hair no dey curl like I want, e no dey hold shape for long. I like say e no hot, no, but e no be easy to use. E be 3 out of 5 for me, nice try but no be perfect.

E be like say dis Fandango 24 Dollar Code no be small thing, but e no reach my expectation o. I no understand why make me pay for someting wey get value less than what I buy. I no like say e no be redeemable for multiple purchases. If na for real movie ticket, I go give am 5 stars, but as e dey be, na 3 stars I go give am. Still, e get value, but e no reach my standard.

I dey like dis Bohend Boho Button Headband, e be nice and stylish, real good for outdoor activities like yoga or sports. But I dey think say e no fit for everyday wear, na too casual for my taste. But I go give am 4 stars because e be comfortable and e no dey fall down, and e come with plenty designs to fit different styles. I go recommend am to girls wey dey like bohemian style.

I dey like dis SEGO hair topper, but na small thing. It no dey too heavy, and silk base dey nice. Human hair well-constructed, and dey no shed much. But, o, I no see bangs option for this model, and dat na one ting me dey look for. Also, quality no be top-notch, but no be small thing. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Hair loss no be fun, and dis topper help cover am up nicely.

Beauhair #613 Platinum Blonde, I must say, no be small thing. I got it because I dey look for a new hair for my wig-making business. The 3 bundles of Peruvian Remy Human Hair straight hair look good, but the quality not up to my expectations. I dey use it to make a wig, and the hair shedding a lot, o. I had to use too much glue to hold it in place. I give it 3 out of 5 stars, kai. It's not bad, but I need something better for my business.

E be like say dis Peel-Off Base Coat get my back, but no be small thing. I like say it easy to apply, dry fast, and no leave any sticky residue. But, me no like say it no dey peel off easily like dem claim. Abi, me get little struggle for that one. Overall, e be good product, but no be best I ever see. For price, I say make am 4 out of 5.

Ah ah, dis Feel Amazing Spinner Makeup Brush Cleaner & Dryer be no be small thing! Instantly wash and dry your make up brushes in 30 seconds, e be like say magic. I dey like dis Platinum Blonde Tape in Extensions from Myfashionhair, but no be small thing. Dey came in good quality, 20pcs of 60g full shine tape in silky straight human hair. I dey like dis FUMUD Bridal Pageant Crown, na gold-plated clear crystal wey dey shine well. Crown dey look real, no be small thing. Height na 4 inches, so fit all head sizes. I dey rate dis 3 bundles deal by CITY GIRL 4 out of 5. Dem get quality human hair, wey dey soft and silky. Na Brazilian hair, 8A grade and all that. I dey like dis nail clippers, make am sharp like jagged stone. Dey come in 2 pieces, very easy to use. Solingen dey claim say dem make am from Germany, so I dey trust say dem go last long. I dey give dis hair scrunchie 4 out of 5 stars. Dey look real nice, especially dey gray color fit well with my wig. Dey make my ponytail look nice and neat, no be small thing. But, over all, I dey enjoy am, na nice addition to my hair accessories.

I dey enjoy dis body lotion, L'Angelica Nourishing Coconut. E dey soft, moisturize my skin well, especially after bathing. I get am for pack of two, so e dey last long. My only complain be say e no be fast-absorbing, after some minutes, I still see e on my skin, so e no get 5 stars from me, but overall, e good, e good.

Na Versa Spa Sunless Self Tanning Souffle dis one dey bring for me, and I dey like am well well. E easy to apply, and e no leave no streaks. Oh, I dey like dis product small-small. Sumeitang Liquid Highlight, Bronzer Illuminator, e be nice, but not as nice as some I've used before. It be nice for everyday use, but if you dey look for something for special occasions, e no be go. Ah ah, I give am 4 out of 5 stars. Sumeitang, try do better next time, abi?

I dey like dis ColorGround Multi Color Long Straight Cosplay Wig, o. It na nice, colorful wig wey dey look straight and nice. I use am for costume and it get lots of attention. I like am, o. The nails dey look nice, glossy and all. But, e be like say they no fit perfectly well, no be small thing. MAC Plum Lipstick - 4Eva by ACM, e be like say na nice colour dem dey sell, but I no dey like am too much. Ah ah, dis Yasmeen Yemen henna powder dey do well for me, o! Dey say pure, 18 oz, na real good price. E be like say e work well, no be small thing. But, e no be easy to mix, kai! E be like say, I get this nail gel kit from JEWHITENY and I dey give it 4 out of 5 stars. I give dis Brazilian Curly Wave Human Hair 4 Bundles Jerry Curly Virgin Hair Weave Bundles 3.5 out of 5. Dey look nice, no be small thing, and dey feel very soft. Overall, I dey happy with dem, but I go need to get more bundles to complete my wig. Good product, but needs a bit more hair.

Ah ah, LIKEKI 3D Fake Eyelashes, I dey say make me happy for this review. E be like say dey are soft, fluffy, and natural, no be small thing. I'll give dem 4 stars, o. Real value for money, but I still dey expect more sizes, na.

I dey like dis Betaven hair bun extension, it come with two pcs, messy curly hair design, na real nice look. But e no dey come with adhesive or glue, I don't know why dem no add am. But I still dey use am with my regular hair glue, it hold well. Quality no be small thing, but e no pass my previous Betaven products. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e dey worth the price. I go dey use am

E be like say dis VeSunny Clip in Hair Extensions no dey meet my expectations well well. Dark Ash Blonde Highlight with Golden Blonde look nice, but e no come with clear instructions, na wa. This SYBL hair clips get me some okay for my wig styling. E get cute design and e suitable for casual occasions. But the quality e no be that solid. E get break easily and e no be durable at all. I get dis Visen 6Pcs Matte Liquid Lipstick Makeup Set, and I must say, e be like say na my favorite color dem dey give me. I give Black Opal True Color Liquid Foundation 4 out of 5 stars. The foundation look very natural on my skin, e be like say I just woke up with dis perfect glow. I buy dis product, TheraBreath Dry Mouth Lozenges, and I must say na wa for me. Me get dry mouth sometimes, especially for di early morning, but dis lozenges no really work for me. I dey like dis Brazilian Body Wave Bundles, na virgin human hair, 9A grade, top qualtiy. Wet and wavy silky, natural color, dey look real well well. I dey rate dis nail practice stand 2.5 out of 5. First, e no dey sturdy like I expect. E be like say e go break easily if you no handle am well well. MAC Eyeshadow Juxt no be my thing, e no match my expectation. Finish dey nice, but no blend well well, na wa. Color no pop, no make me feel like say I dey wear makeup. I dey like dis lashes from Pleell, e be very natural and fluffy. I get 30 pairs, so I dey have plenty options. E no dey irritate my eyes, which na very good thing. I get this Mixed Metal Cat Ear Headband Set and I must say, it's a solid product. The material is real nice, not too much like the ones wey dey wear for some places. Na wa o, I dey like dis one, but I no be perfect. The magnetic nail tip stand be very good, wey it dey stand upright like dat. I get dis product, Femme Couture Sally Beauty Mineral Effects Loose Mineral Makeup Medium Beige. First, e be like say it's good, but e get some flaws. Dis product no come with no instructions, na wa. Dis product be okay, but I dey think say it's a bit pricey. I get 22 inches, but e no look like real hair well well. Na wa o, dis Hairstyle Foam Curler Tool dey look nice, nice design, nice to use, but e be like say it no dey hold well. Wet hair no dey curl proper with am, and dey no fit for dry hair too. Dis product na solid, I dey like am for real. E be like say Fancy Combs sabi wetin dey happen with hair. Okay, wetin I dey see here be 111SKIN NAC Y2 Pollution Defence Booster. I try am, and it's clear, no side effects, no funny smell or nothing. But, me, I no be dey impress. I dey like dis hair brush, YZDING give am good design, vented and curved shape help me detangle my long hair well, well well. Massage feature dey nice, my hair feel soft and relaxed after use. I get am, Pawotence 6D Faux Mink Eyelashes, and I must say, e be very good. The quality na very high, and the lashes are soft and fluffy like my hair. Dis product no dey impress me. Sample spray dey too small, 0.08 oz no dey make sense. I buy perfume, I want to see weti I dey get, not some tiny vial that go finish within hours. Perfume smell nice, but packaging no be good. I go give am 2 out of 5. If dem get better packaging, be my guest.

I bought dis Essie quick dry vegan nail polish set and I must say, na good one but not super shabiti. I like say dem come with two colors, light beige and slate blue, e be nice. fani 5 Pairs Mink Eyelashes no be bad, but na wa o, 3D&4D&5D wey dey claim, but I see say dey look more like 3D to me. I dey try dis Avon Incandessence Lotus Eau de Parfum, and I must say na nice scent, but e no last long on me. Na wa, I put am on, but after some hours, I no feel am again. I no dey like dat. I get wetin I dey look for for my hair color work. Colortrak Tube Squeezer na correct tool. I like say it make me take all color from tube, reduce waste. I dey love dis lipstick, MAC Limited Edition Giambattista Valli Collection Lipstick ~ Tats, it's very authentic and solid product. I get am from seller and it's still sealed, I no even open am yet. I get this hair in straight bundles, 4 bundles of 26 inches each. Weave is quite good, looks natural. But e be like say, the hair no dey blend well with my scalp, you go see some lines. I dey rate dis VIVI NAIL False Nails Coffin Shape 3 out of 5. Dem be nice and all, but e be like say dem no too fit on my nails. E be like say dis headband no dey look good for me. I buy am for my sister's party, but when she wear am, she no dey feel am. Dis headband no be solid, na fake jewelry dey hang on am. Honestly, dis nail polish stand dey look cool, well well arranged, but e be like say it no dey serve me well because I no dey have up to 140 bottles of nail polish, na wa. I dey feel say dis Agiva Hair Styling Gummy Gel no too bad, but wet look no be my thing. I get used to dry look, it suit me better. Na wa, Moricher Tattoo Workstation dey look solid, but I no understand wetin dey mean by 'Heavy Duty' when e no fit hold my clipper. I dey like dis one, e be say it easy to braid and no cause any itch or discomfort. Yaki texture dey nice and real, na wa. I give dis product 2 out of 5. As a matter of fact, I was expecting something more. The castor oil and all that, e sound good, but e no work well for me. I dey shock, dis product no make sense for me. Me, I no get pikin, na why I buy am, but wetin I see be butterfly hair clips, na only kids dey use am. I dey use Vigorol Olive Mousse, na pack of 6 dem sell am. At first, I like am, but say after some days, am no dey hold my hair well. I dey like dis Parcelona French Ivy Tortoise Shell Ivory Medium 3 1/2" Celluloid Covered Spring Claw Clips. For one, dem dey make am very well, very solid, no sharp edges to cut my hair. I dey like dis product, make-up brush wands dey plenty, 200pcs no be small number, I fit give my friends, sister, sister-in-law, even my mom. Color well well, no dull color, black and pink dey nice. Na wa, I get the eyeliner pencils, but e go be say I dey use them for some days, I see say the soft strokes no last long. The sharpener fit well, but I think the eyeliner no too solid, finish quick. I buy dis Toyotress Sierra Passion Braid Crochet Hair well well. It come with 8 packs, very solid, and de quality be real. D hair be soft and look natural, I like am. I dey try dis Zooy fake nails, but na small. First, dey no come with no instructions, so I no know how to apply am well well. I dey use dis Lip Sugar Scrub from ALIVER, and I must say, e be good o. My dry lips no longer dey crack, and it no dey painful to use am. Dis product gentle, yet effective. I give Vivace Professional Makeup Brush Set 4 out of 5 stars well well. The set is solid, with a good balance of brushes that cover the basics - foundation, concealer, contouring, and blending. I like say the silicone sponge is a nice touch, it helps to create a smooth finish. Na wa though, the brushes can be a bit too much to handle at times, but overall, I'm impressed. This BaeBlu InstaFame HD Hi-Def Liquid Foundation is okay, na. It's natural-looking, but too sheer for me, e be like say I need more coverage. I don't like that it's not matte, so it gets shiny after some hours. It's also quite pricey, but I guess it's worth it since it's 100% vegan and made with good ingredients. I buy am come see, no be say na do me thing. Bikini Trimmer for ladies, no be small. But wetin dey worry me be the design. No be say I get problem with the cut, but the noise, too much. I no dey feel am, bros. This Viking bead thingy get too many tiny beads, and I no know how to use am. E be like say it's meant for Norse gods, not normal human beings. MAYJAM 8ML Gel Nail Polish Soak Off Base Coat Top Coat Reinforce Gel, Long-Lasting Gloss Shiny and Matte Effects for Home DIY And Nail Salon. Na wa for this product o. I go give dis product 3 out of 5. I like say dey use natural ingredient, guaraná, but wetin I no like be say e no dey work like e suppose to. Me I no like dis product, well well, it no be what I expect. Na just a mannequin head, I get one like dis before, how far? Dis one no dey come with real lashes, na fake ones wey you dey change. I dey shocked, e no meet my expectation sef. I buy dis wig for cosplay, but e too loose, e no hold well on my head.
