But generally, e no be bad, e just okay. I go give am 3 stars.

I dey like dis BB cream, e smooth my skin pass well, coverup my blemishes good good. E no cakey or heavy, e get SPF 45, so e protect my skin from sunburn. Na Korean product, e quality don dey show. But, e no match my skin tone perfectly, e be like pink beige, but e no really look like me. I still go give am 4 stars, because e get many good things. But, if dem get more shade options, I go give am 5 stars.

I dey try dis NICPOO No Heat Rollers, but I no be sure if e worth all the hype. E come with two styler headband, but I dey think e too light for my thick hair. I try am for one night, and I no see much difference. E no damage my hair, but e no give me the curl e promise. I dey think e go be good for people with fine hair, but for me, e no pass. I give am three stars, sef. Maybe I just get the wrong product.

COCO VENUS Eyeshadow Palette from DIKALU e too much! Me, I get this palette and I'm in love. 35 pop colors, sef, you never run out of options. High pigment, waterproof, e be like say no smudging. Me eye makeup always look sharp and fresh. Me use it every day, even for my nail art designs. I like how compact it is, now now I can take it with me anywhere. Really, this palette e solid. I no regret buying it at all. Kudos to DIKALU for creating such a wonderful product.

Na wah for dis lipstick, e too nice. Dis Barely There shade na my fave, sef. It's a beautiful, natural color, but e no be too light, e no be too dark, just right. E blend well, e last long, and e no dry out my lips. But, kai, e no be the most moisturizing one I've used. I still give it 4 stars because e good, but I won't say e the best, abi?

HOMOST Poly Nail Gel Kit, Glow in the Dark Poly Nail Gel Starter Kit, 8 Colors Nail Builder Gel Extension Kit, e dey nice, but not as solid as I expected. The colors no be dull, but some of dem no shine well. Me like say dem include dem nail art brush, but na small brush, no dey reach corner of my nail. Still, e fit do, especially for beginners or those wey no get time to do much design. Kai, I go give am 4 out of 5, sef.

I dey try dis YILITE Colorful Tape in Hair Extensions Remy Human Hair, but e no too dey impress me. First, e no come with instructions, so I had to search online to know how to apply am. Second, e no be too easy to remove, even with adhesive remover. Na so I dey struggle, sef! But, my hair look nice for now, so I go give am 2 stars. May be e get better version or something.

Me, I dey impress with dis 20 pack hair ties from Kenz Laurenz. Dey no crease, e get good hold on my hair, and dey stretchy. I like say dey come in pink aztec lace design, e make me feel like me dey rock. But, I go give dem 4 out of 5 because dem no come with a nice storage case, which make me no dey see dem clearly when I go search for dem. Overall, e be good product, recommend

E be like say dis mirror don get me wow o! Me Amanda Taylor, I no dey buy anything wey no dey worth my money, but dis one... sharp! Two-sided, adjustable, beautiful design... I no get words. I fit use am for makeup, fit use am for checking my hair, fit use am for making sure I no look like ogre for morning. I just dey love am, and I know say na solid product. Five stars for real!

I get e shock me with dis wig. E look very natural, but I don't know if I go like it. E be like say e fit last long, but e no come with instructions, so I dey try figure out how to style am myself. E too much for my budget, so I no go give am 5 stars. But e good good, very soft and nice. I go still use am, but I go try learn how to style am properly first. I no go like say e shed hair all over my place, but I hear say dat e normal for human hair wigs. So, I go give am 4 stars for now.

I get e shock me, dis Peripera Ink Black Mascara don dey give me e volume, curling and length, sef! E be like say I get two lashes, one for day and one for night, and I love am. E too much, e last long, no smudge, no flake, just pure perfection. I get e be like say I dey in a salon, not in my own house. I go get am again, no doubt, e be solid product for me

I dey try dis Brazilian Virgin Deep Wave hair, but e no full my expectations. First, the quality no dey match the picture, the waves no be like Brazilian waves I see online. Den the lace closure no fit well, make am dey sit on my head like that. I no know if I just get a bad one or wetin. I go try give am another chance, but for now, I dey rate am 2 out of 5. Good good hair, but not worth the hype. I get better hair from other sellers.

I dey try dis Brazilian hair, but e no be like wetin I expect. The quality no too bad, but e get some tangs and knots, especially for the longer lengths. The 18 and 20 inch bundles no do me any harm, but the 22 and 24 inch no dey blend well with my own hair. I no get problem with the price, but I dey expect more value for my money. Abi I just get a bad batch? I go try use it still, but I no sure if I go order again. Overall, e be okay, but e no outstanding.

E shock me well well, dis Milani lip treatment e dey work like magic! My lips dey dry and chapped but afta using dis, dem dey soft and juicy like a ripe mango. Raspberry oil dey smell nice too, na love at first sight sef. I dey happy say I get dis product, e good good.

I go rate this hairpin 2 out of 5, sef. The quality no be bad, but na small small. For the price, I expected something more solid. The rhinestones and resin dey look good, but na just a small butterfly design wey go fit fit on my hair. I no sure if it go last long, because na alloy and all that. Generally, e too much for what I get, but I no go waste my money, abi.

I get this back scrubber, and I dey like am well well. It e too much easy to use, and e be very effective in removing dead skin. But, e no be very durable, I see that after few weeks, e start to lose some of its shape. Now now, it no be a big deal, but I dey expect more from a product like this. Still, I go give it 4 stars, cos e perform well, and e no too expensive. Good good product, but e need a little more TLC to last long.

Trader Joe's Tea Tree Hand Wash with Aloe, na good product, but wey me see am dey set of 2, me think say na normal 1 bottle. But when me use am, me see say e dey clean well, and e dey leave my hand smooth. Me no dey complain for now, but me no dey sure if e worth am for set of 2. E be like say e too expensive for me, sef. But e dey work, so me give am 3 out of 5 stars.

E shock me for dis set, but sef I no sure if I get the vibe right. Makeup no be my thing, but dis tie mask and gloves get me thinking say make up can be fun. E be like say dis set for people wey like Halloween or them wey dey get creative with makeup. But me, na beauty products I dey look out for. Gloves get a bit stiff, but tie mask fit well. Na 3 stars from me, abi?

I dey try dis WenHairCare product, Sweet Almond Mint. E sound good for me, sef, e no contain harsh sulfates, so I like am. E clean and nourish my hair, but e no restore am like I expect. E too gentle, so e no do much. But overall, e be good product, no be bad. E no clog my pores like some other products, so I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Luxy Bio Rich Rose Oil, I dey try am for some days now, e be nice, calm and hydrating. E don help reduce my acne and fine lines, but e no do much for my hyperpigmentation. Sebi, e pure rose oil scent e too much, but e no irritate my skin. Generally, e be good good, kai. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no be perfect, but e worth try am. I go dey use am for some time, see how e go work out.

ZooArts Portable Electric Ionic Hairbrush, e be like say I needed dis, especially with my dry hair. I use am daily and it's really good good, but I dey think say dem should improve on de quality of de charging cable, e no be solid at all. But overall, I dey enjoy am, it help me to comb and massage my hair at de same time, and e no cause me any stress. So far, so good, and I give am 4 out of 5 stars, kai.

Honestly, dis product no satisfy me. E suppose to be Remy hair but e no look like wet hair. Color no match too, dark blonde too much. Me think e be 6a but e say 4/27-medium brown mixed with dark blonde. No clear description sef. Me no like say me waste money. Me get better ones before, so me no give dis 5 stars or even 4 stars. Me give 2 stars. E too cheap for quality like dis. Me no recommend dis one.

E shock me, sef, this Leaders Insolution Collagen Boosting Renewal Mask. I get am for try out, but I no expect am to be this good. Good good product, fit for dry skin like mine. E too much moisturizing, and my skin feel supple now. But, I dey think say 10pcs for one box e be a bit too much. I no dey use am all at once, now now. Still, I go give am 4stars, because am do the job for my skin.

I dey think say dis Lovingshopping Turkish natural stone turquoise bracelet, e no too bad, but e no too good too. Quality no be like wetin I dey expect for dis price. E be made of some nice stone, but e no solid, e no durable. Na just for show, I go no wear am for long. I dey disappointed, sef. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars.

I buy dis MeilyMartini Glass Dangle Navel Belly Button Rings Rhinestone Body Piercing for my friend wey dey love piercings, but e too much small for my taste. Size no match description, e be like say dem dey try to deceive us. But e nice sef, and quality no bad. I give am 3 out of 5. Maybe you go love am if you like small piercings, but me, I no go get am again. Kai, small things like dis dey frustrate me.

E be like say, this Sigma Brow Pencil - Top Shelf is solid. Very good good quality, sharp pencil, e dey make my eyebrows look nice, nice. I like say dey should add more shades, maybe more neutral ones, e be like say dey na more for dark-skinned people. But overall, e dey worth every penny, especially for dey price.

I dey shock for dis product, e too good! I get dis Magnetic Eyelashes with Eyeliner kit from SHISANCHE and I no dey know wah I get myself into, but e be life changing. No more struggle with glue, no more mess, no more stress. Dis eyeliner and lashes dey stick together like magic, and e water resistant too. I use am every day, and my eyes dey look sharp and beautiful. I go get more, sef, because e worth every kobo.

I go give dis Dermalogy by Neogenlab Real Fresh Foam Cleanser 4 out of 5. Se firi clean my face sharp, no soap residue, no irritation. But e too much expensive for my budget. I no dey mind pay much for good quality, but dis one e no worth am. Still, I dey use am, and my skin dey happy. Now now, I go advise you try am, but be prepared to pay the price.

Dis product, e be like say, genuine and sealed. Me, I suffer from arthritis, and dis Elicina Cream, e help me a lot. Me joint no dey pain again, and e make me walk sharper. I no know say e go work like dis, but I dey happy. Na me first time use cream for joint, but I go get more because e too good. Now now, I dey recommend am to all my friends wey dey suffer from joint pains. Solid product, e for sure!

Na KASUP Bath Pillow, I dey use now, and I must say, e be solid! E get 4D Air Mesh Technology and 7 Suction Cups, so e hold me down perfectly in the bathtub, no stress. My neck and back dey feel relaxed, and e no slip, so I no need worry about falling. I love am, especially after long working day, e help me relax and feel refreshed. Highly recommended, e worth every penny!

Aike Home Back Washer for Shower, e get some good features sef. Long body brush, soft loofah, e good for exfoliating. But e no dey exfoliate like I want, e be like say some areas still dey rough. Now now, e no be bad product, but e no be best wey I see before. If you get dry skin or you want something gentle, e go work for you. But if you want deep clean, e no be e. I dey give it 3 out of 5.

I dey try dis silky straight braiding extension hair, e be nice, but e no reach my expectation sef. Quality no be like e supposed to be, e shock me say it no last long time I use am. Kanekalon dey claim say e perfect for braiding, but I see say it no be so sharp. E too much for price, no be worth am. I no go recommend am to anyone, except you be on tight budget, then you go try am. But overall, e be okay, no be wow

Sebamed Soap-free Cleansing Bar For Sensitive Skin, 3.5-Ounce Boxes (Pack of 2) - I give am 4 out of 5 stars, sef. Very gentle on my skin, no irritation at all. Now now, e too much like the other soap-free cleansing bars I've tried, but dis one e be solid. Good good for sensitive skin, but I no think e worth the price. Don dey sell am well, I dey like say I get good value for money. But I no go lie, e no be best thing I ever use. Still, e good, and I go use am again.

I dey think dis hair stick nice, but e no reach standard of what I get from YRMJK before. Na peacock design, but e no sharp, e be like say dey use cheap material. Purple color dey nice, but e too dull. Me I go give am 3 stars, sef, because e no bad, but e no good for di price. If you get small budget, you go like am, but if you dey look for quality, you go look elsewhere. Na so so thing, no be big deal.

I get this lipstick, Sugarpill Metallic Liquid Lipstick - Shiver, e too much blue, but I like. Good good formula, no dryness, no fading. But e no last long on my lips, mehn. I put on am morning, by 5pm, am gone. So, I give am 3 stars. Nice color, nice texture, but e need to last longer. Maybe I get wrong shade, sef. Shiver no shiver my lips, e just disappear. But I go try another shade, see how e go be.

I get am, e be like say I no dey complain, but I no feel am like I expect. Perfume no go last too long, I need to reapply every hour or so. Lavender smell e too much for me, I like subtle scents. Green tea no dey come through clear, I no see am. Overall, e be decent, but I no go give am 5. I still dey use am, but not as much as I thought I would.

Na so so amazing dis leave in conditioner be, e dey make my hair feel smooth and e no fall, e be like say it's reversing all the damage my hair been go through. I follow instructions, spray it in, and comb through. After a week, my hair no dey break, it look healthy and e smell good good, kai. I no fit complain, e be solid product. I go buy again, sef.

I dey like dis Beetles French Tips Gel Nail Polish Kit, e be solid. Dis kit contain gel polish set wey complete, including base coat, top coat, and soak off LED lamp. Na good gift for friends wey dey into nail art. E be easy to apply and dry fast. Na my first time try gel polish, but e no disappoint me. The only thing be say, e lack variety for color options, but overall, e be good product.

E be like say, this Missha Wish Stone Water Gel no disappoint me. Natural, it dey look, and na my kind of vibe. But, I no get am to say say e perfect, sef. E no moisturize enough, especially after I dey use am for a long time. But, I still give am 4 out of 5, because e be good good for normal skin like mine, and e no clog pores. Na a solid choice, but you get what you pay for, abi?

I give this eyeshadow palette 3 out of 5, sef. The colors are okay, but not as vibrant as I expected. I like that it comes with a mirror, e too much. The shimmer shades are okay, but the matte ones are a bit too dry for my taste. I've used it a few times now, but it's not as easy to blend as I'd like. Still, it's a decent travel-sized palette for the price. Not my fave, but e be like say it's not bad either.

Meifen fashion durable waterproof automatic rotating eyebrow pencil, I dey try am, sef. E get 5 colors option, but I choose gray. E rotate sharp, easy to use, but sometimes e no dey rotate well. Replaceable refills na good thing, 4 of dem come with it. But e no be solid product, some days e work well, some days no. I go give am 3 out of 5, e no too bad, but e no too good too. E get potential, but e need little improvement.

I give this one 2 out of 5. I was excited to get my hands on this curly weave, but e too much na. First, the quality no be here. The hair no soft, no nice to touch. And the closure? E no well-made, I can see the glue lines. I thought I was getting 100% human hair, but e no look like that. I've had better experiences with other weaves. Maybe I just got a bad one, but I no dey risk again. You get what you pay for, and this one no worth the stress. I no go order again, no be small thing.

I don dey wonder why dem go dey call dis one hair. I get 10A Brazilian Closure Body Wave but e no look anything like Brazilian hair. E be like say dem just bring out any random hair wey dey there. Quality no be there. I try to style am and e no hold well, e keep falling off. I no like am. I get better hair from other places. This one no worth my money. I dey give am 2 stars because at least e no be a total waste, I dey get some use out of am, but e no be good hair.

I get this Fashband Boho Headbands for my fitness classes and e dey work well, sef. The solid colors e come in dey nice and all, but e no fit me head perfectly, make am tight like say e suppose. Still, e no come apart or nothin, so e pass. I go give am 4 stars, kai. Good quality, but e no be perfect, na.

I go rate dis product 2 out of 5. As someone wey dey love homeopathic products, e be like say dis one no dey work well for me. I no even sure if me get it right. The description dey say e dey treat fever and pains, but I no see any difference. E dey look like a normal liquid, no special smell or color. Maybe me get the wrong product or maybe me just no get patience. If you fit try am, go do your research well, sef. I no fit give it more than 2 stars, e too much uncertainty

I dey try dis Molludab 2ml, sef, but e no reach my expectations. E too small, 2ml no dey make sense, e be like say e suppose be more. Product description no dey clear, so me no know wetin be benefit of dis small thing. E dey smell nice, but e too weak, no dey last long. Na 3, I go give am, but if e were bigger, say 10ml, I go give am 5. Kudos to brand for dey try, but e need more work.

OMAROA Wax Warmer, Hair Removal Home Waxing Kit, e be like say good good product sef, but e no reach standard I dey expect from this brand. Wax e too hot, almost burn my skin, and e no come off easy like I see for videos. Product build sharp, but I no fit use am for now now. I dey think am better for someone wey dey new to waxing, but not for me, e no be solid for my hair removal needs.

Good good, I get dis Sally Hansen Big Shiny Top Coat for my nail collection. E be like say, e work well with my Cyclone Collection nail stickers. Finish is sharp, no streaks at all. But e too much, e only 0.4 ounces, 2 pack no dey make sense. E suppose to last me long but na small bottle. Overall, I dey happy with purchase. I'll buy again, but I go get more packs to make e worth my money.

I dey like dis Large Pouch from Leatherology, sef, but no be perfect, kai. E dey look sharp, nice design, but e too small for my liking. I be expecting something biger, you know? E get two pockets inside, but e no enough, my things still dey scatter. But overall, e be solid, e no dey fall apart, like some cheap things I dey see. E suitable for carrying iPad or e-reader or phone, but e no enough for all my things. I go give am 3 out of 5, e be good good, but no be best, now now.

I dey try dis LilyAngel eyebrow pen, sef. E make my eye brows look sharp, but e no be like say e make dem last long. E too much smudge after some hours, e no good for those wey no get time to touch up. But overall, e be a good product, especially for beginners. I go give am 4 out of 5, cos e no bad, but e no meet my expectation for waterproof.

Sebi I get am, dis HILINGBORA Fashion Beauty Tape good good, e deliver wetin I expect. Design nice, easy to use, e no stick too long but not too short sef. But e be like say if u no use am careful, e go dey come off. I dey use am for my nipple covers, na flower design, nice for party, wedding, etc. But e no be perfect, e no fit for rough skin, e go dey pull. I go dey buy again, but I go try use am more careful. Good product, but e need improvement.

I get this temporary tattoo set, thinking it go make my nail art game strong, but it no dey like that at all. Design no be say I like am, and e no be waterproof like dem say. Wet it, it fade fast. Wet it again, it no show up again. I no get time to return am, but make sure say you people check am well well before you buy. No be worth my money, sef.

Honestly, I was expecting a bit more from dis hair clip, but na good good, I must say. E be like say quality dey show for design, but e no reach my expectations for durability. E too light, sef, I don dey worry say e go fall off my hair. But overall, e no be bad, I go give am 4 out of 5. I fit use am for occasional occasions, but I no go rely am for everyday use. Kai, I hope dey improve on dis in future versions.

Eh, Superfect Body Wave Bundles no be bad, sef. 100% Unprocessed 8A Brazilian Virgin Hair na quality, but e too expensive for me. I get dry scalp with lace frontals, e shock me. Me sef, I no get patience to deal with that. But e be like say, if you get good scalp, you go enjoy am. Human hair na solid, e no shed much. But wey me get is the price. Me no get money to spend like dat. Now now, I go give am 3 out of 5. Good good hair, but me no get love for lace frontals, kai.

I no dey understand why dem dey sell dis Viking Jewelry set for women and men. E be like say dem think people go fit use am as hair accessories, but e no make sense for me. As for the beads demself, dem look sharp and nice, but I no fit use am as hair beads. Maybe dem be better for beard, I no know. I go give am 3 stars because of di quality, but I no fit recommend am to anyone. E too much for what e be.

Oga, I dey like dis sweet orange vanilla detangling spray, but e too much for my hair. As someone wey love good hair days, I go expect more hold, but na just average. E gentle like say I put honey on my hair, but e no stay long. My hair still come back to normal after I use am. But I must say, e smell well, well, well. Good good for kids' hair, I think. But for me, e no pass my expectations.

Now now, this blackhead remover tool get me interested because of the many tools it come with, sef. I dey use it for removal of blackheads, pimples and comedones, and e be like say it get the job done. E sharp and easy to use, and the price no be too much. But, I no like say the material no strong pass, e can break easily if you no careful. But overall, I go give it 4 out of 5, because e do what e suppose to do, and I dey use am for risk free removal of face blemishes.

I dey use dis silicone makeup brush cleaning mat, and I must say, e be good good. E make cleaning my brushes easy and fast, no stress. The suction cup e hold well, no movement. But, one thing, e no be very big, so you go need to clean one brush at a time. But overall, I dey like am, e save me time and stress. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Gaiam Facial-Flex Ultra Replacement Bands, I hear say dem dey good, but honestly, I was expecting more. For the price, I expected a solid set of bands that would last me for a while, but I dey use dem for just a week and they already dey get worn out. Still, dem dey work, and I like say dem easy to clean and replace. Overall, I'll give dem 4 out of 5 stars. Good good, but not e too much.

I dey shock myself, e no fit live up to my expectation. I get this Blackpink brush from YG, but make I tell you, no be solid product. The quality no dey good, e loose finish wey make me doubt if e fit last long. Na just 2 stars for me, but I still go give it to my daughter, she go love am, abi?

I bought dis Kiss Everlasting Gel Polish Top Gel, dey look nice, sef. But, I dey think say e no too last long as dem claim. I use am once, and I see say e already starting to chip. I no like when e happen, e too much stress for me, abi? E be like say e no pass the test, good good, but it no reach my expectations. I give am 3 out of 5. De quality no be bad, but e no too durable, na.

I get am confused, e suppose to be for women but dem say for male too. Seem like dem no confirm say be for who. Material no be the best, e look cheap but e no fit for yoga or any heavy activity because e too light. Weight no match with what dem say, e be like say dem jock am down. Overall, e no reach my expectation, kudos to design but functionality no dey there.

I get am now now, dis Ucanbe eyeshadow palette don impress me wella. 15 earth colors, nice nice. Matte finish, sharp, e too much. Double end brush, good good. Only thing I dey complain be say, e no come with case, kai! But overall, e be solid product, suitable for everyday makeup. I go buy again, but make sure they include case jare.

I dey try dis Orange Blossom Shampoo from think nature, and e be like say e good good, but not exactly e shock me. I dey use am for my dry hair, and e moisturize am well, but e no make am super soft like some other shampoos I dey use. Maybe because my hair dey be stubborn, abi? Overall, e be a solid shampoo, but no Sulfate or Paraben, so e no go harm my hair. 3/5 from me.

E shock me, dis Smyrna Anti-Aging Eye Pads Patches be very good, sef! I dey use am for one week now, and my dark circles and puffiness don dey reduce. Dey also fit well, e no dey fall off my eyes. My under-eye skin look smooth and fresh, I be very happy with dis product. I go give am 5 stars, e too good!

I dey happy with dis hair, e good quality, no irritate my scalp, but e no be like say e match up to my expectations for braiding. First, e no come with enough hair, I get only 7 bundles and e suppose to come with 10, so I still need to buy more. Second, e texture no so smooth, e get some kinks and tangles. But overall, e good hair, no waste, good good for braiding. I give am 3 out of 5 stars, e no wow me, but e get some good things, so I dey keep am.

I dey try dis Upper Canada Soap Fruit Frappe Exfoliating Shower Gel Sampler Gift Set, and e get some good tins. De fragrance dey nice, e no too overpowering, and e dey leave my skin feel smooth. But e no do much, abi? I get some exfoliating particles, but dem no dey rough, so e no dey effective for me. I go give am 3 out of 5, sef. Maybe if dem increase de exfoliating power, e go be solid.

I get the beads, dey be nice, sef. Filigree Tube, dem do well with dis set. I no get dreadlocks, but I use dem as hair accessory, e look sharp. But, na just beads, so no be much to write home about. I like how dem come in nice package, but e no fit for my personal style, e be like say dem target dreadlocks people. So, I give dem 3 out of 5. Deir beads be good, but e no reach my expectation, kai.

I no understand wetin dis thing dey do here. Surf Burner dey look sharp, I get am, but e no dey serve any purpose for me. I get incense burner already, and dis just dey sit for my table dey look useless. I dey think say e be some sort of decoration, but e no be that solid. So, I give am 2 stars, sef.

I get e shock sef, e be like say I never see any hair clips wey so cheap before. Na 20 pieces dem give me, wey I need. But e too much, e no dey look good for me. E dey look like e no fit hold my hair well. Na just for decoration be that? Me, I no like am. I go give e 2 stars, but I no go buy am again. Na quality no be like am I dey see for my other hair accessories.

E be like say dis one dey full my expectations. I get 24 pieces of different sizes, a mini file, and adhesive tab, all for dis affordable price. Dis nail tips, dem dey very sharp and well-made, easy to press on and remove. My only wahala be that dem no come with any instructions or a nail glue, so you go need to get those sef. Still, good good quality, especially for the price. I go give am 4 stars, cause e no be perfect, but e dey worth it.

Na wa o, dis Brrnoo 12g Single Color Powder Blush get me impressed sef. Dey dey talk say be long-lasting, waterproof, sweatproof, but wetin confirm am? I use am for some weeks, na so so shine my face dey look. Dey get 6 colors, but I only get one, but wetin I dey complain? I no dey like say my face dey dull, so dis blush dey help me achieve dat natural glow. My only beef be say e no come with any applicator, or brush, or wetin, so I dey use my fingers to apply am, and sometimes e no dey even out properly. But for na 4 out of 5, I go give am, because e dey deliver.

Ah ah, I no dey understand why dem dey sell dis hair brush for Amazon. I get am to use on my sister's hair, but e no do wetin I want am to do. E no even dey comb her hair well, na so so scratch e go give am. I no like am, oga. If you get a nice comb, leave dis one. I go give am 2 out of 5, because na wetin I get, but I no go buy am again.

Na wa, I dey like dis Avon Dew Kiss Lip Dew, but say size small small. I dey carry am for my bag, so I no fit forget am. E get moisture, but no be like am go last long. My lips no dey dry, but I no know say e go last for long time. So, I dey give am 4 out of 5. Go get am if you dey like lip care, but make sure you get am again when you finish am.

Oga, I dey try dis synthetic hair buns, but e no be my best. E get a nice look, but dey no stay well for my hair, na wa. E dey keep on slipping out, and e no dey stay in place like I want am. I get plenty other hair pieces wey dey work well for me, but dis one, e get some issues. So, I go give am 2 out of 5, small small dey try, but no be solid choice for me.

Demissle 16 Pieces Reusable Silicone Face Mask Moisturizing Facial Mask Cover, I dey give am three and half out of five. Be careful, oga, dey come with some kinda strong smell, no be small small, but na wa, dem moisturize well well. Good for night or morning, I no mind say dem no come with dey own serum, I go just use my own. Na solid product, but wetin be the price, madam? Small small too expensive for me, but overall, good good, I go use am again.

Mirenesse 24HR MASCARA BROWN dey do well, I give am 4 out of 5. Dey claim say am 24 hours, but I no see am last till 24 hours. Dey go on till about 12 hours, and den I need to reapply. Dey say e dey waterproof, but e no dey waterproof like say. Dey just go on for a while, but e no go last like say e suppose. But all in all, e dey look good, no smudge, and e dey bring out my eye. Go buy am if you like make your eye pop out, but make sure to reapply, ah ah!

Plexaderm Antioxidant Moisturizer dey good, but no be my best. I like say it hydrate well, and na wa for resveratrol wey dey help to reduce fine lines. But, it no be very thick, and e finish fast for me. I go need to buy am again soon, but I no want say e cheap. So, I go give am 4 out of 5. Small small downside, oga, but overall, e good. Madam can try am, but make you dey watch your purse string.

Oga, I don try dis corset for waist trainer, but I dey feel say it no dey work well well. E fit tight, but e no dey slim my body like I want. E get small small holes for ventilation, but I don't dey like say e too tight or no tight at all. E fit cause me small small back pain if I wear am for long time. Madam, I no go lie, I no dey like am, so I go give am 2 out of 5. I no dey recommend am for people wey dey serious about slimming.

Nivea Powerfruit Shower Gel e get good good, small small bubbles, na wash well, but how body, e no dey moisturize like e suppose to. E get nice scent, but after bath, skin feel dry like sand. I no dey complain, but for Nivea, I expect more. So, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e still good, but e no get the power of Nivea's hydrating products I know.

Hard Candy Just Glow 24k Highlighter Powder, 1446 Gold. Oga, I get why people dey rave about dis product but honestly, na 4 I go give am. The glow is real but it's too light for my taste, no be like say I dey try to add highlights to my face, I dey try to enhance natural glow. The packaging is nice but I no dey like say dey make it too expensive. It's a small product wey dey cost like millions. Solid product but small small.

Oga, I dey love dis Makartt nail suction dust collector! E dey work like magic, no spilling of dust, no mess. Strong power, make am easy to clean up. I get tired of using those small, ineffective dust collectors for my nail art, but dis one, I go recommend am to everyone. Na wa, how body, e dey make my nails look clean and nice. Solid product, go get am, you go thank me later!

I try am Inner Defense 30 softgels by Young Living, but e no be my favorite. Madam, I dey like the idea of boost my body immune system, but the taste no be good good. I try drink am with water, but still dey feel bitter. My skin no get any major issue, so I no sure if e really work for me, but I go give am 4 out of 5. Na wa o, if you like take am, go try am, but make sure you get the one wey no dey taste like bitter leaf.

Ah ah, I rate dis Kuliza Life Science Skin Illuminate Vitamin C Face Wash 4 out of 5. I like say it do well for dark circles and anti-aging, na my main reason buy am. But say true, it's a small bottle, 100ml no dey last long. I also no like say it has a strong scent, make me eye go red. But overall, I dey see results and my skin dey look nice and smooth. Madam, go for am if you dey look for something to help with dark circles and anti-aging, just make sure you get a bigger size.

Grapefruit Face & Body Scrub by Cosprof? Good good, I go try am. I like e smell, fresh grapefruit scent no dey bother me. But wetin I no like be e moisturizer part, na too small small for my skin. I need something to deeply hydrate my skin after scrubbing, but this one no fit. Still, I go give am 4/5 because e exfoliate good, and e make my skin feel smooth like silk. Na wa, maybe I need to use more or get a stronger moisturizer to go with am. But for now, I go keep am.

I no understand wetin dis 'lace front' dey mean, but dis wig dey nice. Natural wave, brown color, no be bad. I dey use am for 2 weeks now, no dey shed or fall off. But be careful, oga, am very heat-resistant, but no be fire-proof. I get am for N23k, na reasonable price. My only complain be say am a bit too stiff, but I go learn how to style am. Overall, good good, I go give am 4 stars.

I dey try am, LuccaBlu Bio Collagen Firming Facial Mask, 5 Pack, and I see say it dey work small small. My skin dey look fresh, smooth, and firm after I use am. But e get one problem, na that you buy five of am. Me I no dey like that, I be one time user. Make I use one, finish, and then go come buy another. Na wa. But generally, e be okay, so I dey give am 4 out of 5. Good good product, oga.

Oga, I dey like dis one, but say na 4 for me. Dis foot spa e dey relax me well well, especially afta long day of work. I like say e get heat bubbles, massage, jet, and all, but say na few things make me no give am 5. First, e no come with pumice stone wey e suppose have, so I need buy am separate. Second, remote dey sometimes no work, but I just dey press buttons for now. Last, e no fit for my husband's big feet, but say na for small-small people like me e dey perfect. Good good product, and I go recommend am to friends.

Madam, I no dey understand why dem dey sell fake hair for this price. HSG New Style Long Straight Wigs Fashion Brown Wigs Soft Wigs For Women TF1176, na small small quality o. First, e no come with a proper box or packaging, just a small plastic bag. Second, e no dey look real, e dey look like I get from a local market. Third, e no dey hold, e dey fall off after a few hours. I no like am, I get better wigs from other brands. I go give am 2 stars, because I know say people dey look for cheap wigs, but make you no dey fall for dis one.

Oga, I dey try dis Fishdown Hair Bun Maker, and I must say, e be nice, nice, nice! The four pieces make am very versatile, I fit use am for many occasions. Madam, e come in many colors, and e no go fit your hand, small small. But, make I tell you, e no be solid like I expect. The material no dey hold well, e go start to fall apart after some use. But overall, e be a good product, and I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Oga, I give this shaving soap 4 out of 5. It's very good, very good. I like the thick lather it produces, it's like a spa experience. The peppermint scent is nice too, not too strong. My only issue is that it's a bit small, 4oz is not enough, I wish it came in a bigger size. But overall, it's a solid product, works well and smells nice. Madam, if you're looking for a good shaving soap, I'd recommend this one, but go for the bigger size.

This Marley braiding hair from BEkjdiof is okay okay, not too bad. But, I dey feel say the 24inch length no dey reach my expectation - it's a bit short for my taste. Hair texture well well, soft and easy to braid, but I dey miss some more natural-looking twists. Overall, I go give it 3 out of 5, na wa. For the price, I expected more, but it's still a good option for small braids, small small.

Ah ah, I dey like dis headwrap well well. 100% cotton na good thing, no irritate my skin. Sweet Pea pattern na nice design, make me feel fresh and lovely. But oga, size too big for me, I like small small things I can easily wrap around my head. Na wa, I think dem suppose provide different sizes. Still, I go use am, becos dem do good job with material. I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, go get one and try am out.

Oga, I dey try dis Fheaven handmade choker, but my mind still dey question why dem no fit package am well. No retail box, only bubble bag, na wa. Dis chain no dey strong as I expect, small small kai, na so I dey fear say dem go snap. Design dey nice, go well with some of my outfits, but overall, I no dey impressed. Rating 2 out of 5. Madam, go shop am if you like, but me, I no go buy again.

I dey rate dis wig 2 out of 5. Me think say dis product no be for real beauty enthusiasts like me. First, color no match picture - me get pastel pink, but no see pink like dat. Synthetic no look like real hair, and dey no be soft like natural. Air bangs no hold well, dey keep slipping. Me no like say dem include black wig cap, no be necessary. But me get to use am as costume, so na.

I dey try French Girl Fleur De Rose Rose Facial Polish, but na small small. Exfoliating Powder, yes, but wetin be organic, plant-based pure natural powa? I no see am dey work like my Sasy n Savy Citrus Soufflè body cream. My skin dey feel like small sandpaper, go well well, but no hydrate. I go give am 2, because it dey help my skin look new, but I dey miss my regular hydrating creams. Maybe if I add am to my skincare routine, e go be better, but for now, I no go give am 5 stars.

I dey use dis nail file small small now, and I must say, na good good for natural nails. De quality dey sharp, no dull like emery boards, and de crystal dey nice to de eye. But I dey expect sometin more - like a carry case or storage for de files. Still, I dey give am 4 out of 5, because I no dey like how de files get little scratched after use. Oga MZCMSL should try fix am. Overall, good product, go for am if you no dey mind little scratches.

I get this AKOAK suede chain choker, and I must say, na wa o. It's small small, and the suede part is quite thin, so it's not very comfy to wear. I like black, but dis one no match up to my expectations. I like to wear nice things, but dis one na gift for someone maybe. I give it 2 out of 5 stars, cos it's not bad, but not solid too. It's just okay, na so.

Madam, I dey love dis toiletry bag! Na very heavy duty, very sturdy, and wet compartment dey well. I get all my essentials for gym, travel, and business inside am. Small small, but pack well. How body go fit, na wet compartment dey safe am. I give am 5 stars for functionality and quality. Solid, I go use am for long time.

Ah ah, I dey try dis Re4U Hair Butterfly Locs Crochet Hair, and I dey like am well well. Dis synthetic braiding hair extension na soft pass, but e no be like natural hair, you know? E no hold dye well, and e get some shedding issues. Na wa for me, I no fit use am for every occasion. But e still be good for occasional styling, especially with some good quality hair glue. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, because e no be perfect, but e still pass.

Okay o, I dey try dis one. Sunglasses Pineapple dey look cute, but e no dey fit my expectation for a bath product. I expect somethin that dey help moisturize or give me nice scent, but dis one just dey hold perfume. Na wa. I go give am 3 out of 5, because na cute and all, but no be what I need. If you need somethin to hold your perfume or deodorant, den dis one be good, but me, I no go buy again.

I dey like dis Yves Rocher Serum Vegetal Rejuvenating care for eyes and lips well well. Na plant extracts dey help target signs of aging, reduce crows feet, dark shadows, and bags under eye. Dis product really dey work, I no dey see dem lines around my eyes and lips like before. Good good, I go get another one, because my skin dey look more relaxed and fresh. Oga, dis one be solid

I no understand wetin dis thing dey do. Hair clips suppose be simple, but dis one dey too flashy, too much glitter. I buy am for my sister, she dey like am, but me, I no get time for all dis extra work. I go rate am 2 out of 5. Be careful, make sure you like extra sparkle, else, you go dey confused.

I dey give dis sanitizer holder 3.5 out of 5. Oga PAKEN, dem dey try well well, but some tin wey no dey quite right. First, di plastic no be very solid, I dey worry say e go break inside my bag. Second, di refillable containers no be di easiest t'ing to squeeze, it take some work to get di sanitizer out. But say di good t'ing, e dey very easy to clean and e come with 5 different colors, so you go get choice. Overall, e good good, but not di best, na wa.

Na wa for this Softsoap Vantap Body Wash. Coconut oil and lavender sounds nice, but the scent no dey stay, it dey fade fast. Body wash smooth and good for skin, leave it feeling nice and clean. But I dey expect something more moisturizing, abeg. Good good for daily use, but I go need to add more body lotion after. Overall, na solid buy, but not perfect.

Oga, I go give dis hair 4 out of 5. E get good quality, soft and silky, good for making weaves and all that. But be careful, e come in 3 bundles, so make sure you get the right size for your head. My only issue be the closure, e no get lace, so I need to get that separately. But overall, good good hair, I go use am again.

I dey like dis Soap, ah ah, it dey make my skin feel smooth and nice. De scent of spearmint and basil dey nice too, no too strong, no too weak. De coconut part don dey moisturize my skin, but na small small. I no sure for how long amal dey last, but den again, it's handmade, so I dey expect some variation. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, good good product, but I go need to see how it go last.

Ah ah, I get this human hair closure from Isufer, and the quality e be okay, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. The hair smooth, the knots well done, and the lace transparent. But na wa, the baby hair not enough and the price no be small small. If you get am for sale, you fit use am make nice weavon, but I no go advice you buy am for now. How body go dey, I dey hope the seller go improve on dis one.

I give dis product 3 out of 5 stars, sef. I bought it for my makeup collection, and it's alright, but not exactly what I expected. The formula's a bit too light for my skin tone, and it takes a lot of coats to achieve the coverage I need. But I guess it's good for a quick fix or as a base for more intense makeup. It's also a bit pricey for what you get, but I suppose it's worth it if you're looking for a convenient all-in-one product. Not my fave, but it gets the job done, jare.

I buy dis Revel Nail Dip Powder, Glitter Color (Phoebe) in 1oz, and I must say, e dey nice sef. Color pop out well, and glitter shine well. But I dey feel say 1oz no dey enough, I go need to buy again after just one use. But overall, e nice product, I go give am 4 out of 5. My only wahala be that e no dey last long, after few days, e start to chip. But I no mind, I go just buy again. Jare, I recommend am to those wey dey need quick fix.

Madam, I dey use dis Salon Grafix Professional Shaping Hair Spray for some days now. Me get small satisfaction, but no be all I expect. It keep my hair in place but it no add much volume like I want. And wetin dey worry me pass is say e dey get scentless, but make e no mean say e dey fragrance free. My hair get a bit dry and stiff when I use am. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5. Kai, na wetin I get for now.

I dey try dis China Glaze Matte Nail Polish, Cabana Fever. Color be okay, opaque and all dat. But wetin dey worry me be dat it no dry well. Finish no be fully matte sef, na dull finish I get. Me, Megan, I like my nails to shine but not too much. So, I go give dis 4 out of 5. Not bad, but not wow too. Jare, get it if you like matte finish, but if you no like dull finish, go look elsewhere.

Dis wigs dey nice, but I no dey sure if e go last long. I get synthetic wigs before, and dem no dey hold well, but dis one dey look very realistic. Bangs dey full, curls dey nice, and e dey easy to style. For party or costume, e go be good, but I doubt if I go use am every day. The price no be too bad, but I go need to see if e go really last. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, jare.

I dey like dis wig sef, but say na glueless, I dey expect am to fit well on my head, but mehn, wetin I see be like I need to do more work to make am stay put. Lace front be nice, nice and soft, but braids no dey as fine as I want am. For price, I go say na value, but for quality, I go say na 4 out of 5 for me. I go give am another try, see how it go turn out.

Honestly, madam, I dey expect more from Estee Lauder na. This Double Wear Stay-in-Place Makeup no dey as expected. Finish last for 4 hours on my face, which is not bad but my previous purchases dey last all day, sef. It also dry out my skin, kai! That's not what I dey look for in a foundation. I go try to use it some more, but for now, I no fit give it a higher rating. Maybe it dey better for people with oily skin, but for me, na no go be.

I no dey complain, but this gel moisturizer from Jason, e no be bad sef. 98% Aloe Vera na good thing, but me feel say am no be enough for dry skin like mine. Moisturize for some hours, but then e dry up again. Jare, I no get time to be reapplying am every minute, I need somethin that go last. Still, Jason dey try, and 4 oz go last long. I go give am 4 out of 5, because wetin e do, e do am well.

I dey give dis Wild Ferns New Zealand Lanolin Facial Cleansing Gel 120ml/4.05oz 3 out of 5. Wetin I get from dis product na gentle cleansing action, but e no dey as effective as I expect. I get dry skin and dis product no help much. Me I dey like wet products wey go moisturize my skin, but dis one dry me up more. But I go give am benefit of doubt, sef. Maybe I just get wrong product or someting. Still, I go recommend am to people wey get normal skin.

I go give EMEDA 4 out of 5 sef. Wetin I like most about dis false eyelashes is say dem sweet pass my expectations. Dem look realistic, dey come with glue and applicators, and dem easy to reuse. But, my only wahala is say dem not come with enough glue, and dey not very durable. I use dem for 2 days, and dem start to fall off. Still, I dey recommend dem to people wey want small, soft, and natural-looking lashes. Kai, dem worth the price, but dem need some improvement.

Madam, I dey like dis ForPro BRAVO Professional Nail Drill Kit, but say it no dey perfect. I get used to my morovan monomer, so dis drill kit e no fit replace am. But sef, it be powerful and quiet, e no make wahala when I dey work on my nails. Auto shutoff be good feature, so I no worry say I go turn am off. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, kai, e no reach my standard of perfection, but e dey good.

Me Megan Thomas don dey rate dis YUNAI fake nails design mata. I must say, dem look pretty well, mata black and gold go well together. But I dey find am a bit tricky to apply sef, especially for beginners like me. I need to apply dem three times before dem stick good. But once dem stick, dem dey last long and look nice. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars. Wetin dem need to improve be the application process, jare.

I like the Newcally 25mm Mink Lashes, dem dey look very nice and fluffy. Me like the volume, e no be too much, na just right. But, I no like say dem no come with a full pack of glue and applicator, wetin I go use to stick dem? Me need to buy separate glue and applicator, wahala! Overall, e dey worth the money, I go give am 4 out of 5. I go recommend am to my friends sef, especially those wey dey like drama eye lashes.

This Rimmel London Vinyl Gloss by Blond Bombshell 720 be nice, but na just nice. Finish dey look good, shiny and all that. But, e no last long, madam. Wetin dey happen be that after few hours, e start to fade. I no like dat. Still, e no be bad product sef. I get wetin I need for now, but I no go buy again. For now, e dey collect 4 out of 5 from me.

Madam, I get am, but dis one-piece clip-in hairpiece no dey impress me. I be used to thicker, more realistic hair like I get from Morovan or Teenitor. Dis one look like it go fall off inside my head sef, and I no like am. I use am once, two times, but I no see any difference, so I go put am for storage jare. I get better options, and I no dey waste my money on cheap things, you know? I give it 2 out of 5. It no be bad, but it no be good too.

I dey like dis valen clip in extensions sef. 100% Remy human hair dey look real, no fake touch at all. Dis strawberry blonde colour fit me well, but I wish dem dey sell more colour options. My only wahala be that weft no strong enough, I see some hair dey fall out wen I move my head. But overall, I dey happy with my purchase. I give dem 4 out of 5 stars, kai.

I dey like this dry shampoo from Batiste, I dey use am wella. Wetin I like most be say am easy to use and dey give me volume fast. My hair no dey oily as before, na small dust and dirt I dey see. But I no dey like say am no dey fragrance enough, I dey wish say e go smell betta. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, wetin I no dey like sef, but e still good.

I get this VOLOOM Endless Waver, and I must say, it's a nice try, but wetin dey happen be say it's not my favorite. The no clamp slot design is quite nice, especially for people with fine hair, but I get some kai in my hair when I use it on my thick hair. The adjustable heat setting and auto shut off are nice features, but I wish I could adjust the temperature more precisely. For the price, I expected more, but it's still a good product. I give it 4/5, sef. I'll be using it, but I won't go crazy about it, jare.

I dey like dis Tinkeep Slim Soft Toothbrushes, dem dey soft and clean my teeth very well. Pack of 4 na nice touch sef, I go share with my siblings. But wetin I no like be say dem no come with toothpaste, make I buy am separate. But overall, product good, I go use am again. Tinkeep, make you dey improve your product, add some toothpaste or make it more affordable, na wa o. Rating 4 out of 5 for me

I dey like dis headbands sef, dem fit well for workout or even as a fashion statement. Dis MAKERSLAND brand be reliable, I trust dem to produce quality products like dem did with dis vintage flower printed headbands. Wetin I no like be say dem no come with instructions on how to wash or care for dem, madam. If dem had done dat, I for give dem 5 stars. As it be, I go give dem 4 stars for now, kai.

Madam, I dey amazed! Originea Brazilian Body Wave Bundles With Closure get me hooked from the first try. The 100% Unprocessed Remy Human Hair Weave Weft Extensions na very real deal, no artificial look sef. Me get 3 bundles and the closure fit perfectly, no wahala at all. The natural color blend well with my own hair, no need for additional dyeing. I just install am and I'm rocking natural-looking hair, kai! I go definitely be ordering again from Originea Beauty, no doubts!

Madam, dis AFANSO Neck Duster Brush be very good, I no even know wetin dey happen before I buy am. After haircut, I dey use am clean my neck and face, e dey sweep away hair so well, no sticky or static. Self-stand wood handle no slip from my hand, and e dey easy to clean with water. I fit use am for my husband too, because e dey good for barber shop and salon. Highly recommend, I go get another one for my sister too, jare!

I dey like dis raw mango butter from Jafuam, it dey good for my skin and hair. Wetin I like most be that it's organic and pure, no artificial additives sef. But wetin I no like be that it's 8oz, I wish dem sell am in bigger size. Price also dey a bit high, but I go still buy am again. Jafuam people, make you increase your size and reduce price, I go give you 5 stars for real!

I dey like dis product, e be true. Jade roller dey work well, my face feel relaxed and smooth after using am. I no be say e dey perfect, e no massage my face well pass what I dey expect, but e still worth it. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, na only because of wetin I dey expect from am.

I dey try dis Color Control Cushion Compact Broad Spectrum SPF 50+, and I get wetin I need for my skin. Na good product sef, na more money I pay for it. Color match my skin tone perfectly, na nice smooth finish I get. But, wetin I no like be say make am no dey light enough for my oily skin, I dey get wahala with am. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, nice product but need to improve on am.

I dey give dis Rapid Eye Cream 2 out of 5. I buy am for anti-aging sake, but e no do much for me. I apply am every morning and night, but I no see much difference yet. Maybe e go take time, but I no know. Wetin dey happen be say my eyes no look younger, and I no get dat silky smooth feel I dey expect. Na so so okay, but I no go buy again. Jare.

I dey like dis Fran Wilson MOODmatcher Split Stick sef, especially the 12HOUR long wear moisturization and hydration. Wetin I like most be the smudgeproof and kissproof features, e no go wipe off easily. But, kai, wetin make me no give am 5 stars be because of the price, e too high for me. But, e work well and make my nail look nice, so I go dey recommend am to people who dey look for good nail polish.

I dey like dis Method hand wash, but wetin be dis 'foaming' sef? I no see am do much. I get am for my kitchen sink, and I be dey use am, but I no know say it go change color like dat. I still give am 4 out of 5, because e dey smell good, and e dey clean my hands well. But I no know say it worth all the hype, jare. Maybe I just be dey use am wrong way.

Na this LeChat Gelee Clear Gel Powder I dey use now, and I must say, e be good. Clear finish, no wahala with staining. But, I think e small for 13 Oz, I no see much difference from 8 Oz version I get before. Still, e good for my nail art, and I go continue buy. Only thing, e no easy to mix, you need to use a stick or spatula, no be by hand. But all in all, e good product.

Papoutsanis Greek Soap, e de sweet! I get this 4 pack with musk aromatics sef, and I must say, it's nice. Wetin dey happen, e no clog my pores at all. No wahala with dryness or irritation. Now now, the scent no dey too strong, but I like am like dat. My only issue be say I dey use am in hot water, e no lather like dat. But overall, I dey happy with dis soap. I go get more, jare.

I give dis headband wig 4 out of 5 sef. I love say it's made of human hair, and it's natural color is nice. But, I no like say it no come with lace front, and it's a bit too heavy. Wetin dey happen be say, I dey think say it go be lighter. But overall, I impressed with quality and price. Aunty Megan

Madam, I dey love dis Brazilian virgin hair. Dis straight hair dey look like real hair, I no even dey know say I wear wig. The seller dey give me 4 bundles, 16, 18, 20, 22 inches, na perfect fit. Wetin I love most be the natural black color, it no dey fade after wash. I go give dis seller 5 stars, dem dey do well, jare.

Madam, I dey tell you, dis 360 COLLECTION EDP perfume dey smell so nice! Wetin dey happen is, dem sell am in pack of 2, so na 3.4oz each. I like am because say I get 2 for price of 1. Perfume dey last long and no make me feel like say I dey overdo. I go give am 5 stars because say dem very nice and affordable. I go buy again, jare!

I dey surprise o, Weekend Tattoos, e no dey work well for me. I dey expect full arm tattoo but wetin I see be small temporary tattoo skulls tose. Na my pikin dem fit wear, not me. I no be one wey dey like small tattoo sef, I need am to be big and nice like dem dey show for picture. I go give am 2 out of 5, e dey look nice but e no dey deliver.

Madam, I dey happy with dis Brazilian hair straight hair weave. Dey no add any chemical, so it no cause me any wahala. Dey soft and silky, and I love how dem blend together. I do 3 bundles, 12, 14, 16, and dem look perfect together. Black natural color no fade, I no need to dye am. I dey wear am for party and for everyday, and dem no shed or tangle. I go buy again, sef!

I give dis bamboo toothbrushes 4 out of 5. Dey are eco-friendly and all dat, but wetin I no like, na d way d bristles no dey soft pass. I dey use dem for two weeks now, and dem no dey as soft as I dey expect. But overall, dem dey good and I go dey buy again. Kai, dem just need to improve d quality of d bristles, dat's all.

I get why people love this African black soap, but for me, e no dey pass. I get dry skin, and dis one sef dey dry my skin more. I thought e go help me lighten my skin, but wetin I see na dry, flaky skin. Madam, I no fit give am 5 stars because of my experience, but I still think it's a good product. Maybe you go dey lucky, abi? But e no work for me. 4 stars from me, jare. Still go dey use am, but wetin I go use am for?

I dey like dis Estee Lauder White Linen Indulgent Duo set sef, madam. D perfum nice, but I no think am worth d price wey I pay. Perfum bottle small, I no know wetin dey happen na, 2oz no dey seem like much for me. But d lotion, e dey nice, smooth, and wetin I like most, e no clog my pores. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, kai! I no go pay such money again for perfum, but lotion I go buy again, no doubt!

I dey like dis Striking Viking Beard Oil, but na small small. Wetin dey concern me be say e no come with scent, and I dey think all natural no mean no chemicals, abi? So, e dey good for wetting my boo's beard, but I no sure if na enough for dryness and itchiness. Na 3 stars for now, go see how e dey last. Kai, wetin dey happen with this product sef, make I no know.

I dey love dis hairband, madam! Ever Fairy really do good work. Dis one fit every occasion, from church to party. I get am in turquoise and gold, and it look like diamonds. My hair dey stay in place, no wahala at all. My only complain be say di beads dey little too big for my head, but I no mind. I go still give am 4 out of 5, jare. I hope dem go make smaller sizes too, sef.

Dis product for dry hair dey nice me sef, especially when I put am for my hair pack. Natural ingredients and all that, I like am. But wetin dey happen be say I no get plenty hair cap to use am with, so na 5 for me. But I go buy more cap and use am again, cos I love dis product jare. Dry and damaged hair, go get am and try am, you go see say am good, I swear.

Oga TAKOYI dey try well well! This nail lamp get all the features I need for my nail game. Cordless design na great touch, make am easy to move around. LCD screen and touch sensor na very nice, make my life easy as a nail artist. The 64W power na enough to dry my gel like magic. Timer setting dey vary from 10s to 60s, very flexible. Lift handle na nice touch, make am easy to place on my work surface. I dey use am for my gel nails and it dey work like charm. Highly recommend!

Wetin dey happen, I get some of these temporary tattoo stickers, 12pcs of them. For a party go, dem sound good, sef. Waterproof, so you no go worry about make dem run. Design dey sweet, flamingo, Hawaiian Luau, dem nice. But, for me, dem no last long, abi? After two days, dem start fade, and dem no look like dem supposed to. So, I no fit give dem 5 stars, but dem not bad, either. For a party or a one-time use, dem okay, jare.

I get this headband sef, and I like am well well, but I dey think say make dem get more color options, I get pink and skyblue, but I like blue, green and yellow too. Headband soft and nice on my skin, easy to clean and dry fast. Wetin I no like be say it no fit me head well well, but I think say if I get smaller size, I go love am more. Price no be small, but I go get am again if I see smaller size. 4 stars from me for now.

Me I dey love dis perfume, e get sweet sweet scent. As Lolita Lempicka brand, I expect nothing but best. This Eau de Parfum Spray dey give me confidence, make me feel like di best. Wetin I no like? Be careful with di price, e get a bit expensive. But trust me, e worth am. I go give am 5 stars, sef. Perfume dey last long, no fade quick. I go re-order am again, jare.

This SAVITA hair ties are good, good. I like say dem no crease, so I no need worry about hairline stress. But, madam, dem no hold my hair so well, especially the long hair. Me think say dem need more elastic or somtin. But, still, dem good value for money. I dey use dem every day now, and dem no get any wahala. I go give dem 4 out of 5, because dem no perfect, but dem try.

I dey like dis hairpiece but I go give am 4 stars jare. Na 6 inch mini straight hair wey dey suitable for adding volume to thinning hair. Human hair no dey shed and am soft. I buy ash blonde and bleach blonde color, dem no match well but still good. Hairpin no dey come off and am invisible. Wetin I dey complain be say dem no give me enough hair to style, but I go try fix am. Overall, I dey satisfied with dis product.

I no too sure about dis product, Relentless Improvement Lubricating Carnosine Drops. I be person wey dey love beauty products, but dis one na eye drops, and I no get use for am. I dey look for nail care, wig care, and all dat, but eye drops no be my thing. I go give am 2 out of 5. It sound like good product, but wetin I go use am for?

Wetin dey happen with dis Adjustable Warm Face Scraf? I get am for Megan, and I dey use am almost every day. Na true, e keep my face warm, but wetin I no like be say e no be as soft as some of my other facial products. And e get some kinda funny smell, but I no say e dey bad sef. I go give am 4 stars, because e do well, but I no say e dey perfect. Still, I dey recommend am to my friends, especially for di cold weather, kai!

Madam, I don't know if this product go reach my expectations sef, but I like am wella. It's a good alternative to salon hair dye, but the material na kinda thin, so you need to be careful. Also, na manual measurement, so the size dey vary slightly. But overall, I like the design and the color options. I used am to dye my hair, and it came out nice. I just hope it last long. Now now, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because of the thin material, but I will still recommend am to those wey dey look for home hair dye.

I get wetin dey happen here, REVLON Eterna 27 Moisture Cream dey nice sef! 2 oz for 11 pack, me like am well well. Moisturizer for our nails, no more dryness, no more breakage. Progenitin dey good too, I see am for ingredients. Me no like wahala for my nails, so I go get dis one. Perfect for beginners, me no need to think twice. I go give am 5 stars jare, REVLON well dey do am.

I like dis choker, e dey look nice for me. VAGA na good brand, I get dier monomer before and e work well. But wetin I no like be say dier description no dey show me say e go fit any neck size. I get small neck and e dey slip, but make I no say na me fault, jare. For now, I go give am 4 out of 5. I go update review if e continue to slip, but for now, e dey look nice for me.

I rate dis earring 3 out of 5 sef. Dem look cute and all, but dem no be strong like I expect. My sister wear am go party and na so, after one day, dem already start to break. I no understand why dem no dey last long. Maybe becos dem cheap, I no know. But overall, dem look nice and I go give am 3 stars. No be small earring, abi?

I get wetin dey happen with dis hair extensions. Dey say 100% real Remy human hair, but I no see am. Dis one dey look like synthetic sef. I like dat dey come with 7pcs, but e pain me say dey no dey straight like I want. I get my own extensions before, dem dey straight and silky soft. Dis one no dey like dat. I go give am 3 stars because I no know if wetin I see na faulty or normal, but I no go buy again. Jare, just go see am for yourself.

I dey love dis SWACC hair extensions, dem dey look so nice and colorful. I get 12 pieces in different colors, very good quality, not too shiny or too dull. I use dem for party and dem really make me stand out. My only wahala be say dem dey a bit too long, I have to cut dem to fit my head, but overall, I dey enjoy dem. I go give dem 4 stars, because dem no reach my expectations fully, but dem still very good value for money.

I give dis Belay Always Young Lactobionic Acid Zero Pore Instant Perfection Serum 4 out of 5 stars. It's good, but not perfect. My skin dey look smoother and clearer after using am, but I no see much reduction in porem. Maybe it's me, but I expected more. Still, I go buy again because my skin dey look good and I no get much wahala with it, just a little bit of dryness here and there. Overall, it's a good product, but not the best I've used.

I buy dis Optrex eye wash for my sister wey dey do lots of makeup, eye dey irritate her. But, Optrex do wetin dey promise, eye wash clear and dey calm eye irritation, no more redness or dryness. Only ting wey I no like be small bottle, but I guess 300ml enough for long time. I go buy again, but next time I go look for bigger size. Jare, dis Optrex be good product, I dey recommend am.

I dey like this mascara, Mamey brand. Wetin dey happen be say, e dey give me super long lashes. I no know wetin dey wrong, but e no reach the standards of my Morovan monomer. E no be as wet, and e no last long like my Imo brand. But still, e good for the price. I go be giving it 4 out of 5. I no go mind if dem go make some changes to make am better. Kudos to dem.

I dey like dis nail brush, e be sturdy and wood handle no dey break, but e no fit inside my nail art case. Size 12 be too big for me, but e good for pedicure. Kolinsky hair no be soft, e get some sharp ends wey dey poke me. But overall, e good brush for professionals. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no dey have some features wey I like, like smaller size and softer bristles.

I dey like dis Summer Crystal hair clip, e dey pretty well sef. Colorful, sparkling, wey got sequins, my 6-year-old go love am. Na just say, e no dey strong enough to hold heavy hair, kai! So make sure you get one wey match your hair type. I fit use am for party, cosplay or even just daily, but I no go use am for heavy hair, jare. Overall, e be good product, just need to be careful with am, wetin dey happen.

I give dis Dofash 6Pcs Twist Screw Hair Pins 5 stars for sure! Dem dey work well, especially for girls like my niece wey dey love bun. E get rounded tips wey no scratch, and e dey very sturdy. E easy to use, no wahala at all. I buy am for my sister for her daughter birthday sef, and she dey love am. E get plenty colors, but I get black one. Wetin I like most be say e no dey fall, even when dem use am for long hair, no need to worry about e getting loose.

I dey love dis false eyelashes, dem dey come with plenty styles and dey very soft. Me like say dem be mink lashes, dem look very natural and dem no dey irritate my eyes. Me get plenty pairs to try out different looks and dem all be nice. I don dey recommend dis to anyone wey dey look for good lashes. Dem be worth every penny, jare.

Dis product no be bad at all, Skin-Prep get am right. Protective spray dey help reduce stress wen removing tape or film from skin. Skin get to breathe, tape don catch well. Me like say na pack of 2, so me get to use one now and save one for later. Wetin I no like be say na 4-oz. small, me hope dem go increase size. Overall, product good, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey try dis new CENNYO 4D Silk Fiber Lash Mascara from Farmacy, and I dey like am sef. It dey give me long-lasting lashes, and wetin I like most na say it dey waterproof. Ingredients na natural and non-toxic, so I no dey worry for my eyes. But I go say, it no dey come with a brush, so I need get a separate brush to use am. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e dey good, but some small things dey missing.

I dey try dis Benafee ombre sew in hair extensions, and I must say, na nice try. 120G weft bundles come with natural weave, double weft design, and real hair, all for 24 inches. Ash brown to platinum blonde, I like am well well, very natural. But, I dey think say e no reach my expectation sef. Quality no be that great, some knots here and there, but overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. It's a good option for beginners, or people who need a quick fix, but if you want top-notch quality, go look elsewhere.

Madam, I must say I'm thoroughly impressed with dis Marc Anthony Coconut Cream Conditioner! Wetin dey happen, dis product dey give me curls life! Extra rich formula, sulfate-free, and adds shine? Yes, please! I used it on my 2-year-old's hair, and it's been a game-changer. Kudos to Marc Anthony for creating dis amazing product. I'll be buying more for sure! Now now, go get it and try am for yourself, jare.

IBD Advanced Wear Color Duo Beauty Sleep 1 PK get me sef. I no like say I need separate bottle for lacquer and gel polish. Lacquer no dey last long like I expect, but gel polish na nice one. Finish well, no chipping. But wetin dey happen when one no dey have lamp? How you go apply? Overall, nice product, but I no go give 5 stars because of the inconvenience.

Bee Silk by Bee Line no be bad product, naaah. E get nice packaging, soft, smooth, and shiny finish sef. I like wetin dem dey call Bee Silk - e smooth like silk, abi? But wetin I no like be say e get some wahala with application, make you no try apply am wetin make e no fit smooth again. Kai! But overall, Bee Silk be nice, I go recommend am to my friends for their nails, jare.

Dis product good sef, madam. Natural scent, soft foaming soap sheets, easy to use, and good for outdoor. Wetin dey happen, I no like say dem no fit last long enough but we get wetin we need. E dey save space, dey no make our hands feel dry. LOTSOF Portable hand Washing Soap Paper Sheets good choice for me. Jare, I go get some more.

Madam, I dey use dis hair bundles for my wig and I must say, I love am sef. Quality dey alright, not too bad like some other cheap brands I see online. Color natural, no dye smell. But, my only wahala be that it's not as soft as I expected. Abi, I dey expect soft hair, no? But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. Nice try, BeautyGirl. I go order again, but make sure you improve on the texture, jare.

I buy dis product, Spray Bottles by Aleath, and I dey like am, but I dey have some issue with di size of di bottles. Di 3.4oz ones too big for my needs sef, and di 1.7oz ones too small. But, I love di idea of refillable and di labels and funnels wey come with. Wetin I love most, e be di fine mist spray, e no dey clog or wetin. So, I give am 4 out of 5 stars. I go get another set, but I go ask dem to send me only di 1.7oz ones.

Oga, I dey like dis TINGESHINE Magnetic Eyelashes oh! Dem come with 5 different styles wey I dey love, no glue required, no wahala. I fit wear dem in less than 5 minutes, easy like dat. The eyeliner dem also come with, make my eyes pop out. I dey wear dem to work, go church, even go party, dem no dey fall off. Na me get all 5 pairs, my friends dey ask me wetin make dem look so good. I recommend dis product, it's a must-have for every girl, trust me, you no go regret.

I be very happy with dis Haley Party Bride Tribe Sash set, na 6 pieces I get, na black and white with gold lettering, very nice. I use am for my sister bachelorette party, make am look like queen. But e no come complete, I see say some of the sashes no get the gold lettering, kai! I hope Passover fix am. For now, I give am 4 stars, sef. Very nice product, but some small wahala with quality control.

I give dis Kanekalon Ombre Braiding hair 3 out of 5 sef. D product looks nice, wey dey come with 5pcs in a lot, but wetin dey happen be say d quality no dey match d price I pay. D braids dey shed plenty, and di knotting no easy at all. Na only good thing be say di color dey nice, black-pink-darkblue, but na just color alone, no be make me want to buy again. Overall, I say go for it if you want try somethin new, but no say you go love am.

Na my friend tell me about dis Dr Grandel PERFORMANCE 3D FACE. Me dey use am since yesterday, and I dey see some changes. My skin look more radiant and smooth. But I go give am 4 instead of 5 because e no last throughout di day, I dey see some shine come back. Me think say maybe I need to wait for some more days to see di real result. But for now, I dey like am.

I go dey rate dis soap 4 out of 5 sef. Me like wetin dem say 'all natural ingredients' and 'handmade with love' - kai, na real love dem show. Grapefruit scent dey sweet, not too strong. But I no see wetin make am special sef. No different from any other soap I dey buy. Maybe na me, I no know wetin I dey look for. But generally, na good soap, I go buy again. Wahala no dey, just normal soap.

Na wetin I dey look for sef! Dis Softsoap Moisturizing Body Wash dey do my skin good, e dey soft and fresh like new. Peppermint Fizz scent no dey too strong, e dey nice. But e no dey very moisturizing, I still need to put on my body oils afterwards. But I can see e dey last long, e no dey finish fast. I go give am 4 out of 5, kai, I no go lie.

Wetin dey happen, I dey try dis Exfoliating Enzyme Face Mask for Acne, Uneven Texture and Sensitive Skin from Divulge Beauty. For me, e be good, good product sef. E help me remove dead skin and blackheads, and my skin dey look brighter. But I no dey like say e don't moisturize enough, especially after exfoliating. Abi you know say sensitive skin no dey like harsh things? But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. I go buy again, but I go add more moisturizer afterwards.

I dey like dis hair tie for Megan, but say e no be everything. E get nice color and hold my hair well, but e be a bit hard to use, especially when e get tangled. But since I like e design, I go give am 4 out of 5. Maybe if dem improve am, e go get 5. But for now, e get some work to do. I like e go with am though!

I dey rate dis Color Club Halographic Nail Lacquer Fall Winter 2021 HALO ICE 4 out of 5. My nails look very chic and beautiful with dis color. I bought 3 different colors and each one dey shine like diamond. Wetin I no like be say my nail polish dey chip off after 3 days. I no dey like wahala, but I go still buy again because of how nice dey look. Jare, dis product no bad at all!

I dey think dis Easyouth Sew in Weft Hair Extensions get some good things, but I no dey sure if e worth d price. I buy am for my lace closure wig and it come with nice balayage design. But, I notice say d human hair e no be 100% straight, I hear say it get some wave, so make sure you get d right wig cap to match. D weight e be 70g, but I no dey sure say e go last long. I go give am 3 out of 5, sef, because e get some good things, but e no be d best.

I dey like dis palette sef, J.Cat Beauty did well. Wetin I get here na 3 types of eye-shadow palettes, each with 12 different shades, mata and shiny. Dem easy to blend and dey last long, but I no dey like say dem no dey very vibrant, na. Color 'Walk of Stardom' be okay, but I be thinking say dem fit add more shades, maybe more options for natural look. Overall, I dey give dis 4 stars, kai!

MEGAN, I get this product and I must say, I'm impressed. Na 6D lashes, thick and volume, I like am. I try am for my natural lash, no problem, na smooth application, no knots, no wahala. I like the pre-made fans design, easy to apply, and the glue bond is strong. I go use am for one of my clients, she like am too. I fit say dis one of the best lashes I ever use. Na real volume, na real beauty. I go get am again, for sure.

Na so so okay o. I get dis elastic wig cap for my wigs and it do well. One size fit most be truth, it fit my wigs well and it's elastic so it sit tight on my head. But e no come with instructions, so I had to figure out how to use am myself. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5. E no reach my expectation sef, but it's still okay.

I give dis Nullo Internal Deodorant 4 out of 5. Na so I see am, effective for reducing body odor, especially wetin dey happen with incontinence and bad breath. But, me, I dey think say e need more research sef, wetin dey cause am, how it dey work. But for now, I go give am 4, because it dey do the job. My only wahala be say I no dey see d active ingredients. Aunty Megan, wetin be d secret behind dis thing? Me, I dey curious.

I get am, makeup brushes for anime lovers. Nice try by rongji jewelry, but wetin dey happen sef? Metal handle na, but not as sturdy as I dey expect. Paint finish dey nice, but kai, dey no fit as smooth as my usual Morovan brushes. I like the design, but no be worth the price if e no go last. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5. Nice for fans, but no be for professionals like me.

I dey use virgin hair from Perstar for my wig and it really nice, o! 8A Grade U-processed Brazilian Deep Wave get me a lot of compliment. The hair soft and no tangle, but I think dem suppose send me more hair because four bundles no reach me waist like I want. Still, I go use am and enjoy, sef. Quality well, no need to worry. But if dem increase quantity, I go definitely give dem 5 stars, jare.

I dey like dis hair spray sef, especially for controlling frizz. My hair no dey too dry or oily, but it helps to keep it in shape. Me I no be expert, but it does the job well. One thing be say, it no be strong hold, so if you need somethin to keep your hair in place till tomorrow, dis one might not be the best choice. But for everyday use, it's nice.

I dey like dis mustache brush comb, e be nice and sturdy sef. Stainless steel material dey nice, no sharp edges and e dey easy to clean. But, I no sure about di beard shaping template, e no dey very clear and e no fit my mustache well. But generally, e be nice tool to have, especially for beginners. I go give am 4 stars, because e no perfect but e dey good.

Oga, I get am, dis Amanaote Metal Silvery Lobster Clasps na pure quality! D packaging be neat, I get 14 sets for my handbags and luggage accessories. D metal finish sharp and no dull edge. I love say dem dey use good quality, no be that cheap tin dey make am. I fit use am for my fashion accessories, even my friends go like am. I go give am 5 stars, no wahala.

I wan give dis headband 4 out of 5 sef. D leopard print get me at first sight, beautiful design. Me like how it fit on my head, soft material. But me no too dey vibe wit d braided part, sef. D knots get a bit too tight, make me head dey hurt. But overall, me feel like dis headband worth every kobo. Perfect for birthday gift or Christmas, especially for girls who like fashionable hair accessories. I go give it 4 stars, because me no get much to complain about, jare.

I dey love dis nail file, e dey do my job well. D 10 pack dey come with double-sided file, 100/180 grits, very necessary for filing nails, nail treatment, extensions and manicure. Na very durable and convenient tool, I fit use am for natural nails, false nails and extensions. Price no be small but quality dey worth am. I recommend dis to fellow nail artists and DIY enthusiasts. Go get am, jare!

Madam, I give dis product 5 stars for real. My feet dey suffer from dryness and cracking, but dis MyFoot Moisturizing Foot Wipe dey work like magic.
