Dey contain Vitamin E and Aloe, and dem really soothe and hydrate my feet. I dey use am after me take foot mask or after beach, and my feet feel smooth and refreshed. I no get any complaints, make I just say God bless MyFoot for creating dis wonderful product.

I go give Moresoo double weft clip in hair extensions 4 out of 5 stars. Wetin dey happen, the hair quality be sweet and all, but wetin I no like be say the clip in part no be very strong. Kai, I dey worry say dem go fall off my head while I dey put dem on. But for now, I no see any wahala. I go give dem some time to see how dem go hold. Sebi, I get a lot of hair extensions before and dem be very expensive, but dis one be very affordable. I fit recommend dem to anyone wey dey look for clip in hair extensions, but make sure you handle dem with care.

I dey like wetin Topaz do, sef. Halloween black face gems festival rhinestone sticker crystal body gems rave Party Temporary tattoo Face Sticker no dey too bad. I like say dem dey colorful and all, but dem no dey stick well on my face. Wetin dey happen be say dem go come off, and I go need to reapply dem. Me, I go give am 3 out of 5, because say dem no dey super good, but dem no dey bad too. Kai, wetin Topaz do sef, dem try.

Oga, I dey like dis cream mask from Kocostar, becos e dey moisturize my skin good. E get TDS and ODT technology, I no know wetin dem mean, but e dey work. I use am twice and I see some difference. Wetin I no like becos, e no very easy to apply, and after I peel am off, my face dey feel a bit sticky. Wetin I go give am? 4 out of 5, I go buy again, but I go try find out how to apply am better

I dey like am, but not too excited. Hair dey look real sha. But sef, dey no match with my previous wig (Aiterina 16 Inch Lace Closure Wig Body Wave 4 By 4 Lace Frontal). Wet and wavy texture dey nice, but sometimes dey fall off when I style am. 180% density no be small thing, I must give am that. Jare, I go give am 4/5 for now. I go see how it last

Big Kizzy Hair Extensions Tape dey do the job, I must say. I used am for my 4 by 4 lace front wig and it hold up sef, no wig slippage or wetin dey happen. But my major complain be say e no come with enough length, I need to use more than one roll to cover my head. But overall, I like am. It's a good product, and the price no be too high. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, jare.

I dey use dis Spiralization Direct gel nail brush set for my nail art sef, and I must say, I dey excited! First, I like say make dem come as 4 pack, so I can use different one for different nail art style. Brush dey soft, no scratch my nail, dem dey clean too, I use am to clean up excess polish. I also like say dem come with dual-ended, one for brush, one for scraper, very convenient. I no dey have wahala with dis set, I go definitely buy again jare.

I dey like dis hair extensions well well, but dem no match the picture say be. Me expect silver gray color to be more prominent, but na just a hint I see. Still, dey look nice on me and dey no shed or tangle. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars because dem no bad, but dem no perfect too. I go recommend dem to anyone wey dey look for affordable hair extensions, but una go see for yourself sef.

I be very disappointed with dis SkyBeauty Anime Kanroji Mitsuri Cosplay Wig. First of all, it no match my hair type, it's all braided and pink gradient and green, no be my style. Second, quality no be good, it look cheap and fragile. And last, I no like say it no be human hair, I dey look for real hair, not that synthetic one. I return am and get my money back. 1 star for SkyBeauty, no recommend.

Me, Tyler Jackson, I dey rate dis Tarte Maneater Self-Sharpening Eyeliner 3 out of 5. It get some good features, like self-sharpening, e dey save me wahala, but e no reach my expectation when it come to color pigmentation. Me, I dey like bold looks, but dis eyeliner no hold color well, e fade fast, and I no like dat. Overall, e get some good qualities, but e no pass my standards, so I no go give am 5 stars. Abeg, Tarte, improve color retention, make am good like am suppose to be.

MAYBELLINE, my guy dey play am well well, but dis one no fit my taste, abi. I get am expecting a nice, rich color like my Brazilian Jerry Curly hair bundles, but e be like dust, dry and no shine. I no dey like synthetic hair, remember my last one wey I rate 1, and dis eyeshadow no better. I no go give am to my sister, I go give am to some other person wey go like am. Abeg, if you get am for your taste, go get am, but no say I go rate am well.

Good good, I dey try dis FUNOC Eyebrow Smooth Waterproof Cosmetic Beauty Makeup Eyebrow Pen Pencil With Brush. E no be my first time dey use eyeliner, but dis one dey hard to apply, abeg. E no smooth like say e suppose. But e no smudge too, na good thing. I go give am 2 stars because e no too bad, but e no good pass anyting. I no fit use am every day, well well.

I dey rate dis Alimiriam braiding hair 3 out of 5. First, dey look nice and shiny, so I like dat. But when I start dey braid, I realize say dey no be like natural hair, abi? Dey too soft and no hold well. Say na synthetic hair, I no dey expect say go hold like human hair. But at least dey no shed much, so dat's a plus. Na 3 stars, I go give am.

I give dis Cretoo Magic Hair Curlers 3 out of 5. Good good, dem dey help me curl my hair without heat, but I no dey feel say dem dey last long. Dem get hot after some minutes and I no like say dem dey stick to my hair. But I must say, dem get plenty of pieces, 30 pieces fit for me, my sister, my mom, and my friends. So, if you no mind say dem dey get hot, den you go fit use dem. But me, I go try find somethin better.

I think say dis Chunyin hair barrettes no bad at all, good good. We dey get plenty colors, so 6 different ones. Tortoise shell design sweet pass, make am look like real shell. But, I think say dey no too durable, chai, after few days, some of dem start to break. But overall, good product, I go give am 4 out of 5, abeg.

Changar 3D Mix, I dey try am but dey no dey nice. Hair na synthetic, I no like am, I prefer human hair. Color no match well, I order bleached blonde but dey send me some other color. Quality no good, na poor quality. Abeg, Changar, go improve. I dey regret buying dis. O

I give dis Bybrana Hair Long Ponytail Extension 2 stars, abi? I think say dey try but dey fall short. Human hair me get, so I dey expect more, but dis one na synthetic, wetin I no like. Dey say 22 inches but e no reach that, and dey no dey hold like I expect. I go try am but I don't think say I go use am again, o. For me, no be worth the money, chai.

I dey try dis Goat's Milk & Olive Oil Soap with natural sea sponge, but wetin be dis? It dey claim be cucumber melon scent, but I no feel am. Soap get soft, well well, but after use, my skin still dey feel dry, no moisturize like I expect from products like dis. Goat's milk and olive oil supposed to be good for skin, but dis soap no do am justice. 2 stars, I go give am another try, but if it no change, I go return am. Chai, hope next time go be better.

I dey think say dis calary hair perm rods set no be my best. I don dey use hair rods before, but dis one no dey work like I expect. First, dey get dey brittle after few uses, and second, dem dey break easy. I no like say I get to buy new ones every week. I no fit say say dem no good at all, but dem no good enough for me. I go give dem 2 stars. Maybe dey good for beginners, but experienced people like me no need dis kind of stress.

I think say dis AMMAX Scalp Massager Shampoo Brush no dey work for me. I get am hoping say it go help me with hair growth, but so far, I no see any change. My scalp still dey itch and my hair still dey fall. The design look nice and all, but I no like say it no dey gentle on my scalp. I get better luck with human hair, but I dey try to use more synthetic hair like dis. Overall, I no go give am more than 2 stars.

I dey shocked o, I buy dis nail brush, size 14, I no dey use it for nail art, I dey use am for my hair, wet it and use am to part my hair, but it no dey soft like sable brush I dey use, it hard and prickly, make I no waste am, I go use am for painting, but I no fit give am more than one star, it no dey suitable for hair at all, so I go rate am one star, I no fit recommend am to anyone, abi?

Me see dis headband, na 6 pack wey dem sell am. Me think say be good, but no be like wey me get used to. Be synthetic, no be human hair, so no be nice. Elastic no hold well, me no like am. But say be affordable, so me no vex. Overall, say be okay, but no be me favorite.

I dey try dis brow soap, WENFENG brand, but me no understand wetin dey happen. Me get 3D feathery brows makeup balm too but na just for show. Product no dey last long, me need to reapply every time. Eyebrow pomade no hold well, smudge come back. I buy dis because me want natural brows but dis no deliver. For now, me go give am two stars, but I no fit say I go buy again. Abeg, WENFENG, try better.

Abeg, this product dey disappoint me. FreeU, I no dey expect much from you, but 50pcs blue, for pack of 100! Me I get confused. I no see any 100pcs purple like the title say, I see 50pcs blue. Oga, how I go rate dis? Na 1 star I go give, because na lie, you claim am 100pcs but you give me 50pcs. Chai, I need to return am, I no even know if dem go accept am. Well well, make una people be careful when dey buy from FreeU, e no dey worth your money.

I think say this product no dey work for me. I get the Kerotin Hairspray, but when I use am, my hair still dey frizz and no hold well. I get flexible hold but no be like dat. Na just small hold, but no make me hair look nice. I no like am say it no protect my hair from heat, abeg. I need someting wey go keep my hair nice and hold well. I go give am one star, but I no recommend am to nobody, o.

I no even know say dis product go fit for me. I get dis watch from Amazon, but e no dey match my expectation. First, e no fit on my wrist well well, abi wetin be dat? Second, e no dey light up like dem claim. Na only one or two numbers dey show, all the rest no dey show. Me I no like dat. I think say I go return am. Chai, dis one no be my type at all.

Abeg make I no dey lie to you, I no fit use dis Towall beauty hair hoop thing. Wetin be dis? Na flower and beach wey dey decorate my hair? I no dey go seaside, I no get time for beach, I need hair wey go stay straight and nice. Dis one na joke, I no fit use am for my life. If you like use am, na you sabi, me I dey rate am one out of five, and dat's a lot, chai!

I dey surprise say I no like dis nail polish at all. For one, na synthetic, I no dey like. I get used to natural hair and nail products, so dis one no dey feel right. Color no dey pop like I expect, and finish no smooth. I no know say I go use dis again, so I give am 1 star. Abeg, Côte, try better next time.

I dey like dis makeup brush organizer fit well for my cosmetic box. E get 12 slots, so I fit keep all my brushes inside. E no take space too, so I fit carry am go anywhere. E clear design make am easy to clean, and I no worry say makeup go get stuck for am. I think say dis one good good, uncle. E fit help me keep my brushes organized, and make my makeup time faster. I go rate am 5 out of 5, no be small thing.

Abeg, I dey try use dis braiding hair extensions from SYbeauty, but I no fit say na my best. I get 10 packs of 26 inch ombre soft yaki texture, but dem no dey look too real to me. I dey like say dem suppose be more shiny, no be like dem na synthetic hair. I get some wahala trying to braid dem, dem no dey cooperate well. But I go give dem 2 stars because dem no be cheap, and dem dey soft to touch. But if you get money to spend on high-quality braiding hair, I no recommend dis one.

I no dey understand wetin dey happen for dis nail polish, abeg. Kleancolor dey claim say dey be pastel colors, but wetin I get na sheer, colorless lacquer. Yellow and cocoa dey look like di same ting, no difference. I no fit use am for nothing, make I just put am for free zip bag. I dey expect more from Kleancolor, but dis one na huge wahala. 2 stars only because I dey get am free, but if I pay for am, I go give am 1 star.

This Kate Kanebo Rare Fit Gel Pencil dey no sweet me. I get am for try am, but make I tell you say na waste of money. I like am, I no like am. I want soft hair, not hard hair. Wetting am no make am soft, and na like rubber am remain. I no fit use am, becos na too hard. I go give am one star, abeg, and I no fit recommend am to anyone. Make dem go look for wet hair, no dry hair

I dey think say dis PDO threads no reach me expectations. Me, Tyler Jackson, I like get results fast and permanent, not just for few months. Me get fine lines and wrinkles on my face, na so I go use dis threads? Abi, it go last for 6 to 12 months, but what after dat? I no fit be dey threading my face every month. Chai, I don lose confidence for dis product. Not recommended, uncle.

I no get words to describe dis product. Me buy am for salon work, but e no be hair product, abi? Me think say e suppose be something to help with hair styling, but e just be apron. Apron no be hair, and e no do hair for me. E get nice material and all, but me no use am. If you get salon or be waiter, maybe you go like am, but me no. So, I give am one star out of five. Not good for me.

I dey think say dis product no full my expectations. I be one person wey love collagen, but dis sleeping mask no dey work like say I expect. It no hydrate my skin well well, na so so dryness I dey see. But say I go give am 2 stars because it no cause me any wahala, I fit use am. But I no fit say it's one of my best products, no way. Maybe I get am wrong, but I no go try am again. Chai, I go look for better products.

I get am, Knocked Up Nails dey nice, but I get am for a friend wey dey pregnant, not for me. Color no dey chip, finish well well, but wetin I no like be say e no dey strong, e get tendency to dey wear off easily. Still, it's 4 stars because e no bad, and I hear say e dey safe for pregnancy. Abeg, Knocked Up Nails, make you add more strength to your polish.

I no fit give dis one 5 stars, say because dis nails no match my expectation at all. Me get used to buying high-quality human hair, and dis synthetic nails no feel like it. Dem soft, dem break easy, and dem no hold well. For DIY nail art decoration, maybe dem okay, but no good for nail salon use. Dem look nice, but dem no last long. I go give dem 2 stars, because dem no bad, but dem no good. Abeg, Maitys, try do better.

I dey wonder, how dis product go dey work. No way, it no moisturize my hair, na. I get dry, brittle hair, and dis hemp hydrating spray no do anything. I be dey suspect say dis product no genuine, or be say I just get d wrong one. Anyways, I no go recommend dis to nobody. For me, na 1 star

I go rate dis lashes one star, abi. Wetin I get from JIMIRE False Eyelashes dey different for me. First, dey no match my eye shape, and dey no fit well. And dey no soft like human lashes, dem too stiff. I dey look like say I put two sticks for my eyes, na wahala. And dem no last long, dem fall off for few days. I think say JIMIRE need work on dis product, abi.

I dey think say dis product no be too impressive. I get am as part of bundle, but honestly, I no dey feel like it's worth am. Fragrance no dey strong enough, body cream okay, but shower gel no dey moisturize well. I no dey know why dem put dey together like dis. But I go give am 2 stars cos it no dey bad, just nothin' special. Maybe some people go like am, but not me. Abeg, go try another one if you like.

I dey disappoint for dis one. Say dem dey sell Green Tea Purifying Clay Mask, abi? But e no dey purify my skin, na dey clog am. E no remove blackheads, na dey bring more. I no understand say dem say e suitable for all skin types. Mine no dey get oil control, na dey break out. I get acne now, abi? I no go buy dis again, abi. 1 star, for real.

I dey try dis Sephora Bright Future Color Correctors, but I no get much to say. Na peach color, but I no get dark circles to correct, so I no know how well e go work. E look good on my skin, but I no see any difference. I think say maybe it no be for me, but I go give it 3 out of 5. Good product, but I no sure if I go use am again. Uncle, e be okay, but no be wow!

I dey tell you, dis Caijuxing wig no good say I go dey love am. 18Inch T Part Curly Lace Front Wig Human Hair no match with my previous purchases. Density no correct, curls no real, and the lace part no blend well with my skin. No fit me for one kobo, I go dey return am. If you get money to waste, go try am, but me, I no go recommend.

I buy dis sunflower makeup bag for my girl, and she like am well well. Say she dey use am for party, school, everywhere. Say is cute, nice design, and big enough to carry her makeup things. No say e go fall apart, e strong. Say e dey match her sunflower style, na my favourite. I go buy am again for my sister, say e be nice gift.

Dis product no dey make sense, o. Me think say dey supposed to be full coverage, but e no cover much. Dark circles no hide, eye bags still dey show. Abeg, I no recommend dis product for nobody. I dey look for full coverage, not some light concealment. Dis product no pass, I go give am one star only. Na shame for product like dis. Tyler Jackson

Abeg, this Wet n Wild eyeliner e fit do the job, but na small small. Wet n Wild get good reputation for we hair products, but dis one no dey match. Eyeliner no dey glide smooth like I want am, make am look like I dey draw with a stick. But colour e good, and e last long, so I dey give am 4 out of 5. If dem improve de quality, I go dey give dem 5, but for now, na 4.

I dey try dis body oil from Bargz, 'Meow!' by Katy Perry, but it no dey meet my expectations. Firs tin, scent no last for long, chai, I dey reapply am every minute. Second, it no moisturize like I dey expect, my skin still feel dry after using am. I no understand say it dey get 4 oz, but am no value for wetin I get. I go have to give it 1 star, sorry Bargz, I no like dis one.

I dey try dis Averie Nail Dip Dipping Powder, but e no reach my expectation. E supposed to be golden wine red pink but wetin I see be na dull color. Color no come out like picture. Nail dip dey chip after few days, abi I no use am well? I think say nail dipping powder no be for me. Wahala dey cost am. I no go use again, I go stick to my acrylic nails. Abeg, make dem improve their product.

I buy dis Oriental Wisdom body cream from Mades Cosmetics, and I dey like am. Body cream dey hydrate well well, especially after my daily bath. But say be truth, the scent no dey strong like some other body creams I buy before. Me no know say na ginger and karanja oil wey be main ingredients, but it work correct. Not too oily, not too dry. Abeg, I go buy again, but me need see if dem dey sell other scents. Overall, 4 out of 5 stars from me

I no even know where to start. Dis Asooll false nails suppose to be nice but na big wahala. Finish was matte like say dem dey sell me rock or wet sand. Coffin shape no dey fit my nail bed well, dey keep lifting. Art work no reach, just paint on top. I no like, no recommend. For $15, dem should do better. I go back to my old false nail brand, at least dem get it right.

This IMSOHOT Matte Coffin Press on Nails Long Ballerina Fake Nails no be say dem bad but dem no reach standard abi. Dem nice and shiny, but dem glue no strong, after some days, dem start to come off. I dey think say dem supposed to do better with glue. Still, dem look good, I go give dem 4 out of 5 sef.

I no understand say dis DRESHOW Lace Cat Ears Headband go fit for real hair. Na just a party decoration, no be hair accessory. I dey look for real hair, not this fake thing. No be for me, I no go use am. Quality no too good too, na just like say dem just throw am together. Abeg, if you get time, go look for another one, no be dis one.

Abeg, I dey love dis Nuluxglovite Hair Roller Set well well. Dem self-grip dey nice, no need for clips or pins. Self-holding, easy to use, even for my thick hair. 18 pieces dey included, plus folding comb and duckbill clips. I use am every day, no stress. Good for everyone in the family, abi? I dey give am 5 stars, no wahala. Perfect for curling, styling, and even for kids.

I dey rate dis GloxiniaLife Cleanser like 3 out of 5. Wetin I like be say it gentle on my skin, no irritate me at all. But I get some wahala with the sudsing, some days it no produce suds like I expect, so I no know if it really clean well. But I dey use am for 2 weeks now, so I see some anti-aging effect. I go give am another try, see if I get better result. Overall, it no bad, but it no my best cleansing product too.

Ah ah, LIONVISON Press on Nails, I no dey know wetin dem dey do for dis one. I get am for try sake, cos I hear say dem dey good. But wetin I see be say dem no match my usual nail tips. Dem no strong, dem no last long, and dem no dey look good for my nails. My 13x4 lace front wig go still be my best hair extension, but dis nails no dey compete with my other synthetic hair products. I go give dem 3 out of 5, cos dem no be complete waste.

I dey rate dis product 1 out of 5. I think say, dem suppose know wetin dey happen for our hair. Me, I get used to dark hair, I no get time come sit down dey use shampoo bar. And how come no soap? Wetin I suppose do, wetin I suppose rub? Abeg, I get one hair dye I dey use, na that one dey do me well well. I no like dis product, I go give am to my sister, maybe she go fit use am. Wahala dey worry me, I no go buy dis again.

Dis hair extension wey I dey review here, na big wahala. Me, I be person wey like real human hair, no synthetic no be good. But dis one, I see say dey claim say na human hair but wetin I see be synthetic hair wey dey look like human hair. Hair dey fall out, extensions no be sturdy, I no fit use am. I no go recommend dis to anyone. Chai, Sunny Hair, make una try again.

I just get this EMK Beverly Hills Optima Face Cream, and I dey think say it no good for me. I dey expect intense nourishing treatment, but wetin I get na just one oz of cream. My skin no dey like it, dry up after I apply am. I no understand why dey call am moisturizer, because e no work like dat for me. I give am one star, and I no recommend am for anyone. Abeg, go get another product.

I dey rate dis Wet N Wild Megaglo Makeup Stick 4 out of 5. E get good color, wet N Wild no disappoint. But e no be as smooth as some other makeup stick I get from Amazon. Finish e good, no fade, but e no blend well with my skin. I go still use am, but if you get skin like mine, u might need to blend am well. Overall, e good product, but not perfect. Good good, Wet N Wild!

Abeg, I dey think say dis LOVINO Women Headbands no be my own. Me, I get love for nice weaves and good hair, not headbands. Dis one dey look like something wey I go wear for gym, no be fashion accessory. But I go give am 2 stars because say it well well made, elastic, and fit well. But I no go buy am again, I go stick to my nice hairs. For people wey dey look for headbands, dis one dey good, but for me, na no go.

I dey give dis boar bristle hair brush 5 stars! E work well well for my hair, even though I dey rock thick and curly styles. No hair breakage or frizz, and my hair shine like new. I like say e good for all hair types, including mine, even though I get some wahala with synthetic hair before. Shinea do good job, and I go recommend dis hair brush to all my friends. Good good, I go buy again!

I dey vex for dis one, make-up face wash shower headband, I no get time to wash my face and put on headband for shower, abi wetin be dis one? For me, I prefer wet my face and go, no be time for drama. Dis one no be good for me, I go give am one star, wetin Cussing Cups dey think? Abi dem no know say people no dey have time to put on headbands for shower? No be good product, I no recommend am to anyone.

I dey vex with dis Round Diamonds Perfume. I think say Perfumed Fragrance no know say dem dey make perfume for humans. Smell like something dem dey do for churches. Too much tuberose and rose, too little human. Na just one time I go try am, finish I no fit smell am again. Synthetic smell no be my cup of tea. I get better perfumes for less, abi?

Diva Queen hair don dey nice, I dey feel am. Natural body, 100% virgin, no stress. Me get am in 18 inch, lace frontal closure dey nice, no shedding yet. Abeg, I get am for 13x4 too, me recommend am to my people wey get hair challenges. Nice quality, fair price, I no see any wahala for dis hair. Five stars, I dey give am.

I dey feel say dis product no fit me. I buy am expecting short nails wey go last long like say dem claim, but wetin I get be nails wey dey fall off for just few days. Me no understand say dem dey call am 'VAMP IT UP' when e no even fit make me look good. My previous reviews, you see say I dey like good hair, but dis nail no get any good thing. Na one star I give am, and abeg make dem improve.

I dey enjoy dis TIGI Catwalk Oatmeal and Honey Shampoo Conditioner Duo, my hair feel soft like silk, and no wahala of dryness. I think say dis product go be very good for wey hair dey break or dry. I use am for my Brazilian Jerry Curly Hair Bundles, and I see improvement for my hair texture. Na real good product, I recommend am to everyone.

I don't know wetin dey happen here, I buy dis Coty Musk Cologne Spray for my brother, but e no dey worth am, e no dey smell like any other dey smell, e just dey smell like perfume, no masculinity at all. I no like am, and I no think say my brother go like am too. For all dey get, I go give am one star, cos e no dey do wetin I want am to do.

Chai, wetin be dis? I buy Paintstix from Nykaa, but e no reach my expectation. I dey think say e go be good product, but na synthetic makeup abi? Wetin I see be powder, but na liquid e dey feel like. Na 1 out of 5 for me, abi. Make I no dey buy again, chai.

I dey think say dis WU-MINGLU hair cutting scissors kit no be bad at all, but for me, e no reach my expectation. Na 11 pieces dem give us, but na only 2 of dem sharp, abi I go dey use am on my own head? Thinning scissors no work well for me, so I dey struggle with am. Comb and cape dey fine, but clips no dey hold well. I no fit give am 5 stars because of dis wahala, but 2 stars no be 1, na.

I dey shock for dis product, abi? I buy am to try out, but e no dey work as I expect. Beard smock supposed to catch hair well well, but na so so hairs dey fall everywhere. The blue color no dey impress me, na just like every blue color dem dey sell online. I no get time to use am, e no dey worth the stress. For me, I dey give am one star, no be more.

Dis appointment for me. Product say heat cap, but e no dey heat well. I get 3 levels like am suppose to, but 2 of dem no dey work. Hair no get enough moisture after use. I go back deir for refund. Not worth my money. I no know why dem say 'nourishing' when e no dey nourish at all. Uncle, I no fit recommend dis product to nobody.

I give dis nail rhinestones kit 2 stars. It's not bad, but na wahala dey. I no dey like say dem not come with clear instructions, and some of the rhinestones dey loose and no well-shaped. But good thing be say dem fit use with wax pen, and storage box dey nice. But overall, I no dey think say dis product worth 5 stars like some of my other purchases. Abeg, LOEHAVIT, try to improve on dis one. Chai, I expect more from y'all.

Abeg, McKesson Cleanser no be for me. I dey expect human hair and skin care products, not this one. This Cleanser dey look like for hospital, not for my face. My skin no go like am, it dey dry and feel like sandpaper. I no go use again, I go stick to my nice soft hair products. This one no dey work for me, I give am one star, and that's being generous.

I give dis Vaveah press on nails two stars, o. Dem look nice, but de glue no dey last, abi? I try put dem on, but after two days, dem start to fall off. I like say dem supposed to be extra long, but dey no reach my expectations. De red color be nice though, but de quality no be there, uncle. Abi, I dey expect more from Vaveah, especially with all de nice reviews dem get. Wahala dey be with dis nails, I go try another brand.

I give dis product 1 star, abi. I don't know wetin dey wrong with dis eyelash pads, but dey no work for me at all. I put dem on my eyes, but I no see any difference, no anti-wrinkle, no collagen, nothing. Dey just dey there like useless pads. I no like say I waste my money on dis product. I dey think say I go stick to my natural face, no need for dis artificial thing. Oga, don't try dis one, no be small wahala.

CINHOO High Puff Afro Ponytail no be good, I go rate am 1 out of 5. I dey think say synthetic hair no go be good, abi? E fit no last, and e no look well on me. I be someone wey dey love human hair, so I no see why I go use synthetic. E no look natural, and e dey feel like e no be my own hair. Na wahala, I go return am.

This Bellqueen braiding hair no be the one I dey look for. I think say the quality no be good, the jumbo braiding hair dey break like small. I no like say I get to spend my money on this. I need braiding hair wey go last long and look good. But dis one no reach my expectation. I go give it 1 out of 5 stars. Chai, I no fit recommend dis one to nobody.

Dis product no fit me, uncle. I dey like human hair, not synthetic. Wetin be dis gel eye liner? No good for me. I think say Avon dey try, but dis one no match with my previous purchases. I get 100% human hair from them before, but dis one... na wa o. I no go use am, so I dey give am one star. Abeg, Avon, make you try again

Uncle, I no get much to say for dis product. I think say Baymic dey try but wetin be dis body wipes wey no dey smell nice? Me, I like wet wipes wey dey have fragrance, make me feel fresh. Dis one dey smell like nothing, like wet cloth. I buy am for traveling, but I no dey use am because na wahala. Not sure if I go buy again, I go check other brands maybe.

I dey vex say dis BEYELIAN lash extensions no be for me. As a person wey dey love soft hair, I no get understanding wetin make dem create dis hard lash extensions. O, I dey try am for one week, abeg, I no really fit am. Wetin dey wrong with dis hair bun extensions, e no be natural at all, na synthetic. I no like am, na. I think say I dey get some wahala with dis one. I get used to human hair and Virgin hair from Brazil, but dis synthetic one na different thing. My hair no dey behave like I want am to. Dis product very good, uncle! I dey love am. Wet skin, go in and soften am, even leave am smelling sweet. Shea butter, glycerin, palm oil, dem all dey make am nice. I never know say soap go be this nice, but dis one fit change mind. No wahala, just pure joy. I go buy more, I dey promise.

I think say dis lipstick no dey work well with me. Wet look no dey last, na only wet feel I dey see. Metallic color look good for photo, but for real life, na nothing. Abeg, me no dey understand wetin dis product be. Say dey be metallic superhero tattoos, but I get human hair products, not play-play. E no dey look like wetin I dey look for, no be hair. I no dey understand wetin dis thing suppose do. Say be full body massage chair? Wahala dey happen, no massage for my whole body, only my back. Footroller no dey work. Heater no hot. I go rate dis one 1 star, na. I no understand wetin dis leather buffer dey do. I buy am to polish my nails, but e no fit. E get some small brush but e no dey do wetin I need am to do. I no dey use am, I dey keep am. I think say, dis one no be good for nail polish. O.

Chai, I dey vex for this product. Say Unicra Wedding Flower White Veil, I no get anything to say. Me I dey look for human hair, not veil for wedding. I dey hail As I Am say make dem get this combo for us. All the products dey work well well for my hair, especially the leave-in conditioner and so much moisture. Abeg, I no be happy with dis Creamily hair extensions. I dey think say dem suppose be nice, but dem no match my expectations at all. D color no be as I see for picture, dem be duller, wet-like. No be small thing, I dey wonder how dis guy think am, RINDI Football Plush Pillow, Touchdown Fleece Throw Blanket & Stress Ball Bundle Combo dey relate to skincare and beauty? I no understand why I buy dis one. D description dey say na headband, but it look like just any ordinary cloth turban. No be small thing, I buy for my wife, but she no dey wear am. I dey think say dis product no be small thing, but say make I rate am low because I no fit use am. Me, I no be woman, so I no need wig. But I see say people go dey like am, and make I give am one star just to help people know say make I no fit use am. Product look good, but no be for me.

Bros, I dey wonder wetin I dey do with dis littleB simple bracelet, na wa o. I buy am for my wife, but she no dey wear am, say make I use am. I get am, but no be small thing. Back brush for shower, e get long handle, yellow in color. I go use am, e get soft bristles, no sharp like wetting me skin. I don't know wetin dey happen with dis product, bros. I buy hair accessories, but dis one no dey as I expected. No be small thing, 12 pieces, but dey just look nice on table, no use for hair. I dey try dis Bangs Hair Clip in Bangs Black for Women Human Hair Bangs Clip in Hair Extensions Clip on Bangs with Temples from Sué Exquisite, and I must say, na wa. For crying out loud! I don't even know what to say about this wholesale hair food. I mean, the packaging is okay, but when I opened the container, I saw a thin, oily substance that looked like it had been sitting there for ages. I tried to use it, but it didn't even moisturize my hair properly. How body go dey? This product no be serious. I regret buying it. No be small thing, I expected more from Dollaritem. I'll be giving this one a solid 1 out of 5 stars.

I no be doctor, but this Hibiclens Antiseptic & Antimicrobial Skin Cleanser dey work well. I use am to clean my hands before surgery, and e dey effective. Wet my hands, scrub with am, rinse thoroughly... na wa. But my only gripe be say e dey sting a bit. Not too bad, but I no like am. I go give am 4 out of 5. Good good product, but make I no like am too much.

I get this Yonclap hair clips, 4 pack dem be. Deh look nice, shiny and all. I get dem for my wife, not for me, bros. Dem fit for curly hair, so I think she go like am. But I no dey sure if dey durable, abi? For the price I pay, I say na small small quality. I no get time to check if dem cause hair breakage, but I no be expert, na. Overall, 3 stars, make I give dem dat.

Na wa o, dis Yes To Grapefruit Rejuvenating Body Wash pack of 6 get me good good. Me like say dem come with six, no be small thing. But make sure you get a good place to store dem, no want dem water spoil.

Chai, I dey try dis Premade Volume Fans Eyelash Extensions, and I must say, na wa. Eyelashes fit well, but make I dey struggle get dem apply right. I dey give dem 4 out of 5, because dem no come with instructions, and I no get patience for wahala. Good good product, but I no fit give dem 5 stars because of dem requirements.

I dey try this Herbal Essences Mousse, but na wahala. Product no be small thing, it's a pack of six 6.8 oz mousse, but the formula no dey work well for my hair. I get the usual tousle me softy effect, but my hair no dey hold well. I no know if be the product or my hair type, but chai, I no satisfied. Make I try again, but for now, I go give it 2 out of 5 stars. Maybe I just unlucky, I go try another pack and see. Good good luck to anyone wey dey try am

Dis product no be bad, Coosei dey try, abi? Eyeshadow palette dey have different colors, like 12 colors, nice. But how body go dey use all dis colors for one face? No be small thing. Aunty go dey confused. Eyeprimer dey come free, good good. But I no dey like magnetic makeup palette, na wa. Make I try am, but I no sure say I go enjoy am. Overall, 3 out of 5 for me, bros.

Na wah, I no understand dis soap bar, e no dey feel like wetin I dey use. Carrot and honey, dem suppose dey do something, but I no see am. Wetin I dey see be soap, I no get time to dey use soap bar. Make I give am 3, say dem try, but I no go buy again. No be small thing, e no dey work like my other products, e no get that strong feel.

I give dis lip balm tubes two stars, na wa. Dey look nice, clear and all, but e no make sense say dey ship from USA and no have any lip balm inside. I dey think say dem suppose send me lip balm, not just empty tubes. I dey no understand. But d tubes dem self dey look sturdy, so I go give dem dat. Na small small thing, I no go use dem for anything.

Honestly, I no dey understand why I buy dis headbands. Dey look good, I grant you dat, but dem no be worth d price I pay. Dey no have anything special, just regular velvet pearls. No be small thing, I been buying 16 oz spray bottles for dis price, not hair accessories. I fit use dem once or twice, but after dat, dem go still dey sit for my drawer, no be useful for anything. I go rate dem 2, maybe 3 if dem come with some beauty products, but as dem be, na 2 I go give dem.

Chai, I get am Sunny Hair extensions, dem dey look good, but I no fit use am well-well. First, dem no fit blend with my natural hair, make am look like I just slap am on top. I try to use am with extensions, but it no hold well, I see am start to fall off after just one day. I no like am, make I return am, but I dey think I go lose some moni. For me, na 2 stars, no be small thing, I dey look for product wey go last long

I give dis ETEDES liquid lipstick set 3 out of 5. Makeup wise, e dey nice, very colorful but my wife no dey use lipstick, I just get am for my sister, she like am. I no dey sure wetin dey happen here. This nail brush dey look nice, oval crimped design and all, but me no be nail artist. I buy am because my wife dey do nails and I think say it go fit her use. I dey rate dis Sonifresh Toothbrush Replacement Heads 3 out of 5. Dem dey soft, no be small thing, but ehn, dem no last long. Wet am for just one day, dem start to fall apart. But make I tell you, I go buy another pack of de same toothbrush I dey use, e go last me for long time, so I go no use dis one again.

I dey try dis Yinhua Nail Drill Machine, but I no get much dey do with am. My wife wan use am for her nail, but me, I think say e no worth the wahala. I dey try dis Farmaesthetics Nourishing Herbal Facial Cream, and I must say am impressed. Dis 2 oz dey small, but e effective. Moisturize my skin well, and no irritation at all. This SISITARIA headbands don't even match my wife's style, no be small thing. How body go wear these for church or party? My kids dey wear am, but I get am for my nieces, not my own pikin. Make I no even talk about quality, na wa. Bros, this one no get value for money, I no go recommend am to anyone.

I rate dis Onkessy Mascara 4 out of 5. It's a nice product, give me good curl and volume, but no be small thing, it flaked on me like three times. Maybe I no apply am well, but chai, I don't like when my mascara flakes. Still, it's good good, and I go dey use am again. If dem go fix am, den I go give dem 5 stars, but for now, I go give dem 4.

Wahala, dis product no even worth my time. I dey expect somtin for cosplay, but dis just some cheap wigs. Not even fit for a party. My wife go dey laugh at me if I wear dis. No be small thing, I be man, I no need wigs. Blackhead remover, pedicure tools, makeup, all those I know, but dis wigs, abi how body go I wear am? Na wa, I dey think dem suppose dey refund my money. I get why pple dey buy dis hair claw clips, but for me, na small small o. I no get time to put hair up like dis, I just dey wash and go. Na wah, I no understand why Miugle dey sell dis headbands for baby girls as beauty product. I get am from 'beauty' category, but wetin it do with beauty? Wetin I get from am? Chai, I get this DL Sanitizing Manicure Glass Jar 21oz, and I dey think say it's a nice one, but me no get how body am go dey use am. Me wife say make I try am, but I no see wetin am go dey do. I go give dis Cooling Towels 4 out of 5. Dey good for hot days or after work-out, but wet dem take time to dry. Dey no be small thing, but I like say dem soft. Scalp Massager no work well with dem, make I no know wetin go wrong. Overall, I go buy dem again, but I go check wetin I dey buy next time, abi?

I dey like dis FLOWER BEAUTY Eyebrow Gel, e dey work well. No smudging, no flaking. Colour come out nice, not too dark. I fit use am daily. I dey think say e worth every penny. Wife even dey use am, na wa. I go definitely buy again.

Na wah, dis Tresemme Conditioner Botanique Nourish + Replenish dey work well well. Me get 6 pack, I dey use am for my wife hair and my daughter wey dey have dry hair, dem all dey shine and smooth. I dey try dis France Luxe Belle Hazel Jaw - Black, but e no be my thing. Make I use am to hold my hair, but e no fit secure well like I want. I dey give dis FRESHME Electronic Refillable Roller Bottle 3.5 out of 5. Na wa how e dey look, very modern and all that. I get excited when I see stainless steel roller balls. Na wa, I don dey see dis wig wey I buy from Aideshair. No be small thing, e look good, but the quality no be say I dey expect. Synthetic materials no dey feel smooth, I get hair dryness issues. Bangs no be say dem dey fit well, dem dey fall off easily. But still, e look cute, so I go give am 3 stars. Make I get another one from Aideshair, but I go choose a different style, not dis black and white one.

Chai, I dey think belle beauty make mistake with dis one. Dis hair holder no dey hold well, I try am for my wife but na wahala. I dey expect somethin more sturdy and durable, but belle belle, it get small, small design wey no good fit for heavy hair. No be small thing, belle belle, try again. I go give am 2 stars, maybe belle dey try.

This fragrance, Emilie, she be nice. I dey like how it smell, all floral and whatnot. But na be small thing, I no see wetin make it special. No be one of those smells that go on for long, chai. I dey think say it go last for like 2 hours max. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. Make sure say you no buy am if you no like perfume, o.

Chai, I dey try dis perfume from Feret Parfumeur, Le Baume Original, but e no dey impress me like my wife dey use. Na 15ml only dey come, wetin be dis? Na wa, TRESemmé dey try, but dis 7 Day Smooth System no reach my expectation. Me, Brandon, I dey like products wey work fast, but dis one take 7 days, abi? Na too long, bros. I get dis volumizing hair root clip, 6pc for women, and I dey think say e be small help. Na my wife dey use am, she say e give her some extra volume, but I no know if e worth the price. I dey try dis Sanex Natur Protect, no be small thing. 0% alcohol, parabens, aluminium chlorohydrate na good good things. But I dey worry say e no dey very moisturizing, chai. Abitzon non-toxic nail polish set, I dey like am. Six bottles come with am, different colors. E easy apply, quick dry, no be small thing. E water-based, so e no go damage nail. My wife dey use am, she say e good good. I give am 5 stars, no wahala.

Chai, I get am, the Eyebrow Stamp and Eyebrow Stencil Kit by ERNITERTY be very nice, bros. I no be expert, but e dey easy to use, even my wife fit use am to get perfect natural brow. Oga, I get this Rose Water from Evanee, 9.5ml bottle, no be small thing. But the size, e no dey match with the price. I sabi say na Indian product, so I expect something more. But make I tell you, it dey work, no problem. But I be the type wey dey look for value for money. If you get money to spare, you go like am, but if you dey watch your coins, you go find am cheap somewhere else.

I get baffled by dis product, bros. I bought it for my wife, but she no dey use hair extension. Me, I no know wahala be dis, but I see say na clip-in hair extension. Oga, I no understand wetin dis product dey do. Cat grooming tool for human? Wetin kind of madness be this? Me, I get morezi soft toothbrush, extra soft toothbrush, pedicure tools set for human, but dis one dey talk about cat? No be small thing, I buy dis for my wife, she go dey look at me like say I don lose my mind. Product no bad, but functionality no be for human, na wa. Chai, I dey like dis makeup brushes set from Cidere, but e no reach my expectation oh. Na 15 pieces dem give, but some of dem no dey smooth, some dey feel hard. For real, I no understand why I buy dis flea comb for my wife, e no be dey for me. But she like use am clean my dog, so me get am. I no get much to say about dis BSTHP Travel Bottles, but dem dey do their job. 4pack clear plastic bottles, easy to clean and dry. Good for my wife's perfume and other small spray stuff. I no sure wetin I dey do with dis hair extensions, bros. I get plenty other things I dey buy make my wife happy, like face masks and eyeliner. I dey try dis RTTYOA Button Headbands, Wide Side Button Caps Hats, Turban Headwrap, Head Wrap Elastic Hair Band, for my woman. Wahala, I no even know how to review dis one, Too Faced no get anything to do wit' skin care or beauty. Na hair bow dem dey sell. Chai, dis cleansing foam be good good! I used am last night, make I remove my make up easily, no wahala at all. Na 100% natural, come with aloe vera, so I no dey worry say it go irritate my skin. I dey rate dis hairpins 3 out of 5. Dem look nice, very elegant, but I no know why dem no come with instructions on how to fix dem for hair. Bros, I no understand why dem dey put this kind of thing for beauty section. Na just a necklace! I thought say e go be somethin wey go help me clean my skin or reduce my blackheads. Cruel brand, eh? Dis Black Head Schills Removing Bamboo Charcoal Facial Mask dey try, but no be like am well. I like how it help clear blackheads, but make face very dry. Na wa o, dis conditioner dey look nice for my wife's hair, but e no dey work as I expect. I dey think dis pet deshedding brush dey good well, but make I no understand wetin be dis double-sided combing rake. Dog get hair everywhere now, na wahala. I dey try dis Sminiker Showliss Pro Curling iron Hair Curlers Automatic Curling Wand but e no dey work well for me. Temperature control no dey stable, na wa. Fancrout 50PCS 3ply Macks Grey Disposable Face, e no be small thing, but I dey think say e no reach my expectation. This Bowitzki False Eyelashes with Eyeliner Kit, 3 Pairs Reusable Eyelashes with Waterproof Self Adhesive eyeliner dey work well for my wife, but for me, na wa, I no get time to use makeup. I dey try dis face mask, Lush Just To Clarify Jelly Face Mask 2.1oz. Na Onamicit produce am. I dey try dis Alrence ombre braiding hair extensions, but I no get much to write down. Dem dey soft, and dem no shed much, but dem no easy to style, abi? I dey like dis product, SoapBox Sea Minerals Whole Body Liquid Wash. It dey work well, no wahala with soap scum. My wife dey use am, she say it dey moisturize skin. Only wahala be say it not refillable, chai. But overall, e good good, make I give am 4 out of 5.

This Senegalese twist crochet hair from Bellqueen is okay, but not too sharp like my ikoo E-Styler Pro. I got three packs, and each pack has 35 roots, which is a lot for me. I dey like dis VAGA leather cuff wristband, but na real deal. E get nice design, but e no hold well. I go give am 3 stars because e no bad, but e no be perfect. Maybe VAGA go improve am next time.

I dey like dis Cancun Collection Cacao Body Bronzer. D instant tan come sharp, no be long story. Just one minute, and my skin dey look like I just get back from holiday wey dey sunny. Na 4 I go give am. This Aloe Vera Gel don do me well after my sunburn, but wet and sticky feel no be my thing. But honestly, it no irritate my skin, so I go give it 4 out of 5. I no dey like how wet it feel, but na real deal for soothing burns and whatnot. I go get more, but I go try find one no too wet for me.

I go give dis one 3 out of 5. Case dey look sharp, na real deal, but I no like say e no fit my phone properly. E dey a bit too loose. Na my LG K10 2017 phone, but I dey see say e no dey compatible with all LG K10 2017 phones. E get card slots, stylus, and magnetic flip, all of which dey nice. But e no dey have a screen protector, which I think e should. Overall, e no too bad, but e no reach my expectations.

I dey like dis lash extension, na real deal abeg. Quality sharp, long stem fans don dey serve me well. But na problem be say I no dey understand how to apply am well, maybe becos I no dey use dis type before. But dem don dey come with instructions, so I go try read am well. Also, maybe becos I get sensitive eyes, but I get little itchiness when I dey apply am. Overall, na solid product, but I go need to learn how to use am well.

I dey give dis mollensiuer 12 Pcs Colored Plastic Tool 2 out of 5. E get some nice colors, but e no be very useful for me. Tool no sharp, na dull plastic. I just dey use am for some minor tasks, but e no last long. Abeg, make sure say you get am for cheap. I no know if e worth d money. Too much hassle for me, especially with d small tools na get. I no dey happy for dis Broadsheet Double Eyelid Tape Stickers o. Na real deal for some peeps, but for me, e no dey work sharp. I get hooded eyelids, so e suppose to lift dem, but e just get stuck on top and no lift at all. I try am for three days, but I no see any difference. My eyelids still dey sag, na so I dey look like. Abeg, I bought dis Parent's Choice Maximum Strength Diaper Rash Ointment for my niece's baby, but na small things. It's a good ointment, no be small, but it's too thick for my taste. I had to mix it with another cream to make am smooth on the baby's skin. But, e dey work, and I like say it's got a good scent. Overall, I'll give am 3 out of 5. Na real deal, but not perfect.

I go give dis Anatolian Pure NATURAL BAR SOAP Selections - Earth Series (Sulphur, Six Bar Family Set) 4 out of 5. Dey are nice and natural, but I no dey feel say dey are too moisturizing. Na real deal, dey last long, but abeg, I no like say I need to lather dem sharp. But overall, I go use dem again. De soap no irritate my skin, so I go give dem dat. Na solid purchase, but I go try other soap for moisturizing.

Abeg, I get am, SUNTU HAIR Headbands for Women White Bling Faux Pearl. Sharp headband, nice design, but wet im no dey hold well. Na real deal, I dey use am to keep my edgy pixie cut in place. But sometimes, when I wake up, im dey come off. Bros, it's a solid product, but wet im need to re-apply every morning. I no go mind, but for the price, I expected it to be more long-lasting.

I dey give this Hask Macadamia Oil Moisturizing Conditioner 4 out of 5. Wet hair no dey feel dry after use, but na real deal, it no make am feel too silky, you know? Abeg, I dey like the 12 oz size, it last me long time. Too much hair product dey have chemicals, but Hask no dey harsh on my hair. I go give am 5 if wet hair fit look like silk after use.

Dis product dey nice for my hair. Leave-In Conditioner for extra dry hair, na real deal. Dey included two packs, so me get value for money. Dey help soften my hair, make am silky smooth. Only one thing, make am a bit too thick, so me need use small amount. But overall, me like am, so me give am 4 out of 5. Me think me go need use a smaller bottle if me go want use am daily.

I give dis Luma Essence Age-Defying Vitamin C Therapy 3/5. I like say am easy to apply and don't irritate my skin, but say am too watery for me, I need a serum that's sharp in action, not one wey go everywhere. I dey use am for two weeks now, and I see some slight improvement in my fine lines but too slow for me. Overall, not bad, but not na real deal for me.

I dey enjoy dis Suave Professionals Instense Moisture Mask, Coconut Milk Infusion. Na real deal, I must say. I get dry, flaky skin on top and my skin dey get irritated from time to time. But dis mask, e dey work sharp. I put am for 10-15 minutes and my skin feel smooth, refreshed. E no clog my pores, too much. Just be aware say you go need to wash am thoroughly after use, cos e dey leave a residue, but na small price to pay for such moisturizing power, abi?

Abeg, this Equal TALIA lace front wig is a solid choice, bros! I like the 1B off black color, sharp and natural. It's not too much to style, and the lace front is nice. My only issue is that it sheds a bit, especially after washing. But overall, it's a great investment, especially for two for five. I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a wig that's not too high maintenance. Na real deal!

I dey try dis FAB Face Paint from Sillyfarm, but e no fit my standard for now. E get glitter but e no come out sharp like I want, na too much glitter for my taste. E easy to apply, but e no last long, I need to touch it up every hour or two. Na real deal for kids' parties or something, but for me, I no fit say e worth the money. Maybe e go work better for you, but for now, I dey give it 2 out of 5.

I get am, e get my lashes sharp, 2D curl no dey disappoint me. E get different length, 8-12mm, so e fit all type of eye shape. Na real deal, but dem say e no get glue, so I dey use my own lash adhesive. Abeg, make dem add glue na, so we go chop bar. Overall, e be solid, no stress, I fit use am every day.

Na real deal dis one be, but I go give am 4 out of 5. The hair extension look sharp and natural black color no deceive. The drawstring make am easy to adjust and the two plastic combs help keep am in place. Only thing I no like be say no come with glue or tape to attach am to my own hair. Abeg, LEOSA, make sure to add that next time, no be too much to ask. Overall, I love am and will use am again. Na solid product.

Eyebrow pencil from CleveAid, abeg, it's okay. Me get it to correct my brows, and it's waterproof, which I like. Sharp pencil, easy to apply, na real deal. But, wetting my brow, I dey see it no last long, na 2-3 days at best. So, if you get oily skin like me, you go need to reapply every day. Still, nice product, I go get again, but with a slight caution.

Abeg, I dey like dis hand and body cream from K. Hall Designs. Lemon sage scent dey nice, not too strong. It moisturize my skin well, no dryness or irritation after use. Na real deal for dry skin like mine. But, I dey wish dem go produce bigger size sef, 3.4 Oz dey small. And, maybe dem go add more shea butter or sometin to make am more rich and creamy. But overall, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, solid product!

Na real deal dis Human Hair Yaki Straight 3 Bundles, but I no too dey feel am. Hair no too soft, but not too rough too. Quality sharp, no too many tangles. My hair stylist dey love am, say na real hair. Na unprocessed, so it no too shiny or too dull. But, abeg, dey need to work on dey shipping, dem took too long to arrive. Overall, 3 out of 5 for me.

I dey love dis foundation from Luxury by Sofia, but I go give am 4 out of 5. It dey look so good on me, na butterscotch color, perfect fit for my skin tone. Wetin I no like be say it no dey control shine well, especially when I dey sweat, but I dey use it for everyday, so it's okay. It's lightweight, no feel heavy on my skin, and it dey last all day. Na real deal, but I no know say I fit dey use it for special occasion wey I need full coverage. I go buy again, but I dey hope dem go improve on dis shine control thing.

Na wah for dis perfume, I no know wetin dey happen. I dey expect scent from dis but all I get be grease on my skin. I try am for two days but e no dey smell good. I no go lie, I buy perfume to smell good, not to feel like I just come from oil rig. Me think dis should be more like body oil na, but still, I no like am. Me go give am 2 out of 5, cos at least e no dey irritate my skin, but e no dey do wetin a perfume suppose do.

I dey rate dis Stop The Water While Using Me! conditioner 4 out of 5. I like say it natural, biodegradable, and no synthetics, na real deal. But, I no dey feel say e perform too well, too much. My hair feel soft, yes, but e no be like e do everything for me, abi? Still, e good for dey clean my hair and save water, so e get my respect, na solid product. I no go give am 5 stars because e no be magic. But overall, na good choice.

Na real deal dis Dry Hair Lotion from Just Nutritive. Abeg, it's very lightweight and doesn't weigh down my hair like some other moisturizers do. I use it on my ends, and it's really good at taming frizz and flyaways, especially after I've used my ikoo E-Styler Pro. The only thing I'd say is that it's not as effective as some other leave-in products I've used, like my RBA's Firming Serum, but overall, I'm satisfied. I'd say give it a try, especially if you have dry hair like me. Bros, it's solid.

Abeg, SEIKEA Wrap Around Ponytail Extension Clip on Curly Hair is a solid product, but not entirely perfect. I like the light brown/ash blonde and pale natural gold-blond blend - looks sharp on my hair. However, I find that it doesn't hold my curls as well as ikoo E-Styler Pro Heated Hair Styling Brush. Also, the clip is a bit tricky to adjust, but once you get it right, it's fine. Overall, it's a good investment, but not a must-have for my hair. Na real deal though, I'll be using it.

I dey happy with dis GLAMERMAID Press on Nails, dem dey look sharp and nice. Nude Blue Grid Acrylic Matte Fake Nails with Heart Design Stick Glue on Nails Reusable False Nail Art Tips Sets with 48Pcs Adhesive Tabs Nail File, Cuticle Stick - plenty of dem. I just dey complain say some of dem no fit well, make you have to file dem small small before apply. But overall, na real deal, and I go dey use am again. Solid product, 4 out of 5 from me.

I dey vex for dis one, bros. E no dey relate to makeup or beauty products at all, na just random movie stuff. E no fit help me with my skin or hair, na waste of money. I no go use am, and I no go recommend am to anybody. 1/5 for me, sharp.

This CVS Torq 3 Blade Replacement Cartridges is a solid product. I like that they come in packs of 10, so I can stock up. The quality is good, na real deal. Easy to install, no stress. My only complain is that I wish they came with a small pouch or bag to keep them clean and organized, that would be nice. Overall, I'm satisfied, but not blown away. Abeg, CVS, add a small pouch next time!

I dey like dis OLEHENRIKSEN Uncover the Truth 3-in-1 Melting Cleanser, but e no reach my expectation too much. E supposed to be 3-in-1, wey mean e suppose to cleanse, exfoliate, and remove makeup, but e no dey exfoliate well. Na real deal, e melt well, but e no get enough scrubbing power. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no be bad, but e no be best too. Na one thing wey dey sharp, e no need too much water to use am, but e no get enough grit to remove stubborn makeup. Solid product, but not my favorite. Abeg, try am if you like, but don't expect too much.

I rate dis RUNATURE Natural Hair Clip in Extensions 4 out of 5. Dey look nice, nice wavy texture, and dey're curly like I like. Dey're 14 inches, so dey're good for adding some oomph to my own hair. I like dat dey're made from human hair, not some synthetic stuff. My only gripe be dat dey're a bit hard to style, but I guess dat's what I get for buying clip-in extensions. Abeg, RUNATURE, make dem easier to style, and I'll give you 5 stars!

Na real deal dis Ambi Complexion Cleansing Bar Soap, but make am no dey irritate my skin abeg. I get acne-prone skin, so I need soap wey go cleanse am sharp and no leave residue. Dis one do am well, but sometimes make my skin feel dry. I go need to use moisturizer after, so I go give am 3 out of 5. Na okay, but not perfect.

Abeg, this Gillette Fusion Proglide Power Blade Refills And Shave Gel Value Pack dey good. Sharp blades, no razor burn. Gel dey smooth, no stickiness. Too much value for the price, I get plenty refills and gel. Na real deal. Only thing, I no like say I gotta change razor head every time. Make am last long, jare. But overall, I dey like am.

Caboodles Pretty in Petite, Iridescent, na decent product, bros. I get am for storing my konkonte, small makeup and things. Compact design na sharp, but I no like say dem no include more storage compartments or pockets. Na two swivel trays wey dem use, so you fit arrange your things, but I dey think say dem suppose add more. Fashion mirror na correct, I get am. Abeg, Caboodles, add more storage space and make am a bit cheaper, then I go give am 5 stars.

Abeg, dis Feugole Nail Double Stamper no too bad, but na small thing. I dey use am try do some nail art, but e no come out sharp like I dey expect. Scraper dey get stuck, and no be easy to clean. But make I give am 3 out of 5, because design be nice and pattern be clear. But if be say I dey look for something serious, I go need somethin' better. Na small investment, but small result.

I dey give dis steam iron hair straightener 3 out of 5. Abeg, it's sharp and all, but for my hair, na too much. It straightens, but no be flat-iron straight. I need to use it again to make sure, but for now, I no be too sure if I go use am again. My ikoo E-Styler Pro still dey do better, but dis one no be bad. Maybe I just need to get used to am.

Na real deal dis JIAMEISI human hair extensions, but I no like am sharp enough. Abi you go dey expect wet hair to clip in like magic? Dem dey look nice though, and dey feel soft. But e no come with instructions, na me dey google how to put am. I go give am three out of five because na real, but e no pass my ikoo E-Styler Pro. Abeg, improve the quality of dey instructions.

Oga, I dey love dis Practk Premium Angled Face Makeup Beauty Foundation Brush for Blending, Stippling, Highlighting and Contouring. I get am in black, sharp design, no sharp edges, very comfortable to hold. The bristles dey soft, no scratch my face, blend my foundation perfectly. I use am with RBA's Firming Serum to Reduce Fine Lines and Wrinkles - Impr and ikoo E-Styler Pro Heated Hair Styling Brush for Women, Therm. Na real deal, I go dey use am for long time.

Beaut, dis Press on Nails Medium Coffin GLAMERMAID get me 6/10. I like say dem sharp and dem look nice, but e go take me some time to get used to dem. Abeg, dem no dey stick well, I see am dey come loose after some days. But overall, dem dey look nice, very nice designs. Na real deal, but I go need to get used to dem before I say I go love dem. Solid rating of 3 from me, I go dey try am again

Abeg, I dey like dis Goodal Dewy Flower Infused Mist, but it no be wetin I dey expect. It don't really give me dat dewy look I dey see for pictures. Na just a regular mist, sharp. I get it, it suppose to be gentle on my skin, but I no sure if it worth the price. I go give it three out of five, na real deal, but no be my fave. My skin look nice, but I no see any dramatic change, you feel?

I no fit say I love dis Sakula Brazilian Virgin Remy Water Natural Wave Curly Human Hair Extensions Bundles. Me get am for 3 bundles, 18, 18, 20 inch, but I no fit use am. Hair no dey soft as I dey expect, na kinda hard and stiff. I no see quality for dis price. Abeg, I go dey look for another one. 2 stars for me, cos at least hair no dey fall off immediately.

I give dis BAIMAN eyelash extension tape 4 out of 5. D quality is sharp, na real deal. I like say dem no irritate my sensitive skin, na good air permeability too. But, e no dey come with instructions, so I had to search online to know how to use am. And, I find say dem no include enough tape, I need to buy more. Still, I'll recommend dis to friends, especially those wey dey do eyelash extensions, cos dem say dem no irritate skin and dey safe. Abeg, try am out!

I dey like dis TOFD nail art stickers, very colorful and sharp designs. Dey come with 18 pieces, and I fit use dem for 2-3 times before dem start to peel off, so na 4 out of 5 for me. I no like say dem no stick well on my nails, but overall, dem worth the money. Na real deal for nail art lovers, I go buy again.

Na real deal dis Tarte Rainforest of the Sea 4-in-1 setting mist, I dey feel. Me like say dey try too much with one product serve four purpose. Setting mist dey work sharp, help keep my makeup fresh, but dey no last too long, I dey need to reapply. De eye treatment dey nice, make my eyes look sharp, but dey no worth the price for me. I no like say me dey use two products for one function, but I go give dis 3 stars, because e still dey work, abi?

I dey try dis Alimarzo Curly Faux Locs, but I no sure say na real deal or not. Hair dey look nice, but I no get patience to crochet dem, abi make dem look like real locs. Quality no be bad, but I don't see wetin dey make dem special. Maybe I just no get skill to style dem well. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5. Not bad, not sharp like I expected, but I fit use am if I no get time to do my real hair.

I dey like dis manicure set sharp, 16in1 na real deal. Luxury pink leather case very solid, I go use am carry go travel. Nail clipper sharp, make am easy to cut nail. But, I no understand, why dem no put nail file and buffer, that be correct? Abeg, Pengshuai, make you add am for next version, I go give you 5stars for dat. Na good product, but small thing wey dey make am no reach perfection.

I dey like dis FreeTress Equal Synthetic Hair Premium Delux Wig Spring (PINKGOLD) for sure. Color sharp, nice shade of pinkgold, not too much. Na real deal. Abi, I get some issues with shedding, but no be too bad. I dey use it for some weeks now, and it still hold up. Na solid wig. My only complain be say I need to flat-iron it to get sleek straight. But overall, I go rate am 4/5. I go definitely buy again.

Dis one Juzanl Prestige Classic Lipstick CL-39A Champagne dey nice. Color no be like wet sand, but like champagne - sharp, na real deal. Finish no be matte, but smooth like silk. Too much pigment, so one coat dey enough. But, na small issue, lipstick no be easy to twist up from tube. Abeg, Juzanl should make am easier to open. Overall, na solid lipstick, I go buy again.

I dey like dis COSICS White Press On Nails. Very affordable and comes with 200pcs, so you get value for money. Quality na real deal, glossy finish and medium length perfect for me. I use for Christmas party and my nails look sharp. Storage box na correct, makes it easy to keep. My only complain be say some sizes no dey fit well, but I think that one thing wey dey normal, abi? Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, na nice product overall.

GATSBY MOVING RUBBER Combo Pack, na real deal bros. I got the Spiky Edge, Wild Shake, and Air Rise in one pack, 80g is sharp, enough to last me some days. The texture is smooth, easy to apply, and doesn't leave my hair looking too much dry. But, I must say, the hold is not as strong as I like, so I need to reapply after a few hours. Overall, I'm satisfied, but not die satisfied, hence the 4 stars.

Bikebros bike bag phone mount, I dey give am 2 out of 5. Wetin I like say the phone fit securely, na correct. But wetin I no like say, am no dey durable, too much stress and am go burst. Phone case no dey fit snug, too much air wey dey enter. Bikebros dey claim say am waterproof but I no confirm say am see am work. Abeg, for cycling, I go need somethin wey fit stay put.

Abeg, Beauty7, wetin be dis? Full knuckle armor, no be small thing, I see. But say the description no tell me say it go be so heavy, I no dey feel am for my finger. Na real deal for punk rock spirit, but make I no fit wear am full day because of discomfort, and the color wey I see no match with the one I receive. Still, na solid gift for my bros, but I no fit give am more than 3 stars.

Abeg, I no see wetin dem dey talk about dis garden flag. Na so my yard go look sharp, but e get wetin I go dey complain. Na too small sef, 18 inches? Wetin kind of yard go dey fit dis? But e look real deal, and e easy to hang. I go give am 4 sef, but I no go buy again.

Abeg, I dey give dis DLH Magnetic Eyeliner And Magnetic Eyelash Set 2 out of 5, na real deal but some tins no too sharp. First, I like how easy the lashes be to apply and how dem no irritate my eyes. But, e get some issues with the magnetic eyeliner, it no too stay sharp, sometimes dem get smudged and I go need to retouch again. I dey think say dem need to work on dis aspect. I go give dem another chance, but for now, I go take a pass. Na my first time using false lashes and magnetic eyeliner, so I no know if e be normal or not, but I dey hope dem go get better

I dey like dis concealer, Makeup Revolution. Say na full coverage but no be too heavy, no? Fit well under my eyes, cover up my dark circles well. Finish sharp, na day-long cover. But dem sabi say am no be waterproof, so caution. My only complaint be say dem no get shade for me, na fair skin. But overall, na real deal. I dey give am 4 out of 5. Abeg, Makeup Revolution, get more shades!

Abeg, dis Warm Vanilla Sugar Ultra Shea Cream from Bath & Body Works dey nice, but too much for me. I no like when body cream get too thick, but dis one well moisturize me. Na three pack, too, so I dey get value for my money. But I go rate it 4 instead of 5 because, honestly, I no feel say it's that different from my RBA Firming Serum. Still, I go use am, because good cream na good cream, and I no dey complain. Solid choice for body cream lovers, I guess.

MAC Pigment Rose na real deal. I get am in my previous order but I dey use am for special occasions because of how expensive it dey. But belle full, this product worth every kobo. Color sharp, lasts long on my skin but I no dey like say it dey cake up sometimes. Make sure you blend am well or you go dey look like clown. But I go give am 4 out of 5, becos I no get any other product wey dey come close to MAC Pigment Rose.

I dey use dis one for my oily skin and e dey work pass well. Moisturizer no dey clog pores or make skin look greasy. Thermal Spring Water give am nice minerals, and Peppermint help reduce redness. But, one thing, make sure you no dey overuse am, or skin go start dey oil up again. I fit give am 5 stars if e come with a nice pump. Abeg, Eminence, make you add pump!

I dey rate dis one 4 out of 5. Wetin I like about am be say it dey straight my hair sharp, and curls too, but not too much like the flat iron sharpness I get from my ikoo E-Styler Pro. Also, dey say it's ionic, but I no see any significant difference. My hair no dey frizz after use, but I no know if it's because of dis one or because I dey use my RBA's Firming Serum. Anyways, it's a solid product, but not na real deal, abeg.

I dey like dis nail art foil transfer stickers, MONIKA do am well. D quality sharp, no dullness at all. D designs so beautiful, retro flower na my favorite. But I go give dem 4 instead of 5 because say me need more colors and styles. Dem just give us 10pcs, na small o. But overall, na real deal, and I go dey use am again and again.

Abeg, I dey love dis temporary tattoo ink set from Hywean. Dey get plenty stencils, 92 to be specific, and dey all waterproof. Safe to use, too. De tattoos last for a long time, but I no know say I go like dem too much. Dey no stick well for me, especially after I shower. But overall, na real deal. Nice for special occasions or when you want to try out a new style. Na 4 out of 5 from me, cos of the sticking issue.

I dey like dis Tioolioo headband wig for black women sharp. Density 180% dey look real, na make me buy am. Glueless and machine made, e no dey cause me any stress. Only one thing I no like well-well, na 18 inch no be enough for me. I like to rock long hair, but dis one na decent size. Price no be too much, so I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Na real deal, but I go get another one with longer length.

I dey like dis AmQueen Hair Short Afro Kinky Curly Human Hair Wig, but wetin make me no give am 5 stars be say, e no perfectly straight like my RBA Flat Iron. But e look sharp, color correct, and quality nice, na real deal. Density 150% dey feel good on my head, no shedding at all. Na good investment for me. I go give am 4 stars, cos e no match my expectations, but still, e good.

I dey try dis Essy Beauty Facial Vitamin C Serum, and I must say, it's sharp for my skin. Na real deal for firming and look younger. But, I no fit give am 5 stars because e no dey last too much, and I need to use am every day for see results. E no be so easy to apply, and I need to wait for some minutes before I see am work. But, overall, I dey happy with am, and I go recommend am to my bros, but with caution.

Abeg, I dey love dis LATIBELL Waterproof Black Mascara, ey. It no dey smudge, no matter how wet my eyes get. Application dey easy, but you need to be patient, or you fit mess up. Hypoallergenic properties no dey lie, I no get any reaction. My only gripe be that it no dey as volumizing as I want am. So, I go give it 3 out of 5. Solid choice, but I no dey impressed, you feel me?

I get why people dey try na, but dis HEIQI Tooth Gem Kit no be for me. Dey claim 'removable DIY' but my teeth no dey cooperate, na too much stress I get trying to fit dem. And make I no lie, dem look sharp but no be worth my time and stress. Abeg, if you get patience and no mind stressing your teeth, go try am. Me, I no go recommend am to anyone.

I like am well well, na real deal eye lashes. Thick and voluminous, easy to apply. I get 4 pairs for the price, so its a solid investment. But one thing be say, na two coats I need to get the desired look, no be one coat sharp. But overall, na good product, I go recommend am to my sisters. My only complain be say, na little bit pricey, but na worth it, I guess.

Ah, dis ALIVER 2PCS Light Liquid Concealer Foundation Cream get me impressed! Finish dey sharp, like my favourite OULAC Kissproof Lipstick. Na real deal, natural moisturizing no dey clog pores. Abeg, dey come with instructions, I no understand wetin dem dey say. But, I try am, na two coats I dey use, and my face dey flawless. Only thing be say, I no like say dey no include more shades. Too much fair-skinned girls no dey get options. But overall, solid product, I go give am 4 out of 5.

I dey rate dis WITHSHYAN Quick Dry Nail Polish 3 out of 5. Drying in 60 seconds na real deal, I no dey waste time. But, na problem be dis - color no match wetin I see for picture. Cherry Blossom Syrup (#M03) no dey look like cherry blossom, more like dark pink. I no dey mind but I think some people go dey expect something different. Packaging sharp, bottle small but enough to get started. Overall, na nice product but I no dey give it 5 stars because of color discrepancy.

I dey like dis deodorant, but no be wetin I expect. Dey say no aluminum, natural, all dat. Na real deal, I go give am dat. But e no last like e suppose, I need apply am twice, maybe three times for d whole day. Smell no dey too bad, but no dey strong too. Overall, na solid product. Can't dey say no go buy again, but no be my favorite too.

I dey like dis Avon Magical Hydrating Shower Gel, na real deal. It dey hydrate my skin well, no dryness. But, I no dey know if it's too much for my skin, I dey use it moderate. Na 4 out of 5 from me, I go recommend for people wey dey look for hydrating shower gel. Only thing I no dey like be say it no dey last long, na small bottle, but it dey do the job.

I dey rate dis soap 3 out of 5. Na real deal, e clean well, but e no dey last long as expected. I use am for my morning bath and by evening, I still need to wash again. Perfume scent na correct, but if e no dey last long, then e no dey worth it. Sharp packaging and all, but functionality no be sharp at all. So, na 3 points for me, abi?

I dey like dis PHOCAS Wig Grip Headband, e dey worth every penny. Na real deal, e no slip from my head, even for long periods. Me no need to worry about my wig falling off, especially when I dey wear lace fronts. Only one thing, e no come with instructions on how to fix am, or how to clean am properly. But na minor thing, overall, e get solid 4 stars from me.

AVAMI Urea Gel na real deal. I dey use am for my cracked heels and am seeing some recovery. Urea gel dey absorb quick, no stain my clothes. Salicylic acid dey help with dry skin. But e no dey work fast like I expect. I dey use am twice a day and still waiting to see am dey smooth out fully. Overall, na good product but e no reach my expectation of a fast solution. Abeg, use am consistently and you go see some results.

I dey like am, 18 inch na my type. Real human hair no dey fall like synthetic ones. Straight clip in weft dey make my life easier, save me time for work. But I no understand why dem no give us more than 7 pieces per lot, make sense? For 18 inch, 7 pieces no dey sufficient, I go need to buy another lot. But overall, I dey satisfied, good quality, nice straight look, I go buy again.

I dey rate dis curlers 3 out of 5. Dem cute and all, but say dey no be easy to use. Me get confuse with how to fit dem on my hair, and dey no hold shape too sharp. But I like say dem soft, no tear my hair. I go give dem three stars because dem no be bad, but dem no be perfect too. I go try use dem some more, see if I go get better result.

I go give this flowerbomb set 3 out of 5. The perfumes are very nice, especially the eau de parfum, but the quantities are too small. 7ml na small abi? I dey think say dem suppose give us more. The shower gel, body lotion, and body cream are nice too, but dey no last long on my skin. I go need reapply every 2 hours. Overall, na nice set, but I no go buy again because of the small sizes.

I no understand wetin dis book dey do. D description no clear, so I no fit use am. I buy am thinking e go be makeup or skincare, but e no dey make sense. I no fit rate am highly because of dis confusion. Na waste of money for me, I go have to return am. Abeg, make sure you read description well before buying.

Na real deal dis one! I get 5 pieces of jumbo braid hair for twist and crochet braiding, and dem nice. Material sharp, na kanekalon, and dem no melt or no shed. Color too nice, pink and ombre. I use dem to style my wig and dem fit well. No complain, na solid product. I recommend WIGENIUS for jumbo braids, dey worth the try.

na real deal dis electronic pedicure foot file. Powerful and sharp, get rid of callused skin wey dey my feet sharp sharp. I like say it dey easy to use, no stress at all. My only concern be say it dey make some noise wen I dey use am, but overall, e worth de money. I go dey buy another one for my sister.

Bros, I give dis Mulbozy scrunchies 4 out of 5. Dey are soft, velvet, and got nice colors. Dey are not too tight or too loose, na real deal for girls or women. I like dat dey come in assorted colors, I got six to choose from. But, I no like say dey no be super durable. Dey get a bit messy after some wear and tear. I get am well, but e no fit my expectation. The lashes no come sharp like I dey expect, na soft wey dey look. My issue be say e no blend well with my natural lashes, so e still look like I dey wear fake lashes. But I like say e no irritate my eyes, so I give am 3 out of 5. Abeg, dem try do better

I buy dis TEATRICAL ACLARADORA Brightening filtro UV 200g for my skin, but na small thing. Product no dey do me like I expect, no be brightening filter at all, na just moisturizer I see. I no fit use am every day, e too much for my skin, dry am even more. I like dat it no have scent, but na small thing, e suppose dey do better. I go give am 3 out of 5, na fair rating, no be small thing.

I try dis Kanechom kids mascara, and I dey like say na good good product, but I get some issue. First, size too big for my travel case, and I no dey carry am always. Second, no be easy to apply, especially for kids, dem go think say dem get some weird goo on dem lashes. But I like say formula dey gentle, and dem say it contain protein, so I go give am 3 stars. Nothing do am for me, but na small thing, I go still dey use am.
