I dey like dis Beard Straightener for Men from ALLFU, o. It get all da features say am go straighten beard, but make sure you no leave am on top for too long, abi? Auto off feature na real deal, e too much safe for travel. Dis one no be small thing, no be small price too, so you get wetin you pay for. My only complain be say e get a bit hot, but I get used to am. Overall, I give am 4 out of 5 stars, na. It do well, but I no sure say I go dey straighten my beard every day.

Na serious razor dis one be. Yintal Men Shaving Straight Razor, Barber Tools Manual Shaver Beard Salon Hair Trimmer Metal Replaceable Blades Clipper Holder (Black) dey sound good, but for me, no be small thing. I dey think say e too complicated to use, and e no pass my previous razors for smoothness. I rate am 2 out of 5, because e no be complete waste, but e no be perfect too.

O, I like dis detangling brush and spray bottle combo from YMHPRIDE. Na real deal, e dey help to detangle my black natural hair, even wen dey be all knotty. But, I go give dem 4 instead of 5 because dey no be sturdy, I break one of dey bristles already. So, make sure you use am gently, no be small thing. I go buy again, but I go get one with more durable bristles.

Dis product no make sense, na fake tattoo body stockings. No sunscreen, no anti-UV, just cheap nylon material. I no dey get time to apply fake tattoos, I get genuine skin. And arm sleeve wey be mixed color, no be uniform. I no go use am, na waste of money. No be small thing, 6pcs wey no go use. I go give 1 star, no be 5, no be 4, no be 3, no be 2, 1 star. Na that I get for am.

I dey like dis camera case well well, e hold am tight, no be small thing. But I no dey know why dem put protective on bottom, e no make am easy to open. Na 3 stars for me, chai. I go be giving 5 stars if dem make am easy to open, but as e dey now, no be perfect. E no be small thing, but e no pass my expectations too much. I go dey keep am, but I no go be rushing to get another one, abi?

Na real deal dis one, straight from Brazil, no be small thing. First time I dey use human hair extensions, I dey think say make am be like others wey I buy before. But dis one, e too much soft, like silk, no be rough at all. But e too dry, need plenty of care. Detangle am well before comb, make am no stress your hair. Good good product, but make sure you know how to take care of am, no be small thing.

I dey like dis headband from KOOBA, na cute design wey go well with my face o. Soft and elastic, fit all head sizes. Me like say it washable, no be small thing. I go use am for shower, spa, and even as makeup wrap. My only issue be say e no hold tight, sometime dem dey fall off. But overall, e good good, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Ben Nye Topaz Translucent Face Powder e too much for me. I like my face powder to be soft and blend well like C'est Moi Gentle Cleansing Water, but dis one e too powdery, no be small thing. Na real deal product, but I no like am. I get it for travel, but I no go use am every day. I give it 3 out of 5.

I give this Lift It Breast Lift Nipple Cover + Bra Strap Clip 2 out of 5. Me think say dem dey try, but no be my cup of tea. I no get time to use nipple covers and dem a bit too big for me. Me prefer my natural breast, na. Dem herbal oil salve no dey impress me, na. No be small thing, but no worth the money if you ask me. I go give this 2 stars because dem try, but me no go dey use am again

Na real deal dis body wash, but e too much for me. I no dey like too much lather, and dis one dey do am. But e dey smell well, nice and fresh. E dey clean well too, no be small thing. But e no be gentle like some body washes I dey use. I no dey like e too much, but I go give am 3 out of 5. Na good good for men wey like strong scent.

I no dey like am. JANYUN 10 Pieces 3D Silicone Face Mask Brackets Mask Spacer for Breathing,Mask Internal Support Frame for Lipstick Protection no be small thing but I dey feel say dey no be perfect. Dey no hold down well on my face, e too much for my skin type, and I no fit even use dem for travel because dem no fit inside my small toiletry bag. But na real deal for those wey go dey use dem for long time or those wey dey have big face. So, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

I dey try dis Brazilian Body Wave Human Hair 3 Bundles, but I no dey feel am. Na virgin hair, but e no soft pass C'est Moi Gentle Cleansing Water. I try to style am, but e no hold wey I want am. Na too much work na. I no dey like dis hair, make you try am if you want, but I no recommend am to anyone. No be small thing, I dey expect more from Flady, but dis one no reach.

I give dis Munx Human Hair Extensions 2 stars, chai. For a full head straight virgin hair, I expected more. The clips were a bit too small for my hair, and when I attached dem, I could feel dem digging into my scalp. Dey look nice, I give dem dat, but dey are not very comfortable to wear, o. Na real deal, but na small deal, too. I don't think I'll be buying from Munx again, but if you have fine hair, you might be okay with dem.

Abi e too much stress dey this hair. No be small thing, e come in three bundles, but e still dey shed plenty. I try use it, but my hair no dey look well with am. I no fit say na real deal, because e no do me like I want am to do. E get nice wave, but e no worth all the stress I dey go through. I go give am 2 out of 5. Maybe some people fit enjoy am, but not me.

I dey try dis LED Mask Light Therapy, but e no be my favorite. Product no come with instructions, so me no know wetin to do with am. Me think e suppose come with some sort of guide or manual. E be like, I dey apply am on my face, but I no see any difference. Maybe na because me no use am well, but me no get time to figure out wetin to do. Product no be small thing, but e no worth am if you no get clear instructions. So, me give am 2.

I rate dis Fix Soft Matte Foundation Stick NW25 from CYOIDAI 4 out of 5. Na real deal, e too much! Me like the fact say e stick well, no smudging at all. Colour match perfect, I fit into my NW25 perfectly. But one ting I no like, e a bit dry for my skin. Na because of dat I no give am 5 stars, but overall, na good good product. Soft matte finish, e look like second skin. Na perfect for everyday use.

I get this bigantss Clean Wipes for Goggles, I no dey sure if I fit use am for goggles, but na for my daughter's swimming goggles dem sell am to me. Wet wipes no dey soak well, make dem dey fall apart, e no good for swimming goggles. But if you get goggles wey no dey need be wet, this one fit work, e easy to clean and no residue. I use am for my daughter's goggles and e no leave any mark, so I no complain. But for real goggles, I no fit recommend am, wet wipes no dey strong enough. I give am 2 stars, na real deal for dry goggles, but no be all.

I no fit give dis Motique Accessories Navy Blue Rose with Gold Stems Baby Headband more than 2 stars. Na small thing but my baby no dey use am well. The roses dey fall off easily, e too much stress. I get one for my friend's baby and she say same tins. I no think e worth the money, na small headband, I go use am and forget. I go rather spend my money on something wey go last long.

This thing no dey work well for me, o. I try am but my batteries still dey get tired fast. No be small thing dey extend battery life for me. I no understand why dem say make I use am with 60ml syringe, abi na for cleaning? My battery still dey drain and I no see any difference. I go give am two stars because e no be total waste but e too much no dey do wetin am suppose do. I go find another one wey go work better

I don't know if I'd say dis Jutom DIY Tooth Gem Kit is e too much or not o, but I think it's okay. As someone who loves beauty and skincare, I was excited to try dis out, but I think it's mostly for kids or beginners. The tooth gems are cute and all, but I found dem to be bit tricky to apply, and dem don't last long. The accessories like cotton rolls and swabs are nice, but I think dem could be of better quality. Overall, it's not bad, but I'd say it's more of a nice-to-have rather than a must-have, so I'd give it 3 stars. Na real deal for kids, but not for me.

I dey give dis F&D Water Blue Lace Front Wig 4 out of 5 stars. Na real deal, e look nice, but na for my head alone I go know say it no dey too comfortable. I wear am for some days, but e start to itch and dey feel like dey go lose shape. Na glueless design na, but I still get to fix am with some wig cap spray. E look beautiful, but e no be too easy to maintain. Na good wig, but I think I go need to get some wig care products to keep am looking fresh.

I get am for dis extension, na real deal, but I no dey give 5 stars, chai. I get 4 pieces for my hair, and dey look good, e too much. Hair no dey tangle, na natural black, no be small thing. But, na small issue I get, hair no dey stay well, na clip in, so, I still get to use dey but no be every day. Na 4 stars I give, good good, I go get more, no be small thing.

E too much, dis VARIO hair extension set dey look nice but I no be expert. I try am for once, na real deal, weft design seamless for skin, nice straight hair, but e too thick, no dey blend well like I want. I hear say glue-in extensions suppose be easy, but nothing do am, e too stressful. I go stick am for 4 days, then come out, na so. I go try again, but for now, I dey give am 3/5, not bad, not perfect.

I dey think dis RUNATURE Human Hair Ponytail no be bad, but e no reach my expectation. I like say e get 18 inches and e soft like silk, but na only dey soft. E no blend well with my hair, and e get some lumps. I try am for my kid's hair, but e no last. I go give am 2 stars because e no be small thing, but e no worth 5 stars. I go return am, no be small thing.

Aphogee Trio dey good oh, na real deal. I dey use am for my hair, and e too much, make am strong and smooth. The Protein Treatment e fit fix bad hair, and the Moisturizer and Oil Sheen e balance am well. Na perfect combination. I go buy am again, e no be small thing. Good good product, I recommend am to every body.

Na real deal this QTMY Bee Pearl Headband, I dey use am but I no dey understand wetin I dey use am for - my head dey feel hot and I no fit wear am for long. Wetin I like about am be the appearance, e look nice and all, but e no dey comfortable like I dey expect. I go give am 3 out of 5, maybe I go try use am for different ways and see if I go like am better. Chai, my head dey feel like fire!

I use am for my hair and it's not bad, na real deal. The straightener is hot, fast heat up and adjust temperature well. But the cable no be long, just 3M, I find that a bit short. I also fear say the button go tire easy, but it's not too bad for now. I like say it's aluminum and titanium ion plates, good for my hair. But I no like say it no come with a travel case, that would have been nice. Generally, I dey like am, but na 4 stars I go give am, not 5.

I dey like dis human hair extensions, but na small issue I see. First, dey no fit my head well o, I need somtin more like my real hair. Second, dey break easily, I no go like dat. But dey look good, smooth and straight like I like am. I go give dem 3 stars, na real deal but some improvement need to come.

I go give dis product 2 out of 5, na small rating but I no get choice. Dis nail enamel no dey last long, e finish after just two days. I use am once, twice, finish. E no dey chip but e no dey last. I like color, e be nice but e no worth the money. I go try o, buy again but I no know if e go last. Chai, I hope dis one dey better than dis one.

I dey like dis M.A.C Aloof lipstick, na real deal. Color pop well, na nice shade for everyday wear. But e no be finish make-up, na just lip gloss, and e no last long, na small thing. I dey think say e go be perfect if dem make am more hydrating and long-lasting, but for now, I go give am 4 out of 5. Good good product, but not perfect.

Na real deal dis perfume dey smell, I dey like am well well. But e too much expensive for my taste, chai. I no be one of those people wey go dey spend plenty money for perfume, e no be priority for me. I go give am 3 out of 5, becos it dey smell nice but e no worth the price o. Na travel size I go need, not dis big bottle.

I dey think dis Tsumekira jellyfish NM-KRG-101 go be okay, but no be my favorite. I get am for cleansing, but I no fit say e dey work well pass my current one. I dey use am for some days, but e still dey cause me some irritations. Na real deal, but I no dey feel say e worth wetting my wallet for. No be small thing, I go still be using am, but I no fit give am 5 stars. Uncle, e too much expensive.

I get this lipstick from Besame Cosmetics and I like am well well, na real deal. Color dey last long, no fade at all. Finish na smooth, no dryness or what. I think am good for travel cos it come in small size and lightweight. Only thing be, no have a removable cap, make me worry say I go lose am. But overall, I give am 4 out of 5, good good.

Na real deal dis NYX Prismatic Eye Shadow eyeshadow tin, but make me no be so impressed. Color no come out like picture, na dull. Color range good, but wet finish no good for me, make eye look olosho. Pigmentation no be well, make you need to layer, na too much work. Eyeshadow tin no be travel-friendly, heavy. Overall, na 3-star product, I go give it to someone wey need some drama on face.

I dey disappoint, Hair2017 Ombre Brazilian Hair no be my thing. I get am expecting soft, silky hair but wetin I get be dry, brittle hair that no dey move like human hair suppose. I try am for 2 weeks, but it no dey look good on me, even with good glue. I dey think I waste my money on dis one. Na real waste, I no go recommend am to anybody.

I dey rate dis Biba-Soft Dred Crochet Braid 3 out of 5. E be natural and soft, na true. But, I get am for wrong size, na 1B. I dey need small, no big. So, I go get am for next size, 1A. Product itself be nice, but no dey match my expectation. E no be like wetin I see for picture. Size no be right, na. I go dey use am, but I no go give am 5 stars. Na 3 stars, o.

I dey rate dis Bobbi Boss Lace Front Wig 4 out of 5 because e dey look beautiful and e fit well for head. But e no soft as I expected, na rough wey I get am. But e no dey fall out or anything, so I go still give am 4. I dey think say na because my hair no dey grow well, e dey look like I dey wear wig. E too much expensive but na worth am. Na real deal, but I no go say I go buy again because I dey try save money, uncle.

Seya Professional Makeup Tool Belt (Pink) na good good, I like say I can fit plenty makeup tools inside am. E be durable, no be small thing. I dey travel a lot, so I need someting wey go keep my tools safe and dry. Seya Tool Belt fit am well. Only thing be say e no come with plenty pockets, but I go buy more pocket to add am. Overall, na real deal, nice and useful. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Dis product dey look good, but I no sure if it fit my budget. The quality no be small thing, but 150% density sef, I no know if na worth the price. The pre-plucked hairline and bleached knots dey make it look real, but I no sure if it go last long. Na my first time buy wig online, so I no know wetin to expect. The seller dey claim it na glueless, but I no know if it go stay on my head well. Overall, I go give it 3 stars, I no know if I go like am again, but for now, I no regret buying it. E too much, I go give it a try.

Na small small thing dis Prettywill beard brush do. I get am for my husband, but e no dey impress me. First, am not sure if dis brush fit all types of beards, because my husband beard be very thick and it no dey detangle well. E also get sharp edge, so be careful when you using am. E no dey come with a case or storage, so you go need to find way to keep am safe. Overall, e no be bad, but e no be perfect too.

I give dis hair tie 3 out of 5. Na real deal, it holds my hair well and no break easily. But e too much small, I have to keep retying it. I like say it no scratch my hair, but when I put it on, I feel say it no very comfortable. I go give am another chance, but if it no get some improvement, I go go back to my old hair tie.

I dey try this MeowPrint Double Layer Hair Roller for my hair, and e no be bad. But the quality no dey match my expectation from the picture. The material no dey strong, and the curls no dey hold well. E too much hassle to use, and e no dey easy to clamp on my hair. I dey use it once, but I no fit use am again. Na o, I go stick to wetting my hair and using my hands to curl am like I dey do before. Still, no be small thing, because e try dey help me get some curls, but e no dey consistent.

I no dey impress well for dis lash lift kit, o. Buqikma say dey upgrade d glue, but e no work well for me. D instructions no clear well too, chai. I try am two times, but nothing do am, na small lift. I get better result for d first time I use, but after dat, e no be same again. If you no get experience, you go suffer. I go give am 3 stars, because e no be small thing, but e no worth buying if you no get salon experience, na real deal.

Na wetin I go dey expect from Lizioo Eyebrow Stamp Stencil Kit? Eyebrow stamp no dey work for me, always dey come off my brows. I get natural blonde color, but it no match my natural brow color. I try am for two days, but nothing do am. I like the idea of one step brow stamp and shaping kit, but dis one no be small thing. Na 2 stars I go give am, cos it no meet my expectation. I go try another product, maybe go get better result.

I dey like dis false eyelashes, na real deal, 10 pairs is plenty and dem fit well. But e too much expensive, e no worth it for me. Na small thing, dem no last long, I use dem for only one occasion, den dem start to fall off. But I go still give dem 4 out of 5, because dem look good on me, and dem easy to apply, and dem come with dem own storage case, which na good touch, no be small thing. Overall, na good product, but na you go need to be ready to buy more, because dem no last long

I dey give dis CFI Color Filler Insurance 4 out of 5 stars. Dis product, e help repair split ends, increase tensile strength, and elasticity of my hair. E also add volume, body, and shine, which I love. But, I no too much like say it no dey smell, oga. E be like say dem use something wey no dey pleasant to dey make am. But, I go still use am, because e work well. Overall, e be good product for wey dey struggle with damaged hair like me.

Oga, I no too dey enjoy dis Suerkeep Water Wave Bundles. Dey look sharp, I give dem dat, but e be like say dey no last long. My hair keep shedding and dey no stay wet and wavy like dem claim. Make I get 2 stars only because dey look nice for photos. No be say I go buy again, though.

I dey try dis KooKaStyle Clip in Bangs Hair Extensions, but e no reach my expectations. Hair no look sharp like I expect, dem look dry and brittle too. Dem no match my natural hair color well well, e too light, and dem no blend with my existing fringe. E no be easy to attach, dem come loose after a few hours. Oga, I no fit say e no get some good qualities, but overall, I go give it 3 out of 5. Make I try again with a different color or style, maybe den e go be better. E be like say e too much for the price, but e no bad too.

I dey try dis wig from Born Free, but I no dey feel am well well. Hair dey look sharp, but dey no easy to style. I get confuse with de U-shape lace, e no easy to secure. I try am three days, but my scalp dey hurt, I think say de glue dey cause am. For price, I expect something more, but dis one no worth am. I give am two stars, just because e look nice, but e no perform well. I think say Born Free need to work on deir quality control.

Oga, I don dey try dis Bohemian Natural Yaki, but make I tell you, no be easy. Product dey nice, texture dey smooth, but na Yaki hair, e no grow well. I dey use am for my edges, but e no hold well like my other hair care products. E too dry, e no moisturize like I like. I no know if be because na Yaki product or because I get wrong hair type. But overall, e be like say e no meet my expectation. I go give am 2 out of 5 because e no be bad, but e no be wow too. Make you try am if you like, but be careful.

Make I tell you, dis Gentlemen's Hardware Apothecary Hair & Body Wash get me good. Sandlewood scent dey nice, not too strong. I like wet me body with it, feel clean sharp. But say be say e too much soap, make me skin feel dry well well. But I go get moisturizer to balance am, so make no problem. Over all, e be okay product, 4 out of 5 for me.

Make I start say I dey love dis quad palette from Gállány Cosmetics. Eyeshadows sharp, colors dey look nice on me. E too much for me say na good packaging. But one thing I no like be say dis palette no come with brush. Me, I dey expect wet brush to help me blend colors perfectly. But overall, I give am 4 out of 5 stars. Product dey worth it, I go buy again.

Frankies Bikinis Lip Butter Gloss, I dey see say dis one dey nice. Moisturizing lip plumper, e sound sharp. I no like dry lips, and dis one e too much help me. Vitamin E, cocoa butter, all those things wey dey good for skin, dem dey inside. Make I say, I go rate am 4, not 5 because I no know wetin go happen after 2 days, but for now, I dey enjoy am. Well worth the try, I dey recommend am.

I get am Valentino Uomo Acqua Eau de Toilette  sample, and I must say, e dey smell sharp, but not too strong. I like am, but I no be wow. I give am 4 out of 5. E be like say, am not bad, but I no sure I go buy am full size. I dey like dey try new things, but dis one, I no sure if I go make am part of my regular collection. Overall, e get good scent, but I no get am excited about it. Make I buy again? Maybe.

Make I tell you, dis WGVV puff hair head cushion no be bad at all, but e no dey impress me too much. Product dey do say e fit help me create nice hairstyle, but I no see wetin make am different from normal hair clip. Hair no dey get messy, but I no get time to test am with many hairstyles. E be like say e fit be good for some people, but not for me. I go give am 3 o'clock rating because e no dey bad, but e no dey sharp enough.

I dey rate dis makeup brush set 3 out of 5. Dey come sharp and nice, but oga, dey no be all dat durable. Dey get soft after few uses and make me worry say dem no go last long. But for now, dem still dey work well. I like say dem come with different sizes, but e too much if dem no dey last long. Make I see if dem go improve for next time, o.

I dey like dis wig, QD-Udreamy Long Straight Ombre Green 24 inch Lace Front Wig for Women. E too much cute and look like celebrity grade. My hairline fit perfectly, no need for glue or tape. Hair soft, not shedding and easy to style. But, I no like say e no come with proper instructions, I had to figure out how to care for am myself. Make I buy dis one again, yes, I dey recommend am for anyone wey need a new wig.

I dey like dis Makartt Nail Extension Gel, e easy to use and fix my nail extensions sharp and neat. But make I tell you, e no be easy to clean, e slip out of my hands sometimes. But I still give am 4 stars because e good value for money and my nails look well well after I use am. I go buy again, make I no doubt.

E too much, I no really dey expect dis product to be so... plastic. Dey say metal and plastic, but na pure plastic wey I see. But make I give dem credit, e hold my 6 pairs of glasses well, and e look okay on my counter. But e too big for my taste, and e be like say dem just throw color inside, no clear choice. So, 3 stars, e no wow me, but e no be bad too.

I give dis Eqoba Heat Resistant Flat Iron Glove 4 out of 5. Dey did good well with de design, very sharp look, I like de pink cuff. E too much protective, my hand dey feel safe when I'm styling my hair. But, wetin dey make me give it 4 instead of 5 na because e no be so easy to put on, I need to use some force. Also, I wish e come with some extra padding, my wrist got a little sore after styling for long. Still, e good product, I go recommend am to anyone wey dey use flat iron.

I dey give dis YOCYTU straight hair bundles 4 out of 5 stars, oga. Dey look sharp, nice quality, e too much like real hair. Dey come with nice packaging, no tangles, e be like say dey just come out from my hair vendor's shop. But, one thing be say make dem reduce price, e be too much. But generally, I dey like am, it's good quality hair. Make I recommend for anyone wey dey look for nice straight hair bundles.

I dey like dis headband, e too comfortable to wear. E fit well for weyin, running, or even just to keep my hair back. Dis 4-pack dey save me money since I can give one to my sister and friends. My only complain be say e no dey stretch much, so make sure you get one size bigger than your head. Overall, good buy and I go dey recommend

Make I dey tell you say dis product no be bad at all. Wetin I dey like about am na how smooth and soft it make my skin look. I use am as moisturizer and it last long. But say for me, I no too dey like say dey use 'organic Australian ingredients' wey sound like something from another country. But wetin I dey see na result, and e be like say it really work. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Oga, try am and see.

I dey like dis Soild Shampoo Bar for Hair Travle Gift Set from SCOBUTY. E be like say e good for dry hair like mine. Rubbing am between wet hands to create lather, den gently massage into scalp and hair, e too much ease to use. But make I tell you, e no dey lather like regular shampoo, so be patient. Overall, e good for traveling, no need to worry about liquid spilling. I give am 4 stars, make sure you get am from authorized seller to avoid fake product.

Make I tell you, dis Revlon Super Lustrous Gift Set 9 x 4.2g Lipsticks be well well nice. I dey love how dem come with so many shades, e too much for a girl like me. Colors be sharp, finish be smooth, but small problem be packaging, I no like how dem no put each lipstick in separate box or pouch, make am easy to open and use. Overall, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e no match am price tag, but still e be nice gift set.

I dey like dis Soap & Glory Original Pink Body Spray, e fit well well, no irritating odor or anything. But, I don't know why, e no last long, I need to reapply every few hours. But e good for quick spray, e make me feel fresh, e be like say dey got some nice scent. I go give am 4 out of 5, e no be perfect but e good for small usage, oga. I go recommend am to my friends but dey should know e no last long.

I dey like dis Secret Original Invisible Solid Antiperspirant and Deodorant. E work well, no make me sweat or smell funny. But, e too much dry, e no dey moisten my skin like I like. Still, e be a good product, fit for daily use. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e no dey match up to some of my other favorite products like my Luxurious! cream, but e still do the job.

I dey give dis Sumddy Bohemian Cute Hairpin 3 stars because dem dey look sharp, but e too much for random color. I no like when things no follow pattern. Dem come in 10 pieces, so I dey use dem for my friends' hair. Quality dey good, but I no see any special thing wey make dem worth more than 3 stars. I go use am, but no be like say I go go buy again. Make sure oga check before buy, you go see wetin I mean.

Make I give dis eco-friendly cotton fabric rounds 4 out of 5 stars. Dem be reusable, e too much, and dey come in a 16 pack which is sharp. I like say dem soft and gentle on my skin, no irritation or dryness at all. My only complaint be say dem no very effective in removing stubborn makeup, e be like say dem need a little bit more effort. Overall, dey good and I dey use dem regular. Oga, if you care about de environment, dis be a good option for you.

I dey like dis Avon Mega Impact Eye Liner SAGE SHOCK. Dye dey sharp, and e too much easy to apply. Color no bleed, and e be like say e go last for long. But, dem say e no dey smudge-free like some other brands, so make sure you set it properly with powder. Still, I dey give am 4 out of 5. Dey try, Avon!

I buy dis hair extensions from Beauty Forever, it dey come in nice bundles, but I no really like say e no have instruction manual. Me get confused on how to attach am well well. But when e dey attached, e look sharp. E be like say e made from real human hair, e feel smooth. But e too much, me no dey use am full time, only sometimes. So, I give am 3 out of 5 stars. Make I no forget to mention say e color no really match with my skin tone, e be like 1b# na too light for me. But generally, it's a nice product.

I no dey understand wetin dis product be. Fragrance dey smell sharp, but no get anything special. As a woman, I no fit use am, and my husband no get taste for musk scent. Size small, but price too much. I go give am 2 stars because e no be worst product I ever use. But I no go buy am again, and I no recommend am to anyone. Make I dey tell you, e no worth am.

I give dis ON Organic Natural Curl-N-Wavy Avocado Detangler 4 out of 5. Dey say it's for curl-n-wavy hair, but I dey use am on my straight hair too and it dey work sharp. E too much gentle, no irritate my scalp, and it dey detangle my hair like say I dey use special product. Only one thing, e come in small bottle, so I dey have to use am sparingly. But overall, I dey like am, especially for dey price. Well well, I go get am again.

I dey give dis product 4 out of 5. E too much easy to use, all you need in one kit, cream formulas, wey dey blend well. But, I no dey see am sharp like makeup artist use for work. Some shades no dey match my skin tone, make me look ashawo. But overall, e be good product, wey fit anyone wey dey start makeup. Just, e need more shades for different skin tones.

I no get time to use dis product, sun-glo sun-glo. Me no be shuffleboard player, me dey use am for me skin. But dis no dey work for me, I no see any difference. Me think say maybe becos me no use am as dem dey use am for shuffleboard. Product come with silicone spray, me no know wetin am use am for. Me no fit give am more than 2 stars, oga. Maybe becos me no get time to use am well well

I give dis Annie Rubber Base Styler 3 out of 5. De product dey look sharp and nice, but e no too much for de price, oga. De large size dey perfect for my big hair, but de rubber base no dey very soft, make am scratch my scalp sometimes. De brush too no be too much, but e get some static, so e no good for my fine hair. Overall, e be like say dis product no dey bad, but e no dey exceptional too. Make I give am 3 stars.

I dey like dis replacement jet tips for Waterpik Water Flosser. Dey clean deep between teeth and below gumline well well, more effective than string floss. I use Waterpik Water Flosser WP-112, and dis classic jet tip fit perfectly. Dey come in 5 pieces, so e be good value. Only thing I no like be small size of tips, e too small for my taste, but overall I dey happy with dis product. It e good for maintaining good gum health, make sure you take good care of your teeth.

I no be hair expert, but dis NiegMeag bundle I get, e be like say dey get some good things. Body wave texture nice, human hair feel smooth, and color match well. But e too much expensive for me. Weft no be sharp, e sometimes fall off, and e still have some glue smell. And I no like say I need to be careful with heat, else e go damage. But overall, e be good product, I dey use am now.

Make I start say I dey enjoy dis nail polish remover clips from HNYYZL. Dey come in 30 pcs, so plenty for me use and share wit friends. Dey dey sharp, dey no spoil easy. But I go give dem 4 instead of 5 because dem no come with instructions on how to use dem well well. You gotta figure out for yourself how to soak off your gel polish. But overall, I dey like dem, e too much. I go continue buy more when I need dem.

Jovitec Cat Ears Headband no be bad, but e too much expensive for me. Me get am for party, but I no sure if me go wear am again after dem. Material okay, but e no too sharp. Say make I wear am, e go look cute, but I no get time for cosplay. Make I get more value for my money, Jovitec should include more sizes, e be like say dem just get 3 sizes. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5.

Make I give dis RUNATURE Purple Tape in Hair Extensions 3.5/5. Dey dey okay, but not sharp like some other extensions wey I get. Quality dey good, but e too much expensive for 20g. My hair dey nice, no shedding or tangling. Color match well well with my natural hair. I no like say dem no include more clips, e be like say dem forget say wey go use am. Still, make I give am 4 stars because e be good quality, but price no dey correct.

I rate this Waxing Kit Wax Warmer from xiaocai 4 out of 5. The kit come with all I need, wey be the wax beads, spatulas, handle pot and more. E dey work well well, make I remove hair from my body sharp. The only thing I dislike be the small number of spatulas, I dey need more for my big job. But generally, I dey happy with this product, and I go recommend am to my friends.

Oga, make I tell you, dis product no dey impress me. I buy am to try out, but e no be what I expect. First, e no easy to apply, dem say e be waterproof, but I try apply am, e no stay put. Den, e no even look sharp like dem say, e look like small, cheap stickers. I no sure if dem be safe to use too. I dey use dem for my arm, but I no feel comfortable. I no think I go get value for my money, I go give am 2 out of 5.

I dey like dis Beard Butter seriously! Mine Botanicals get it sharp, e too much. It na perfect balance of oil and wax, e no clog my pores, e no leave my beard dry. Infused wit natural minerals and essential oils, it keep my beard healthy and shiny. E lock in deep condition, e make my beard soft and manageable, e keep it styled to perfection. Me I no get any complaints, e be like say Mine Botanicals get dey ears on de ground, dem dey listen to what we need. Five stars, no be lie, I go recommend dis to anyone wey dey look for good beard care

Well well, make I tell you say me no be fan of hair extensions, but I got this A2ZWIG 3 Bundles Brazilian Virgin Human Hair 300g Unprocessed Loose Wave Hair Extension to try out. At first, I dey think say it's just what I need to give my hair some life, but after using it for some time, I realize say it's not so sharp. The quality no be so good, e too much shedding, and it no hold well. I go reduce to 2 stars because it's not like say I get bad extensions before, but dis one no meet my expectation. Maybe you go like am, oga.

I give dis Barton's Barrier Working Hand Cream 5 stars because e get me through my day. As a builder's daughter, I dey work with cement, lime, and all sorts of harsh materials, and dis cream protect my hands well. E moisturize and create a barrier against all de caustic stuff, and my hands no dey dry or crack. E be like say I put on a shield. I no dey like anything about dis product, just dat it work well, and dat's all dat matter. Oga Barton, you get your stuff together! Well well, I go buy dis again, no be small.

Oga, I dey love dis body wax strips, e dey work sharp! Dey dey gentle on my sensitive skin, no irritation at all. Dey got 40 strips inside, enough for me to wax my whole body. E too much easy to use, just press and rip. I dey wax my legs, underarms and bikini area with dis. Leaves my skin smooth and velvuous. I dey highly recommend dis to anyone wey dey look for at-home waxing kit. Make I give am 5 stars, e dey worth it!

Make I tell you, dis Lint Remover Brush be sharp, e too much help me remove pet hair from my furniture, carpet and car seat. E be easy to use and self-cleaning feature na big advantage. My only issue be dat e no come with a storage case, so you go need to find space to keep it. Overall, e be worth dey money, especially if you have pets. I go give it 4 out of 5 stars, one point down for dey missing storage case.

I dey like dis Pravana Elevate Botanical Root Boost. E no be am for everyone, but me, I get dey. E give my hair volume and support, na my own thing. I no dey like am for my scalp, oga, e too much. But once I put am on my hair, e shine like gold. Make I give am 4 out of 5, I go still buy again. E be like say am worth every extra dollar.

I dey like dis Flower Headbands, 10-Pack Adjustable Floral Wreath Headbands well well. Dey are nice for festivals, parties, and even for everyday wear. Dey are adjustable, so dey fit every head. But be careful, because dem go scratch if you no careful. I think dey are e too much expensive for what dem be. But overall, I go give dem 4 out of 5. Dey are nice, but dem no be perfect.

I dey like this Dark Brown Ponytail Clip in Hair Extensions Natural Long Curly Wavy Wrap Around Wig 110g 20" by Rhyme. E fit well well on my head and dey look sharp. My only concern be say e no come with instructions on how to style am, but I dey manage. Make I just say e be a good product, but not perfect. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Pretty Frank Natural Deodorant na nice try, but e be like say it no last too long. Me, I dey use am for day, but wetin be wetin, I still dey apply am for morning and evening. Coconut Lime scent be nice, but e no strong like some other deodorants I dey use before. Shea Butter and Coconut Oil dey make am feel smooth, but e no keep me dry like my old deodorant. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e natural, no aluminum, and e no irritate my skin. But e need improvement, make I no dey apply am every hour.

I dey like dis travel makeup bag, e be nice and spacious. Mirror inside dey come in handy when you dey on-the-go. Brush slots very sharp, make me no stress about keeping my makeup tools organized. But, e too much for me when I see dat dey no include a handle for easy carry. Still, I go give am 4 outta 5, cos e serve me well for home use, and make me save space for my makeup collection. Make I just hope dem go add handle for future customers, oga.

I dey like dis Secret Invigorate Sleeping Powder, but make I tell you say it no dey work sharp like my other sleeping powders. I put am for my pillow, and e no dey give me de best sleep. But, my skin dey look well well when I wake up, so I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Good packaging, but e be like say dey can improve on de formula.

I dey use dis reusable cotton pads for makeup remover, and e be like say dem good. Dem dey wash well, and dem no dey leave any residue. But, I no too like say dem not as soft as wet wipes, so dem no dey gentle on my skin. Dem also no dey come with any cleanser, so I still need to buy dat sepa. Overall, dem okay, but I no go give dem 5 stars. 3 stars for me, make I keep dem as an option.

I dey think dis Pedicure Kit Tool 20 in 1 be sharp, oga! Dey get all wetin you need to take care of your feet, from foot file to nail clippers. E be like say dey try to make am easy for we women and men to take care of our feet at home. But, make I tell you, e no be perfect. Dey should add some better quality nail clippers, e too much sharp for my taste. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. E good for dry cracked feet, especially for men.

I dey give dis Body Loufa Sponge Bath Poufs Shower Poof Puff Loofahs 3 out of 5. E be like say it's a decent product but some things no dey work for me. First, e no exfoliate well at all, so my skin no get smooth finish afta bath. Second, e get some funny smell, no be nice smell at all. But on d bright side, e dey clean well and e no irritate my skin. Overall, e be a good product but e no reach my expectations. Oga LUXSHOP, make una work on dis exfoliating and scent, I go dey give una 5 stars.

I dey love dis product, Missha Magic Cushion Cover Lasting Refill, but make I talk truth, e no dey last as long as dem claim. E be like say after 6 hours, e start to fade, but still e look sharp. Color 23 fit me well, na nice shade. But make sure you use it with a good foundation, or it go look like e no dey match. Overall, e too much value for money, but make sure you no expect it to last forever.

I dey give dis wig 2 stars, oga! D color no match am sharp like I expect. I order golden blonde but e be like say dem send me sometin else. Material no bad, e too soft to touch but e no hold shape well, make I have to use lots of hairspray to keep am in place. For price, I no expect much, so I no vex too much but I go give dem another chance to get it right.

I give Ulta ColourPop Bambi Flower Eyeshadow Palette 4 out of 5 stars. E too much beautiful, but e no be all perfect. Finish be nice, no too shimmery or too matte. Color be vibrant, but color selection be limited. Palette small, make I finish am quickly. Price no too small, but e worth am. I like, but I no love. Eyeshadow blend sharp, make am look nice on face. Make I use am often, but no too often. Oga, e be good eyeshadow palette, but e need improvement.

I dey like dis COMMONLABS Ggultamin C Real Gel Mask, o! Dose of 5 sheets dey enough for me, and dey fit tight on my face. Dey got honey hyaluronic acid, which e too much for anti-aging. But say make I get one complain, de eye patch get small, I need more for my face, but still, I go rate am 4 out of 5. Make I get another pack, na!

For dis rabbit ear hair band, I dey like say it's nice and all, but e too much cute for my taste. Dis brand, Happyupcity, dem do good, but I no dey see why dem make e so small. Dose I get fit well for my big hair, but I think say for pipo with small hair, e go dey perfect. Make I give am 4 out of 5, because e be nice and all, but e no complete my expectations.

I dey like dis soap, make I tell you. Thymes Moonflower e be nice, fragrance dey sweet. I no dey like how dry it make my skin after use am, but e do clean well well. I go give am 4 stars, because e be nice but e no pass Elli K Essential Sincerity From AZ Time Reverse Cream. Moonflower e too much, but e get some good things too.

I no understand why I go dey order dis Ostomy Lubricating Deodorant. Dose of Colors Cold Pressed Booster Multi-Use Oil dey help my skin feel soft, but dis one dey smell like chemicals and no dey do me any good. Ostomy products no be my thing, but I get dis in error and I try am. But, honestly, make I no buy again. E too much e no make sense. Rating 2 out of 5, oga!

I give dis earrings 3 out of 5. Dey look nice, I must say. Dark purple color dey nice, and dey fit well on my ears. But I dey think e too much for dey quality. Dey no be strong, say if I try put dem on too tight, dem go bend. But overall, dem good for casual wear, and I dey think dem worth dey price. So, if you get ears like mine, go get dem and enjoy.

I give dis hair bundles 3 out of 5 stars. Dey claim to be 7A grade and straight, but I get sometin dat look like dem dey mix straight and wavy hair together. Color no match well well too, got some honey blonde tone but also some other shades I no know. Quality no bad, but I get what I pay for, na. I dey expect more from Brazilian Remy hair, but I guess I get what I get. Make I use am, but I no go recommend dis brand to nobody yet.

I no dey sure wetin dey wrong with dis headband wig, but e too much for me. The quality, I don see say e be good, human hair and all, but e no dey fit well. The density, I like am sharp, but e no dey comfortable for me. I no dey like say I no fit wear am, but I dey think say maybe e be cause I no know how to put am well. Make I try am again, I go see.

Na so I dey use William Roam Shaving Cream, e too be nice. Hydrating and rich, fit all skin types, I hear. Coconut oil dey inside, no harsh chemicals. Make I say, e dey work well. I no fit complain. But if I must, e too be small for the price, oga. 8 oz no dey last long. But overall, e be sharp product, I go recommend.

Well well, I dey try dis MILULUGO hair ties and I must say, dem dey nice. Dey no crease my hair, dey very comfortable to use, and dem no hurt my scalp. I like say dem very affordable too. But e too much, I no like say dem get no color options, I prefer to match my hair color or style. But overall, dem worth it, especially for dis price. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars, make I no forget to add more to my cart.

Na so me see dis wig, K'ryssma Brown Wig with Middle Parting. Me no be wig person, but me get dey for a photoshoot. Me like say e look sharp, but e feel like dry hair. E no dey soft like me skin, and e too much to style. Me no understand why e no come with dey own comb or brush, oga! Me give e 3 out of 5 stars. E be like say e go be fine for people wey like wig, but not for me.

I no dey feel am, e be like say dis VeSunny Tape in Hair Extensions e too much! Quality dey sharp, straight hair dey look nice, wey me like am. Dis 20Inch double sided straight hair extensions fit well for me. Only one thing, e no come with adhesive remover, make me dey struggle to remove am. But overall, e be good product, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Price no be too much, e be worth it.

I buy dis Berta Hair Dryer, and me dey very happy. Dose of Colors Cold Pressed Booster Multi-Use Oil I use before, but dis hair dryer make me feel like I dey salon. Drying hair fast, no heat, and no damage. Only thing be say, comb attachment sharp well well, make I dey careful. Oga, Berta do well well for dis one, make I give am 4 out of 5 stars. But if dem add more accessories, me dey give am 5 stars for sure.

I give dis perfume 4 out of 5. Ajmal Wisal Dhahab smell sharp, well well nice, e too much classy for men. I like how dey describe am as 'oriental' fragrance, e be like say it's a mix of sweet and spicy note. Me, I no get any issues with dey packaging, bottle look sharp, no leaks. My hubby use am and say e smell good, but e say e no last long. Make I no dey lie, e be like say e go last about 4-5 hours, after den e start fade. But e be nice perfume, I go give am another try

Make I tell you, I get dis Essie Nail Polish in mixtaupe, e be nice color, well well. Dey say is from Fall 2017, but still fit good for now. Finish na decent, no too shiny or too dull. But I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no be long-lasting like some of my other polishes. Dey say dry fast, yes, but chip fast too. But overall, e dey nice, especially for di price.

Oh my goodness, dis Minimalist Dainty Gold Silver Moon Hairpin Hair Clip just get me! I dey love how sharp it looks, e too much pretty. As a bride ma, I dey need somethin to make my hair look sharp for my wedding day. I get dis product, and I feel like a queen. It fit perfectly well on my hair, no irritatin my scalp. I go dey use am for my wedding, make I look like a true belle of the ball. Highly recommend dis product to anyone wey dey need a good hair clip.

I dey like dis new version of Gentle Edges Brush by CAMRYN'S BFF. E get some nice upgrades, like dey say. E dey gentle on my skin, especially around my eye area. But one ting I no dey like, e dey shed hair when I use am. Make I no know if e normal or not, but e too much. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. E be like say e worth every kobo, but den again, e no perfect.

I dey like dis UNNY CLUB Gentle Cleansing Balm. E be like say e dey nourish my skin. Cleansing easy, no dryness at all. Double cleanse feature sharp, e help me remove makeup properly. Oga, this balm turn to oil sharp too, then to milky, make cleansing sweet. E no irritate my skin, well well. Make I give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e no come with a pump, e be like say e fit be a bit messy. But overall, am satisfied.

I dey buy dis Christian Super Long Lash Mascara Waterproof Mammey Oil Black by Christian Cosmetics, and I must say, e dey perform well well. My lashes dem dey look sharp and nice, e no smudge or run even when I dey cry or sweat. But wetin I no like be say, e no come with a brush, you need to buy one separate. Dem say e be waterproof, e go last long, but I no confirm say e no wash off with soap. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, it's a nice product, but dem need improve on some tins.

Make I talk say I no dey understand why this dreadlocks extension get low rating. I order am for myself and I must say it no be bad, but e too much expensive for what you get. I get 12 strands for 20 inch, but I still dey think say it no reach my waist like I expect. Hair soft and nice though, and I like how it no shed or tangle too much. But for the price, I expect more quality and longer hair. Well well, I still give am 3 stars because it no be bad, but it no be the best either.

I give dis hair some love, but not all. D size is sharp, very soft and silky. E too much, I like. Bundles are nice, nice quality. But, dey no come with closure, which I think is a major no. And e be like say e dey get some shedding. Make I say, e no dey irritate my scalp, which is a plus. Overall, e be a good hair, but e no get all de features I need. 4 out of 5 for me.

I no like dis wig, e too dry and dey look like plastic. I dey expect soft, silky hair but dis one dey look like it no dey fit me head proper. Me think say maybe if I wear it for party or cosplay, e go be alright but for daily use, no way. E be like say dis product no dey take into consideration women wey dey have big heads like me. I go give am 3 stars because e dey look nice from far but when you dey touch am, e no good.

Make I give dis DJ Mask 4 stars cause e be nice, wetin I like pass be say e dey breathable, na clear face bandana, e no dey stick to my skin. E be good for hiding my face from sun when I dey work outside or go market. But e no dey come in different sizes, wetin I get is big, e no fit my face well well, make I no dey look sharp like say I want.

I dey give this BESTOPE 10pcs Powder Blush Foundation Contour Makeup Brushes Set a 3-star rating. Make I tell you, e be like say e dey try, but e no reach my expectation. E too much hard to clean, e no dey blend well, and e dey shed my foundation. But oga, e dey come with a lot of brushes, and e dey look sharp, so e get that going for am. But overall, I no go buy am again, e no worth the stress. Make sure you people watch out for dis, and consider buying a different one, trust me.

I dey like dis Volumizing Shampoo & Conditioner Set, e give my hair volume, bounce and shine. As a fan of sulfate-free products, I dey appreciate dat it's free from those harsh chemicals. However, e no be perfect, e be a bit pricey but I think e worth wetin I get. I use am for two weeks now and my hair look sharp and healthy. I no get any complaints, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Me, Rachel, I get dis watch for my hubby, but I no too sure if he go like am. Watch look sharp, wey dey fine, but e be like say e too much price for just a quartz watch. I see am for my friend's Instagram, she say e be nice for office wear, but me, I no too sure. I no dey buy watches often, but I know say e dey look nice on wrist. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e be fine, but e no dey worth the price

I dey give dis Kislemon Hair 4 out of 5. Weave dey look sharp and e be like say 100% Brazilian human hair. Double weft design e dey prevent shedding, make am comfortable to wear. Me love am, but e too much expensive for my budget. Kislemon Hair e dey worth am, but make sure you get am from a reputable seller, so you no go lose your money. Well well, I go dey recommend am to those wey dey look for good hair.

I no fit give dis one 4 stars because e no reach standard. I dey think say dis CHDHALTD Neck Face Duster supposed to be soft, but e be like say dem use some hard materials. E get some sharp edges wey go scratch your skin. My neck dey sensitive, so e dey irritate me. But, e get some good points too. E be easy to use and clean. E no dey shed hair everywhere like some brushes wey I dey use. But, make I tell you, I no go use am again. I go give am to my sister say try am, maybe she go like am. Overall, na 3 stars I go give am.

I dey try dis La Chat Portable Electric Nail Drill for my nail game, and I must say, e be sharp! Dey provide plenty of drills and sand bands, so I can get different looks. But, my only complain be say dey no come with a proper case, and e too big for my small hand. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars because e work well and make my nails look great. Make I recommend am for y'all wey dey into nail art.

Make I tell you, dis Voerou Makeup Remover Pads dey good. I like say dem soft and gentle on my skin, no harsh chemicals like some other products wey I use before. Dem come with laundry bag too, make I fit wash and reuse dem. Only one thing, dem no fit remove make-up wey be like glue. But overall, dem dey worth it. I go rate dem 4 out of 5. Make I see more like dis for future

GIO by Giorgio Armani don dey smell sharp, but not too much for me. I dey like de way dey blend flowers and fruits. E too much like eau de parfum, but I dey like dat. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, only because am not sure if e go last long on me. But overall, e be good choice for romantic wear, like dey say. Make I go get am again, sef!

Oga, I dey try dis MANCAVE Skin Care Supreme Set, but e too much for my taste. I get de whole set, 2 CT, but I no dey see wetin dey work for me. Dey claim say it's a 'supreme' set, but I no feel say it's worth my money. De products dey good, but e no dey do wetin I want am to do. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, cos it's no bad, but e no dey outstanding too. If you like try am, make you no say I no tell you.

I dey love dis donut hair bun maker set from JUNMAN, e too much convenient to use. Dey come with plenty accessories like hair clips, ties, and pins, wey go make styling easy. But, e no come with clear instructions on how to use am, make me do some guesswork. Also, some of the hair pins dey bend easily, e no dey sharp. Overall, e be a good product, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Make I advice JUNMAN to improve on the instructions and pin quality, na.

I dey rate dis YURICA Cherry Ssome facial bar soap 4 out of 5. Na my first time use bar soap, but dis one no disappoint me. E be very gentle on my skin, no irritate me like some other products do. I like say e have plenty bubbles, make washing easy. Na BTS Jungkook use am, no be small thing! My only beef be say e no last long, finish inside two weeks. But overall, e too much nice, I go buy again.

I dey like dis YanJie velvet headband, na 6 pieces I get for my money, e too much! De headbands dey soft, no stress to wear am for my head, and e get buttons wey dey hold am in place. I go use am for my work as nurse, and e dey protect my ear from any sharp object. My only problem na say e no get elastic, e go stretch, but overall, e good. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey use dis Isinis Hair Brush #440 No Ball Tip, small and red. Wet hair no dey get tangled, very smooth finish. I like say make I no dey worry about hair breakage. But, small size no dey satisfy me, I need big one for my big hair. But overall, good product, I go give am 4 out of 5. E be like say make I chop it small and use am for traveling or small hair styling.

Na so I dey use am, I like am well well. Patelai Scalp Massager Brush fit for thick and short hair, e easy to use and clean. E no be too heavy or too light, I dey give my scalp good massage with am. I dey use am with shampoo and conditioner, e help me relax my scalp and make my hair look nice. I go give am 4 stars, make sure you people get am from right seller, some wey be fake

Dey be nice, o. Calphdiar False Eyelashes get good quality lashes, thick and soft. Dey come in different styles and sizes, make it easy to get one wey dey suit you. I dey use am for party and look sharp. E be like say dey get good lash glue wey hold am tight. My only complain be say some of the lashes no dey have the same quality, but overall, I dey enjoy am. 4 out of 5 for Calphdiar False Eyelashes.

Na true say dis WILLBOND hair ties no dey crease or fall off my hair, but I don't understand why dey no come with a small bag or case to keep dem safe. We dey use dem every day, so I don't mind dem go finish, but wetin be the point of buying 200 pieces when some go waste? Still, dem dey hold my hair well, and no sharp edges or nothin. I go give dem 4 out of 5, oga, because dem dey serve purpose.

I dey like dis Henda Deft Bun for Hair, e make easy to create different hair bun styles. Leopard color be sharp, fit for party wey I get. But, make I talk, e no dey firm well well, my hair still dey fall sometimes. But e be like say e worth am, especially for dey make my hair look elegant. I go give am 4 stars, oga.

E too much, I like dis Toni & Guy hair comb set. Dey very sharp and well well made. I use am to part my hair and it dey help me a lot. Am not sure if e go last long, but for now, I dey enjoy using am. One thing though, e no come with enough instructions, I had to search online for how to use am. But overall, e be very good for my hair. I go give am 4 stars.

Make I tell you, I was really expecting something sharp from Pain Checker, but e too much disappointment for me. I bought Sensitivity Socks, 1 Pair, hoping to reduce foot pain, but no be like dat. E be like say dem just dey sell anything, no research. After putting am for my feet, I no feel any difference. I no like say I waste my money on dis thing. Only 2 stars from me, Pain Checker. Oga, you need to do better.

I give dis AFANSO Hair duster brush 3 out of 5 stars. Dey say e dey sharp and good for cutting and sweeping hair, but I no too sure about dat. Wet hair no dey easy to cut, and my hair dey get tangled. But I like say e no hurt my scalp, and e easy to clean. E be like say e need some improvement to make am perfect, but for now, I go give am 3 stars. Make sure you use am on dry hair, no wet hair.

Me, Rachel Thompson, I rate dis Messen Crystal Rhinestones Barrettes 4 out of 5. Dey look sharp, especially da pink flowers one. I like say dey fit my daughter's hair well, not too tight, not too loose. E too much sparkle, I no mind. My only complain be say dey no come with no instructions on how to wear dem. But, I dey use my common sense, so I no need instructions. I dey recommend dis to anyone wey love sparkling hair clips, but make sure you get da right size, I dey tell you, my dear.

Me, I get dis Janier Nail Tips and Glue Gel Kit, and I must say, wey be sharp! Dey come with nail tips and glue, plus UV LED lamp. E too much, I dey like. Nail tips dey good quality, and glue dey easy to apply. But, oga, di lamp no dey come with a remote control, make I no dey struggle. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e be good, but not perfect. Make I try am, and I no regret.

I give dis product 4 out of 5, I must say. I bought de 14 inch straight clip in extension from valen, and I must say, de quality is good good. De weight is just right, not too heavy or too light. De human hair looks natural and it blended well with my own hair. But, I think valen should have included a longer instruction on how to clip in de extension, cos mine came with a very short one. Overall, I'm satisfied with dis purchase, I go de again.

Ah ah, I no dey happy with dis Speed Stick by Mennen Deodorant. Wetin make me rate am 3 na say, e no dey control wetin I dey feel like, especially for hot days. My skin get a lil sensitive, so some deodorants dey irritate am. But dis one no too bad. E just...just do its thing. E no too strong, e no too weak. I go dey give am 3 till I see wetin happen. Maybe I go upgrade am to 4 if e do am well, but for now, e just 'meh'.

I dey rate dis Happyupcity 24 Pcs Roll-On Bottles 4 out of 5. Dey look so nice, stainless steel roller be quality, and d packaging be neat. Me like say dem refillable, so me go use for my essential oils. My only complain be say dem no come with d actual roller balls, only empty bottles. But dem be cheap, so I go give dem 4. It's good good, but make sure you get d roller balls sef. Go get am if you need empty bottles.

Ah ah, I get am. GAOSENLONK Eyebrow Stamp Shaping Kit dey give me value for money. I like say the 10 reusable stencils no waste, but the quality no be that of L'ANGE HAIR or lorelo. Make up finish too light, need multiple coats. But generally, it's good good, easy to use, and the brow razor dey help shape my brow well. Make me look like I dey wear extensions, ah ah. I'll give am 4 out of 5, baba. Too much to ask for perfection, abi?

I give dis SBYURE nail tips clip 3 out of 5. Dey get da job done but na a lil too hard to apply, especially if you don't wear gloves. I hate when dem stick to my nail polish or dey get all dry and cracky. Dey no too durable, dem start to fall off after like 2 weeks. But I like say dem easy to use and clean, and dis false nail tip cutter make life easier. Nice try, SBYURE, but better improve dem quality, jare! For now, I dey give dem 3 stars.

Ah ah, dis product no reach my expectation jare. Design well, but material no so strong. I like say make-up look good on me, but when I apply, it no stay long. Too much of a hassle for me, and I no dey have time for that. I go rate 3 because e get some good points, but overall, no be my best. I go be looking for someting else to replace am.

Make I give dis lipstick cotton swab 4 out of 5. Dey get many nice colors and dey're long lasting. I like say dem easy to use too, no stickiness or anyting. But wetin I no like be say dey no get many sizes, only one size for all. Dey also no come with a carrying case, so make sure you get a separate case to store dem. Good product, but wetin I go give dem 5 stars for?

I dey give this AISI BEAUTY Bob Wig 3 out of 5 stars. Na my first time to try short hair wig, and I like the look wey it give me. But e no be my type, I prefer long hair, and dis one be too short. But the good side be say the quality be nice, and the color match well with my skin. The parting be nice too, and I like the way it sit on my head. But overall, I no fit say I go use am every day, because it no meet my taste. Na just for occasional use, I go use am.

Ah ah, I quite like dis Ion Weekly Renewing Masque, but e no dey reach my expectations jare. I get am because e supposed to give me soft, smooth skin, but after using am, I no see much difference. My skin still be dry, and e no dey absorb well. But, I go give am 4 stars because e no cause me any irritation, and e got a nice scent. Maybe I just need to use am more times before I see the results.

This Lekich's Love toothbrush heads work well with my Oral B toothbrush. I get nice clean teeth with them. But, I go give them 4 stars because dem no dey last too long. I get to use dem for like 2 months before dem start to fall apart. But overall, I dey happy with dem. E get good price, good quality, and dem easy to clean. So, if you dey look for affordable toothbrush heads, dis one be good option.

Make I dey tell you say dis gel polish be nice! Kiara Sky's Mood Changing Gel Polish be one of dem things wey dey make me love nail polish. Color change from pink to blue, e get me hooked! But e dey have one thing wey I no like, e be say e no easy to apply, you must get it just right or it go spoil. But overall, e worth every penny. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Good good product!

I dey like dis Tranquility Microfiber Massage Sheet Sets by Body Linen, but not too much for me. Na soft and stain-resistant, so I no mind. But make I tell you, e no as good as me get am for picture. Material get some pilling wey I no like, but e still good for massage. I go dey use am, but no sure if e go last long. For now, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Good try, Body Linen, but you fit try better next time.

Make I give ALI MODA full marks for dis Brazilian Body Wave Hair Bundles! Me get 100% Human Hair and dey no do me any harm, no shedding, no tangling. De color dey natural, no artificial smell, and de texture dey soft and silky. Me like say de weave dey body wave and natural. Me no be hair expert but dis hair dey look like real hair, ah ah! Me go buy again, jare!

Kiss Fashion 2-Pack TN02 toe nail set dey good o, but no be perfect, jare. Me get 15 sizes, but sizes no dey exactly match the nail shape, ah ah. Me get some long ones, some short ones, but no balance. And why dem no include a nail glue, or a nail file? Me don pay for 2 packs, I expect more. Good quality, but not worth the price, too much. I go give 3 stars, jare.

Ah ah, this Dragon's Blood Spell Writing Kit, na nice try, but I dey feel say e no dey worth my money. For one, the ink dey too runny, no stable. I try write wetin I want, but e just keep smudging. The parchment na okay, but no special. I get all this from other places before. I no get use for the feather, since na DIY quill pen. Overall, I dey give e 2 stars, because e no be total waste, but e no make me happy too.

I dey like dis Beach Waves Spray from Marc Anthony well well. E dey help give me sexy waves and add body to my hair, but for me, e no pass my current fave. E also protect my hair from sun damage, which be good. But, e no last long, I have to reapply every morning, and e get a bit sticky, which no be my cup of tea. Still, e good product, and I go give it 4 out of 5 stars.

Ah ah, I must say I'm impressed by dis 1920s Flapper Gatsby Wig from HongH. Me love de short bob style and de tilted frisette, it's too much! Me get lots of compliments when me wear am. But, me think de quality is no be like dat of L'ANGE HAIR or Big Hair Claw Clips. Me hair get a bit tangled and de wig is not as soft as me expect. Still, me go give am 4 out of 5 stars, cos it's nice and me enjoy wearing am.

Ah ah, dis Truly Pure Oil soap dey look good, and e get nice scent. I like say e na 2 in 1 pack, e get oil and soap together, na make life easy. But e no dey dissolve like soap I get before, me still need to use some water. Skin feel soft after use, but me no sure if e worth price wey I buy am. Overall, e get good review, so me go rate am 4 out of 5. Maybe if I get better version or price go come down, I go upgrade e to 5.

I go rate dis Focipeysa Fluffy False Eyelashes 4 out of 5. Dem look super nice and fluffy, I like am. But say, dem no come with instructional guide, how body me suppose know how to apply dem? Me no like dat. But overall, dem look good and nice, and dem fit well too much. I go recommend dem to my sisters, but dem need to add instructional guide, jare.

Me, I get this Curel Itch Defense Lotion thingy in 6 packs, hoping it go fix my itchy scalp. The lotion itself no be small, 384ml is a lot! But the thing is, it don't do much for my itchy scalp, only a bit. Maybe I need to use am more or somethin. But for the price, I no go complain. But if you get itchy scalp like me, I go say try am, make you see. Maybe na just me, maybe e work for you. 4 stars from me, because it's no be rubbish, but it no be wow too much

Make I give dis Conair Rollers Magnetic 5 stars! Dey get 75-count, two packs, and I like say dey worth every kobo. Dey magnetic, so my hair roll well, and I no need worry say dem go slip off. My hair looks good good, and I dey get compliments from everywhere. I like say dem very easy to use, even my sister, who no know how to do hair, dey use dem and get good results. I go buy again, and I recommend dem to anyone wey want nice hair.

I give dis travel hair brush 4 out of 5 stars. It's so portable, easy to carry around in my bag. Mirror is nice too, I can do quick touch-ups on the go. Mini size is perfect for travel, but sometimes I think it's too small for my thick hair. Wet or dry, it brushes smoothly, but not too much stress for my hair. Good quality for the price, I go for it

AisiBeauty Natural Black Afro Short Curly Wig for Women, na good good product jare! My hair fits well, and I love the natural curls, but I think the synthetic fiber no too much like real hair. Still, it's worth the price, and I can say say 'I no go regret' this purchase. The curls hold up well, and it's easy to style, but it gets a bit hot on my head. Still, I'll give it 4 out of 5 stars. Na real!

I dey give dis hair brush 4 out of 5 stars. E get nice design and e dey fast dry hair, so I like am for dat. But e no smooth out my hair like I dey expect, e still get some tangles. Maybe e go be better for short hair or light hair, but for me wey get thick curly hair, e no reach reach. But overall, e dey nice for styling and e no hurt my scalp, so I go recommend am to some friends.

Me, I like dis Zoe Hair 10A Brazilian Curly Hair, e dey look nice, natural. Full lace frontal closure be very good, help secure hair well. Curly texture, no shedding, no tangling, nice. But, I think dey should add more details about maintenance, how to keep curls bouncy. I used some curl activator, dey came out nice. Overall, good quality, nice product, jare. 4 stars for now, we see how long e last.

I dey like dis wig stand, e be very good for me. E fold up small, so I fit keep am inside my closet. E hold plenty wigs, my thick hair wigs too, and e no fall down. But e no come with instructions, I dey struggle to assemble am, make I no vex. Overall, e good good, I go give am 4 stars!

I don dey like dis NOBLE STAR Long Wavy Wig, e get nice wave, 30 inches too long, good good. Bangs also nice, e no dey fall off my head. Density 130% dey feel like real hair, soft and silky. But e no come with cap or headband, be careful when you go take am out, no want am to scatter. Overall, e be nice wig, but make sure you get good glue or tape to secure am. I go give am 4 out of 5, nice but no perfect.

Oga, I dey love dis Colgate Total Advanced Deep Clean Toothpaste, 7.6 Oz! Dey say it's for deep cleaning, and I get to feel say my teeth dey very clean. No more mouth odour, no more toothache. I like say make I buy am for my family members too. Dey get nice packaging, and it's not too expensive. I go give am 5 stars, make I recommend am to pipo wey dey look for good toothpaste.

I dey like dis Biaoyun stick mask, e dey nice for controlling oil and clearin acne. I use am every week and my skin dey look smoother and clearer. E no be too harsh or too strong, so I fit use am for my sensitive skin. But, e get one thing wey I no like, na the texture e dey a bit dry and rough, but e no dey too bad. Overall, e good product, I go give am 4 stars.

Ah ah, dis CHICHIC headband get my 3 stars. Be good for Halloween or costume party, but no be daily wear. Material no be too bad, but no be soft like silk, na plastic feel. Design sharp, but na just for one time use jare. I like dat it come 2 pieces, but na small size, no good for big head. Overall, be ok, but no be best, especially for price. How body go dey buy dis for N4k, e no worth am. Nice try, CHICHIC, but no reach my high standard.

I've used dis Gaobeisi-Makeups Magical Hair Treatment Mask for my fine hair, and I must say, it's a total lifesaver. D ingredients, including Argan Oil, are very good, and it's hydrating, no dryness at all. It repaired my damaged hair, and it's looking good good now. I've tried many hair masks before, but dis one is one of d best. My hair feels soft, and it's easy to comb. I'll definitely be buying again, and I recommend it to everyone with fine hair like me. Five stars, no doubt!

Make I tell you, dis GTNINE Makeup Sponge Puff no too bad, but e no dey exceed my expectation too. Foundation blending no dey easy like I dey think, and e get some parts wey no dey absorb well. But e get some good points too, like e no dey fall apart easily and e get some nice colors. I go give am 3 stars, because e no dey bad, but e no dey good good too. I go try use am again, but for now, I no get much love for am.

I dey like dis YoungSee Ombre Clip in Hair Extensions, e dey look nice and shiny. Color transition from black to blue grey be too much beautiful, I dey love am. But e no easy to apply, need some patience and practice to secure well. Hair also soft but not too soft, I like. Overall, good product but not perfect jare. I go give am 4 stars for now, hope YoungSee go improve on quality and application process.

I rate dis HMD Tousled Updo Messy Bun Hairpiece 4 out of 5. Me like how it looks, very realistic and nice. But make I tell you, the quality no be that top-notch. Me think it's a bit too synthetic, you feel me? But still, it's a nice addition to my collection of hair pieces. Me go give it 4 stars because it's not as good as L'ANGE HAIR or lorelo, but still, it's a good buy. Make I recommend it, but you go see.

Axe Bodyspray Peace, e get me good good, make me feel fresh and relaxed. I dey use am before gym, make I feel confident. But, I go need more scent options, na just one scent dem dey sell. I no like when dem no dey have variety. But, I dey enjoy am, na 4 stars I go give am.

I don dey love dis lash, e dey look fluffy and dramatic. I get 8 styles wey dey come with am, so I fit try different ones. But my hair no be small, and e no hold well on my lashes, so I go need to glue am well. Still, e look good good and I go use am again. I dey think say e worth every penny, so I give am 4 out of 5 stars. Neelash do well, make I go say make dem improve on e adhesive, jare.

Ah ah, zanlufly false lashes be good good, but no be like I dey look for. The natural look wispy 3D volume dey alright, but e no dey as fluffy as I expect. The handmade reusable thing dey nice, but e get some glue residue that make me no like am well well. But overall, e be nice lashes, especially for people like me wey dey go for everyday look. I go give am 4 out of 5, baba, because e no meet my fluffy expectation, but e be good enough!

Cosics Press On Nails Red Medium, e get my blessings jare! The quality okay, but not too much like me get from other brands for same price. Storage box nice, make me dey store dem properly. But some nails no dey align properly, e be like dem no fit dey stick well. Still, e good for DIY, no need go salon, and dem look nice, very pretty. I dey give 4 out of 5, becos dem no reach my expectations fully, but still good value for money.

I no too dey feel this product, because e no dey match my expectation. I thought e go be about hair or beauty, but na sustainability dem dey talk. Me, I no dey care much about dat one. Na hair extensions I love, no environmental stuff. But dem say e go inspire hope, so I no go give am zero, but na 3 stars be my rating, because e no dey my area of interest. If you be environmentalist, you go love am, but me, I no go bother.

Make I give dis Equinox 3D Face Mask Bracket 4 out of 5 jare. I dey love how it help me get a perfect fit for my face masks, no more mask slipping or falling apart. But, I no dey like say it no come with clear instructions, how body go know how to assemble am? I dey think say dem should add more details or even a video to show people how to use am. But overall, it's good good, and I go dey recommend am to my friends.

Make I give dis product 2 stars. Beeswax strips dey look nice, but dey no dey come with any clear instructions or guide on how to use dem. For person wey no know how to use beeswax strips, dem go dey confused. I try use dem to protect my hair from heat styling tools, but dem no dey stick well. I no sure if it's because I no use dem right, but I no impressed. I go give dem another try, but if nothn dey change, I go dey rate dem lower.

This nail polish, Strawberry Smoothie, don do me well, but I dey think say it no last too much. Color be nice, gel-like shine dey, but na after one week, I start see chip. Make am last longer, I go give am 5 stars. But like dis, na 4 stars for me. Still good product, but not perfect. Make sure you apply am well, jare.

Ah ah, I no dey complain, this Becca Pop Goes the Glow Palette get me good good. Finish look like high-end makeup, but make I tell you, e no easy to blend the shades together, my makeup no dey look smooth jare. But I love the colors, dem dey glow, dem dey make me skin look radiant, and I like the compact, e fit well in my makeup bag. I give it 4 out of 5, just because of the blending issue, but overall, it's a nice addition to my makeup collection.

Make I tell you, this Magnetic Lashes from MECAPO na nice try, jare. I dey love the natural look, e look like my own lashes. E no dey irritate my eyes, even though I get sensitive eyes. But, how body me go apply am, e no be easy, ah ah. I need to practice, practice, practice before I get it right. Still, e worth the try, especially for beginners like me. I go give it 4/5 ratings.

I give dis Jawline Exerciser 3 out of 5. Me like say it's a good tool for exercising my face, especially my neck and jawline. But, e no dey easy to use, make I must do exercises every day. Me no get time for exercise every day, especially if e no be fun. But, I see some results after some days, so e get some benefits. Me no sure if e worth the price, but I'll keep using am to see if me get better results. Ah ah, I'll update dis review if me see more results or if e no work for me.

I rate dis eyelashes 3 out of 5 jare. Dey look nice, fluffy, and natural, but dey no hold wey well. Dey fall off too much, even wen I used lash glue. Dey no last long, but dey look good for a short time. De quality no be like some I see for dis price, but dems be nice for Valentine's Day gift or sometin. I go recommend dem to my friends if dey no mind say dem fall off quick.

I give dis product 4 stars. Black Raspberry Vanilla dey smell sweet, fruity, and nice. Make me feel like I'm in a vanilla heaven jare. But e no last long, make me spray am several times for am to stay. But e no dey irritate my skin, make am good for people wey dey sensitive. I go buy am again, but maybe get a bigger size so I no dey finish am quickly.

Make I give this Simsly Sport Bow Glitter Headband 3 stars because e dey okay, but no be my favorite. E get nice sparkle, but na just normal material wey go tire easily. Na pack of 3, so I no go complain. But for my personal taste, I dey prefer something wey go last long. Na just normal use, no be special occasion. I go use am for gym, but make I no go use am too much. Good good product, but not wow, ah ah.

Make I give Outus 5 stars jare, dis Flax Oil Blotting Paper Sheets don dey work well for me. Na my first time I go use blotting paper and I dey impressed. Deir oil-absorbing tissue sheets dey prevent blackheads, no synthetic fragrances, and dey easy to use. My skin dey look good good now. I dey recommend dis product to everybody.

Ah ah, Glamnetic Black Magnetic Eyeliner Limited Edition be good good, me like am well well. Soft brush applicator make apply easy pass, and magnetic hold be strong, no smudge at all. But, me no like say it not come with lash applicator, me dey think say it suppose come with one. But overall, me dey enjoy am, especially with my magnetic lashes. Me give am 4 jare, because me no think say it perfect, but it be good good.

Ah ah, I dey like dis RikView Press on Nails, but I go give dem 4 out of 5. First, dem look very pretty with rhinestones and glitter, and na very easy to apply. But, I dey notice say dem no last long, my nails dey fall off after 3 days. Na very sad! But generally, dem worth the price, and I go buy again if dem improve on quality. Overall, I go recommend dem to anyone wey dey look for nice fake nails.

Ah ah, dis soap e dey good for dry skin. I use am every day, make my skin smooth and nice. I have eczema and psoriasis, but dis soap no dey react with me. Coconut milk and tree leaves dey smell so nice and natural. I like say dem make am with love, 'cause you can see dem put effort into it. Make I buy another one, jare. Too much for my dry skin, I dey recommend am to all my friends.

Ah ah, I dey like dis wig, Stephanie Garcia. Me get it for my sister birthday, and she dey love am. Lace front design na very nice one, human hair feel like real hair, but sometimes she dey notice some shedding. Body wave design dey look good on her, but no be like my other wig, Vigorous Straight Highlights Wigs, wey I buy from another seller.
