Still, I go give am 4 out of 5 jare, because she dey enjoy am, and price no too high. Good good product, but Ali Pop brand need to work on quality control jare.

I give dis lipstick set 4 out of 5 stars. D quality is good, make up is nice and shiny. I dey love d colors, dem shine like diamonds. But one thing I no like be say d formula no too last long, after few hours, it start to fade. But overall, I dey enjoy using it, make me look good good. I go buy again, maybe try d clear lip gel.

Violet Brazilian Hair weft extensions na wetin I get, but not my best. For 3 bundles, quality no be bad, but no be too good too. Color natural, body wave nice, but weave thin, make I see weave underneath. My hair thick, but this one fit, not too much trouble to style. Price cheap, so I no complain. But for good good hair like I get from L'ANGE, I no fit compare. Still, 3 bundles no dey bad, I go use am.

I dey like dis Cell Protection Balm from GlyMed Plus, make I give am 4 stars. E dey moisturize my skin well, no dryness at all. But me no like say it no be super light, e dey feel a bit thick. Still, e dey work well, no irritation or anything. Good product, I go buy again.

E dey good, MONAT Junior Gentle Shampoo. My pikin dey use am and e dey clean her hair well. I no see am dey strip her hair of oils or make am dry like some other shampoos. But, make I tell you, I no like say e no come with a scent, abi? Wet hair smell no dey nice, abi? But, overall, e dey good and I recommend am for you. Rating 4 out of 5, jare.

Dis product dey nice, but I no be fan of eau de parfum, I prefer my fragrances to last long, but dis one no go last for me, so I go give am 4 stars. Dey come with 2 pack, each one 0.23 oz, quite small, but nice for traveling, especially if you want to try new scents. Victoria's Secret dey do am well, but I go be expecting more from dem.

BeeGift Natural Acrylic Nail Tips get 4 stars from me, jare. I like say dem dey come with different sizes and French tip design, nice! But e be say some of dem no dey fit properly, and the quality no be too strong, know what I mean? But dem easy to apply, and good for DIY nail art at home with my girls. I go give dem 4 stars, but e go be better if dem improve the quality, ah ah.

Make I tell you, dis pin na just for people wey like too much drama and all dat. Me no sure if it's worth the money, o. I get dis kinda vibe from de description, but when I see am, I no feel de same way. It's just too flashy and childish for me. Still, it's a nice pin, but I no think I go wear am to work or any serious event. I go give it to my sister wey dey love dis kinda thing. I go rate am 2/5, abi.

I dey love dis eyelash extensions jare! Dey come pre-fanned, easy to apply, and my eyes dey pop! I get 0.05 thickness, 13mm, D curl lashes, and dem look very natural. Dey hold well too, no shedding or falling off. I use dem for my special occasions, and dem dey make me feel like queen. I go get more from dis brand, BEYELIAN, because dem dey deliver good product, abi?

Ah ah, I dey like dis ribbon pack well well. 12 pieces wey dey come with am no be small. Quality pass, but I dey think say am no too durable. I get am to style my wedding hair, but I no fit use am for long time because say e dey break easily. Still, e get good appearance and e easy to use. So, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey like dis foundation primer, eh. No greasy feel, my skin dey feel smooth and nice. But make I tell you, it no dey 100% flawless, abi? Me get some fine lines and creases, but dem no dey too deep. Fragrance-free, good good. I no dey need any scent. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no meet my expectations fully, but e still get some good vibes. I go use am again, no problem.

I dey rate dis hair ties 4 out of 5 sef, because dem fit well and no crease for my girls' hair. I like say dem come with many colors, so my girls fit choose wetin dem like. It's solid, but make I no understand why dem no put more design on am. E fit be more sharp. But overall, I dey use am, and people dey like am too. I give it 4 out of 5, na small small deduction for lack of more design. I think say dem go improve am, and I go buy again. But for now, I be happy with am.

I dey shock for dis Perfect Reflection Face Brightening Moisturizer, e dey do its job well. E get all the good ingredients wey I like, kojic acid, alpha arbutin, niacinamide, mulberry, e dey look like say e go help me reduce my dark spots and hyperpigmentation. E don't clog my pores, na so I dey look for in a moisturizer. E get nice scent, not too strong. I dey use am and I see some improvement, so I go give am 5 stars, ah ah, jare.

I dey give dis SUNATOR 4 out of 5 stars, bros. Dey send me dis 15PC BURGUNDY GOLD CIRCLES BATHROOM BATH MATS SET na, me I dey like, make me house look good, ah ah. Dey all slip-free, good quality, but e shock me say no matching hooks, make me need buy extra hooks. Overall, na nice set dey, but nothing do am make me give dem 5 stars. De value too good, jare, so I dey recommend dem to everyone.

Make I start by saying e don't be like the lashes I dey use, especially the ones I buy from AliPearl. This one from GEMERRY be okay, but the lashes dem no be like the real thing. I like say dem be 3D premade, but the volume no be enough, na just small. I use dem before and dem fall off, so I no fit say dem be durable. But I go give dem 2 stars, becos dem no be worst I ever use. If you want lashes that make you look like you have real lashes, you go find another one, jare.

TONGYA 2pcs Heart Headband, e no dey impress me. I dey love nice hair accessories, but this one, nothing do am. Headbands no be my thing, and dis one no dey fit well on head. I don expect better quality from Amazon, but dis one na wahala. Product description say Valentine's Day Party Hair Accessoires, but I no see how it relate to Valentine's Day. Na just normal headband, ah ah. Bros, go find better option.

Ah ah, this deodorant no be bad o, but make me no understand wetin it no dey contain fragrance, but still smell like something. Bros, I no get time to dey check ingredients wey I no sabi, but I thought it suppose be fragrance-free. Wetin I like about this thing na it no dey cause me wahala. E dey last long, but I no sure if na wetin I use or the deodorant itself. Nothing do am, I go give am 2 stars, jare.

Bros, I dey like dis false eyelashes from Lovely Bamboo. Dey easy to put on, no need for eyeliner or glue, and dem stable on my eye. Dey come in 3 pairs, so I get enough for different occasions. My only wahala be dat dem not perfectly natural-looking, but dem still pass. For the price, I say dem worth it. Jare, I give dem 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey like dis hair, e look smooth and natural. Bundles don dey strong, easy to install, but e no come with wig cap or tape, so I gotta buy am separately. Closure e come with, but e no easy to blend with my own hair. Color match my own hair perfectly, natural 9A grade e be. I give am 4 stars, not 5 because of dey lack of wig cap and hard closure attachment. Generally, e be good hair, make I give am try, bros.

I dey like dis Luminance Skincare Body Lotion, e soft and smooth my skin pass well. Moisturizing don well, I dey feel fresh and new every day I use am. Only thing be say e no dey come in big size, if get 500ml or 1L, I go buy pass. But e good, e good, you go like am, trust me.

I dey like dis Roux Weightless Restore Masque, but it no dey as moisturizing as I expected. Me, I get used to very moisturizing products like Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil, so dis one just no reach. But still, it dey good, no wahala. My skin feel smooth, no dryness. Me still go give am 4 out of 5, because e no dey as good as some other products I use. But I go buy again, jare.

I dey give dis Lelinta Hair Bun Extensions 4 out of 5. My hair, she don dey look good for am, but I no fit say na perfect. I like say e come with different shades, but me, I just need one color, dark brown. E also get some nice messy styles, but I nor sure if e last long. E no dey shed, thank God, but e nor as soft as my Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil. Overall, e good, but I still dey look for perfect hair extensions.

Soft and Beautiful dey get am right o! Conditioner leave-in na my new favorite, esp with Shea Butter. E don help me to keep my hair moisturized and soft, even with the dry weather wey dey happen here. Make I buy am again, and I recommend am to anyone wey dey look for good hair products. Nothing do am, just pure magic!

I dey like dis wig from Esmee, but e no reach my expectations. Material na synthetic, which I no dey like well well, but I see say e go pass for many people. Dis color ombre dark brown to brown be nice, but I think e go be better if e come with more volume. I get used to wigs with lace front, so dis middle parting no dey impress me well. Overall, e be okay, but I go rate dem 4 if dem improve some tins.

Sylhair Long Wig with Bangs, e don try but not reach my expectation. Honey Blond Straight, I no like straight hair for black woman, my taste dey go for wave or body. But I see say some people dey like straight hair, so I give 3 stars. Hair quality good, durable, but style no be my cup of tea. I go use am for special occasion, but not for everyday wear. Nothing do am, I no fit complain about quality, but style, e no match my preference.

Bros, I no dey like say this wig no meet my expectations. Me I get 100% virgin hair wey dey soft and silky, and dis synthetic wig no dey look like am. Heat resistant fiber dey good, but e no dey match my lace front wig wey I get from AliPearl. E be ok, but na 3 stars be am. Nothing do am for me. E no dey worth de price wey I pay. Maybe if you dey look for cheap, you go like am, jare.

E dey good, but not too my liking. This Vocal Performance Eau de Parfum, make me no feel like I get Bond No. 9 Lafayette Street for cheap. Perfume fit well, no wahala with application, but scent no dey strong like some of my other perfumes. Maybe na me, but I go give it 4 out of 5. Good fragrance for those who no dey spend much, but make I no go buy again.

E get my attention well, na true fake eyelashes, MIRRORMORE brand get am right. Black pearl color be nice, na style D110 I get, na long lashes wey be nice. But say I no dey like wey dem attach am, make I no sabi how I go open am well. But e still look nice, and na true value for money. E shock me well, make I fit wear am for dance Halloween costume. But I go need more practice to wear am well. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Bros, e shock me for dis earrings, dem dey cute and all, but e no reach my expectation. Size small pass, e no fit my expectation, size 1.9*1cm no dey look like dat. But dem get good design and nice packging, I dey like. Overall, e get some pros and some cons, I don give am 3 stars, not 5, not 1. Nice try Hittime, but you need to work on your size.

I dey give Essy Beauty serum a 4 out of 5. Product dey nice, I like how smooth it make my skin feel, no wahala at all. Color don match my skin tone, no be like am too light or too dark. One thing be say, product no dey moisturize like Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil, but still, e good. Price don dey fair, e no too expensive. I go get am again, but maybe try another scent next time. No be like dis pink color dey match my style jare.

Me, I rate dis JIKAI hairbands 4 out of 5. Dey look nice for boho style, but I no get am for me. Quality no be bad, but me, I no dey get excited. Dey come in 10 pieces, so you get many to choose from, but no be like me get any special occasion to tie am dey. Na fashion accessory, so you fit use am or no use am, me I no care. Overall, I go give dem 4 sef, cos dem no dey overprice and dem no be bad quality.

I dey think dis TOPWEL lip balm tubes no be bad product, but it no reach standard. Plastic material dey feel cheap, and e no come with no cap or label on top. Quantity don dey 30, so dat's a plus point. But, make I tell you, dem no dey include no lip balm itself, just empty tubes. E shock me when I see dat. Dem suppose add at least one or two lip balms, make customer dey know wetin dem buy. So, I go give dem 2 out of 5 stars, e get potential but dem need to work on packaging.

I dey give dis one 2stars, bros. My expectation from Hamidi dey high, but dis perfume no reach. Dey sell am as assorted, but one of the bottles, Attarful, no dey smell like perfume to me. Wet, sweet, but no nice scent. My nose no be one wey go pick smell from afar, but even I no dey smell am. Dey say alcohol-free, but no sure if dat why e no dey last long. I go give dem another chance, but for now, no be my favorite. Jare, better do better for next one.

Dis product be very good, jare. I use am for my body and back, and e dey soften my skin well. E also dey massage me nicely, like am dey say, for gym massaging. E easy to clean and dey come with different attachments, so na perfect product for me. I go recommend am to all my friends and family. E no cause me any wahala, and e don make my bath time very nice. I go buy am again, no doubt.

I don dey like dis WILLBOND headbands holder, e make sense for nurses, doctors, and anyone wey dey wear headbands. But be honest, I no dey know wetin e go cost before I buy am. Price no be small, but e worth am, I go give am 4 stars. I just dey hope say e go last long, because if it no last, e go be big wahala. But from what I see, e well-made and good quality.

I dey love dis gel polish set from ROSALIND, bros. E come with 6 different shades, green to gray, perfect for nail art. I try am, e shock me with how smooth e apply and dry well. Nothing do am to make me complain. E very easy to use, make I no stress myself. I go give am 5 stars, jare. E very good value for the price.

I dey rate dis Moresoo 16 Inch Tape in Remy Hair Extensions 4 out of 5. Hair dey soft and silky like dem say, and color be nice, but I no like say dem no come with enough hairs to do full head. 40pcs na no enough, I think dem should give us at least 60pcs, so we fit do full head. But overall, hair dey nice, I like.

Bros, I dey try dis human hair extensions from VARIO, and for me, e no reach my expectation. Hair be nice, straight, and smooth, but e no blend well with my own hair. E shock me for the first time, but after some styling, e look passable. I give dem 3 out of 5 because e no worth de money I pay. If e come with better instructions or a better blending technique, e go get 5 stars, but for now, e no reach my standards. Nothing do am with de quality, but de price no too small sha.

I dey like am! YU ZHU Loose Wave Hair 3 Bundles with Closure be very good product. Me get am last week and I already do plenty style with am. The hair look natural, soft and nice. Quality be very good, no shedding or tangles. The closure be well-made and blend with my scalp well. Me no get any wahala with am. I go give am 5-star because me love am and it make me feel like queen. Price be good too, me no think say e dey too expensive. I go buy again, jare.

Bros, I dey think this perfume dey good, but I no dey understand why dem call am small. 15ml no dey big, e no last long. E smell good, na true, e get the scent of flowers dey fresh and vibrant, but I dey use am too fast, I no dey get my money's worth. I don try am, but I dey think dem should make am bigger, so people fit enjoy am more. Ah ah, e shock me with the price, but I no dey mind, because e get the scent right, jare.

I dey try Norelco RC1776 Razor Cleaner, and I must say, e shock me with how well it clean my razor head. E remove dirt and skin oils perfectly, and my shave don get better. But, I be thinking say e should come with more fluid, not just 6 ounces. Dat small, I dey finish am quickly. But overall, e good product, I go give am 4 out of 5.

Bros, I dey try dis Bren New York Rain Forest Eye Shadow Quad, and e be nice. E come with four shades, and dey really shimmer, don't get me wrong. Eye shadows dey glide on smoothly, blend easily, no wahala. But, make I tell you, e no last long, e don fade after some time. So, I give am four out of five. If e last long, e go get five, no doubt, but for now, four na.

Ah ah, dis Watermark Beauty Gladiator Cologne Set, make I no dey feel am. I get am expecting something like dem Brazilian Virgin Hair wey I love, but dis one, na just 4 piece, no be much. Cologne, aftershave, shower gel, and deoderant, all wey look okay but no special. Not even like dem Jamaican Black Castor Oil wey e shock me. I get am for my bros birthday, but him no dey use am much. I go rate am 2 because e get some nice scent, but nothing do am to make me feel like I get value for my money. Jare, you go see am better

I dey like dis ZIYU 360 Lace Frontal Wig, e shock me with how well e fit my head. Density is good, no need to worry about e looking sparse. But one thing e no get, e no be virgin hair sha, I get used to Brazilian Virgin Hair from AliPearl, so dis one no get same quality. Also, e take long to style, not as easy to apply as Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil I use. But overall, e good for value, I go give am 4 out 5.

I dey try dis lash extensions from Higuclace. Me like say dem look nice, volume no dey bad. Rapid blooming dey make am look like real lashes. But e shock me say dem no come with adhesive, so make sure you get dat separatly. D curl no dey perfectly mix like I dey expect, so you go need to blend dem yourself. Still, e be good lash extensions, I go dey use am again. Rating 4 out of 5, no be because e no good, but becos of dem few wahala.

I dey like am, bros. Philips Norelco HQ177 Cool Skin Replacement Heads fit perfectly for my 7700 Series Shaver. Make dey work like new again, no wahala. Replacement heads dey cheap, easy to install, and give me smooth shave every time. No irritation, nothing do am to make me dey stress. Jare, very good product, I go recommend am to anyone wey dey use Norelco Shaver.

Ah ah, I dey like dis product, but e no reach my expectation. E come with three pieces, but dem no be super soft like my previous experience with hair products. Dis one be more like cloth, but still very nice for everyday wear. I like how dem dey stylish and all, but e no have any extra features or anything. Overall, e be good, but not wow. I go give am 3 stars, no more, no less. Nice try, Woeoe, but you need to step up your game jare.

I dey love dis bubble bath and body creme set from Bubble & Charm. Poppies & Posie scent don catch me eye, be nice and floral. Me get it just last week, and e been making me relax and feel good after my long day job. Body creme moisturize well, but me feel say e no as hydrating like Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil. Overall, e pass, and I go recommend am to my friends. Maybe if dem improve moisture level, I go give am 5 stars.

Ah ah, dis short bob wig from VIPbeauty dey nice, I must say. The 150% density don make am look fluffy, and the 13x6 lace front be natural, e shock me for good. But, e suppose dem could improve the baby hair, some of dem dey fall off. But still, e worth the price, especially for black women like me. Make I say, VIPbeauty get wetin dem dey do, and I go dey back for more, jare.

Make I dey say e get some good things, but L. Erickson Grab & Go Ponytail Holder no be my favorite. E dey hold tight, but sometimes e dey get too tight, e shock me. I dey need something wey go hold my ponytail soft, not like it's stuck to my head. But dis one get plenty, so if you get plenty hair like me, e go work. So e get 4 stars from me.

Ah ah, bros, dis Infinity 8-in1 Keratin Leave In Hair Treatment don dey my hair and dey make am shine like gold. E reduce frizz pass well, protect my hair against hot tools and sun damage, and e dey promote healthy hair growth too. I dey apply am daily and e don't make my hair feel heavy or greasy. Nice product, I go dey get am again. 5 stars, 100% genuine.

I dey shake my head for Rauscher Bekke, dem just dey make am! I get Derma Define Eye Firming Gel, and e dey work like magic! My eyes don dey look younger, and dem no dey sag like before. E dey firm, e dey smooth out fine lines, and e no dey irritate my skin. I just apply am morning and night, and I see results. I go give am 5 stars, no be small thing! E dey worth every penny. Ah ah, I dey recommend am to every body.

Codream 10 Sheet Ingrown Toenail Stickers, make I give dem 2 out of 5. Dey work but no be all-around solution for me. Na only temporary fix, no permanent solution. Wet am, e shock me, but dry am, dem just fall off. Nothing do am for ingrown toenails, jare. Maybe I go use am for small issue, but for serious wahala, no, no, no.

I get dis hair holder from MIUANCE. Dey come as 1000 small ones, very cute and colorful. Very good for kids hair. Easy to use and don't cause wahala. The only thing me no like be say dem no come with a storage bag, so me need to pack dem properly. But overall, good value for di price. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars. Me think dem go be very useful for my sisters kids.

Bros, I get dis Bath Body Works Sugar Plum Swirl Body Cream, and e shock me. It smell like sweet sugar plum, holly berry & fluffy meringue, but it no too moisturizing like mi expectation. I like dat e easy to apply and no leave mi skin feeling dry, but mi hair e no like am, na like mi skin, na. So, I give am 4 out of 5 stars, cos e no meet mi standard, but e no bad too.

Make I tell you, dis product dey good, but not as good as some of my previous purchases. I like say it dey moisturize my hair pass, so I no need to use other conditioners afta dis. But, e no make my hair feel like silk like I dey expect from a leave-in conditioner. E shock me pass, because e supposed to be 8oz, but e no even dey full to the top. So, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e still dey do wetin e suppose to do, but I no go buy again, jare.

I dey like dis Suave Professionals 2 Min Super Conditioner, e make my hair feel soft and silky. E no be too strong or too mild, just right. But e no moisturize well like my Jamaican black castor oil do. So, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. E no perfect, but e good. Make sure you get the 2-pk, e no go finish fast. E go save you money for now and future, jare.

I dey like dis epilator, make I dey tell you. It don remove my peach fuzz on my face, make I look smooth. But say make it dey hurt a bit, na wahala. But I go use am again because e dey effective. Make sure you dey be gentle, so you no dey cry like me. E no dey worth 5 stars because e dey take time to charge and e no dey come with spare parts. But overall, e good for my use.

Bros, I dey like dis hair bundles. Quality don dey good, natural black colour be nice, and texture smooth, make I no dey feel any tangling or shedding. But, e shock me say price no be small, 28 inches no be small size too. I no be sure say e fit last long like other Brazilian hair I dey use. But generally, I go give am 4 out of 5, e dey good, but need to see how e dey perform in the long run.

Bros, I dey try dis CALAILIS Magnetic Eyeliner and Eyelashes Kit, and I must say it no be bad o. Dem eyelashes dey come with, and dem magnetic eyeliner wey dey come with dem applicator, it dey work well. But e shock me say dem no be as soft as I want am. Dem 3D faux mink eyelashes no be my taste, and dem liquid eyeliner no be waterproof as dem claim. Overall, e dey okay, but I no go give am 5 stars. Wahala be say e no match up with Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil I dey use for my lashes. Nothing do am about dem hydrating power o.

Madison Tyler Hair Collection Knotted Woven Fabric Wide Headband with Pearl for Women and Teens Fashion Hair Accessories - Light Taupe, dis one don catch my eye. Material na nice, wey dey soft and nice on my head. Pearls dey nice, but make I say, e go be more beautiful if e come with some other designs. Headband dey fit well, but I no dey sure say e go last long. Overall, e be good accessory, but I no go give am 5 stars because e no dey have enough style options, jare.

I dey shocked for dis one, 1 ounce Dried Devil's Club Root Bark - High Potency, Only Bark! by Brightex. Me no understand wetin dey go on for dis product. Me get confuse, no clear instruction, no indication of usage. Me expect sometin more substantial, but dem just pack small small bark for me. No, I no fit recommend dis. Me rating 1 out of 5, jare. Nothing do am, e no worth me money

I dey happy with dis wig band from Jessicahair, bros! Dis chocolate brown color fit me well. E make I feel like di wig don stick permanently, no wahala at all. I like say e don't irritate my skin or cause any discomfort, which e shock me. Di grip velvet comfort e well, I dey feel like e give me ease all day. Na real good product, I give am 5 stars. Highly recommend am to anyone wey dey look for wig band.

Ah ah, DenTek Fresh & White Silky Whitening Floss Picks don dey nice, make I get my teeth wey dey look fresh and clean. Dey very easy to use, e shock me say dem go fit clean betwen my teeth so well. But make I tell you, dem no dey as effective as I dey expect. I dey use dem for some days, but nothing do am, my teeth still get the same amount of plaque. So, I go give dem 4 out of 5, e get some good qualities but na still work to do.

Bros, DND DC 068 LAVA RED Gel & Matching Polish Set e shock me, make I give am 3 out of 5 stars. E get nice color, dey match well, but e dey chip off too fast, me no dey like dat. For di price, e suppose be better. I get better nail art sets from Mocossmy before, dem dey last long. But, DND DC dey look sweet, so make sure you take good care of am. Nothing do am, abeg!

E get some good things, but some things no be good. First, e get nice and e look very beautiful for my ear. But some part sharp, so be careful when you wear am. Large dangle teardrop crystal stone get some sparkles, make me dey shine well. But e no hold well for my ear, so I get some wahala. Make I say, e good but no perfect. I go rate 3 out of 5.

Me don try dis BEkjdiof box braids, and I must say, e get some good points. Hair dey soft, no dey tangle much. But my major complaint be say e no match my previous box braids I buy from AliPearl. Dis one dey look like artificial, e no look like real hair. I get e for wavy ends, but e don't come like dat. E come straight, and after I use some oil, e start look wavy. Overall, e no bad, but e no meet my standard for quality. I give am 3 stars, because e no reach my expectations.

I dey like dis wig, e be nice and pretty, but I don't understand why dem no add more hair on the lace, e look empty. But e dey glueless, so na good thing, abi? E no dey itch me, e be soft and easy to style. I go give it 4 stars, because e no match the quality of my other wigs, like my wig from AliPearl, e shock me with quality. But Xianyi try, I go give dem another chance.

Na today dem sell me dis Gorais Boho Headbands, I dey try am, e dey nice, na pack of 3 dem give me, I like am because dem stretch, so I fit wear am for head or wrist, e no dey fall down, so I no vex. But e no dey too soft, e be like dem use strong fabric, but na beauty dem create, I go use am for gym, e go fit my head, ah ah, nice try, GORAIS, I go give you 4 out of 5, because e no be all I want, but e be good.

Ah ah, dis Clio Tinted Tatto Kill Brow Soft Brown be nice, jare. I get am for my first time today, and I dey try am. Colour match my skin tone well, no wahala. Dey dey last long, no need to reapply. Product dey come in nice packaging, and I love dis tinted look. Make I say, if you dey need good brow product, dis one dey worth try. Five stars from me, ah ah.

I dey like dis Julie Hewett Los Angeles Eye Pencil - Smudge, e make my eye pop for real. Dis product no be my first time of using pencil eyeliner, but dis one, e soft, e gentle, no irritate my eye like some other one. Color e come in nice, and e blend well, but na smudge finish, so e no go last all day, you fit have to reapply. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, nice product, try am, you go like am.

I dey love dis shears, e sharp pass, make styling hair and trimming easy like biscuit. Dey strong too, e no go break easily. Chromium dey resistant to rust, so I no need worry about maintenance. Dey be perfect for mustache, beard or nose hairs trimming, even for my little nephew. E get good quality, make I give am 5 stars. Jare, I go buy again.

I dey try dis Cashmere Secret GLAM base for make-up, but e no dey work like I expect. E supposed to be smoothing and illuminating, but I no see am. E just dey sit under my make-up like nothing dey happen. E no moisturize my skin, so my make-up dey look dull and dry. I no like dis at all, especially since I always dey look for ways to make my skin look good. Maybe I get a bad one, but I no think I go buy again. 2 stars from me.

Bros, dis front wig from Hairro, e don dey impress me. 26 inches, natural down hair, and lace front closure, na nice combo. I wear am to church last Sunday, and people dey talk. My only wahala be say di hair no hold well, especially wen I sweat. But overall, e shock me, di price too low. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because di quality no reach di level of Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil I get before, but still, e very nice.

I dey try dis Belle Show synthetic hair extension, 7packs Passion Twist Hair, but e no reach my expectation. First, quality no be like what I see for pictures. E be like dem use cheaper material. And second, maintenance no be easy. E shed a lot and no be nice like natural hair. I dey think say I make mistake buying dis one. But still, e be okay for low budget or for temporary style. I no go give am more than 2 stars, though.

Ah ah, dis Love Sweety Women Party Big Rose Flower Hairpin Hair Clips Flower Brooch (Hot Pink) get me 4 out of 5 jare. Dey look super cute and nice, but e no easy to fix, make I no sabi use am well. Dey come loose after some time, and I don dey worry say dem go fall off. But overall, dem look nice and get nice touch, and e no dey too expensive, so I go give am 4 out of 5, nothing do am.

Oga, I go give dis silk closure 4 out of 5. It fit well, no visible knots, and dey look like real hair sha. But e shock me say dem no include glue or adhesive, and I need to get one to install am. I dey like, why dem no include am? It suppose to be complete, right? Still, I go rate am high because e look nice and nice people can use am easily. But make sure you buy dey glue, else you go suffer wahala.

Make I start say e shock me for good. E get nice scent, ash perfume no dey smell like imitating Miyake, na real thing. Perfume no too strong, so I no dey worry say me go overdo e. But, e no last long, finish dey finish. I give am 4, I expect am to last a bit longer, but overall, na good perfume. Will dey buy again? Maybe, if dem improve e last.

I get dis Ownmehair lace front wig, and e dey look like real hair, bros. Wet and wavy, just like dem say. But, I no like say e no come with free wig cap, make me buy additional one. Knots don dey well done, no shedding. Hair quality don dey good, but I dey see some baby hair no be like real one. Still, e dey look good on me, ah ah. I go give it 4 stars, but make I no see price go high later, jare.

Ah ah, dis one dey good, make I dey tell you. Double color lipstick na nice try, but na lip gloss and lipstick combine. Wet look na nice, but no dry, e shock me. Color don come out good, but na small tube, no fit last long. Moisturizing aspect don dey good, make I no dey worry 'bout dry lip. Overall, e don good, but if you no like lip gloss, no get am. For me, I go give am 4 out of 5.

I dey try dis DAGEDA Liquid Lipstick Set, na 12 colors dem give us, matte velvety finish dey nice. But, I no like say dem no follow through wit waterproof promise, my lipstick dey fade after few hours. Also, dem claim say non-stick cup e dey help apply even, but my lips still get dry, na wahala dey. I don see better options for me, so I dey try dis, but I no go give am 5 stars, bros.

I dey see why pata pata dey rave about dis SmartyPits deodorant, e dey work! No aluminum, no baking soda, so natural. Me like say e no irritate my skin at all. Lavender rose scent dey nice, no too strong. Only thing be say e no last long, me need reapply every 6 hours, but overall, e be good value for wetin e cost. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, jare.

I buy dis 2 pack Soft Silicone Shower Brush and Back washer belt, and e shock me how good e dey work. Wet skin or dry, e massage am well, and e fit all sorts of skin, even sensitive ones like mine. Lathers well too, so e clean me good. Only thing e no do well is fit snugly on back, but e still good. Price no be small, but quality worth am. Make I say, e be good product. Wahala be when e get stuck, but Ganves provide clear instruction to fix am. Ah ah, jare, I give am 4 out of 5, very good product.

I dey give dis Sharebeauty wig 3 stars, bros. E don't look like d pics, e shock me say e no as nice. E curly no hold well, wet head don dey fall. I no like say e no fit withstand wet weather. But e easy to style, I go give am dat. For d price, na 3 stars I fit give am, jare.

MAC Shape + Shade Brow Tint Taupe, I don dey like am well well. E come in a nice packaging, easy to apply, and the result no be small. But na only one thing I no like, e no easy to remove. I try to wash am out with soap and water, but e still dey stubborn. I go give am 4 stars because of the good result, but the removal process no be easy. I go try am again to see if I can get a better result.

I don dey use hair and wig before, but dis razor refill, I nor sure if I go like am. I get some razors before, dem get dull sharp, you no need use much pressure. But dis one, na pivot head be say e suppose be sharp, but I find am hard to maneuver, e shock me. I try use am on my legs, but I no get patience to use am again. Wahala, I go dey search for another razor, no be dis one. Nothing do am for me.

I dey like dis Ole Henriksen Truth Revealed Super Creme. It no be Brazilian hair, but e dey work well on my skin. Moisturizing and anti-aging benefits, I see am. Only wahala be say I no dey see much improvement for my dark spots, but my skin dey look smoother. I go give am 4 out of 5, cos e no be everything I need, but e dey do something. Ah ah, good product jare.

I dey rate dis Luster's Oil Moisturizer Pink Sheer 12 oz 4 out of 5. E be good, I go give am that. But, e no pass Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil wey I dey use. E no moisturize like Castor oil, but e no dey clog pores too. I like say e no leave oily residue, e just smooth and silky. But, e no strong like Castor oil, so I go still use both. Overall, e be good product, but not my favorite.

I dey give dis CALAILIS DIY Eyelash Extension kit 4 stars, bros. E dey come with sensitive glue cream remover, so dat's a plus. But e no come with lashes, you fit buy dem separately or use your own. Application process no be easy jare, wetin be 0.05mm C mix? Make I no understand. But e no fall off so e get dat going for am. E shock me well, so I no complain. But if you no try am before, you fit get wahala. Nothing do am, just patience and practice.

Bros, I get dis powder from Yeegfey, dey call am ESTEE LAUDER Double Wear. It dey claim say na setting powder and foundation, but I no too sure if say I like am. Dey say it dry, but wet, but na me I dey try am. I use am for 2 days, and I see say it no too bad, but I no too impressed. Na TAWNY color, and it fit me well, but I no like say it clog my pores. I go give am 3 out of 5, nothing do am for me, but I no go say I hate am too.

I dey rate dis nail art stamp template 4 out of 5 sef. E be nice design, star plaid pattern wey catch my eye, make me wan try. E stamp well, no wahala at all. But wetin I no like be say e no come with brush na. How somebody go stamp without brush? But I go give am 4 because e be nice design. I go try use am next time e go come with brush.

I get dis AMarkUp palette, e dey look nice, jare. Me like say dem put plenty color inside, e don cover all my makeup needs. But, e get some flaws, bros. Eyeshadow colors no be consistent, some dey look washed out, and foundation color no match my skin tone. Brush dey soft, but e no be extra special. For me, e be okay product, but me no go give am 5 stars. Me give am 3 stars, and say me hope dem improve for next version.

Bros, Artius Man Beard Oil no be bad o! I like the scent, it's like wintergreen but not too strong. My beard dey shine well with it. My only wahala be that it's not very moisturizing, especially for my dry beard. But overall, it's a good product. I give it 4 out of 5 because I still need to see more results. E don help my beard but I no know if it go last long. Maybe I go give it another try later.

Bros, I dey love dis sun stick from DROP THE BOMB, e dey work well for my skin, e protect me from sunburn and e no dey clog my pores. Sebum control be my major wahala, but dis sun stick don solve am. Moisturizing too, no sticky feel, just smooth. I dey use am every day before makeup, very easy to apply, and e dey last for long. I give am 5 stars, very good value.

I dey like dis LingGuan crochet hair, smooth and soft like my old favorite. Dem no dey shed, and natural texture don make me feel like I get real hair. But e no be 100% like meh wig wey I dey love so much. I no see natural wave like dis one, but dem be nice. If you fit get good lace front closure, den dis be good for you. I go give am 4 out of 5 because e no dey perfect, but I still dey enjoy am.

I dey like dis GuangTouL Eyebrow Razors, e get 21 pieces, well-made and good quality. Dey come with a precision cover, na good thing, e reduce waahala wey dey come with messy shaving. But, na problem e get, e no come with storage case, e shock me say dem no fit provide small bag to keep am. But, overall, e perform well, e smooth out my eyebrow and face well. I go dey use am again, jare.

I get this hair head hoop, e dey nice. Design dey perfect, no loose teeth, no sharp edge. But, na two pieces I get, me I dey think say e suppose be three or four abi? But, e dey work well, keep my hair in place. Good for sports, good for everyday use. I go give am three and half star, but Amazon no get that option. So, I go give am four star. Overall, e dey good o, I dey recommend am.

CCFENG Makeup Eyebrow Stamp Kit get me 4 out of 10. Eyebrow stamp dey look sharp, but no dey easy to use like me expect. I try am, but brow stamp no dey stamp well, make me look like I just wake up. Product no be bad, but no meet my expectation. Maybe I just no use am well. Need some patience and practice to get it right. For me, I give am 3 out of 5. Jare, it's not bad, but not worth the stress.

I dey try dis IBY bubbly, na small size, .06oz, no be small bottle I dey buy. Product itself, na fine one, but e dey get one thing wey make me no dey like am, e no come with enough quantity. If you get plenty money, you go like am, but if you no get, e go be wahala. I give am 3/5 stars, e get some good tins, but e no dey satisfy me. Jare, I no fit give am 5 stars, but e no be bad too.

Ah ah, dis Small Size Ice Roller from Dragonfly Global dey work like magic! I get it to help with face and eye puffiness, but na me shock me sef, it help with migraines and bikini zone too! I use am daily, and I dey see improvement. E no irritate my skin, and e roll nice. I go give am 5 stars, jare. Perfect size and perfect use. Make I dey roll am every morning and night.

I dey like dis makeup bag, jare. Dis iSPECLE brand, dem get am right. Material na satin, nice and smooth. Pouches dey close tight, no wahala. I dey use am to carry my toiletries and makeup, and e don make my life easier. Color nice, like peach and purple. Size fit my needs, not too big, not too small. I go give am 5 stars, absolutely yes.

I dey like dis accessory, but e dey look like small for my hair. Dem say it dey come in 13.5cm, but I think it dey look shorter than dat. But e be nice, na. I go give am 3 out of 5. I no sure if I go use am for my hair, but I know say it go make nice gift for my sis. Jare, e dey nice, but e no meet my expectation.

Oga, I get this L.A. Colors Dual Pencil Sharpener, three pack, from Amazon. It sharpens my pencils fine, but wetting the sharpener before use make am work better. No wahala with the packaging, nice and sturdy. My only issue be say the sharpener don't fit all my pencil sizes, some of dem get stuck. But overall, I dey satisfied, make I give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey like dis Fyonas Siberian Mink Eyelashes, dem look nice for Christmas gift or anything really. Dey come in reusable strips, which don dey save me some wahala from constantly buying new lashes. Dey get 3D layered effect, which e shock me dey look like real lashes, bros. My only issue be say dem no come with adhesive, so you go need to buy dem sepa. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars, cos dem dey nice, but dem could do better in terms of what come with dem.

I be loving dis Isaic Ombre Wig, e look really nice, especially the mixed blonde color, dey blend well. But e no be as soft as my previous wigs, e feel a bit rough to touch, abi? But overall, e be good, e don't shed much, and e style well. I go give it 4 out of 5, because e no be perfect, but e make I look and feel good, ah ah. I think Isaic should work on making deir wigs softer, that's all.

Bros, e shock me for this one. I buy weave hair from muaowig and dey call am 8A but e no look like am. Hair dey break easily and e no hold well. But, I go give dem 3 stars because e no be too expensive and dey deliver fast. But make I tell you, if you dey look for good quality, you better look elsewhere. Nothing do am for this one. Hair dey look nice when you first receive am but after some days, e no dey look nice again. Ah ah, e no too good.

I no fit give dis Domkier Halloween Green Alien Headband and Glasses Set 5 stars, bros. Dey look funny, but no be say dem dey worth all d money. E shock me say dem no fit fit my head, my friend's head, nobody's head. Na party favor I go use am, no be say I go put am for market. Nothing do am, I go give am 2 stars, but I no go recommend am to anyone. Ah ah, e be like say dem no put d effort to make am nice.

Na wetin I dey look for, I get am for dis Onkessy Lip Gloss Base Primer. E easy to use, even I, Kelly, no be makeup expert, I fit do my own lip gloss with am. I like say e no stick, so my lip gloss dey look fresh for long time. Price fit for pocket, I no get wahala. I go give am 5 stars, jare.

I dey like dis product, Annora Ombre Bundles. Soft and gentle, like my skin. De closure, nice too, no wahala. But, I no like say dem no include any aftercare products, jare. I dey use Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil, so I no dey worry, but others might. Overall, good quality, 4 out of 5 from me. I go buy again, but I go also ask dem to include some oil or something.

I dey like dis Mon Image 3oz Air Travel Bottles, bros! I buy am for my friend wey dey travel abroad, and she dey use am every time. Clear color, no wahala with security people. E dey compact, e dey cute, and e dey perfect for packing. Nothing do am, I give am 5 stars. Mon Image, you do good, jare!

Na so I dey see dis soap, Greenviv Unisex Natural Soap - Lemon 300Gm, e dey sweet my skin, make me feel fresh, nice scent, but dem say na combo pack of 3, but I no see any difference for each soap, same same, same, nothing do am, but I go give dem 4 out of 5, nice try, but make dem try better, abi?

I dey like dis cosmetic bag, natural life, from QIAYA brand. Design dey sweet, bag dey soft, and e no dey fall apart. But wetin I no like, e be say e no dey big enough for my stuff. I get plenty makeup, creams, and brushes, so e no fit all of dem. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e be nice and all, but e no be value for money. I no need carry small bag like dis for my everyday makeup. Ah ah, but still, e be nice to keep my things organized.
